Genesis1:2 tualai in leitung sia lim le meal nei ngawlin awngthong hi. Na theampo a tuam tuipi kihual sia khuazing in siin bikbek a

Genesis1:7

Genesis1:10 Ama in leitang sia “Leitung” ci a

Genesis2:1 Tuabangin vaannuai buppi sia kikhuangkhim hi.
Genesis2:2 A ni sali ni ciangin Pathian in a nasep teng man siat a
Genesis2:3 Tua ni in ama in a bitphua nasep a khuangkhim a
Genesis2:4 Tuaciang vaannuai bitphuana sia tuabang teng ahi hi. Topa Pathian in vaannuai bup a vawt lai in
Genesis2:5 leitung ah thingkung lopate om ngawl a
Genesis2:6 ahizong leinuai pan tui pusuakin
Genesis2:7 Tuasia ciang Topa Pathian in lei pan leivui pawlkhat la in tuasia taw mihingpa khat vawt hi; ama in a naak sungah nuntakna a piangsak hu mopin tua mihingpa hong nungta hi.
Genesis2:8 Tua zawkciang Topa Pathian in nisuana sang Eden ah huan khat vawt a
Genesis2:9 Ama in a et hoi thingkung namcin tua munah posak in

Genesis9:11 Note taw ka vawt thuciamna sia hi kammalte hi: nuntakna nei a minpiang peuma tuipi liimna taw ka mon kik ngei buatu a; tuipi liimin leitung ka lalsak kik ngei buatu hi

Exodus12:1 Egypt ngam sungah Topa in Moses le Aaron tung a cina ah:
Exodus12:2 “Tu tha sia note atu in kum kipat tha hi tu hi.
Exodus12:3 Israel mi bup tungah hi bang kihilna te son tu ni hi: Tu tha ni sawm ni in pasal sim in tuuno khat ahibuale kealno khat a innkuan atu in teal nanak tu hi.
Exodus12:4 Nganno pum bup khat a ne tu in a innkuan a tawm leih le
Exodus12:5 Nganno sia kum khat a pha
Exodus12:6 Tuaciang tua tha ni sawm le ni li nitak ciang Israel mi bup in tua ngante ngo tu uh hi.
Exodus12:7 Mipite in a chisan pawlkhat la in
Exodus12:8 Tua zanin a sa na em tu uh a
Exodus12:9 A sate a sial ahizong tuihuan ahizong na ne buatu uh a
Exodus12:10 Zingsang dongin neakmong peuma na omsak buatu uh hi; neakmong a om le na hal kul tu hi.
Exodus12:11 Hi ante manlang takin na ne tu uh hi
Exodus12:12 “Tua zanin Egypt ngamsung tengah ka pai tu a
Exodus12:13 Kongkha khuamte tungah chisan a kinoai teng noma teenna inn teptee natu lim ahi hi. Chisan ka mu ciang note kong kaantan tu a
Exodus12:14 Keima Topa in bang vawt khi ziam ci na phaw natu in hi ni sia biaknapoai khatin vawt tu nu hi. Mailam hun theampo ah tua poai vawt suak tavun
Exodus12:15 Topa in
Exodus12:16 Ni masa ni le ni sali ni in biak kikhopna nei tu nu hi. Tua ni nii sung
Exodus12:17 Hi poai bosak ngawl tu nu hi
Exodus12:18 Tha masabel ni sawm le ni li nitak pan ni kul le ni khat nitak sang dong tol kisaw anluum ne ngawl tu nu hi.
Exodus12:19 Ni sali sung tol peuma na inn sungah koi ngawl tu nu hi
Exodus12:20 
Exodus12:21 Moses in Israel lampui teng samin amate tungah
Exodus12:22 Hyssop sip khat la vun a
Exodus12:23 Egypt te a that tu in Egypt ngamsung teng ah Topa a pai ciang
Exodus12:24 Hi zui tu ngeinate nangma le na tate in a tawntung zui tu nu hi.
Exodus12:25 Topa ii kamciam hong piakna ngam ah na tum uh ciang hi a zeksa ngeina sia seam hamtang tu nu hi.
Exodus12:26 Na tate in
Exodus12:27 ‘ Topa tungah zatakna in ih piak Paisan Poai sangaw biakpiakna hi
Exodus12:28 Tua zawkciang Topa ii Moses le Aaron tungah a thupiak bangin amate pai in seam uh hi.
Exodus12:29 Zankim laitak Topa in Egypt ngamsung tapaciil theampo
Exodus12:30 Tua zanin kumpipa
Exodus12:31 Tua zan ma in kumpipa in Moses le Aaron samsak in
Exodus12:32 Na tuu
Exodus12:33 Egypt te in a ngam manlang tak a nusiat natu in tua mite sawl a; “Na pai bua uh ahile ka thi siat tu uh hi
Exodus12:34 Tua ahiciang Israel te in tol saw ngawl anvuite anluum emna bealpeute sungah heangin
Exodus12:35 Moses ii a ci bangin Israel te in Egypt te tungah khamh le ngunn kizepna
Exodus12:36 Topa in Israel te sia Egypt te in zaktasak ahikom Israel te nget bangin pia uh hi. Tuabangin Egypt te hauna teng Israel te in paipui uh hi.
Exodus12:37 Israel te a peangin pai a
Exodus12:38 Midang tam mama le tuu
Exodus12:39 Amate in Egypt pan a ken tol saw ngawl anluum em uh hi
Exodus12:40 Israel te Egypt ah kum 430 sung teang hi.
Exodus12:41 Kum 430 a bo ni in Topa mite ii minam theampo in Egypt nusia uh hi.
Exodus12:42 Tua zan sia amate Egypt pan pusua pui tu in Topa ii kep ni zan hi a; tua zan sia ma Israel te ii mailam hun theampo ah a kepcing nanak tu zan khat in Topa tungah aap uh hi.
Exodus12:43 Topa in Moses le Aaron tungah
Exodus12:44 ahizong na leisa sila pawpo a vunteap atsak masa po le uhte ne thei tu hi.
Exodus12:45 A peam pak khat
Exodus12:46 An theampo a kihuanna inn sung bek ah kine tu a; a pua ah kipusua pui ngawl het tu hi. Tuaciang tua nganno ii ngute khat zongh thiaktan heak vun.
Exodus12:47 Israel mi bup in hi poai vawt tu a
Exodus12:48 ahizong vunteap at ngawl sia in ne thei ngawl tu hi. Note sungah hong teang ngamdangmi khat in Topa zatakna Paisan Poai a vawt nuam le amate innkuan sung pan pa peuma vunteap atsak masa tu nu hi. Tuasia ciang Israel mi tualsuak khat taw a kibangin poai sungah kihel thei tu hi.
Exodus12:49 Hi zui tu ngeinate sia ma

Exodus13:6 Ni sali sung tol saw ngawl anluum na ne tu uh a
Exodus13:7 Ni sali sung tol kisaw anluum peuma na ne buatu uh a
Exodus13:8 Tua poai na vawt uh ciang na tapate tungah Topa in Egypt pan note hong paipui ahi hu in hi bangin poai kivawt hi
Exodus13:9 Hi ngeina poai vawtna in na khut ah ahibuale na tal tungah na khat a kikhit bangin
Exodus13:10 Kum sim a ciangtan hun a tun simin poai vawt tu nu hi.
Exodus13:11 “ Topa in na taanghpupite tungah a kamciamsa Canaan ngam ah note hong paipui tu hi. Tua ngam note tungah hong piak ciang
Exodus13:12 tapaciil theampo Topa tungah pia nanak tu nu hi. Na ngannote a pa suakciil theampo Topa neisa hi a
Exodus13:13 ahizong ama tung pan laa pa a suakciil theampo sia tua taang in tuuno khat piakna taw tan kik tu nu hi. Tua laa na tan kik nuam bua ahile a ngawng thiaktan in. Na tapaciil peuma tan kik tu nu hi.

Exodus13:15 Egypt kumpipa a thinsakin eite hong paisak nop ngawl ciang Topa in Egypt ngamsung tapaciil theampo le nganhing suakciil a pa theampo thatlum siat hi. Tua ahi hu in tapaciil le nganhing suakciil a pa theampo Topa tungah sangaw biakna in kipia a
Exodus13:16 Hi bang ngeina poai vawtna sia nung thu hong phawksak kik tu in ih khut tungah ahibuale ih tal tungah tepteena a kikhit bang hi tu hi; tua in Egypt pan Topa in a vaangletna taw hong pusuapuina thu hong phawksak tu hi
Exodus13:17 Egypt kumpipa in Israel te a paisak lai in
Exodus13:18 Tua lampi taangin ama in sennealngam kiimkot a

Exodus13:20 Sukkoth nusia in Israel te dingin
Exodus13:21 Amate sun ahizong
Exodus13:22 Israel te mai ah sun hunin meeikaai khuam le zan hunin meitaang khuam om tawntung hi.

Exodus24:17

Exodus25:1 Topa in Moses tungah
Exodus25:2 “Kei tungah sumpi hong piak natu in Israel te son in. A pia nuam khat pawpo ii sumpite saang in.
Exodus25:3 Hi sumpite sia: khamh
Exodus25:4 puanneal
Exodus25:5 a san a kinimh tuuvun
Exodus25:6 meidet sathau
Exodus25:7 Thiampi Lianbel ii ephod tung le awmdal te tungah bul tu suangsante le suangmanpha dangte ahi hi.
Exodus25:8 Amate sungah ka teen thei natu in
Exodus25:9 Tuasia le a sung nazak tu te theampo kong lak tu ngealna bangin vawt tahen.
Exodus25:10 “Acacia thing taw thingkuang a sau centimetre 110
Exodus25:11 A sung a pua khamh ciitak taw tuam in a
Exodus25:12 A zawn natu khamh kual li vawt in a
Exodus25:13 A zawn natu in acacia thingpum sui in a
Exodus25:14 thingkuang pangh veve ah a kibul khamh kualte sungah thun in.
Exodus25:15 Tua thingpumte khamh kualte sungah kinusia tu a
Exodus25:16 Tuaciang nang kong piak tu thupiak teng a ki at suangpheak niite thingkuang sungah koi in.
Exodus25:17 “A sitna khamh ciitak taw vawt in
Exodus25:18 A kiseakpeak khamh taw cherub nii ii lim vawt in a
Exodus25:19 a sitna mong veve ah koi in. A sitna taw kipee
Exodus25:20 Cherub niite ii lim sia a sitna tungah khat le khat kimaingat tu a
Exodus25:21 Suangpheakte nii thingkuang sungah koi in a tungah a sitna koi in.
Exodus25:22 Tualai ah kong kisikpui tu a
Exodus25:23 “Acacia thing taw a sau centimetre 88
Exodus25:24 khamh ciitak taw tuamin
Exodus25:25 A kiil kiimkot millimetre 75 zaisakin
Exodus25:26 Khamkual li vawt in a
Exodus25:27 Tua khamh kualte sabuai zawn natu thingpumte thun natu hi a
Exodus25:28 A thingpumte acacia thing taw vawt in a
Exodus25:29 Sapittui biakpiakna ah a kizangh tu pakante
Exodus25:30 Sabuai sia Thuciamna Thingkuang mai ah kikoi tu a
Exodus25:31 “Khamh ciitak taw meivakna khuam vawt in. A tawdap le a khuamte a kiseakpeak khamh taw vawt in; a zepna paakte
Exodus25:32 A khuam panghte pan baak luk kaasak tu a
Exodus25:33 A baak luk te khat simin almond paak bangin a mom le a palh taw a kithua paak nam thum nei tu hi.
Exodus25:34 A meikhuam sia almond paak bangin a mom le a paakpalh taw a kithua kizepna paak pha nam li nei tu hi.
Exodus25:35 Kop thum a pha a baakte sim ii nuai ah a mom khat tek om tu hi.
Exodus25:36 A momte
Exodus25:37 A mai sang a taan thei natu in tua meivak khuam tungah meivak sali de in.
Exodus25:38 Taiteete le kuangdalte khamh ciitak taw vawt in.
Exodus25:39 Hi meikhuam le a nadang teng vawt natu in khamh ciitak kilogramme 35 zangh in.
Exodus25:40 Mual tungah kong lak ngealna sia bang tatak in
Exodus26:1 “Kong ompuina Puanbuk
Exodus26:2 Tua puante a letna kikim tu a
Exodus26:3 Tua puan ngate khatin khuikhawmin
Exodus26:4 Na puan pee khop khat simin a puasang puanbek ii mong tung teng ah vancii puan kualte vawt in.
Exodus26:5 A puan masa sia tungah kual sawmnga koi in a
Exodus26:6 Tua puante nii sia puan khai khat in na pe thei natu khamh taw kivawt a khilna koaite sawmnga vawt in.
Exodus26:7 “Puanbuk ii a tung sit natu in kealmul taw kivawt puanbek sawm le khat vawt in.
Exodus26:8 Tua teng a letna kibangsak in
Exodus26:9 Tua puanbek nga teng khatin khui khawm in a
Exodus26:10 Na khuikhop puankhai khat ii puanbek khakbel sia ii mong tungah a kual sawmnga vawt in a
Exodus26:11 Puante kipee khop natu in taaukoai sawmnga vawt in a
Exodus26:12 Puanbuk nungsangah tua puanbek vaal ii a lang sia kaaisuksak in.
Exodus26:13 Tua puankhai sia a sau lamin a mong vaal centimetre sawmnga veve sia Puanbuk pangh tek ah kaaisuksak in.
Exodus26:14 “Puanbuk sit natu a sanin a kinimh tuutal vun taw kivawt a sitna khat le savun neal taw kivawt a sitna dangkhat te ngeal vawt lai in.
Exodus26:15 “Acacia thing taw Puanbuk a kalpheak dingtangte vawt in.

Exodus26:17 a kipee thei natu in a meang nii vawt in. A kalpheak theampo tuabangin vawt siat in.
Exodus26:18 Thang sang atu a kalpheak kul
Exodus26:19 a nuai phaa tu ngunn taw kivawt tawdap sawmli vawt in a
Exodus26:20 Puanbuk saksang atu a kalpheak kul
Exodus26:21 a kalpheak khat ciang tawdap nii veu
Exodus26:22 Nitumna sang Puanbuk nungsangah a kalpheak luk

Exodus26:25 Tuabangin a kalpheakte liat om tu a
Exodus26:26 “Acacia thingzawl sawm le nga vawt in
Exodus26:27 a langkhat ah a kalpheak nga le a nungsang nitumna sang khakbel ah a kalpheak nga vawt in.

Exodus26:29 A kalpheakte khamh taw tuamin
Exodus26:30 Mual tungah kong lak ngealna sa om bangin Puanbuk sa in.

Exodus40:27 Topa thupiak bangin ngimnamtui hal hi.
Exodus40:28 Ama in Puanbuk kongbiang ah puankhai khak a
Exodus40:29 tua mun puankhai mai ah meihal biakpiak natu in biaknatau koi hi. Topa thupiak bangin tua biaknatau tungah ama in sangawna taw meihal biakpiakna le antang taw biakpiakna te seam hi.
Exodus40:30 Ama in Puanbuk le biaknatau kilaklaw ah kisilna kuang koi in tui dim hi.
Exodus40:31 Moses
Exodus40:32 Topa thupiak bangin
Exodus40:33 Moses in Puanbuk le biaknatau kiimkot teng uumin a doituam kongbiang ah puankhai khai hi. Tuabangin ama in nasep theampo man zo hi.
Exodus40:34 Tuasia ciang meei in Puanbuk tuam a Topa ii ompuina khuavak taang velvol sia in tua puanbuk dim hi.
Exodus40:35 Hi bang ahi hu in Puanbuk sungah Moses tum thei ngawl hi.
Exodus40:36 Puanbuk pan meei a kilapto ciang bekin Israel te in a ngiaphual mun dangah khiin uh hi.
Exodus40:37 Tualai ah meei a kaai laiteng a ngiaphual khiin ngawl uh hi.
Exodus40:38 Duisung ah a vathap sung tawntungin amate in Topa ii ompuina ahi
Leviticus1:1 Topa ompuina Puanbuk sung pan Topa in Moses sam a
Leviticus1:2 Israel te ii biakpiakna a nei ciang a zui tu in a nuai a ngeinate pia hi. Mihing khat pawpo in nganhing taw biakpiakna a nei ciang
Leviticus1:3 A khuihonte sung pan khat taw meihal biakpiakna a pia ahile
Leviticus1:4 Ama in khuital lu tungah a khut nga tu a
Leviticus1:5 Tualai ah ama in tua khuital ngo tu a
Leviticus1:6 Tua zawkciang ama in a vun hoai in a sa sem tu a
Leviticus1:7 thiampite in biaknatau tungah thing seng in mei taw tu hi.
Leviticus1:8 Amate in a kisemsa sabak teng
Leviticus1:9 Ama in a sungkua le a nungpeangte nii
Leviticus1:10 Mihing khat in a tuu ahibuale a kealte sung pan khat taw biakpiakna a nei le
Leviticus1:11 Ama in biaknatau saksang ah tuasia ngo tu a
Leviticus1:12 A sa a sem zawkciang thiampipa in a sa teng mei tungah koi tu a
Leviticus1:13 Ama in a sungkua le a nungpeangte nii sil tu a
Leviticus1:14 Mi khat in vacim khat taw meihal biakpiakna a pia le
Leviticus1:15 Thiampipa in tua biakpiakna sia biaknatau ah paipui tu a
Leviticus1:16 A longtawl le a tawl sungah a om teng la tu a
Leviticus1:17 Ama in a thate nii pan len tu a
Leviticus2:1 Mihing khat pawpo in antang taw Topa biakpiakna a nei ciang
Leviticus2:2 Aaron suan thiampite kungah paipui tu hi. Thiampipa in anvui khutdim khat
Leviticus2:3 A taanglai antang teng thiampite neisa hi a
Leviticus2:4 A kipia anluum sia
Leviticus2:5 A kipia anluum sia moh emna taw minsak ahile
Leviticus2:6 Biakpiakna in na nei ciang
Leviticus2:7 Beal baannei taw a kihuan anluum a kipia ahile
Leviticus2:8 Hi an sia Topa tungah biakpiakna khat in paipui a
Leviticus2:9 A vekpi in Topa tungah a kipia a hina thu limlakna in thiampipa in tawm la a
Leviticus2:10 A taanglai biakpiaknate thiampite neisa hi a; Topa a kipia an sung pan a kila ahikom
Leviticus2:11 Topa a kipia antang taw biakpiaknate tol kisaw ngawl tu a; Topa tungah na piak an sungah khuaitui ahibuale tol na zangh ngei buatu hi.
Leviticus2:12 Anpal taw biakpiakna khat kum simin na paipui tu uh a
Leviticus2:13 Antang taw biakpiakna theampo ah ci saw vun
Leviticus2:14 Anpal taw Topa tungah biakpiakna na nei uh ciang
Leviticus2:15 Tua tungah olive thau helin ngimnamtui na buak tu uh hi.
Leviticus2:16 Topa tungah an taw biakpiakna a hina
Leviticus3:1 Mihing khat pawpo in kipawlkhop biakpiakna in a khuite khat a piak ciang a mealhem ngawl a tal ahibuale a nu hi tu hi.
Leviticus3:2 Ama in tua nganhing lu tungah a khut nga tu a
Leviticus3:3 a nuai a sa teng Topa tungah an taw biakpiakna in pia tu hi: a sungthau theampo
Leviticus3:4 a nautate le a nauta tuam a thau teng le a thinsa phabel teng pia tu hi.
Leviticus3:5 Thiampite in hi teng theampo meihal biakpiaknate taw biaknatau tungah hal khawm tu hi. Hi an taw biakpiakna ii ngimnam in Topa lungkimsak hi.
Leviticus3:6 Kipawlkhop biakpiakna khat ah tuu ahibuale keal a kizangh le; anu zongh apa zongh hi thei a
Leviticus3:7 Mihing khat in tuu taw a bia le
Leviticus3:8 tuu lu tungah a khut nga tu a
Leviticus3:9 a nuai a
Leviticus3:10 a nauta le a nauta tuam a thau teng le a thinsa phabel teng pia tu hi.
Leviticus3:11 Topa tungah an taw biakpiakna khat ahi bangma vaipuak nei thiampipa in biaknatau tungah hal siat tu hi.
Leviticus3:12 Mihing khat in keal a pia le
Leviticus3:13 a keal lu tungah a khut nga tu a
Leviticus3:14 a nuai a sa teng Topa tungah an taw biakpiakna in pia tu hi: a sungthau theampo
Leviticus3:15 a nauta le a nauta tuam a thau teng
Leviticus3:16 Topa a lungkimsak an taw biakpiakna ahi bangma
Leviticus3:17 Israel te in a thau ahizong
Leviticus4:1 Topa in Moses tungah
Leviticus4:2 a maw a khial mihing khat in tupkhol ngawlin Topa thupiakte khat pawpo a paltan ciang
Leviticus4:3 A maw a khial sia Thiampi Lianbelpa hi a
Leviticus4:4 Ama in Puanbuk kongbiang ah khuital paipui tu a
Leviticus4:5 Tuaciang Thiampi Lianbelpa in khuital chi pawlkhat la in
Leviticus4:6 Ama in a khutme
Leviticus4:7 Tuaciang ama in chi pawlkhat
Leviticus4:8 Hi khuital tung pan a thau teng theampo
Leviticus4:9 a nauta le a nauta tuam a thaute
Leviticus4:10 Thiampipa in tua a thau teng la tu a
Leviticus4:11 Ahizong ama in a vun
Leviticus4:12 ngiaphual puasang ah paipui in vut buakna
Leviticus4:13 Tupkhol ngawlin Israel taangpi bup in Topa thupiakte khat paltan in a maw a khial in ahile
Leviticus4:14 a maw a khial a kiheak po ciang taangpi taangta in khuital khat taw mawphel biakpiakna nei tu hi. Amate in Topa ompuina Puanbuk ah paipui tu a
Leviticus4:15 taangpi lampuite in a khui lu tungah a khutte nga in
Leviticus4:16 Thiampi Lianbelpa in khuital chi tawm Puanbuk sungah paipui tu a tua ii sungah
Leviticus4:17 a khutme papin puankhai mai ah salivei the tu hi.
Leviticus4:18 Ama in Puanbuk sung ngimnamtui biaknatau king
Leviticus4:19 Tua zawkciang ama in a thau teng la in biaknatau tungah hal tu hi.
Leviticus4:20 Ama in mawphel biakpiakna in a kizangh khuital sia taw a vawt bangma in hi khuital zongh taw a kibangin vawt tu a
Leviticus4:21 Tua zawkciang ama in tua khuital ngiaphual pua sangah paipui in
Leviticus4:22 Ngam uk khat in tupkhol ngawlin Topa thupiakte paltan in mawna a vawt le
Leviticus4:23 a mawna a heak po ciang
Leviticus4:24 Ama in kealtal lu tungah a khut nga tu a
Leviticus4:25 Thiampipa in a chi sungah a khutme pap tu a
Leviticus4:26 Tua zawkciang ama in kipawlkhop biakpiakna in a kingo nganhing thaute kihal bangma in
Leviticus4:27 Tupkhol ngawlin nautaang mi khat in Topa thupiakte paltan in
Leviticus4:28 a mawna a heak po ciang a mealhem ngawl kealnu khat taw biakpiakna nei tu hi.
Leviticus4:29 Ama in keallu tungah a khut nga tu a
Leviticus4:30 Nganhing chi sungah thiampipa in a khutme pap tu a
Leviticus4:31 Tua zawkciang ama in kipawlkhop biakpiak natu in a kingo nganthaute laak bangin a thau teng la tu a
Leviticus4:32 Mihing khat in mawphel biakpiakna in tuu khat hong paipui le
Leviticus4:33 Ama in tuu lu tungah a khut nga tu a
Leviticus4:34 Thiampipa in a chi sungah a khutme pap tu a
Leviticus4:35 Tua zawkciang ama in kipawlkhop biakpiak natu in a kingo tuu thau laak bangin a thau teng la tu a
Leviticus5:1 A nuai a thute ah mawphel biakpiaknate kisamh hi. Mihing khat sia thukhenzum ah tetti pang tu in kisam a
Leviticus5:2 Tup khol ngawlin
Leviticus5:3 Tup khol ngawlin mihing khat in mihing sung pan a piang a thiang ngawl na khat pawpo a thamtha ahile bang po ahizong ama in a vawt hunlam a heak po ciang a maw a khial hi tu hi.
Leviticus5:4 Kidawm ngawlin
Leviticus5:5 Mihing khat in a khial ciang a khialna pualaak nanak tu a
Leviticus5:6 mawna daan tu in Topa tungah tuu anu khat ahibuale keal anu khat pia tu hi. Tua pa mawmai natu in thiampipa in sangaw biakpiakna neisak tu hi.
Leviticus5:7 Mi khat in tuu ahibuale keal a pia zo buale
Leviticus5:8 Ama in tuate thiampipa kungah paipui tu a
Leviticus5:9 a chi pawlkhat biaknatau pangh the tu hi. A taanglai chi teng biaknatau bul ah sung tu hi. Hisia in mawphel biakpiakna khat ahi hi.
Leviticus5:10 Tua zawkciang a niina vacim taw ngeina om bangin meihal biakpiakna pia tu hi. Hi bangin thiampipa in tua pa mawmai natu sangaw biakpiakna vawtsak tu a
Leviticus5:11 Mi khat in ngam vakhu nii le inn vakhu nii a pia zo buale mawphel biakpiak natu in anvui kilogramme khat paipui tu hi. Antang taw biakpiakna hi ngawl a
Leviticus5:12 Ama in thiampipa kungah paipui tu a
Leviticus5:13 Hi bangin thiampipa in tua pa mawmai natu biakpiakna neisak tu a
Leviticus5:14 Topa in Moses tungah a nuai a zui tu ngeinate pia hi.
Leviticus5:15 Mihing khat pawpo in tup khol ngawlin Topa tungah biakna taw kisai a thiangtho nate pia ngawlin a khial le ama in khialphel biakpiakna in a mealhem ngawl tuutal ahibuale kealtal khat Topa tungah pia tu hi. A man sia a khensat ngeina om bang kikhensat tu hi.
Leviticus5:16 A piak ngawl vanh teng ama in pia kik tu a
Leviticus5:17 Mihing khat pawpo in tup khol ngawlin Topa thupiakte a paltan le
Leviticus5:18 A khialphel natu in a mealhem ngawl tuutal khat ahibuale kealtal khat thiampipa tungah paipui tu hi. A man sia a ngeina om bangin kikhensat tu hi. Thiampipa in tupkhol ngawlin a khialpa khialphel natu in sangaw biakpiakna neisak tu a
Leviticus5:19 Hisia ama ii Topa tungah a khialna hu a
Leviticus6:1 Topa in Moses tungah a nuai a ngeinate pia hi.
Leviticus6:2 Mihing khat tungah Israel a mipui khat in sum koi a
Leviticus6:3 a bo vanh khat mu napi leilot a mu bong ci in a kiciam ahile zong
Leviticus6:4 Hi bang khat pawpo taw mihing khat in a maw a khial ciang thumaan ngawlin a nga vanh pawpo pia kik hamtang tu hi. A khialna a kimu ni in
Leviticus6:5 
Leviticus6:6 Ama in Topa tungah ama ii khialphel biakpiak natu in a mealhem ngawl tuutal ahibuale kealtal khat thiampipa kungah paipui tu hi. A man sia khensat ngeina om bang hi tu hi.
Leviticus6:7 Tua pa mawmai natu in
Leviticus6:8 Topa in Moses tungah
Leviticus6:9 Aaron le a tapate ii meihal biakpiaknate a piak ciang a nuai a ngeinate a zui tu in thupia hi. Meihal biakpiakna sia zankhuateak biaknatau tungah kinusia tu a
Leviticus6:10 Tuaciang thiampipa in puanneal ngoaipuan tom le puanneal puantual sil a
Leviticus6:11 Tuaciang ama in a puan laih tu a
Leviticus6:12 Biaknatau ah mei kuang topsak tu a
Leviticus6:13 Biaknatau ah mei kuang topsak tu a
Leviticus6:14 A nuai a te sia antang biakpiakna ah zui tu ngeinate ahi hi. Aaron suan thiampipa in biaknatau mai Topa tungah antang biakpiakna pia tu hi.
Leviticus6:15 A vekpi in Topa tungah a kipia a hina thu heaksakna in ama in khutdim khat anvui le sathau
Leviticus6:16 A taanglai teng thiampite in ne tu hi. Tuate tol kisaw ngawl anluum in ki em tu a
Leviticus6:17 
Leviticus6:18 Maisang hun theampo atu in Aaron suan le paal peuma in Topa tungah a kipia ante amate nga bangin ne tan thei tu uh hi. Midang khat pawpo tua biakpiakna an a thutha sia
Leviticus6:19 Topa in Moses tungah
Leviticus6:20 Aaron suan thiampi khat thupha piak kipsak natu taw kisai ngeinate pia hi. Thupha piak kipsakna a nga ni in Topa tungah anvui kilogramme khat (ni sim antang biakpiakna za taw a kikim) zingsangin a lang
Leviticus6:21 Tuate sathau taw hel tu a
Leviticus6:22 Maisang hun theampo ah Aaron suan peuma Thiampi Lianbel a sep ciang hi biakpiakna vawt tu hi. Tua antang sia Topa tungah sangaw biakpiakna bangin kihal tum tu hi.
Leviticus6:23 Thiampipa ii a piak antang biakpiaknate tawm zongh kine thei ngawl hi; tua teng a kihal siat kul tu hi.
Leviticus6:24 Topa in Moses tungah Aaron le a tapate in
Leviticus6:25 a nuai a ngeinate mawphel biakpiakna a piak ciang a zui tu in thupia hi. Meihal biakpiak natu in sa a kingawna mun
Leviticus6:26 Sangaw biakpiakna a pia thiampipa in a piak nganhing sate
Leviticus6:27 Mihing khat pawpo ahibuale na khat pawpo in tua nganhing sa a thutha le tuasia ii thianthona vaang in ngim ngasak tu hi. Tua sachi puan khat po tungah a baang tha le tuasia mun thiangtho na ah sawp kul tu hi.
Leviticus6:28 Sa huanna leibeal khat pawpo sia kisutham tu a
Leviticus6:29 Thiampi innkuanpui pa pawpo in hi biakpiakna sa ne thei tu hi; tua biakpiakna sia thiangtho mama hi.
Leviticus6:30 Ahizong Puanbuk sungah sachi kipaipui in
Leviticus7:1 A nuai a te sia khialphel biakpiaknate atu zui tu ngeinate hi a
Leviticus7:2 Meihal biakpiak natu in nganhing kingawna mun
Leviticus7:3 A thau theampo la in biaknatau tungah kipia tu a
Leviticus7:4 a nauta le a tuam thau teng
Leviticus7:5 Topa tungah an taw biakpiakna bangin thiampipa in a thau theampo biaknatau tungah hal tu hi. Tua in khialphel biakpiakna khat ahi hi.
Leviticus7:6 Thiampi innkuanpui
Leviticus7:7 Mawphel biakpiakna le khialphel biakpiakna ah a kibangin zak tu ngeina khat om a
Leviticus7:8 Meihal biakpiakna in a kipia nganhing vun sia biakpiakna a pia thiampipa ii neisa ahi hi.
Leviticus7:9 Thik bealpeu sungah a ki em
Leviticus7:10 Ahizong a kihuan ngawl antang a kipia theampo
Leviticus7:11 A nuai a te Topa tungah a kipia kipawlkhop biakpiakna ah zui tu ngeinate ahi hi.
Leviticus7:12 Mihing khat in Pathian tungah lungdamko biakpiakna in hi biakpiakna a vawt le biakpiakna ah a zak tu nganhing taw in
Leviticus7:13 Tua dom ngawlin tol kisaw anluumte zongh pia tu hi.
Leviticus7:14 Ama in anluum nam simin khen khat tek a tuam vilvel in Topa tungah pia tu a; tuate nganhing chi la a
Leviticus7:15 Biakpiakna nganhing sa sia biakpiakna vawt ni in kine tu a; a zingsang ciang dong koi ngawl tu hi.
Leviticus7:16 Mihing khat in kamciam taangtut natu ahizong ama thinzaw biakpiakna taw ahizong a piak pawlkhop biakpiakna hong paipui le biakpiak ni in ne siat ngawl tu a
Leviticus7:17 A ni thum ni in sa taanglai pawpo kihal tu hi.
Leviticus7:18 A ni thum ni in a taanglai sa a kine le tua pa biakpiakna Pathian in saang ngawl tu hi. Tua biakpiakna sia ama atu in phattuamna om ngawl tu a
Leviticus7:19 Tua biakpiakna sa sia biakna taw kisai a thiang ngawl khat pawpo taw a kithutha le kine ngawlin a kihal kul tu hi. Biakna zeksa taw kisai in a thiang khat pawpo in tua sa ne thei tu hi
Leviticus7:20 ahizong a thiang ngawl khat pawpo in tua sa a ne le Pathian mi in kingaisun nawn ngawl tu hi.
Leviticus7:21 Mihing khat pawpo in mihing ahibuale nganhing tung pan biakna taw kisai in a thiang ngawl khat pawpo a tham zawkciang hi biakpiakna sa a ne le
Leviticus7:22 Topa in Moses tungah
Leviticus7:23 a nuai a
Leviticus7:24 Ama thu in a thi thawthong nganhing ahibuale ngamsa ii a mat nganhing sia ii thaute kine ngawl tu a
Leviticus7:25 Mihing khat pawpo in Topa tungah an taw biakpiakna in a kizangh thei nganhing thau a ne le
Leviticus7:26 Koisung po ah a teang zong Israel te in vacim chi le nganhing chi ne ngawl tu hi.
Leviticus7:27 Hi thukham a paltan pawpo Pathian ii mi khat in kingaisun nawn ngawl tu hi.
Leviticus7:28 Topa in Moses tungah
Leviticus7:29 a nuai a
Leviticus7:30 tua letsong sia an taw biakpiakna bangin ama khut vateak taw paipui tu hi. Ama in nganhing thau sia a awmsa taw paipui tu a
Leviticus7:31 Thiampipa in a thaute biaknatau ah hal tu a
Leviticus7:32 A ziatsang phei bup sia a tuam vilvel letsong in
Leviticus7:33 a chi le a thau taw in kipawlkhop biakpiakna a pia thiampipa tungah pia tu hi.
Leviticus7:34 A awmsa sia a tuam vilvel letsong hi a
Leviticus7:35 Hisia in Aaron le a tapate thiampi in a kikipsak ni a
Leviticus7:36 Tua ni in hi biakpiakna sung pan khen khat thiampite tungah piak tu in Israel mite tungah Topa in thupia hi. Hi sia in Israel mite ii mai sang hun theampo ah a zui tu ngeina khat ahi hi.
Leviticus7:37 Tua ahiciang
Leviticus7:38 Hite sia sennealngam Sinai Mual ah
Leviticus8:1 Topa in Moses tungah
Leviticus8:2 “Aaron le a tapate ka ompuina Puanbuk kongbiang ah paipui in
Leviticus8:3 Tua zawkciang tualai ah taangpi bup khawm in
Leviticus8:4 Topa thupiak bangin Moses in seam a
Leviticus8:5 amate tungah Moses in
Leviticus8:6 Moses in Aaron le a tapate mai sangah paipui a biakna zeksa om bangin
Leviticus8:7 Moses in Aaron laktong le puantual silhsak a
Leviticus8:8 Ama in awmdal thuasakin
Leviticus8:9 Topa thupiak bangin ama in a lu ah dial khimsak a
Leviticus8:10 Tua zawkciang Moses in noi sathau la in Topa ompuina Puanbuk tung le a sungah a om nazak theampo noai siat a
Leviticus8:11 Topa tungah tua teng aap natu in ama in sathau pawlkhat la in biaknatau tung
Leviticus8:12 Moses in Aaron lu tung sathau buakna taw Aaron sia thiampi a hina kipsak hi.
Leviticus8:13 Tua zawkciang Moses in Topa thupiak bangin Aaron tapate mai sangah paipui a
Leviticus8:14 Tua zawkciang Moses in mawphel biakpiak natu in khuital moi sia paipui a
Leviticus8:15 Tua biaknatau aap natu in Moses in tuasia ngo a
Leviticus8:16 Moses in a sungthau theampo
Leviticus8:17 Ama in a taanglai khuital sa teng
Leviticus8:18 Tuasia zawkciang Moses in meihal biakpiak natu in tuutal paipui a
Leviticus8:19 Moses in tua tuu ngo a
Leviticus8:20 Ama in Topa thupiak bangin tuusa sem a
Leviticus8:21 
Leviticus8:22 Tua zawkciang Moses in thiampite a kipsak natu in tuutal a niina sia paipui a
Leviticus8:23 Moses in tuutal ngo a
Leviticus8:24 Tuaciang ama in Aaron ii tapate mai ah paipui a
Leviticus8:25 Ama in a thau
Leviticus8:26 Tua zawkciang ama in Topa tungah a ki aap khum sung pan tol saw ngawl anluum khat
Leviticus8:27 Ama in Aaron le a tapate khut tungah hi an teng koi a
Leviticus8:28 Tuaciang Moses in amate tung pan tua an teng la in kipsakna biakpiakna in nei a
Leviticus8:29 Tuaciang Moses in a awmsa la in Topa tungah a tuam vilvel letsong in pia hi. Tua in kipsakna biakpiakna tuutal sa sung pan Moses ii satel ahi hi. Topa thupiak bangin Moses in seam siat hi.
Leviticus8:30 Moses in noi sathau tawm le biaknatau tungah a om sachi tawm la in
Leviticus8:31 Moses in Aaron le a tapate tungah
Leviticus8:32 A sa le anluum neakmongte hal vun.
Leviticus8:33 Kipsakna biakpiakna a zeksa teng a cin mateng ni sali sung Puanbuk kongbiang pan puapial ngawl tu nu hi.
Leviticus8:34 Na mawna uh a mai natu in Topa thupiak bangin tuni in ih vawt zo hi.
Leviticus8:35 Topa thupiak bangin seamin
Leviticus8:36 Topa ii Moses tungtawnin a thupiakte Aaron le a tapate in tuabangin vawt siat uh hi.
Leviticus9:1 Thiampi kipsakna a zeksa teng a man khuavak ni in Moses in Aaron le a tapate le Israel lampuite sam hi.
Leviticus9:2 Ama in Aaron tungah
Leviticus9:3 Tua zawkciang Israel mite tungah mawphel biakpiak natu in kealtal khat
Leviticus9:4 pawlkhop biakpiakna khat atu in khuital khat le tuutal khat a ken natu son in. Sathau taw a kihel antang taw biakpiakna taw in amate in Topa tungah sangaw biakpiakna pia tu uh hi. Amate in hi teng vawt nanak tu uh hi
Leviticus9:5 Moses thupiak bangin amate in Puanbuk mai ah na theampo paipui a
Leviticus9:6 Moses in
Leviticus9:7 Tua ahiciang ama in Aaron tungah
Leviticus9:8 Aaron in biaknatau ah pai a
Leviticus9:9 A tapate in sachi puak a
Leviticus9:10 Tua zawkciang Moses tungah Topa thupiak bangin Aaron in a thau
Leviticus9:11 Ahizong ama in a satak le a vun sia ngiaphual pua sangah hal hi.
Leviticus9:12 Ama ii aituam meihal biakpiakna in ama in ngan ngo hi. A tapate in sachi puakin tuasia biaknatau pangh li tengah the hi.
Leviticus9:13 Amate in a lu le a sabek dangte a khut sungah pia a
Leviticus9:14 Tua zawkciang ama in a sungkua teng le a nung peangte nii silin biaknatau tung
Leviticus9:15 Tua zawkciang ama in mipite atu biakpiaknate pia hi. Ama in ama mawphel biakpiakna a vawt bangin mipite mawmai natu in a kipia keal sia kai in ngo a
Leviticus9:16 Ama in meihal biakpiak natu in nganno zongh paipui a
Leviticus9:17 Ama in antang biakpiakna pia a
Leviticus9:18 Ama in mipite atu kipawlkhop biakpiakna in khuital le tuutal ngo hi. A tapate in sachi puak a
Leviticus9:19 Aaron in khuithau le tuutal thaute
Leviticus9:20 nganhingte ii awmsa tungah koi in biaknatau ah paipui siat hi. Ama in biaknatau tungah a thaute halin
Leviticus9:21 Moses thupiak bangin a awmsate le a nung peang ziatsangte thiampite atu in Topa tungah a tuam vilvel letsong in pia hi.
Leviticus9:22 Aaron in sangaw biakpiakna teng a man ciang mipite tungah a khutte laamin thupha pia a
Leviticus9:23 Topa ompuina Puanbuk sungah Moses le Aaron tum in
Leviticus9:24 Thakhat thu in Topa in meikuang puak a
Leviticus10:1 Aaron ii tapate Nadab le Abibu in amate mei lakna kuang tek la in a sungah meikam koi a
Leviticus10:2 Thakhat thu in Topa in mei puak a
Leviticus10:3 Tuasia ciang Moses in Aaron tungah
Leviticus10:4 Moses in Aaron pano
Leviticus10:5 Moses thupiak bangin amate in a luangte puan taw tunin ngiaphual pua sangah pusuapui uh hi.
Leviticus10:6 Tua zawkciang Moses in Aaron le a tapate Eleazar le Ithamar tungah
Leviticus10:7 Puanbuk kongbiang nusia heak vun
Leviticus10:8 Topa in Aaron tungah
Leviticus10:9 “Nangma le na tapate sapittui ahibuale beer na neak zawk uh ciang kong ompuina Puanbuk sungah tum ngawl tu nu hi; na tum uh le thi tu nu hi. Hi thukham na suan na paalte theampo ii zui tu ahi hi.
Leviticus10:10 Note in Topa neisa le zak ngengei vanhte sia
Leviticus10:11 Moses tungtawn a kong piak thukham theampo note in Israel mite tungah hil nanak tu nu hi
Leviticus10:12 Moses in Aaron le a taanglai a tapa niite Eleazar le Ithamar tungah
Leviticus10:13 A thiangtho munah ne vun; tua in Topa tungah a kipia an sung pan hong khensak nangma le na tapate ii tan tu ahi hi. Tua in Topa ii kei tungah hong thupiak ahi hi.
Leviticus10:14 Ahizong nangma le na innkuanpuite in thiampite atu a Topa tungah a kituam piak letsong le a sa tel
Leviticus10:15 Topa tungah an biakpiakna in a thau a kipiak hun ciang amate in a pheisa le a awmsa paipui tu uh hi. Topa thupiak bangin hi sanamte nangma le na tate neisa hi tawntung tu hi
Leviticus10:16 Mawphel biakpiak natu ahi keal sia ii thu Moses in a dok ciang tua keal
Leviticus10:17 “Banghangin mawphel biakpiakna sa a thiangtho munah ne ngawl nu ziam? Tuasia in a thiangtho mama an hi a
Leviticus10:18 A chi sia Puanbuk thiang sungah a kipaipui ngawl hu in
Leviticus10:19 Aaron in
Leviticus10:20 Moses sia hi thu a zaak ciang lungkim hi.
Leviticus11:1 Topa in Moses le Aaron tungah
Leviticus11:2 Israel mite atu a nuai a ngeinate pia hi. Leitung nganhing
Leviticus11:3 peangcin kaa a
Leviticus11:4 ahizong kalaohte
Leviticus11:5 
Leviticus11:6 
Leviticus11:7 Voksa ne heak vun. Tuate a thiang ngawlin ngaisut tu ahi hi; Vok sia a peangcin kaa hikale eakkha thai ngawl hi.
Leviticus11:8 Tua nganhingte ii sa ne heak vun
Leviticus11:9 Tha le hawlip a nei ngasa nam peuma ne thei tu nu hi
Leviticus11:10 ahizong tuisung nganhing
Leviticus11:11 Hi nganhingte a thiang ngawlin ngaisut tu ahi hi. Na ne buahet tu uh a
Leviticus11:12 Tuisung a nungta
Leviticus11:13 A nuai a vacimte: muvanlai
Leviticus11:14 
Leviticus11:15 
Leviticus11:16 
Leviticus11:17 
Leviticus11:18 
Leviticus11:19 
Leviticus11:20 Peang luk a nei tha nei lungnote
Leviticus11:21 a leang vakeu theite simngawl po thiang ngawl hi.
Leviticus11:22 Khaumaw
Leviticus11:23 Ahizong tha nei a
Leviticus11:24 A kuama po in a nuai a nganhing thite a tham peuma nitak dongin nin tu hi: tuate peangcin nei ahihang a kaa ngawl
Leviticus11:25 
Leviticus11:26 
Leviticus11:27 
Leviticus11:28 
Leviticus11:29 Savokphualte
Leviticus11:30 
Leviticus11:31 Hi nganhingte ahibuale a thiluangte a tham pawpo nitak dongin a thiang ngawl hi tu hi.
Leviticus11:32 Hi sa a thite na khat pawpo tungah a taak le
Leviticus11:33 Tua sathi luangte leibeal khat sungah a taak le
Leviticus11:34 A kine thei an pawpo tungah tuabang beal sung pan tui a kisung le a nin hi tu a
Leviticus11:35 Sa thiluangte ii taakna khat pawpo sia thiang ngawl a
Leviticus11:36 Hi sathi luangte ii a thuthaak dang pawpo a thiang ngawl hi tu a
Leviticus11:37 A kiciing tu thaicii tungah sathi luang khat a taak le
Leviticus11:38 Ahizong thaicii sia tui sungah kidia in tua tungah sathi luang khat a taak le tua thaicii thiang ngawl hi.
Leviticus11:39 A kine thei nganhing khat a thi le
Leviticus11:40 Tua nganhing sate a ne a om le
Leviticus11:41 Lei ah a vak nganhing note
Leviticus11:42 a awmtaal ahizong
Leviticus11:43 Hi sate ne in noma le noma a thiang ngawl kisua heak vun.
Leviticus11:44 Keima in Topa na Pathian ka hi a
Leviticus11:45 Na Pathian ka hi thei natu in Egypt pan hong pusuapui Topa ka hi hi. Keima thiangtho ka hikom note na thiangtho uh kul hi.
Leviticus11:46 Tua ahiciang hisia in nganhingte
Leviticus11:47 Note in biakna taw kisai a thiang le a thiang ngawl
Leviticus12:1 Topa in Moses tungah Israel mite atu in
Leviticus12:2 zui tu a nuai a ngeinate pia hi. Numei khat in tha sim nin a nei hunsung bangma in tapa khat a nei zawk ni sali sung sia biakna taw kisai in thiangtho ngawl hi.
Leviticus12:3 Ni liat ni in a tapa vunteap ki at tu hi.
Leviticus12:4 Tuaciang numei in a chi luanna pan biakna taw kisai in a thiantho dong ni sawmthum le ni thum sung ngak tu hi. Ama in a kithiansuana hun a cin mateng a thiangtho na khat zongh tham thei ngawl tu a
Leviticus12:5 Numei khat in tha sim nin a nei hunsung bangma in tanu khat a nei zawk ni sawm le ni li sung biakna taw kisai in thiangtho ngawl hi. Tuaciang a chi luanna pan biakna taw kisai in a thian natu in ni sawmluk le ni luk ngei lai tu hi.
Leviticus12:6 Tapa ahizong tanu ahizong nei in a thiansua na hun a cin zawkciang
Leviticus12:7 Thiampipa in Topa tungah tua nu ii a zeksa biakpiakna piaksak tu a
Leviticus12:8 Numeinu in tuuno khat a nei zo bua ahile inn vakhu nii ahibuale ngam vakhu nii
Leviticus13:1 Topa in Moses le Aaron tungah hi thukhamte pia hi.
Leviticus13:2 Mihing khat pawpo in a vun tungah
Leviticus13:3 Thiampipa in a meima etsak tu a
Leviticus13:4 Ahizong tua meima kaangin
Leviticus13:5 Thiampipa in ni sali ni in en kik tu a
Leviticus13:6 Thiampipa in ni sali ni in en kik tu a
Leviticus13:7 Ahizong thiampipa in en a
Leviticus13:8 Thiampipa in en kik tu a
Leviticus13:9 Mihing khat pawpo in a lauhuai vun natna a nei le tua pa thiampipa kungah kipaipui tu a
Leviticus13:10 thiampipa in en tu hi. A vun tungah meima kaang khat om in
Leviticus13:11 tua meima sia a dam thei ngawl vun natna ahi hi. Thiampipa in tua pa a thiangtho ngawlin thangsak tu a
Leviticus13:12 Tua vun natna beakin a lu pan a peang dong a theng le
Leviticus13:13 thiampipa in en kik tu hi. A pumpi tung bup beak zo in a mu le thiampipa in biakna taw kisai in a thiang in thangsak tu hi. A vun theampo hong kaang ahile ama sia biakna taw kisai in a thiang ahi hi.
Leviticus13:14 Ahizong a meima balh a kimu po ciang ama sia a thiang ngawl ahi hi.
Leviticus13:15 Thiampipa in en kik tu a
Leviticus13:16 Ahizong a meima damin a kaan kik ciang
Leviticus13:17 thiampipa in en kik tu hi
Leviticus13:18 Uilut vei khat a dam zawkciang
Leviticus13:19 a ma santak kang in ahibuale a san le a kang kithua in
Leviticus13:20 Thiampipa in en tu a
Leviticus13:21 Ahizong thiampipa in en in a sung a
Leviticus13:22 A meima a beak le thiampipa in ama a thiang ngawlin thangsak tu a; ama sia vun natna vei ahi hi.
Leviticus13:23 Ahizong a meima a ngei bangma hi in a beak tuan buale uilut mapawn hi lel a
Leviticus13:24 Mihing khat pawpo mei in kaanghin
Leviticus13:25 thiampipa in en tu hi. A meima sung multe kaangin
Leviticus13:26 Ahizong a meima santak multe kaang ngawlin
Leviticus13:27 Ni sali ni in thiampipa in ama en kik tu a
Leviticus13:28 Ahizong a meima beak ngawlin
Leviticus13:29 Pa ahizong numei ahizong a lu tung ahibuale a kha ah meima a nei ciang
Leviticus13:30 thiampipa in en tu hi. A kiim a
Leviticus13:31 Thiampipa in a et ciang a kiim a
Leviticus13:32 Thiampipa in ni sali ni in a meima en kik tu a
Leviticus13:33 tua pa in a meima kiim simngawl teng
Leviticus13:34 Ni sali ni in thiampipa in a meima en kik tu a
Leviticus13:35 Ahizong a thiang in a thansak zawkciang a meima a beak le
Leviticus13:36 thiampipa in en kik tu hi. A meima a beak le
Leviticus13:37 Ahizong thiampipa in a meima beak ngawlin
Leviticus13:38 Pa ahizong numei ahizong a vun tungah a kaangpawlte a om le
Leviticus13:39 thiampipa in en tu hi. Tua munte a kaang philphel ahile
Leviticus13:40 Mihing khat a nung sam ahizong
Leviticus13:41 
Leviticus13:42 Ahizong a lu kolhna ah a san le a kaang a kithua meima a piang le
Leviticus13:43 Thiampipa in en tu a
Leviticus13:44 a lu tungah a lauhuai vun natna vei ahikom thiampipa in ama a thiang ngawlin thangsak tu hi.
Leviticus13:45 A lauhuai vun natna a veipa in puan ek silh tu a
Leviticus13:46 Tua natna a vei hun sung a thiang ngawl hi a
Leviticus13:47 Samul ahibuale puanneal puansilh tungah
Leviticus13:48 puanneal puanbek
Leviticus13:49 a hing ahibuale a sanin a beak le thiampipa tung lak tu hi.
Leviticus13:50 Thiampipa in en tu a
Leviticus13:51 Thiampipa in ni sali ni ciang en kik tu a
Leviticus13:52 Thiampipa in hal tu hi
Leviticus13:53 Ahizong ama in a ettel ciang
Leviticus13:54 ama in tua puan a sawp natu le a dang ni sali sung a koituam natu in thupia tu hi.
Leviticus13:55 Tuaciang ama in en tu a
Leviticus13:56 Ahizong thiampipa in a et ciang a pawl teng a bo zo le
Leviticus13:57 Tua zawkciang a pawl te hong piangkik in a kizel kik le a neipa in tua sia hal tu hi.
Leviticus13:58 Ama in tua na sia silthiang in a pawlte a bo le
Leviticus13:59 Hisia in samul ahibuale puanneal ahibuale samul puan
Leviticus14:1 Topa in a lauhuai vun natna pan a dam mihing khat a zeksa thiansua natu in
Leviticus14:2 a nuai a zui tu ngeinate Moses tungah pia hi. Ama a thiang hi ci in a kithansak tu ni in
Leviticus14:3 thiampipa in ngiaphual pua sangah ama paipui in en tu hi.
Leviticus14:4 A natna a dam le
Leviticus14:5 Tuaciang thiampipa in vacimte khat ciktui thiang a kidim leibeal khat tungah a thalup natu in thupia tu hi.
Leviticus14:6 Ama in vacim dang khat sia la in a kithat vacim ii chi sungah cedar thing
Leviticus14:7 Ama in vun natna vei a kithiansua tu pa ii tungah salivei a chi the tu a
Leviticus14:8 Tua pa in a puan sawp tu a
Leviticus14:9 Ni sali ni in ama in a sam
Leviticus14:10 A ni liat ni in kum khat a pha
Leviticus14:11 Thiampipa in tua pa le biakpiaknate Topa ompuina Puanbuk kongbiang ah paipui tu hi.
Leviticus14:12 Tuaciang thiampipa in sathau litre khat ii khenthum sua khenkhat taw tuutal note khat khialphel biakpiakna in pia tu hi. Ama in thiampipa atu in tua te Topa tungah a tuam vilvel letsong in pia tu hi.
Leviticus14:13 Ama in mawphel biakpiak natu le meihal biakpiak natu in nganhing kingawna mun
Leviticus14:14 Thiampipa in tuuno chi tawm la in
Leviticus14:15 Thiampipa in olive thau tawm la in a veisang khutpheak sungah sung tu a
Leviticus14:16 a ziatsang khutme khat a sungah papin
Leviticus14:17 Ama in a khutpheak sung a om sathau tawm le tuuno chi tawm la in biakna taw kisai thiang hi
Leviticus14:18 A khutpheak sungah a taanglai sathaute tua pa lu tungah thisak tu hi. Tuabangin thiampipa in a zeksa thiansuana vawt tu hi.
Leviticus14:19 Tuaciang thiampipa in mawphel biakpiakna pia in a zeksa thiansuana vawt tu hi. Tuasia zawkciang ama in meihal biakpiak natu in ngan ngo tu a
Leviticus14:20 antang biakpiakna taw biaknatau tungah pia tu hi. Hi bangin thiampipa in a zeksa thiansuana vawt tu a
Leviticus14:21 Tua pa zawngin a dang bangma a pia zo buale a kithiansua natu bekin
Leviticus14:22 Ama in inn vakhu nii ahibuale ngam vakhu nii zongh keng tu a
Leviticus14:23 A kithiansua zawk ni liat ni in
Leviticus14:24 Thiampipa in tuu le olive thau keng tu a
Leviticus14:25 Ama in tuu ngo tu a
Leviticus14:26 Thiampipa in a veisang khutpheak tungah sathau tawm sung tu a
Leviticus14:27 a ziatsang khutme taw Topa ompuina tualai ah tua sathau pawlkhat salivei the tu hi.
Leviticus14:28 Ama in chisan a noina mun tengma ahi
Leviticus14:29 A khutpheak sungah a taanglai sathau teng sia tua pa lu tungah thisak tu a
Leviticus14:30 Tuaciang ama in inn vakhu khat ahibuale ngam vakhu khat sia
Leviticus14:31 mawphel biakpiakna in pia tu a
Leviticus14:32 Hisia in a kiitakhuai vun natna vei a ahihang ama kithiansua natu in a kisamh biakpiaknate a pia zo ngawl sia ii zui tu thukham ahi hi.
Leviticus14:33 Topa in Moses le Aaron tungah
Leviticus14:34 inn sungah cipawl natna kizel in a om ciang a nuai a zui tu ngeinate pia hi. (Hite sia Israel mite ii lua tu in Topa ii a piak tu Canaan ngamsung a tum zawkciang a zak tu ngeinate ahi hi.) Topa in a inn sungah cipawl natna puak hi ci in mihing khat pawpo in a mu le pai in thiampipa tungah son nanak tu hi.
Leviticus14:35 
Leviticus14:36 Thiampipa in cipawlnatna en tu a pai ma in inn sung vanh theampo a pusua natu in thupia tu a; tua ahibuale inn sung vanh teng thiang ngawl hi
Leviticus14:37 cipawl natna sittel tu hi. Tuate in ahingpian ahibuale a sanpawl hi a
Leviticus14:38 tua inn sia ni sali sung tawkalh cip in ama in nusia tu hi.
Leviticus14:39 Ni sali ni ciang ama heak kikin sittel kik tu hi. Tua cipawl natna a beak le
Leviticus14:40 tua cipawl natna a baanna suangte la in khuapi puasang a ninna munah a vawk natu in thiampipa in thupia tu hi.
Leviticus14:41 Tua zawkciang ama in pang sungsang belna teng kiatsak tu a
Leviticus14:42 Tuaciang tua suangte a kilaakna munah suang dangte koi kik tu a
Leviticus14:43 Suangte la in pangte kiat a
Leviticus14:44 thiampipa in pai in en tu hi. Tua cipawl natna a kizel ahile tua inn a thiang ngawl ahi hi.
Leviticus14:45 Tua inn phel tu a
Leviticus14:46 Tua inn sia taw a kikalh laitakin a sungah a tum khat pawpo sia nitak dong a thiang ngawl hi tu hi.
Leviticus14:47 Hi inn sungah a lum ahibuale an a ne sia in ama puante sawpthiang tu hi.
Leviticus14:48 Thiampipa in inn sia za a kizut zawk in a et ciang cipawl natna a om kik nawn buale
Leviticus14:49 Inn thiansua natu in ama in vacim nii
Leviticus14:50 Ama in cik tuithiang koina leibeal tungah vacimte khat ngo tu hi.
Leviticus14:51 Tuaciang ama in cedar thing
Leviticus14:52 Hi bangin vacim chi
Leviticus14:53 Tuaciang ama in a nungta vacim sia khuapi puasang dui sungah leangsak tu hi. Hi bangin ama in a zeksa inn thiansuana vawt tu a
Leviticus14:54 Hiteng sia a kiitakhuai vun natnate;
Leviticus14:55 meimate
Leviticus14:56 
Leviticus14:57 Hi thukhamte in na khat sia thiang ziam thiang ngawl ziam khensat hi.
Leviticus15:1 Topa in Moses le Aaron tungah
Leviticus15:2 Israel mite atu in a nuai a zui tu ngeinate pia hi. Pasal khat pawpo a zang pan a tui a naai a pusuak le
Leviticus15:3 tawlnga ngawlin a luang ahizong
Leviticus15:4 Lupna tungah a to ahibuale a lum le tua lupna thiang ngawl hi.
Leviticus15:5 Tua pa lupna a tham pawpo
Leviticus15:6 ahibuale a tona tungah a to pawpo in a puante sawp in kibual nanak tu a
Leviticus15:7 Tua naai a neipa a tham pawpo in a puante sawp in kibual nanak tu a
Leviticus15:8 Tua naai a neipa in biakna taw kisai in a thiang khat pawpo cil a phii le tua pa sia ama puan teng sawp in
Leviticus15:9 Tua naai a neipa tona siphukungh ahibuale tokhum sia thiang ngawl hi.
Leviticus15:10 Hi sia pa tona a tham pawpo nitak dongin thiang ngawl hi. Hi sia pa tona a pua pawpo in ama puante sawp in
Leviticus15:11 Tua naai a neipa in a khut sil masa ngawlin mihing khat po a tham le ama puan teng sawp in kibual nanak tu a
Leviticus15:12 Hi sia pa ii a tham leibeal pawpo kisutham tu a
Leviticus15:13 Tua naai a neipa a dam zawkciang ni sali sung ngak tu a
Leviticus15:14 A ni liat ni in ama in inn vakhu nii ahibuale ngam vakhu nii Topa ompuina Puanbuk kongbiang ah paipui in thiampipa pia tu hi.
Leviticus15:15 Thiampipa in mawphel biakpiakna in khat
Leviticus15:16 Mihing khat sia a bawtui a pusuak le a pum bupin kibual tu a
Leviticus15:17 Tua bawtui a taakna puan taw ahibuale savun taw kivawt na khat pawpo sia silthiang tu a
Leviticus15:18 Numei le pa omkhopna a nei zawkciang a nii in kibual nanak tu a
Leviticus15:19 Numei khat tha sim nin a nei ciang ama ni sali sung thiang ngawl hi. Tua nu a tham pawpo nitak dongin thiang ngawl hi.
Leviticus15:20 Tua numei ii a nin nei sung a tona ahibuale a lupna sia thiang ngawl hi.
Leviticus15:21 Ama lupna ahizong a tona ahizong a tham pawpo in ama puante silthiang in kibual tu a
Leviticus15:22 
Leviticus15:23 
Leviticus15:24 Pa khat in numei khat a nin nei sungin a omkhoppui le tua pa niinsak a
Leviticus15:25 Numei khat tha sim a nin nei zawkciang ni tam mama sung a chi a luang le
Leviticus15:26 A nin nei hun sungin a lupna le a tona pawpo sia nin hi.
Leviticus15:27 Tuate a tham pawpo nin a
Leviticus15:28 A chi luan a kan zawkciang ama in ni sali ngak tu a
Leviticus15:29 A ni liat ni in ama in inn vakhu nii ahibuale ngam vakhu nii Topa ompuina Puanbuk kongbiang ah a om thiampipa kungah paipui tu hi.
Leviticus15:30 Thiampipa in mawphel biakpiakna in khat le meihal biakpiakna in a dang khat pia tu a
Leviticus15:31 Ngiaphual laizang ah a om Topa ompuina Puanbuk a nitsak ngawl natu in Israel mite tungah a thiantho ngawlna taw kisai in
Leviticus15:32 Hiteng sia
Leviticus15:33 numei khat tha sim a nin nei hunsung ahibuale
Leviticus16:1 Topa tungah a thiangtho ngawl mei taw biakpiakna a piak ciang a kithat Aaron tapate nii thi zawkciang Topa in Moses paupui hi.
Leviticus16:2 Ama in
Leviticus16:3 Ama mawphel biakpiakna in khuitalno khat le meihal biakpiakna in tuutal khat a paipui zawkciang bek in Thiangtho Bel Mun ah tum thei tu hi
Leviticus16:4 Tuaciang Topa in a nuai a zui tu ngeinate pia hi. Aaron
Leviticus16:5 Israel taangpite in mawphel biakpiak natu in kealtal nii le meihal biakpiak natu in tuutal khat Aaron tungah pia tu hi.
Leviticus16:6 Aaron in ama mawna le a innkuanpuite mawna a mai natu in khuital khat sangaw biakpiakna in pia tu hi.
Leviticus16:7 Tuaciang ama in Topa ompuina Puanbuk kongbiang ah keal nii paipui tu hi.
Leviticus16:8 Tualai ah
Leviticus16:9 Topa atu in meetang taw a teal kealtal khat sia Aaron in mawphel biakpiakna in pia tu hi.
Leviticus16:10 Azazel atu a kiteal keal sia a nungta in Topa tungah pia tu a
Leviticus16:11 Aaron in ama le a innkuanpuite atu mawphel biakpiakna in khuital a piak ciang
Leviticus16:12 ama in biaknatau pan meikam kuang khat dim le ngimnamtui phate khutdim nii la tu a
Leviticus16:13 Tualai Topa ompuina munah ama in ngimnamtui sia mei tungah koi tu a
Leviticus16:14 Ama in khuital chi tawm la tu a
Leviticus16:15 Tua zawkciang
Leviticus16:16 Tuabangin Israel mite ii thiantho ngawlna le mawna theampo ii nitsakna panin Thiang Bel Mun sia a zeksa thiansuana vawt tu hi. Biakna taw kisai in a thiang ngawl ngiaphual laizang ah tua Puanbuk om ahikom Aaron in Puanbuk sia tuabangin a thiansua kul tu hi.
Leviticus16:17 Thiangtho Bel Mun ah a zeksa thiansuana vawt tu in Aaron a tum pan kipan a pusua kik dong
Leviticus16:18 meihal biakpiakna pia tu le biaknatau thiansua tu in biaknatau ah ama pai tu hi. Ama in khuital chi tawm le keal chi tawm la in biaknatau king a dokna teng noai tu hi.
Leviticus16:19 Ama in a khutme taw sachi pawlkhat biaknatau tung salivei the tu hi. Hi bangin ama in tua biaknatau Israel mite mawna pan thiansua in
Leviticus16:20 Aaron in Thiangtho Bel Mun le Topa ompuina Puanbuk sung mundang teng le biaknatau atu in a zeksa thiansuana a vawt zawkciang
Leviticus16:21 Ama in tua keal lu tungah a khutte nii nga tu a
Leviticus16:22 Tua keal in kuama teen ngawlna ngam sungah amate mawna theampo pua in paipui tu hi.
Leviticus16:23 Tuaciang Puanbuk sungah Aaron tum tu a
Leviticus16:24 Ama in mun thiangtho ah kibual tu a
Leviticus16:25 Ama in mawphel biakpiak natu in nganthau sia biaknatau tungah hal tu hi.
Leviticus16:26 Sennealngam sung Azazel kungah keal a beng pa in ngiaphual ah hong cia kik ma in a puante sawp in kibual nanak tu hi.
Leviticus16:27 Mawphel biakpiak natu in a kizangh khuital le keal ii chi
Leviticus16:28 A hal pa ngiaphual hong heak kik ma in a puante sawp in kibual nanak tu hi.
Leviticus16:29 A nuai a ngeinate maisang hun theampo ah zui tu ahi hi. A tha salina
Leviticus16:30 Tua ni in biakna taw kisai in a thian natu in amate mawna theampo a thiansua tu in a zeksa teng vawt tu hi.
Leviticus16:31 Tua ni sia a thiangtho mama ni khat hi tu a
Leviticus16:32 A pa za a laih tu in thupha piak kipsakna a vawtsak sa le a ki aap sa
Leviticus16:33 Thiangthobel Mun Topa ii ompuina Puanbuk a taanglai teng
Leviticus16:34 Hi ngeinate maisang hun theampo ah zui tu ahi hi. Israel mite mawna theampo thiansua natu in hi zeksa ngeina sia kum khat in khatvei kivawt hamtang tu hi. Tuabangin Moses in Topa thupiak bangin seam hi.
Leviticus17:1 Topa in Moses tungah Aaron le a tapate
Leviticus17:2 le Israel mite theampo tungah a nuai a zui tu ngeinate a piak tu in thupia hi.
Leviticus17:3 Israel te khat in khui khat ahibuale tuu khat ahibuale keal khat Topa tungah biakpiakna khat bangin Topa ompuina Puanbuk kongbiang simngawl mundang ah a ngo le
Leviticus17:4 
Leviticus17:5 Hi thupiak ii a khiakna sia tu in Israel mite ii ngam sungah a ngaw bul ngannote Topa kungah paipui tu cinopna ahi hi. Amate in tu in tua ngannote Puanbuk kongbiang ah a om thiampipa kungah paipui tu a
Leviticus17:6 Thiampipa in Puanbuk kongbiang ah a om biaknatau pangh tengah a chi the tu a
Leviticus17:7 Israel mite in Topa tungah hong thumaan in
Leviticus17:8 Israel khat ahibuale a teen khoppui ngamdangmi khat pawpo in meihal biakpiakna ahizong a dang biakpiakna ahizong
Leviticus17:9 Topa tungah biakpiakna a piak ciang Puanbuk kongbiang simngawl mundang ah a pia le
Leviticus17:10 Israel te khat pawpo ahibuale a teen khoppui ngamdangmi khat pawpo in a sungah chi om lai sa a ne le
Leviticus17:11 A nungta theampo ii nuntakna sia chi sungah om hi
Leviticus17:12 Tua ahi hu in
Leviticus17:13 Israel te khat pawpo ahibuale a teen khoppui ngamdangmi khat pawpo in biakna taw kisai a thiang nganhing khat ahibuale vacim khat a man le ama in a chi lei ah sung nanak tu a lei huk tu hi.
Leviticus17:14 A nungta theampo ii nuntakna sia chi sungah om ahi hu in a sungah chi om lai sa pawpo a neak ngawl natu in
Leviticus17:15 Israel te ahibuale ngamdangte khat pawpo in ama thu in a thi thawthong nganhing khat ahibuale ngamsa ii a mat khat ii sa a ne le
Leviticus17:16 Tuabang a vawt buale thupiangte a thuak kul tu hi.
Leviticus18:1 Topa in
Leviticus18:2 Israel mite a sonsawn tu in Moses tungah
Leviticus18:3 Na om ngeina uh Egypt mite omziate ahizong ahibuale tu in note kong paipuina Canaan ngamsung a teang mihingte ii omziate ahizong zui heak vun.
Leviticus18:4 Ka thukhamte zui in kong thupiakte seam vun. Keima in Topa noma Pathian ka hi hi.
Leviticus18:5 Sep tu kong sawl te seam vun a
Leviticus18:6 Topa in a nuai a zui tu ngeinate pia hi. Na mealheakte khat pawpo taw omkhop khialna vawt heak vun.
Leviticus18:7 Na nu taw numei le pa khialna vawtin na pa maizum pia heak in. Na nu maimawlsak heak in.
Leviticus18:8 Na pa zino dangte khat pawpo taw numei le pa khialna vawtin na pa maizum pia heak in.
Leviticus18:9 Inn khat sungah khangkhawm na hi uh zong
Leviticus18:10 Na tunu taw numei le pa khialna vawt heak in; na maizum natu hi tu hi.
Leviticus18:11 Na suapuisealnu taw numei le pa khialna vawt heak vun
Leviticus18:12 Na pa suapuinu ahibuale na nu suapuinu taw omkhop khialna vawt heak in.
Leviticus18:13 
Leviticus18:14 Na pa suapuipa ii zi khialpui heak in; ama zongh na nu khat ma ahi hi.
Leviticus18:15 Na tapa zi khialpui heak in.
Leviticus18:16 Na suapuipa zi khialpui heak in.
Leviticus18:17 Na khialpui nu ii tanu ahibuale a tunu khialpui heak in; na mealheakte ma hi a
Leviticus18:18 Na zi nuntak laiteng na zi tu in na nuphal nu la heak in.
Leviticus18:19 Numei khat nin a nei laitak omkhoppui heak in
Leviticus18:20 Ngual zi khialpui heak in; na khialpui le biakna taw kisai in hong ninsak tu hi.
Leviticus18:21 Molech pathian biakna ah zak tu in na tate khat zongh pia heak in
Leviticus18:22 Pa le pa omkhop khialna vawt heak in; Pathian in ngaimaw hi.
Leviticus18:23 Pa ahizong numei ahizong kuama in nganhing taw omkhop khialna vawt heak hen; tuabang khialna in biakna taw kisai in no hong ninsak hi.
Leviticus18:24 Hi ngamtatnate taw a thiang ngawl kisua tawm heak vun
Leviticus18:25 Amate ngamtatna in ngam le lei ninsak ahikom Topa in leitang daan pia in tualai ah a teang mite leitang in nialsak hi.
Leviticus18:26 Amate in hi bang a kiihuainate taw a leitang ninsak uh a
Leviticus18:27 
Leviticus18:28 tua hile note mai ah a teang doai biate leitang ii a nial bangin
Leviticus18:29 Hi bangza in a thasiathuai in a ngamta peuma sia Pathian mi khat in kingaisun nawn ngawl tu a hina thu na he uh hi.
Leviticus18:30 Tuaciang Topa in

Leviticus19:6 Sa na ngaw uh sia na ngaw ni ahibuale a zing ciang na neak nanak kul hi. Ni thum ni in a taanglai sa pawpo kihal tu hi
Leviticus19:7 banghang ziam cile tua sa in biakna taw kisai in nin a

Leviticus19:9 “Na lo ante na laak uh ciang lo kiil ah ante la heak vun

Leviticus19:18 Kuama tungah phula heak vun a

Leviticus19:22 thiampipa in a khialphel natu in tua tuutal taw a zeksa thiansuana vawt tu a
Leviticus19:23 “Canaan ngam sungah tumin thingno kung nam khat pawpo na suan uh ciang a masa kum thum sung tua thingngate biakna taw kisai in a thiang ngawlin ngaisun vun. Tua hun sung teng tua thingnga ne heak vun.
Leviticus19:24 A kum lina ciang thingnga theampo
Leviticus19:25 Ahizong a kum ngana ciang tua thingnga ne thei tu nu hi. Tuabang na hi uh le na thingno te in nga tamzaw nga tu hi. Keima in Topa na Pathian ka hi hi.
Leviticus19:26 “Chisan a om lai sa ne heak vun. Mitbum aisaanna tuatuamte zangh heak vun.
Leviticus19:27 Mithite atu khuangai in na pangh samte meet heak vun
Leviticus19:28 ahibuale noma le noma thulkawng sun ahibuale na taksa kiliamsua heak vun. Keima in Topa ka hi hi.

Leviticus20:8 Ka thukhamte hong zui tavun

Leviticus20:10 Mi khat in Israel mipui khat ii zi a khialpui le a nii in kithatlum tu hi.
Leviticus20:11 Mi khat in a pa zite khat a khialpui le a pa maimawlsak hi a
Leviticus20:12 Mihing khat in a tapa zi a khialpui le a nii in kithatlum tu hi. Mealheak kuung sung numei le pa omkhop khialna vawt ahiciang amate thina in amate kivawt ahi hi.

Leviticus20:15 Mi khat in nganhing taw a khial le
Leviticus20:16 Numei khat in nganhing khat taw khial nuamin a hanciam le a nii in kithatlum tu hi. Amate thina in amate kivawt ahi hi.
Leviticus20:17 Mi khat in a suapuinu ahibuale a suapuisealnu a teenpui le

Leviticus22:5 ahibuale a thiang ngawl nganhing

Leviticus22:7 Nitum zawkciang ama thiang a
Leviticus22:8 Ama in

Leviticus22:10 “Thiampi innkuanpuite bek in a thiangtho biakpiakna an pawpo ne thei tu a; kuama dang — thiampi taw a omkhawm khat
Leviticus22:11 Ahizong ama ii sum taw a lei silate ahibuale tualsuak silate in thiampi ii a nga ante ne thei tu hi.
Leviticus22:12 Thiampi khat ii tanu in thiampi ahi ngawl khat a teenpui le a thiangtho biakpiakna an khat pawpo ne thei ngawl tu hi.
Leviticus22:13 Ahizong thiampi khat ii tanu sia a pasal thi in meingong
Leviticus22:14 “Thiampi innkuanpui ahi ngawl khat in a thiangtho biakpiakna ante a heak ngawlin a ne tha le ama in thiampipa tungah a man a cingin liau kik tu a
Leviticus22:15 Thiampite in tua ante a ne thei ngawl tu midang khat pawpo a neaksakna taw
Leviticus22:16 a thiangtho biakpiakna ante ninsak ngawl tu hi; a ninsakte a maw hi tu a

Leviticus22:18 Aaron le a tapate le Israel mite theampo ii zui tu in a nuai a ngeinate a piak tu in thupia hi. Israel mite khat pawpo in ahibuale Israel sung a teang ngamdangmi khat pawpo in meihal biakpiakna a piak ciang
Leviticus22:19 A kisaang thei tu in
Leviticus22:20 A mealhem nganno khat po na pia le Topa in saang ngawl tu hi.
Leviticus22:21 Mi khat pawpo in kipawlkhop biakpiakna Topa tungah a piak ciang
Leviticus22:22 Topa tungah a mittaw
Leviticus22:23 Thinzaw biakpiakna ah a khansamh ahibuale a limci tatak ngawl nganhingte pia thei tu nu hi
Leviticus22:24 A ciltang a tamhsa

Leviticus23:1 Topa in Moses tungah
Leviticus23:2 Israel mite ii a biak kikhop ciang
Leviticus23:3 Note in na nasep natu in ni luk sung nei nu hi
Leviticus23:4 A kisee hun a tun simin a nuai a poaite thangsak vun.
Leviticus23:5 Topa patoaina in a kivawt Paisan Poai sia tha masabel ni sawm le ni li ni
Leviticus23:6 Ni sawm le ni nga ni in Tol saw ngawl Anluum Poai kipan a
Leviticus23:7 Poai sung ni masabel ni in biakna vawt tu in na kikhawm tu uh a
Leviticus23:8 Ni sali sung Topa tungah an taw biakpiaknate pia vun. A ni sali ni in biakna vawt tu in kikhawm kik vun
Leviticus23:9 Topa hong piakna ngam thengin an na laak uh ciang anpal taangvawng sia thiampipa pia vun.
Leviticus23:10 
Leviticus23:11 No hong kisaan thei natu in thiampipa in Topa tungah tuasia a tuam vilvel biakpiakna in pia tu hi. Tuasia Sabbath khuavak ni in thiampipa in pia tu hi.
Leviticus23:12 Antang biakpiakna na piak ni in meihal biakpiakna in a mealhem ngawl kum khat a pha tuutal khat zongh na pia tu uh hi.
Leviticus23:13 Tua taw an biakpiakna in olive thau taw a kihel anvui kilogramme nii na pia tu uh hi. Hi biakpiakna ii ngimnam in Topa lungkimsak hi. Biakpiakna in sapittui litre khat zongh pia tu nu hi.
Leviticus23:14 Pathian tungah hi biakpiakna na piak uh mateng anthak peuma
Leviticus23:15 Topa tungah anpal na piak ni
Leviticus23:16 Sabbath salivei a cin zawk ni sawmnga ni in Topa tungah a dang antang biakpiakna thak pia vun.
Leviticus23:17 Innkuan simin anluum lum nii tek keng tu a
Leviticus23:18 Tua anluum taw taangpite in a mealhem ngawl kum khat a pha
Leviticus23:19 Mawphel biakpiakna in kealtal khat le kipawlkhop biakpiakna in kum khat a pha tuutalno nii zongh pia vun.
Leviticus23:20 Thiampipa in thiampite atu in Topa tungah a tuam vilvel letsong in anluum sia tuunote nii taw pia tu hi. Hi biakpiaknate thiangtho hi.
Leviticus23:21 Tua ni in kuama in noma ii ni sim nasep bangma seam heak vun
Leviticus23:22 Na lo ante na laak uh ciang lomong a om ante la heak vun a
Leviticus23:23 A tha salina ni masabel ni sia a tuam vilvel tawlngakna ni in tang vun a
Leviticus23:24 
Leviticus23:25 Topa tungah an taw biakpiakna pia vun a
Leviticus23:26 Tha salina ni sawm ni sia mite mawmai natu in kumcin biakna a zeksa sep ni tu ahi hi. Tua ni in bangma ne heak vun a; biak kikhopna ah pai tekin Topa tungah an taw biakpiakna pia vun.
Leviticus23:27 
Leviticus23:28 Tua ni in naseam heak vun
Leviticus23:29 Tua ni in an khat pawpo a ne sia
Leviticus23:30 Tua ni in na seam a om le Topa ama mama in thisak tu hi.
Leviticus23:31 Koisung po ah a teang zong hi ngeina sia na suan na paalte theampo atu ahi hi.
Leviticus23:32 Tua tha ni kua ni nitum pan kipan ni sawm ni nitum dong sia a tuam vilvel tawlngakna ni in na tan tu uh hi a
Leviticus23:33 Buk poai sia tha salina
Leviticus23:34 
Leviticus23:35 Ni masabel ni in biakna vawt khawm vun a
Leviticus23:36 Ni sali sung ni simin an taw biakpiakna na vawt tu uh hi. A ni liat ni in a bia tu le an taw biakpiakna pia tu in na kikhawm kik tu uh hi. Tua ni sia biak kikhop ni hi a
Leviticus23:37 (Hi biakna poaite sia a kisamh bangin biakna vawt khopna nei a
Leviticus23:38 Hi poaite in Sabbath tan ngeina sia belapna hi a
Leviticus23:39 Lo an na laak zawk uh ciang
Leviticus23:40 Tua ni in na thingnote ii nga phabelte
Leviticus23:41 Tua poai ni sali sung vawt tu nu hi. Hi ngeina sia na suan na paalte ii maisang hun theampo ah a zui tu ahi hi.
Leviticus23:42 Israel mite theampo ni sali sung bukte sungah teang tu a
Leviticus23:43 tua hile Topa in Egypt pan hong pusuapui lai in Israel mite ii buk sak tawmte sungah hong teensakna thu na suan na paalte in hong he thei tu hi. Ama in Topa na Pathian ahi hi.
Leviticus23:44 Hi bangin Topa patoaina in biakna poaite a khaam ciang Israel mite zui tu ngeinate Moses in pia hi.

Leviticus25:1 Topa in Sinai Mual tungah Moses paupui a
Leviticus25:2 Israel mite tungah a nuai a zui tu ngeinate a piak tu in thupia hi. Topa hong piak tu ngam ah na tum uh ciang a kum sali kum simin lothaw ngawlna taw Topa na upat tu uh hi.
Leviticus25:3 Kum luk sung lo na poai tu uh a
Leviticus25:4 Ahizong a kum salina sia na leitang ii tawlngak kum hi tu a
Leviticus25:5 Na lo sungah a lipo ante zongh la ngawlin na pua ngawl sapitngate zongh lo heak vun. Tua kum sia na leitang ii tawlngak hiithiat kum ahi hi.
Leviticus25:6 Tua kumin lo a kithaw ngawl hang tua lo in note
Leviticus25:7 na ngannote le ngamsate zongh hong vak tu hi. Tua lo pan a piang theampo kine thei tu hi.
Leviticus25:8 Kum sali mun salivei simna a kingawm ciang kum 49 ci in sim vun.
Leviticus25:9 Tua zawk tha salina
Leviticus25:10 Hi bangin kum sawmngana kum sia na koituam tu a
Leviticus25:11 Lo na tho buatu uh a
Leviticus25:12 Tua kum bup note atu in kum thiangtho hi tu a; lote pan a piang tawm teng bek na ne tu uh hi.
Leviticus25:13 Hi kum sungin a kizuaksa na theampo a neite kungah kilee kiksak siat tu hi.
Leviticus25:14 Tua hi a
Leviticus25:15 A man sia Piakkikna Jubilee Kum kik dong hi lo pan kum bangza sung
Leviticus25:16 A kum a tam le a man tam tu a
Leviticus25:17 Israel na mipuite theam heak in a
Leviticus25:18 Hi ngam sungah ngammuang tak na nuntak thei natu in Topa thukhamte le thupiakte theampo zui in.
Leviticus25:19 Leitang pan an hong piang tu a
Leviticus25:20 Ahizong mihing khat po in tuabang lothaw ngawl
Leviticus25:21 Kum nii sung an na khom thei natu uh in Topa in a kum luk kumin leitang thupha pia tu hi.
Leviticus25:22 A kum liat kumin lo na thaw ciang a kum lukna kumin na laak ante na ne lai tu a
Leviticus25:23 Na leitang sia a tawntung atu in kizuak thei ngawl tu hi
Leviticus25:24 Leitang a kizuak ciang a neipa ii tat kik thei natu a thuneina sia heak tek kul hi.
Leviticus25:25 Israel te khat zawng a
Leviticus25:26 A tan kik tu mealheak a nei ngawl khat sia hong hau kikin a tan kik zo zongh suak thei tu hi.
Leviticus25:27 Tua thu ah a lei kik thei ni in Piakkikna Jubilee kum dong a leitang pan a nga kik tu za taw tuatin a zuakna pa tungah a man pia in tuasia tan kik tu hi.
Leviticus25:28 Ahizong a tat kik natu sum a cin zo buale Piakkikna Jubilee kum kik dong a leipa khut sungah om lai tu hi. Tua kum ciang tuasia a neipa tungah kipia kik tu hi.
Leviticus25:29 Mihing khat in kulh taw ki uum khuapi sungah a om inn khat a zuak le
Leviticus25:30 Ahizong tua kum sungin a tan kik zo buale tan kik thei nawn ngawl tu a
Leviticus25:31 Ahizong uumna a nei ngawl khuanote sungah innte sia lote bangin kingaisun tu a
Leviticus25:32 Ahizong Levi suante in a nasepna khuapite sungah a neisate bang hun po in tat kik thei natu thu nei hi.
Leviticus25:33 Hi khuapite khat sung pan inn khat sia Levi khat in zuak a
Leviticus25:34 Levi khuapite kiimkot ah nganthana leitang ahile kizuak ngeingawl tu hi; tuasia a tawntung amate ii neisa ahi hi.
Leviticus25:35 Na nai a
Leviticus25:36 Ama tung pan a meet la heak in a
Leviticus25:37 Ama
Leviticus25:38 Hi thu sia Canaan ngam hong piak natu le noma Pathian ahi natu in Egypt ngam pan hong pusuapuipa Topa na Pathian uh ii thu piak ahi hi.
Leviticus25:39 Na nai a
Leviticus25:40 Ama in kuli khat bangin na kungah om tu a
Leviticus25:41 Tuasia hun ciang ama le a tate in nangma hong nusia tu a
Leviticus25:42 Israel mite sia Topa ii silate hi a
Leviticus25:43 Na Pathian kiita vun a
Leviticus25:44 Sila na kisamh le na kiim a om minamte tung pan lei vun.
Leviticus25:45 Note taw teang khawm ngamdangmite ii tate zongh lei thei tu nu hi. Na ngamsung pan piang tuabang patangte noma neisa suak thei a
Leviticus25:46 amate na tapate ii lua tu in na nusiat thei tu a
Leviticus25:47 Sonteena in note taw teang khawm ngamdangmite khat hong hau a
Leviticus25:48 Ama a kizuak zawk hang kitan kik thei lai hi. A suapuite khat
Leviticus25:49 ahibuale a pano
Leviticus25:50 Ama in a leipa taw kikum tu a
Leviticus25:51 Kum sim kuli naseam khat bangin ngaisun in
Leviticus25:52 
Leviticus25:53 A topa in vawtsia ngawl het tu hi.
Leviticus25:54 Hi bang lam khat pawpo taw a kisuaktasak buale ama le a tate sia Piakkikna Jubilee kum kik ciang kisuaktasak nanak tu hi.
Leviticus25:55 Israel mi khat sia sila hi top thei ngawl tu hi

Leviticus26:4 Keima in nguatui hun maanin kong pia tu a

Leviticus26:9 Thupha kong pia tu a
Leviticus26:10 An tam mama na la tu uh a
Leviticus26:11 A thiangtho ka Puanbuk sungah note taw ka teang tu a
Leviticus26:12 Noma taw kong om tu a

Leviticus26:15 Note taw ka vawt ka thuciam paltan in
Leviticus26:16 note daan kong pia tu hi. Na mit hong tawsak tu le na nuntakna a bo tu in note tungah tuasiatna — a dam thei ngawl natnate le cisa natnate kong tungsak tu hi. Lo na thaw ancii na poai hangin na phattuamna om ngawl tu hi
Leviticus26:17 Ngal na lel natu in kong nungngat tu a
Leviticus26:18 “Hi bang teng zawkciang ka thu nong ni bua veve uh le
Leviticus26:19 Na thinpui kiphatsakna ka sumai tu hi; nguatui hang a

Leviticus26:24 kong nungngat tu a
Leviticus26:25 Ih thuciamna na palsat manin daan hong pia tu in no tungah ngalpi kong thengsak tu hi. Na ngammuan natu in khuapi sung na zuan zonghin a dam maw natnate kong tungsak tu a
Leviticus26:26 Nupi sawm ii a nei anluum theampo a em natu sia anluum emna khat bek a kisap natu zaa dongin na anneak nga natu kong khaktan tu hi. Amate in hong hawmsak tu uh a
Leviticus26:27 “Hi bang teng zawkciang ka thu ni ngawlin nong nial veve lai uh le
Leviticus26:28 no tungah ka thin uukin a masa na daan thuak uh sangin
Leviticus26:29 Na ngil uh kial leilam in
Leviticus26:30 Mual tungah om noma biakna munte ka lalsak tu a
Leviticus26:31 na khuapite ka lalcipsak tu a
Leviticus26:32 Na leitang ka lalcipsak tu a
Leviticus26:33 Ngal kong thengsak tu a
Leviticus26:34 Tuasia ciang tawlngak hun na piak ngawl
Leviticus26:35 
Leviticus26:36 “Saltaangin a om note kong patausak mama tu a
Leviticus26:37 Kuama hong del om ngawl napi kipaltha in na liik tu uh a
Leviticus26:38 Na saltanna ah na thi tu uh a
Leviticus26:39 Na ngalte ngam le lei ah a taanglai sun tawmte zongh noma mawna le na taanghpupite mawna hangin na mangthang veve tu uh hi.
Leviticus26:40 “Ahizong na suan na paalte in amate mawnate le hong nalh a hong leedo hu in amate mawnate le a taanghpupite mawnate pualaak tu uh hi

Leviticus26:46 Hi thukhamte le thupiakte theampo sia Israel mite atu in Sinai Mual tungah Topa ii Moses tungah a piakte ahi hi.
Leviticus27:1 Topa in Moses tungah
Leviticus27:2 Israel mite atu a nuai a zui tu ngeinate pia hi. A tuam vilvel kiciamna khat taangtutna in Topa tungah a kipiasa mihing khat sia
Leviticus27:3 Tua sumte Biakinn zak ngei khaikhin taw kitee hi: — pasal khanthin kum kul pan kum sawmluk dong: ngunntang 50 — numei khanthin: ngunntang 30 — pa a khangmoi
Leviticus27:4 
Leviticus27:5 
Leviticus27:6 
Leviticus27:7 
Leviticus27:8 Kamciamna a vawtpa sia zawng leih in a ngeina bangin a pia zo buale ama sia thiampipa kungah kipaipui tu a
Leviticus27:9 Kamciamna a vawt sia Topa biakpiakna in a saan thamman nganno khat ahile Topa tungah a kipia letsong theampo biakna taw kisai in a thiangtho hi a
Leviticus27:10 kamciamna a vawtpa in nganno dang taw laih thei ngawl tu hi. Nganno dang taw a laih le ngannote nii sia Topa neisa hi tu hi.
Leviticus27:11 Ahizong kamciamna in a piak tu nganno sia biakna taw kisai in a thiang ngawl hi a
Leviticus27:12 Thiampipa in nganno phatna le siatna taw kizui in a man tan tu a
Leviticus27:13 Tua pa in a lei kik nuam le
Leviticus27:14 Mi khat in a inn Topa tungah a aap ciang
Leviticus27:15 Tua pa in a inn a lei kik nuam le a man za le tua man tungah zakhat ciang kul veu belapin pia tu hi.
Leviticus27:16 Mihing khat in a leitang khen khat Topa tungah a aap le
Leviticus27:17 Piakkikna Jubilee kum zawk po ciang a leitang a aap le
Leviticus27:18 Piakkikna Jubilee kum zawk pek ciang a aap le
Leviticus27:19 Mi khat in a aapsa lo a lei kik nuam ahile a lo man za le tua man tungah zakhat ciang kul veu belap thua in pia tu hi.
Leviticus27:20 Topa tung pan tuasia lei kik masa ngawlin mi dang khat tungah a zuak le lei kik theina thu sia a bo hi tu hi.
Leviticus27:21 Piakkikna Jubilee kum a cin kik ciang tua lo a tawntungin Topa neisa suak tu a; thiampite in tang tu hi.
Leviticus27:22 Mihing khat in ama leisa lo Topa tungah a aap le
Leviticus27:23 thiampipa in mai Piakkikna Jubilee kum dong a kum tuatin a man see tu a
Leviticus27:24 Piakkikna Jubilee kum a cin ciang tua lo a neiphitpa tungah ahibuale a suan a paalte tungah ki aap kik tu hi.
Leviticus27:25 Biakinn zak ngei khaikhin taw kizui in na man theampo a man kitan tu hi.
Leviticus27:26 Nganhing no suakciil peuma Topa neisa hi zo ahiciang
Leviticus27:27 ahizong a thiang ngawl nganhing no suakciil ahile
Leviticus27:28 Topa tungah thudang om ngawl tu in a aap thiang sitsetsa
Leviticus27:29 Mihing ngawngawn tuabang a ki aap thiang sitset sa te tat kik thei tu hi ngawl hi; ama sia kithatlum nanak tu hi.
Leviticus27:30 Na leitang pan a piang theampo
Leviticus27:31 Mi khat in tuate a tan kik nuam le
Leviticus27:32 Na khoai sa ngannote sawm a khat Topa ii neisa ahi hi. Na nganno na sim ciang a sawmna nganno sia veu Topa ii neisa ahi hi.
Leviticus27:33 A neipa in a sim ciang a sawmna nganno sia a tha zawmbel a teal thei natu in vawt kaltang ngawl tu a
Leviticus27:34 Hite Israel mite atu in Sinai Mual tungah Topa ii Moses tungah a thupiakte ahi hi.

Numbers5:13

Numbers5:16 Thiampipa in tua numei

Numbers5:19 Tuaciang thiampipa in tua numei ii thukimna la in
Numbers5:20 Ahizong na pasal na palngul ahile
Numbers5:21 Topa in na min sia na mite sungah haamsiatna khat suaksak tahen. Topa in na numei thilte kinsakin
Numbers5:22 Hi tui na ngil sungah tum a
Numbers5:23 Tuaciang thiampipa in hi haamsiatna teng lai taw at tu a
Numbers5:24 Tua tui sia numeinu ngil sungah a bot mama natna a piangsak thei tu in a neaksak ma in
Numbers5:25 thiampipa in numei nu khut sungah a om biakpiakna anvui sia la tu a

Numbers6:1 Topa in Moses tungah
Numbers6:2 a nuai a kihilnate Israel mite a piak tu in thupia hi. Pa ahizong numei ahizong Nazirite mi suak tu khi hi
Numbers6:3 sapittui le kham thei ngui theite ten tu hi. Ama in sapitnga taw dawn tu a kivawt bangma dawn ngawl tu a
Numbers6:4 Ama in Nazirite te ahi hun sungin sapitkung pan a piang peuma
Numbers6:5 Ama in Nazirite kiciamna nuai ah a om hun sung theampo a sam meet ngawl tu a
Numbers6:6 Ama sam sia Pathian tungah ki aapna lim hi a
Numbers6:7 
Numbers6:8 Ama in Nazirite te ahi laiteng Topa tungah a kipum aap ahi hi.
Numbers6:9 Thakhat thu in a thi pa khat ii kungah a om hu in Nazirite pa in a kipum aap sa
Numbers6:10 Ni liat ni in ama in Topa ompuina Puanbuk sung tumna ah a om thiampipa kungah inn vakhu nii ahi buale ngam vakhu nii paipui tu hi.
Numbers6:11 Thiampipa in khat sia mawphel biakpiakna in
Numbers6:12 Nazirite ahi na bangin Topa tungah amate hun sia aap kik tu hi. A masa hun teng kisimsak ngawl tu hi
Numbers6:13 Nazirite khat a kiciam hun a cin ciang ama in a zeksa teng vawt tu hi. Ama in Puanbuk tumna ah pai in
Numbers6:14 a mealhem ngawl nganhing thum Topa pia tu hi: meihal biakpiakna in kum khat a pha tuutalno khat
Numbers6:15 Ama in tol saw ngawl anluum law khat: olive thau taw hel in a vawt
Numbers6:16 Thiampipa in hi teng theampo Topa kungah paipui tu a
Numbers6:17 Ama in pawlkhop biakpiakna in tuutal khat sia Topa tungah anluum law khat taw pia tu hi; ama in antang le sapittui biakpiakna zongh pia tu hi.
Numbers6:18 Puanbuk tumna ah tua nazirite in a sam meet tu a
Numbers6:19 Tuaciang thiampipa in a kihuan tuutal liang la tu a
Numbers6:20 Tuasia zawkciang thiampipa in tua teng Topa tungah a tuam vilvel letsong in pia tu hi; tuate thiampipa atu in a thiangtho biakpiakna hi a
Numbers6:21 Hite Nazirite mite zui tu ngeina hi a; ahizong Nazirite khat in a kulza sangin a tamzaw piak tu in kiciamna a nei le ama kamciam piak bang linlian in cingsak hamtang tu hi.

Numbers15:1 Topa in Moses tungah
Numbers15:2 Israel mite ii zui tu in a nuai a ngeinate pia hi.
Numbers15:3 Meihal biakpiakna
Numbers15:4 Meihal biakpiakna in tuu ahizong keal ahizong Topa mai ah a pia pawpo in antang biakpiakna ah nganno khat ciang olive thau litre khat taw a kihel anvui kilogramme khat
Numbers15:5 
Numbers15:6 Tuutal khat a kipiak ciang
Numbers15:7 le sapittui litre khat le lang taw pia khawm tu hi. Hi sangaw biakpiaknate ii ngimnam in Topa lungkimsak hi.
Numbers15:8 Meihal biakpiakna ahibuale
Numbers15:9 antang biakpiakna in olive thau litre nii taw a kihel anvui kilogramme thum
Numbers15:10 le sapittui litre nii taw kipia khawm tu hi. Hi sangaw biakpiakna ngimnam sia in Topa lungkimsak hi.
Numbers15:11 Biakpiakna in khuital khat
Numbers15:12 Nganhing khat sang a tamzaw a kipiak ciang nganhing a phaza zui in vanh dangte zongh kikhan to tu hi.
Numbers15:13 Israel mi tatak theampo in a ngimnam taw Topa lungkim na ahi
Numbers15:14 Ngamdangmi khat note sungah tawmvei sung ahizong a tawntung ahizong a teang pa in hun khat pawpo ah Topa ii a ngim dik a sak an taw biakpiakna a nei le tua ngeinate ma zui tu hi.
Numbers15:15 Noma na hi uh zong
Numbers15:16 thukhamte le ngeinate a kibang ma in note le amate zui tu ahi hi.
Numbers15:17 Topa ii a piak tu ngamah
Numbers15:18 Israel mite ii zui tu a nuai a ngeinate Topa in Moses tungah pia hi.
Numbers15:19 Tua ngam pan a piang ante a neak uh ciang pawlkhat sia Topa aituam atu in kikoituam tu hi.
Numbers15:20 Anthak na laak uh ciang anluum na em maksakbel uh sia Topa tungah a tuamin kipia tu hi. Na ancilna sung pan antang na piaktuam bangin hisia kipia tu hi.
Numbers15:21 Na anluum emte sung pan hi a tuam vilvel letsong sia Topa tungah maisang hun theampo ah kipia tu hi.
Numbers15:22 Ahihang Topa in Moses tungah a piak zui tu ngeina pawlkhat sia
Numbers15:23 Topa ii Moses tungtawn a
Numbers15:24 taangpite ii a heak ngawlna hu in
Numbers15:25 Thiampipa in taangpite atu in a zeksa thiansuana vawt tu a
Numbers15:26 Israel taangpi bup le amate sungah a teang ngamdangmite a vekpi in a khialna kimaisak tu hi
Numbers15:27 Mihing khat in ama aituamin mawna khialna a vawt tha ahile
Numbers15:28 Thiampipa in biaknatau ah tua pa a mawna a khialna pan thiansua natu in a zeksa thiansuana teng vawt tu a
Numbers15:29 Hi ngeina sia Israel mi tatak te ahizong
Numbers15:30 Ahizong ngammi ahizong
Numbers15:31 banghang ziam cile ama in Topa ci bang nialin a thupiakte khat a palsat kaltang hang ahi hi. A thina in ama kivawt ahi hi.
Numbers15:32 Khatvei

Numbers35:1 Jericho khua pan Jordan ngun ngalkhat Moab zaangtam ah Topa in Moses tungah
Numbers35:2 “Israel te ii a nga a neisate sung pan Levi te teen natu in khuapi pawlkhat le a khuapite kiimkot ah ngan tha natu leitang a piak nanak tu in son in.
Numbers35:3 Hi khuapite Levi te neisa hi tu a
Numbers35:4 Nganthana mun sia khuapi luphungte pan a kiimkot metre 450 veu zai tu hi
Numbers35:5 Tua hile ngantha natu sia khuapi kiimkot teng hi a
Numbers35:6 Levi te tungah bukna khuapi luk na pia tu uh a
Numbers35:7 a vekpi in sawmli le liat hi.
Numbers35:8 A nam khat sim ii sungah Levi te ii khuapi phaza tu sia
Numbers35:9 Topa in Moses tungah
Numbers35:10 Israel mite a sonsawn tu in thupia a: “Jordan Ngun kaanin Canaan ngamsung na tum uh ciang
Numbers35:11 ngaisut khol ngawlin mi khat in ngual a that tha le ama suatak thei natu in a buk natu khuapite teal tu nu hi.
Numbers35:12 Tua munah mithi pa mealheak a phula nuam sia ii khut sung pan suakta tu hi. Mihing that hi ci in a kimawsak pa sia mipi mai ah thu a kikhensat mateng kithat ngawl tu hi.
Numbers35:13 Khuapi luk
Numbers35:14 Jordan nisuana sangah thum le Canaan ngam sungah thum teal vun.
Numbers35:15 Hi khuapi luk te sia Israel mite le tawmvei sung ahizong a tawntung ahizong a teang ngamdangmite atu in bukna hi tu hi. Ngaisut khol ngawlin mi khat a that tha pawpo in tua khuapi khat pawpo zuan thei tu hi.

Numbers35:17 
Numbers35:18

Numbers35:21 ahibuale a khuttum taw thongin a that le ama sia mihing that mawna nei a
Numbers35:22 “Ahizong sonteena in mihing khat in a ngaimawk ngawl ngual khat po sawnvawk a
Numbers35:23 Ahibuale a liamsua nuam hi ngawl
Numbers35:24 Tuabang thute ah taangpite in a thi sia ii bee pa
Numbers35:25 Taangpite in mihing that mawna nei pa sia
Numbers35:26 Mihing that mawna nei pa sia a suatakna a bukna khuapi nusia a
Numbers35:27 tuaciang mithi pa ii beepa in mu in a thatlum le hi phulaakna sia mi that hi ngawl hi.
Numbers35:28 Mihing that mawna nei pa sia a bukna khuapi ah Thiampi Lianbelpa thi dong teang hamtang lai tu a
Numbers35:29 Hi ngeinate na teenna mun po ah nangma le na suan na paalte ii zui tu ahi hi.

Numbers35:31 Mihing that pa sia kithatlum tu hi. Ama mawna daan pan a suatak natu in sum taw kitan thei ngawl tu hi.

Deuteronomy5:25 Ahizong banghangin thina tu masuan in om kik tu khu ziam? A lauhuai tua meikuang in hong kaanghlum tu hi. Topa ih Pathian hong paupuina aw ih za kik le ih thi takpi tu hi.
Deuteronomy5:26 A nungta Pathian ii meikuang sung pan a paupuina a zaak zawkciang a nungta mihing om ngei na ziam?
