Deuteronomy24:3 Tua pa in zongh dei ngawlin kikhulna lai vawt a
Deuteronomy24:4 Hi bang thute tungtaang ah a pasal masa in ama teenpui kik ngawl tu hi; tua pa atu in a numei sia a thiang ngawl ahi hi. Tua pa in a teenpui kik ahile Topa a do suak tu hi. Topa na Pathian ii hong piak tu ngam ah hi bang a cizathuai mawna vawt ngawl tu nu hi.
Deuteronomy24:5 “Zi nei tuung khat sia ngalkap kitumsak ngawl tu a
Deuteronomy24:6 “Mihing khat tungah na khat na zawn le
Deuteronomy24:7 “Israel a mipui khat ngu a
Deuteronomy24:8 “A lauhuai mama vun natna na vei uh ciang
Deuteronomy24:9 Egypt pan nong pai uh lai
Deuteronomy24:10 “Ngual tungah na khat na zawn le khapna in hong piak tu a puansilh sia a inn sungah tumin la heak vun.
Deuteronomy24:11 A puasang pan ngak vun a
Deuteronomy24:12 Ama sia mizawng khat ahile
Deuteronomy24:13 a mut thei natu in nitak simin ama pia kik vun. Tuasia ciang ama lungdam tu a
Deuteronomy24:14 “Israel na mipuite ahibuale na khua sungah a teang ngamdang mite
Deuteronomy24:15 Ni sim nitum ma in a nitha pia vun. Ama sum kisamh in
Deuteronomy24:16 “A tate khialna liante hangin a nu le a pa thina thuak ngawl tu a
Deuteronomy24:17 “Ngamdangmite le tangate ii a nga tu te khaktan heak vun a; meingong nu ii puansilh sia leiba khapna in la heak vun.
Deuteronomy24:18 Egypt ngam ah sal na hina uh le Topa na Pathian ii hong suataksakna thu phawk vun; tua hu in hi thupiakna sia kong pia hi.
Deuteronomy24:19 “Lo ante na laak uh ciang na laak sa na puak ngawl uhte pai in la kik heak vun; Topa na Pathian in na nasepna po ah
Deuteronomy24:20 Olive kungte khatvei na law zawk uh ciang a taanglaite pai in lo kik heak vun; tuate ngamdangmite
Deuteronomy24:21 Na sapitngate khatvei na law zawk uh ciang
Deuteronomy24:22 Egypt ngam ah sila na hina uh mangil ngei heak vun; tua hu in hi thupiakna sia kong pia hi.
Deuteronomy25:1 “Sonteena in Israel te nii sia thu kinei in zum kithen a
Deuteronomy25:2 A maw pa sia saat thuak tu in thu a kikhen le
Deuteronomy25:3 Ama sia sawmlivei dong kisaat thei tu a
Deuteronomy25:4 “Khuital khat an na cilsak laitakin a muk tuamsak heak vun.
Deuteronomy25:5 “Unau nii inn khat ah teang khawm a
Deuteronomy25:6 Mithi pa ii bee le ngui Israel minam sungah a bo ngawl natu in amate ii nei a tapaciil sia mithipa ii tapa in kingaisun tu hi.
Deuteronomy25:7 Ahizong mithi pa ii suapuipa in ama a teenpui nuam buale tua nu sia khua lampuite mai ah pai tu a
Deuteronomy25:8 Tuaciang khua lampuite in tua pa samin thu sonpui tu hi. Tua pa in a teenpui nuam bualai ahile
Deuteronomy25:9 a suapuipa zi in khua lampuite mai
Deuteronomy25:10 Israel sungah tua pa ii innkuan sia
Deuteronomy25:11 “Pasal nii kihau a
Deuteronomy25:12 tua nu hesuak ngawlin; a khut tansak vun.
Deuteronomy25:13 “Toaisuangte le piciangte na zak uh ciang theam heak vun.
Deuteronomy25:14 
Deuteronomy25:15 Topa na Pathian ii hong piak tu ngam ah na khan a sau thei natu in toaisuangte le piciangte thumaan thutak taw zangh vun.
Deuteronomy25:16 Topa in ngualtheamte ngaimaw hi.
Deuteronomy25:17 “Egypt ngam pan nong pai uh lai in
Deuteronomy25:18 Amate in Pathian kiita ngawl ahiciang noma toi in na tha uh a bo ciang na nung pan hong simin
Deuteronomy25:19 Tua ahikom
Deuteronomy26:1 “ Topa na Pathian hong piak tu ngam la in na teen zawk uh ciang
Deuteronomy26:2 note khat simin na laak maksak uh na lo anpalte sung pan khen khat tek khum khat sungah koi in
Deuteronomy26:3 Tua hun lai in
Deuteronomy26:4 “Thiampipa in nangma tung pan tua khum hong saang tu a
Deuteronomy26:5 Tuaciang Topa mai ah hi kammal teng a lot in son in: ‘Ka taanghpupi sia a vak kawkoai Aram mi hi a
Deuteronomy26:6 Egypt te in kote hong vawtsia in zawthawk thu taw sal nasep hong seamsak uh hi.
Deuteronomy26:7 Tuasia ciang ka taanghpupite ii Pathian
Deuteronomy26:8 Ama in a vaangletna le a thahatna taw Egypt ngam pan hong suatak hi. Ama in nalamdang lakna te le a lamdangte vawtin a kiitakhuai nate piangsak hi.
Deuteronomy26:9 Ama in hi munah hong paipui a
Deuteronomy26:10 Tua ahiciang tu in ama hong piaksa anpalte Topa kungah kong paipui hi
Deuteronomy26:11 Topa na Pathian in nang le na innkuanpuite hong piak naphate hangin lungdamko vun; Levi te le note sungah hong teang ngamdangmite zongh taw lungdamko khawm vun.
Deuteronomy26:12 “Kum thum simin na lo ante — sawm a khat sumpite — sia Levi te
Deuteronomy26:13 Topa tungah
Deuteronomy26:14 Hee in kaikut a ka om ciang zong
Deuteronomy26:15 Vantung na omna thiangtho mun pan hong ensuk ta'n a
Deuteronomy26:16 “Tuni in Topa na Pathian in ama ii thukham theampo zui tu in no tungah thu hong pia hi; tua ahiciang tuate na thin na lung theampo taw thumaan takin zui vun.
Deuteronomy26:17 Tuni in Topa sia note Pathian in na saang zo uh hi
Deuteronomy26:18 Ama hong kamciam bangin tuni in Topa in note sia ama mihing in hong saang zo a; ama thukham theampo zui tu in thu hong pia hi.

Deuteronomy27:1 Tuaciang Moses in Israel lampuite taw kopin mipite tungah

Deuteronomy27:6 banghang ziam cile Topa na Pathian atu in na cian biaknatau peuma a ki attan ngawl suangte taw bekin kivawt tu hi. Tualai ah meihal biakpiaknate na pia tu uh a
Deuteronomy27:7 sangaw biakpiakna pia in pawlkhop biakpiaknate ne in Topa na Pathian mai ah lungdamko vun.

Deuteronomy28:1 “Tuni a kong piak Topa na Pathian thupiak theampo thumaan takin zui in
Deuteronomy28:2 Topa na Pathian thu ni vun
Deuteronomy28:3 “ Topa in na khua te na lote thupha hong pia tu hi.
Deuteronomy28:4 “ Topa in ta tam
Deuteronomy28:5 “ Topa in na lo ante le tuate sung pan na vawt uh ante thupha hong pia tu hi.
Deuteronomy28:6 “ Topa in na sep na vawt theampo thupha hong pia tu hi.
Deuteronomy28:7 “Na ngalte in note hong sim ciang Topa in amate zo tu hi. Amate in mun khat pan hong sim tu a
Deuteronomy28:8 “ Topa na Pathian in na nasepna uh thupha hong pia tu a
Deuteronomy28:9 Topa na Pathian ii thu ni in
Deuteronomy28:10 Tuaciang leitung mihingte theampo in note Topa ii a teal ama mihingte na hi uh hunlam hong mu tu uh a
Deuteronomy28:11 “ Topa in no tungah hong piak tu in na taanghpupite tungah a kamciamsa ngam sungah ta tam mama
Deuteronomy28:12 Ama in a na kholna van pan a hun zui in nguatui hong zusak tu a
Deuteronomy28:13 Topa na Pathian in minamte sungah lampui hong suaksak tu a
Deuteronomy28:14 Bangbang po ahizong hi thupiakte na nial ngei buatu uh a
Deuteronomy28:15 “Ahizong tuni in kong piak Topa na Pathian ii hong thupiak theampo le thukham theampo thumaan takin zui ngawlin ama thu na ni bua uh le
Deuteronomy28:16 “ Topa in na khuate le na lote haamsiat tu hi.
Deuteronomy28:17 Topa in na lo ante le tuate sung pan na vawt uh ante haamsiat tu hi.
Deuteronomy28:18 “ Topa in ta tawm bek a nei tu
Deuteronomy28:19 “ Topa in na sep na vawt theampo haamsiat tu hi.
Deuteronomy28:20 “A sia vawtin Topa na nial uh le
Deuteronomy28:21 Ama in na laak tu ngam sungah khat zongh na taan nawn ngawl uh dongin natna khat zawkciang khat hong tungsak tu hi.
Deuteronomy28:22 Topa in a kilaw thei natnate
Deuteronomy28:23 Nguazu ngawl tu a
Deuteronomy28:24 Na lalcip siat uh dong Topa in nguatui taangin leivui le senneal vuipite hong puak tu hi.
Deuteronomy28:25 “ Topa in na ngalte in hong zosak tu hi. Note in mun khat pan na sim tu uh a
Deuteronomy28:26 Na thi uh ciang vacimte le ngamsate hong pai in hong ne tu uh a
Deuteronomy28:27 Topa in Egypt te tungah a tunsak bangma in note uilut hong veisak tu hi. Ama in na pumpite matum veisak tu hi. Cithak natna vei in thak na sa tu uh a
Deuteronomy28:28 Topa in na thin hong kiamcipsak tu a; mittaw lungmangin hong buaisak tu hi.
Deuteronomy28:29 Mittaw bangin sun lai in na zawt tu a
Deuteronomy28:30 Zi tu in ngaknu khat doksa in na koi tu a — ahizong midang khat in ama teenpui tu hi. Inn khat na sa tu a — ahizong a sungah na teang ngei buatu hi. Sapit na ciing tu a — ahizong a nga na ne ngei buatu hi.
Deuteronomy28:31 Na khui sia na mu tangin kingo tu a
Deuteronomy28:32 “Na tapate le na tanute na mu tangin ngamdang mite tungah salin kipia tu hi. Na tate hong cia kik tu en in ni simin na mit zung na liang ahihang a luithawthong hi tu hi.
Deuteronomy28:33 Haksa takin na ciin sa lo ante ngamdang minam khat in hong laksak tu a
Deuteronomy28:34 Na thuaknate in na thin hong kiamcipsak tu hi.
Deuteronomy28:35 Topa in na peangte a dam thei ngawl
Deuteronomy28:36 “ Topa in nangma le na kumpipa sia nangma le na taanghpupite ii a teen ngeingawlna ngamdang ah hong paipui tu hi; tua munah thing le suang taw a kivawt pathiante ii na
Deuteronomy28:37 Topa ii hong thethaang natu ngam tuatuam ah note tungah thupiangte hangin mihingte in lamdang sa tu uh hi; amate in note hong nunau in hong ciammui vawt tu uh hi.
Deuteronomy28:38 “Thaici tam mama na ciing tu hi
Deuteronomy28:39 Sapitkung ciingin na pua tu a
Deuteronomy28:40 Na ngamsung theampo ah olive kungte na ciing tu uh hi
Deuteronomy28:41 Tapate le tanute na nei tu uh hi
Deuteronomy28:42 Na thingkungte le na ankungte theampo lung in netum tu hi.
Deuteronomy28:43 “Na ngam sungah a teang ngamdangmite in vaang nei vaial tu a
Deuteronomy28:44 Amate in no hong pukthaak tu sum nei tu a
Deuteronomy28:45 “ Topa na Pathian thu ni ngawlin hong piak thukham theampo na zui ngawl hu in

Deuteronomy28:47 Topa in a nanam in thupha hong pia hi
Deuteronomy28:48 Tua ahikom
Deuteronomy28:49 Topa in no hong langpan tu in a kampau na heak ngawl uh minam khat leimong panin hong puak tu hi. Muvanlai khat bangin amate in no hong man tu hi.
Deuteronomy28:50 Amate ngongtat tu a
Deuteronomy28:51 Amate in na ngannote le na lo ante hong neaksak tu a
Deuteronomy28:52 Amate in Topa na Pathian ii no hong piak tu ngamsung khua theampo sim tu a

Deuteronomy28:59 ama in na suan na paalte tungah a dam thei ngawl natnate le a kikhaam zo ngeingawl a lauhuai a kilaw thei natnate tungsak tu hi.

Deuteronomy30:11 “Tuni kong thupiak sia haksa lei ngawl a

Deuteronomy32:1 “Van le lei awng
Deuteronomy32:2 Kong hilcianna nguamal bangin taak tu a
Deuteronomy32:3 Topa min ka pok tu a
Deuteronomy32:4 “ Topa sia note hong dal a hatbelpa hi a
Deuteronomy32:5 Ahizong note sia thumaan ngawlin ama ii mi tu in na citaak bua uh a
Deuteronomy32:6 A mawmaw
Deuteronomy32:7 “A bosa hunte
Deuteronomy32:8 A Saangbel Pa in minamte a ngam a lei tu pia a; mite teen natu mun khensatsak hi. Ama in minam simin vantung mi khat tek pia a
Deuteronomy32:9 ahizong Jacob suan le paalte sia ama atu in teal hi.
Deuteronomy32:10 “Ama in a ngamtongta vuipi vakna duisung ngampa sennealngam sungah amate vakkotna mu hi. Ama in ama le ama a kikep bangin amate keamcing hi.
Deuteronomy32:11 Muvanlai in a note len tu sinpui a
Deuteronomy32:12 Topa bek in ama mite lampui a
Deuteronomy32:13 “ Topa in amate mualtung munte uksak a
Deuteronomy32:14 A khuipuite le a kealpuite in noai tam tatak ma pia a
Deuteronomy32:15 “ Topa ii mite hau uh a
Deuteronomy32:16 A milim biakna Topa in ensan a; a pha ngawl a sepna in Topa thin uuksak hi.
Deuteronomy32:17 Amate in pathian tatak ahi ngawl pathiante
Deuteronomy32:18 Amate in a vaanglian ngumpa
Deuteronomy32:19 “Hi thu teng Topa in a mu ciang a thin uuk a
Deuteronomy32:20 ‘Amate ka hu nawn buatu hi
Deuteronomy32:21 Amate in a milimte taw ka thin hong uuksak a
Deuteronomy32:22 Ka thin uukna sia mei bangin kuang a
Deuteronomy32:23 “‘Keima in amate tungah a bo thei ngawl tuasiatnate ka tungsak tu a
Deuteronomy32:24 Amate ngilkial le cisa natna taw thi tu a; a lauhuai natnate taw thi tu uh hi. Ngamsa ngilote in amate ka simsak tu a
Deuteronomy32:25 Ngalpi hangin amate lam lai ah thi tu uh a; a bangkua uh sungah patauna tung tu hi. Tangvalno le ngaknuno te thi tu uh a; nausente le khanghaamte zongh kikhoaikhe ngawl tu hi.
Deuteronomy32:26 Keima in amate ka mon siat tu a
Deuteronomy32:27 Ahizong amate a hualcip pa keima ma ka hi ciang a ngalte in ka mite a zawna thu sia kiphatsakna in ka neisak thei buatu hi
Deuteronomy32:28 “Israel sia khua ngaisutna nei ngawl minam khat hi a; ciimna bangma nei ngawl hi.
Deuteronomy32:29 Amate in a ngallelna ii ahang sia mu ngawl a; thupiangte tel zo ngawl uh hi.
Deuteronomy32:30 Banghangin mi khat in tulkhat zo a
Deuteronomy32:31 A ngalte in amate ii pathiante thazawm a
Deuteronomy32:32 A ngalte Sodom le Gomorrah bangin tatsia a
Deuteronomy32:33 sapittui sia ngulngu taw vawt bang ahi hi.
Deuteronomy32:34 “ Topa in a ngalte ii vawtna teng ciamtee a; daan a piak hun tu ngak nginge hi.
Deuteronomy32:35 Topa in amate phula in daan pia tu a; a kiamsuk tu hun hong pai tu a; a lal tu ni nai hi.
Deuteronomy32:36 A thahatna teng a bo a mu ciang Topa in a mite suatak tu hi. Ama in a naseamte a panpui tu a om ngawl hunlam a mu ciang
Deuteronomy32:37 Tuasia ciang Topa in a mite tungah
Deuteronomy32:38 Noma in na sangaw biakpiakna sathau taw amate na vaak uh a
Deuteronomy32:39 “ ‘Keima
Deuteronomy32:40 Keima in a nungta Pathian ka hi takpi bangma in
Deuteronomy32:41 a tee vazal ka namsau ka taat tu a
Deuteronomy32:42 Ka thaltangte amate chi sungah kidia tu a
Deuteronomy32:43 “Minamte awng Topa ii mite pok hamtang tu nu hi — ama in ama ii mite a thatte theampo daan pia hi. Ama in a ngalte phula a
Deuteronomy32:44 Moses le Nun tapa Joshua in Israel mite zaak thei tu in
Deuteronomy32:45 Moses in mite tungah Pathian ii hilnate a son zawkciang
Deuteronomy32:46 ama in
Deuteronomy32:47 Hi hilnate kammal thawthong hi ngawl a; na nuntakna tatak uh ahi hi. Tuate zui vun
Deuteronomy32:48 Tua ni ma in Topa in Moses tungah
Deuteronomy32:49 “Jericho khuapi ii langkhat a om Moab te ngamsung Abarim Mual te ah pai in a
Deuteronomy32:50 Na suapuipa Aaron ii Hor Mual tungah a thi bangin tua mual tungah na thi tu hi
Deuteronomy32:51 banghang ziam cile note ngeal in Israel mite mai ah keima hong melsia in nong thumaan bua uh hi. Zin ngampa sung Kadesh khua nai tui omna Meribah ah na om uh lai in
Deuteronomy32:52 Tua ngam sia na ngal et tu a
Deuteronomy33:1 Hite sia Pathian ii teal pa Moses in a thi ma in Israel mite tungah a thansak thuphate ahi hi.
Deuteronomy33:2 Sinai Mual pan Topa hong pai a; Edom ngam tungah ni bangin suak in
Deuteronomy33:3 Topa in a mite it a
Deuteronomy33:4 Ih minam ii neisa a manphabel Moses ii hong piaksa thukham ih zui hi.
Deuteronomy33:5 Tua nam teng le a lampuite a kikaikhop ciang
Deuteronomy33:6 Moses in Reuben nam huvau hi bangin ci hi: “A mite a tawm hangin Reuben nam mong ngei heak hen.
Deuteronomy33:7 Ama in Judah nam huvau hi bangin ci hi: “ Topa awng
Deuteronomy33:8 Ama in Levi nam huvau hi bangin ci hi: “ Topa awng
Deuteronomy33:9 Amate in nangma tungah a nute a pate
Deuteronomy33:10 Amate in na thukham a zui thei natu in na mite hil tu hi; Na biaknatau tungah sangaw biakpiaknate pia tu uh hi.
Deuteronomy33:11 Topa awng
Deuteronomy33:12 Ama in Benjamin nam huvau hi bangin ci hi: “Hite Topa ii it le a kepcing nam ahi hi. Ama in sunkhuateakin amate cing a
Deuteronomy33:13 Ama in Joseph nam huvau hi bangin ci hi: “ Topa in a ngam a lei sia nguatui le leinuai tui taw thupha pia tahen.
Deuteronomy33:14 A ngam a lei in thupha nga hen a
Deuteronomy33:15 A taanghtawng mualte sia deiteal thingngate taw kidim tahen.
Deuteronomy33:16 A ngam a lei sia napha theampo taw kidim hen a
Deuteronomy33:17 Joseph in khuital khat ii thahatna nei a
Deuteronomy33:18 Ama in Zebulun le Issachar minamte huvau hi bangin ci hi: “Zelubun sia tuipi tungah sum vawtna taw nuamsa tahen a
Deuteronomy33:19 Amate in a mual tungah ngamdang mite sam a
Deuteronomy33:20 Ama in Gad nam huvau hi bangin ci hi: “Amate ngam a zaisak pa Pathian pok vun. Gad in tawpi khat bangin a lu a baan khat balkeak tu in pang hi.
Deuteronomy33:21 Amate in amate atu in ngam phabelna mun la tu hi; Lampui khat ii tel amate kipia hi. Israel lampuite a kikaikhop tek ciang
Deuteronomy33:22 Ama in Dan nam huvau hi bangin ci hi: “Dan sia tawpi no khat ahi hi; Ama sia Bashan panin leang hi
Deuteronomy33:23 Ama in Naphtali nam huvau hi bangin ci hi: “Naphtali sia Topa ii maipha nga in nasia takin thupha kipia hi
Deuteronomy33:24 Ama in Asher nam huvau hi bangin ci hi: “Asher sia nam dangte sangin thupha kipia zaw hi. Ama a suapuipate ii diksakbel hi hen a
Deuteronomy33:25 A khuate thik kongpite taw kidal hen a
Deuteronomy33:26 Israel mite awng
Deuteronomy33:27 Pathian in note hong dal tawntung zo a; A tawntung a om ama ii khutte in no hong panpui hi. Ama in maisang na manaw kawkawmin na ngalte notkeak a
Deuteronomy33:28 Tuabangin Jacob suan le paalte van pan a taak daaitui ii a kawtsakna mun
Deuteronomy33:29 Israel awng
Deuteronomy34:1 Moses sia Moab zaangtam pan Nebo Mual
Deuteronomy34:2 Naphtali ngam bup
Deuteronomy34:3 Judah ngamkhen thangsang; tuaciang Zoar zaangtam panin palm pona khuapi Jericho dong zaangtam teng lak hi.
Deuteronomy34:4 Tua zawkciang Topa in Moses tungah
Deuteronomy34:5 Tua ahiciang Topa ii naseampa Moses sia
Deuteronomy34:6 Topa in Moses sia Bethpeor khua langkhat
Deuteronomy34:7 Moses sia kum za le kum kul a phak ciang thi a; a tha a ngal zongh a hat ngei za ma in hat lai in
Deuteronomy34:8 Israel mite Moab zaangtam ah ama atu in ni sawmthum sung khuangai in om uh hi.
Deuteronomy34:9 Nun tapa Joshua sia ciimna taw kidim hi
Deuteronomy34:10 Topa in ama taw maitang kisi in paupui hi. Moses bang ahi Israel mite sungah kamsaang khat zongh om ngeingawl hi;
Deuteronomy34:11 Topa in Moses sawlin Egypt kumpipa
Deuteronomy34:12 Israel te theampo ii mit mu in Moses ii na lianpi le a lauhuai nate a vawt bangin a vawt thei kamsaang dang om ngawl hi.
Joshua1:1 Topa ii naseam Moses thi zawkciang
Joshua1:2 Ama in
Joshua1:3 Moses tungah ka ci sa bangma in nang le ka mite theampo ii na si natu leitang a buppi in kong pia zo hi.
Joshua1:4 Na ngamngi te sia thangsang sennealngam panin saksang Lebanon Mualpite dong kithung to tu hi; nisuana sang Ngunpi lian Euphrates pan Hit te ngam kaantan in
Joshua1:5 Joshua awng
Joshua1:6 Na thin khosak in a kimuang in
Joshua1:7 Na thin khosak in a kimuang po in; tuaciang ka naseampa Moses ii hong piak Thukham a buppi in na zui hamtang in. Tuate khat zongh na ngaingon heak in
Joshua1:8 Na biakpiakna sungah Thukham Laibu sia sim vateei tawntung tu ni hi. Sun taw zan taw tuasia kantel in a ki at theampo na zui hamtang vun. Tuasia ciang na nuamsa tu a
Joshua1:9 Thin takkhana le kimuanna nei tu in kong thupiak sia ciamtee in! Lau heak in a
Joshua1:10 Tua zawkciang Joshua in lampuite ngiaphual sungah
Joshua1:11 pai kawkoai in sawl a
Joshua1:12 Reuben le Gad ii namte le Manasseh ii nam khenlang tungah Joshua in
Joshua1:13 “ Topa na Pathian in Jordan ngun nisuana ngam sia na inn na lo tu in hong pia tu hi ci in Topa naseampa Moses ii a ci teng ciamtee vun.
Joshua1:14 Na zite na tate le na ngannote sia hi lai munah taang tu a
Joshua1:15 Topa na Pathian ii amate a piaksa Jordan nitumna sang ngam teng a laak uh mateng tuabangin ngamta tu nu hi. Ama in Israel nam teng a vekpi in ngammuanna a piak zawkciang Topa naseampa Moses ii no hong piak Jordan nisuana ngam
Joshua1:16 Amate in Joshua tungah
Joshua1:17 Moses ii thu ka nit uh bangma in na thu hong ni tu khu hi
Joshua1:18 Na thuneina hong thusim ngawlte le na thupiakna khat pawpo hong ni ngawlte in thina thuak tu hi. Na thin khosak in a kimuang in
Joshua2:1 Tua zawkciang Joshua in thudawpkute nii sia Acacia ngiaphual panin paisak a
Joshua2:2 Jericho khua kumpipa in ngal vil tu Israel mi pawlkhat tua zanin hong pai hi ci in za hi
Joshua2:3 tua ahikom ama in Rahab tungah thu puak a: “Na inn ah hong tung mite in ih ngam bup hong enkuu tu in hong pai hi! Amate hong pusua ta'n!” ci hi.
Joshua2:4 “Mihing pawlkhat ahile ka inn ah hong pai peu hi
Joshua2:5 
Joshua2:6 
Joshua2:7 Kumpipa mite in khuapi nusia a
Joshua2:8 Thudawpkute zan a lup ma in Rahab sia innkhum tungah kaato a
Joshua2:9 hi bangin ci hi; “ Topa in hi ngam sia no hong pia zo hi ci in ka he hi. Ngamsung mite khat simin no hong kiita vadil hi.
Joshua2:10 Topa in Egypt ngam na nusiat uh ciangin na mai a om San Tuipi sia kangsak ci in ka za uh hi. Jordan nisuana sang Amor te ii kumpite nii Sihon le Og na thalup uh zongh ka za uh hi.
Joshua2:11 Ka zaak uh po ciang ka lau uh hi; no hu in ka thin letna teng ka bosua uh hi. Topa na Pathian sia vantung le hi lai leitung ii Pathian ahi hi.
Joshua2:12 No tungah kong dik bangin ka innkuanpui te tungah dikna taw nong ngamtat natu in ama min taw hong kiciam tavun a
Joshua2:13 Ka pa le ka nu
Joshua2:14 Tua mite in ama tungah
Joshua2:15 Rahab sia khuapi luphung pang sungah inn vawtin teang ahi bangma ama in pasal te nii khauzeen taw kongvang no panin khiasuk hi.
Joshua2:16 “Mual tung ngam sang zuan tavun
Joshua2:17 Pasalte in ama munah
Joshua2:18 Na ngam uh kong sim uh ciang khauhual san hisia khitin nong khiaksukna kongvang no panin kaaisuksak in. Na pa na nu le na suapuite na pa innkuanpuite theampo na inn sungah khawm siat tu ni hi.
Joshua2:19 Khat po doipua ah a pusuak le ama ii thina sia ama ii khialna hi tu a
Joshua2:20 Ahizong ko ii ngamtatna sia khat po tungah na son a
Joshua2:21 Numei in tua thu lungkim in amate a paisak hi. Amate pai zawkciang numei nu in khauhual san khat a kongvang no panin a kaai suk tu in khit hi.
Joshua2:22 Thukankute mual kawm ah pai in buu uh hi. Kumpipa mite in amate sia ni thum tangciing mun theampo ah zong uh hi
Joshua2:23 Tua zawkciang thudawpkute nii sia mual tung pan hong tuaksuk uh a
Joshua2:24 tuasia zawkciang

Joshua3:5 Joshua in mipite tungah

Joshua3:7 Topa in Joshua munah

Joshua3:10 Maisang ah na manaw uh ciang ama in Canaan te

Joshua3:12 Tu in

Joshua4:1 Minam buppi Jordan a kaantan zawk uh ciang Topa in Joshua mun ah
Joshua4:2 “Nam khat pan mihing khat veu
Joshua4:3 Jordan ngun laizang thiampite ii dinna san tak panin suangtum sawm le nii lasak in. Amate in hi suangtumte pua in zan ciang ngiaphual na saat natu munah koi in sawl in
Joshua4:4 Tuaciang Joshua in mihing sawm le nii a teal teng sam a
Joshua4:5 “ Topa na Pathian ii Thuciamna Thingkuang ii mai Jordan ngun sungah na pai tavun a
Joshua4:6 Topa in bang seam zo ci in hi suangtumte in mipite phawksak tu hi. Mai sangah na tate in hi suangte ii a cinopna bang ziam ci hong dok ciangin
Joshua4:7 Topa Thuciamna Thingkuang ii ngun a kaantan ciangin Jordan ngun sia a luan tawlnga hi
Joshua4:8 Tua pasalte in Joshua ii thupiakna te zui uh hi. Topa ii Joshua thu a piak bangma amate in suangtum sawm le nii Jordan ngun sung pan la a
Joshua4:9 Thuciamna Thingkuang a pua thiampite ii dinna san Jordan ngun laizang ah Joshua zongh in suangtum sawm le nii ciang hi. (Tua suangtumte tua munah om lai hi.)
Joshua4:10 Topa ii Joshua tungah a thupiak
Joshua4:11 Amate ngun langkhat a thet siat zawk uh ciang Topa Thuciamna Thingkuang a pua thiampite sia mipite mai ah pai uh hi.
Joshua4:12 Reuben le Gad namte le Manasseh nam a khenlang sung pan ngal sim tu in a kinging te sia Moses ii sawl bangin a taang lai mipite mai ah ngun kan masa uh hi.
Joshua4:13 Topa ii a ompui ngal sim tu in a kinging sa mihing 40
Joshua4:14 Topa ii tua ni a sep a vawt teng in Joshua sia Israel te ngaisutna ah mihing thupi mama khat suaksak hi. Amate ii Moses a zatak vawt uh bangma
Joshua4:15 Tua zawkciang Topa in Joshua munah
Joshua4:16 Thuciamna Thingkuang a pua thiampite Jordan ngun sung pan hong kaato natu thupia tu in sawl hi.
Joshua4:17 Joshua in tuabang ma in seam hi
Joshua4:18 Tuaciang thiampite ngun vaal a thet uh ciang
Joshua4:19 Mipite sia a tha khatna ni sawm ni in Jordan kaantan uh a
Joshua4:20 Tua munah Jordan ngun sung pan a laak uh suangtum sawm le nii teng sia Joshua in ciang hi.
Joshua4:21 Ama in Israel te mun ah
Joshua4:22 Jordan ngun sia leiko tungah Israel te ii kaantan hun lai thute na son tu uh hi.
Joshua4:23 Topa na Pathian in ei atu San Tuipi sung leiko a suasak bangma in Jordan ngun zongh ih kaantan siat dong leiko a suasakna thu na son tu uh hi.
Joshua4:24 Hi sia hu in leitung mi theampo in Topa ii vaangletna sia bangza in lian ci in he tu a

Joshua5:3 Joshua sia Topa sawl bangin ngamta hi
Joshua5:4 Israel te ii Egypt a nusiat lai in pa a minpiang vunteap ki at siat zo hi. Ahihang kum sawmli sung sennealngam a kaantan hun sungin a piang pano te kuama vunteap ki at ngawl hi. Egypt ngam a nusiat lai in ngal sim thei tu kumcingsa te theampo zongh tua hun bo kuan ciang Topa ii thu a nit ngawl hu in thi siat zo hi. A taanghpupite tungah a khapsa tua ngam hau
Joshua5:5 
Joshua5:6 
Joshua5:7 Hi mite ii tapate sia vunteap ki at ngeingawl hi; Joshua ii vunteap a atsak te sia hi khangthak te ahi hi.
Joshua5:8 Vunteap a at zawkciang minam bup sia a ki atna ma a dam dong ngiaphual ah taam uh hi.
Joshua5:9 Topa in Joshua mun ah
Joshua5:10 Jericho hui zaangtam
Joshua5:11 A khuavak ni sia Canaan ngam ah a kiciing ante a neak phit ni hi: antang kan le anluum tol saw ngawl te ne uh hi.
Joshua5:12 Tuasia hunin manna an hong taak nawn ngawl a

Joshua6:3 Nang le na ngalkapte khuapi kiimkot ah ni khat in khatvei veu ni luk sung pai tu nu hi.
Joshua6:4 Thiampi sali sia lemle khat tek toai in Thuciamna Thingkuang mai ah pai tu hi. A ni sali ni ciangin nang le na ngalkapte sia khuapi kiimkot salivei pai tu nu hi
Joshua6:5 Tua zawkciang
Joshua6:6 Joshua in thiampite sam a

Joshua6:8 Tua ahikom
Joshua6:9

Joshua6:12 Joshua sia a zing ciang zingtuungin tho a
Joshua6:13

Joshua6:16 A salivei a kiimkotna
Joshua6:17 Khuapi le a sungah a om theampo sia
Joshua6:18 Ahizong a kisusia tu nate khat zongh la thei ngawl tu nu hi; tuabang na ngamta uh le ngimna le lalna Israel te ngiaphual ah tungsak tu nu hi.
Joshua6:19 Ngunn
Joshua6:20 Tua ahikom thiampite in lemle tum hi. Mipite in tuasia a zaak poma ciang nging takin au uh a
Joshua6:21 A namsau uh taw khuapi sung a om mi theampo

Joshua6:23 Tua ahiciang amate in Rahab sia a pa
Joshua6:24 Tua zawkciang amate in khuapi sia a sung a om theampo taw cip in haltham a
Joshua6:25 Joshua in pumpi zuak Rahab le a mealheakte sia khoaikhe hi
Joshua6:26 Tua hun laitakin Joshua in a ciliap huai kidop natu thupia hi: “Mihing khat pawpo Jericho khuapi saat kik tu in a hanciam sia Pathian haamsiat nuai ah om tu hi. A kuama po khuapi phungkawng a ciang sia in a tapa lianbel sia thisua tu hi. A kuama po kongpite a sa kik sia in a tapa nobel sia thisua tu hi.”
Joshua6:27 Tuabangin Topa sia Joshua taw omkhawm a
Joshua7:1 A kisusia tu na khat pawpo Jericho pan a laak ngawl natu Topa ii thupiakna kizui ngawl hi. Achan a kici pasal khat in tua thupiak sia ni ngawl hi
Joshua7:2 Joshua in mihing pawlkhat Jericho pan Ai khua ah paisak hi

Joshua7:5 Ai mite in amate sia khuapi kongpi panin suangkhuk pawlkhat omna dong uum uh a

Joshua7:7 Tuaciang Joshua in

Joshua7:11 Israel te in mawna vawt zo hi! Amate ii let tu in ka thupiak
Joshua7:12 Hi sia hu in Israel te in a ngalte nang zo ngawl hi. Tuate ii mai pan amate nungkin hi
Joshua7:13 Thoto in! Mipite thiansua in a
Joshua7:14 Tua ahikom zingsang ciangin amate sia nam khat zawkciang nam khat
Joshua7:15 Pasal khat kiteal in a kiningkhiin vanhte taw kiman pa sia a innkuanpuite le a neisa theampo taw kihal tu hi
Joshua7:16 A zing ciang zingtuungin Joshua in Israel te nam khat zawkciang nam khat mai ah a paisak ciang Judah nam kitealtuam hi.
Joshua7:17 Ama in Judah namte

Joshua7:24 Joshua le Israel mi theampo in Achan
Joshua7:25 Joshua in

Joshua8:1 Topa in Joshua munah
Joshua8:2 Jericho le a kumpipa tungah na vawt uh bangin Ai le a kumpipa tungah na vawt tu uh hi; ahihang tu sia hun ciang vanhte le ngannote noma neisa tu in na keam thei tu uh hi. A muanmawk ngawl het tu in khuapi sia a nungsang pan sim tu in kithoai vun.”
Joshua8:3 Tua ahikom Joshua sia a ngalkap theampo taw Ai khua ah kuan tu in kinging hi. Ama in a ngalkapte sung pan a phabel 30
Joshua8:4 thupiakna hi teng taw zan in kuansak hi
Joshua8:5 Ka mite le keima in khuapi kong neak tu uh hi. Ai khua mite in ko sim tu hong pai uh ciang a masa ih ngamtat bangin kiheak in kong tai tu uh hi.
Joshua8:6 Khuapi pua ah kong thetpui uh dong delsak tu khu hi. A masa lai bangma in amate kung pan a taikeak in hong ngaisun tu hi.
Joshua8:7 Tuasia ciang no sia na bukna uh pan hong pusuak in
Joshua8:8 Khuapi na laak zawk uh ciang
Joshua8:9 Tua ahikom Joshua in amate kuansak a
Joshua8:10 Zingsang tuungin Joshua tho a
Joshua8:11 Ama taw a kithua ngalkapte sia khuapi tumna kongpi sangah pai in
Joshua8:12 Ama in mihing tulnga bang khuapi ii nitumna sang Ai le Bethel kilaklaw ah buusak hi.
Joshua8:13 Ngalkapte sia a kido hun tak ciang ngiaphualpi a om teng khuapi ii saksang ah
Joshua8:14 Ai kumpipa in Joshua ii mite a mu ciang manlang takin diang hi. Ama le a mite sia Jordan Kuam sangah a masa a lai bangma in Israel te do tu in hong pai uh hi
Joshua8:15 Joshua le a mite sia a nungkin bangin hong kiheang a
Joshua8:16 Khuapi sungah a om pasal theampo sia ngalte del tu in kisam a
Joshua8:17 Ai khua mi pasal a minpiang in Israel te del ahikom khuapi kihong keak a
Joshua8:18 Tuasia ciang Topa in Joshua mun ah
Joshua8:19 tuaciang a khut a lapto po ciang
Joshua8:20 Ai mite in a lee et kik uh ciang
Joshua8:21 A dang teng in khuapi la zo in
Joshua8:22 Khuapi sungah a om Israel te sia tu in ngalsim pui tu in hong paisuk uh hi. Tuabangin Ai mite sia Israel te in kiim uum cip zo ci in kimu a
Joshua8:23 Ai kumpipa simngawl kuama nungta in a suakta om ngawl hi. Ai kumpipa ahile kiman a Joshua kungah kipuak hi.
Joshua8:24 Israel te in ngamkolna sungah amate a del ngalte thatlum siat uh hi. Tua zawkciang amate Ai ah heak kikin tua munah a om theampo thatlum siat uh hi.
Joshua8:25 Joshua in a teipalh sia Ai khua kawk topsak a
Joshua8:26

Joshua8:28 Joshua in Ai sia haltum a
Joshua8:29 Ama in Ai kumpipa sia thingkung khat tungah awklumsak a
Joshua8:30 Tuaciang Joshua in Ebal Mual ah Topa Israel te ii Pathian atu biaknatau khat vawt hi.
Joshua8:31 Topa naseampa Moses ii Israel te a hilna bangin Moses ii Thukham sungah: “Thik vanhzakte taw a kitan ngawl suang taw a kivawt biaknatau” sia vawt hi. Tua tungah amate in Topa atu meihal biakpiaknate le pawlkhop biakpiaknate pia uh hi.

Joshua10:30 Topa in Israel te hi khuapi le a kumpipa zosak leleau hi. Amate in kuama khoaikhe ngawlin a sungah a om mi theampo thatlum siat uh hi. A kumpipa tungah Jericho kumpipa a vawt bangin amate in vawt uh hi.
Joshua10:31 Tua zawkciang Joshua le a ngalkaphonpi Libnah panin Lachish ah paitanin tuasia kiim uum in sim uh hi.
Joshua10:32 A kido zawk ni nii ni ciang Topa in Israel te Lachish khua zosak hi. Libnah ah a vawt uh bangma in kuama khoaikhe ngawlin khuapi sungah a om mi theampo thatlum uh hi.

Joshua10:37 tua khua la uh hi. A kumpipa le a dang khuapi sungah a om theampo ahi zong khua nai nate sungah a om theampo ahi zong thatlum uh hi. Joshua in tua khuapi sia Eglon a vawt lai bangma in zaancipsak hi. Kuama a hingkhoai bua hi.

Joshua16:6 tua mun panin Mediterranean Tuipi dong ahi hi. Michmethath sia a saksang ah om hi. Tua ii nisuana sangah ngamngi sia Taanath Shiloh sangah koai a

Joshua16:8 Ngamngi sia Tappuah pan nitumna sang Kanah lui ah pai in Mediterranean Tuipi ah tawp hi. Hi leitang sia Ephraim nam innkuante tan tu in kipia a

Joshua17:3 Zelophehad sia Hepher tapa hi a
Joshua17:4 Amate sia thiampi Eleazar le Nun ii tapa Joshua le lampuite kungah pai in
Joshua17:5 Tua hu in Manasseh in Jordan Ngun ii nisuana sangah Gilead le Bashan belapna in leitang tel sawm nga hi
Joshua17:6 ama suan le paal numeite le pate tel a kipiak khop hang ahi hi. Gilead ngam le lei sia Manasseh suan a taang laite kipia hi.
Joshua17:7 Manasseh ngam sia Shechem nisuana sang Asher pan Michmethath dong ban hi. Tua zawkciang ngamngi sia Entappuah mite sungsuam tu in thangsang ah pai hi.
Joshua17:8 Tappuah ii kiim a leitangte sia Manasseh neisa hi
Joshua17:9 Ngamngi sia tua mun pan Kanah lui dong paisuk hi. A ngam sia Manasseh ngamsung ahisaap hang lui ii thangsang a om khuapite sia Ephraim te neisa ahi hi. Manasseh ngamngi sia lui ii saksang ah paitan a
Joshua17:10 Ephraim sia thang sangah
Joshua17:11 Issachar le Asher ngamte ii sungsang ah Manasseh in Beth Shan le Ibleam
Joshua17:12 Manasseh mite in tua khuapite ah a teang mite not zo ngawl ahikom Canaan mite sia tuasung ah teang suak uh hi.

Joshua17:14 Joseph suan le paalte in Joshua munah

Joshua18:1 Ngam a zawthal zawk uh ciang Israel taangpi bup sia Shiloh ah kikhawm in
Joshua18:2 Amate tel saan tu leitang a piak ngawl lai Israel mite nam sali om lai hi.
Joshua18:3 Tua ahikom Joshua in Israel te mun ah
Joshua18:4 Noma nam sim panin mihing thum veu hong pia tavun. Ngam bup sungah ka vaksak kawkoai tu a
Joshua18:5 A ngam sia khen sali kisua tu hi; Judah sia thangsang a ngam sungah om tu a
Joshua18:6 Hi ngam khen salite ii thu hong at tavun a

Joshua18:8 Tua pasalte ngamlim suai tu in a pai ciang

Joshua23:1 Khuangei mama zawkciang Topa in Israel te sia a kiim a paam ngal launa panin ngammuanna pia hi. Tua hun in Joshua sia huai mama zo hi
Joshua23:2 tua ahikom Israel theampo
Joshua23:3 Noma hu in hi minam teng tungah Topa na Pathian ii a sep a vawt theampo na mu zo uh hi. Topa na Pathian sia no atu in ngal do hi.
Joshua23:4 Ngamsung minam a taanglai te ii leitang sia noma namte atu kong pia zo a
Joshua23:5 Topa na Pathian in no kung pan amate nungkinsak tu a
Joshua23:6 Tua ahikom Moses Thukham laibu sung a ki at theampo na zui natu na kikhuangkho tavun. Tuasung thute khat zongh na ngaingon heak vun
Joshua23:7 tuasia ciang note kawm ah a taanglai mite taw na kipawl buatu uh hi
Joshua23:8 Tua taangin tu dong ciang na thumaan sa uh bangma Topa tungah thumaan tu nu hi.
Joshua23:9 Topa in a thahat minam liante sia na mai sang na manaw uh ciang hong nawkeaksak zo a
Joshua23:10 No sung pan pasal khat pawpo in pasal tulkhat taikeaksak zo tu nu hi
Joshua23:11 Tua ahikom
Joshua23:12 Na thumaan bua uh a
Joshua23:13 Topa na Pathian in hi minamte sia maisang na manaw uh ciang hong nawkeaksak nawn ngawl het tu ahi sia na he thei hi. Amate sia no atu in thaang bang
Joshua23:14 “Tu in ka thi tu hun theng zo hi. Topa na Pathian in na pha theampo hong kamciamsa bangin hong pia zo ci sia na thinmuu na lungmuu le na thaa sungah a kuama po in na he uh hi. A kamciam khat simin kikeamcing a; khat zongh vaalthongsak ngawl hi.
Joshua23:15 Ahihang
Joshua23:16 Topa na Pathian ii na kepcing tu in hong thupiak thuciam sia keam ngawlin pathian dangte na seamin na bia uh le ama in a thin uuk tutna in note daan hong pia tu a

Judges2:1 Topa ii vantunglalang sia Gilgal pan Bochim ah pai a
Judges2:2 Hi ngam a teang te taw thuciamna vawt ngawl het tu nu hi. Amate biaknataute na baltham nanak tu uh hi
Judges2:3 Tua ahikom tu in kong cina pan
Judges2:4 Vantunglalang in hi teng a ci zawkciang
Judges2:5 tua hu in tua mun sia Bochim kici hi. Tua munah amate in Topa tungah sangaw biakpiakna pia uh hi.
Judges2:6 Mi sim in ama ii neisa ngam le lei tel a nga tu in Joshua in Israel te paisak hi.
Judges2:7 Joshua nuntak lai tengin Israel mite in Topa na seam uh hi
Judges2:8 Topa naseampa Nun ii tapa Joshua sia kum za le kum sawm a phak ciang thi hi.
Judges2:9 Ama sia Ephraim mualtung ngam Gaash Mual saksang ama ii leitang ahi Timnath Serah a kicina ah kiphum hi.
Judges2:10 Tua khang bup mi theampo zongh thi siat zo a
Judges2:11 Tua zawkciang Israel mite in Topa tungah mawna vawtin
Judges2:12 A taanghpupite ii Pathian
Judges2:13 Topa a biak uh nusia in
Judges2:14 Tua ahikom Topa sia Israel tungah nasia takin thin uuk a
Judges2:15 Ngal kidona ah a kuan uh simin
Judges2:16 Tuasia ciang Topa in a simthamte ii khut pan a hung tu Israel lampuite pia hi.
Judges2:17 Ahihang Israel te in a lampuite sia awlmawk vawt ngawl uh hi. Israel te Topa tungah thumaan ngawlin pathian dangte bia uh hi. Amate ii pate in Topa thupiakte ni hi

1Samuel1:1 Ephraim mualtung ngam Ramah khua ah Ephraim nam ahi Elkanah a kici pasal khat om hi. Ama sia Jeroham ii ta
1Samuel1:2 Elkanah in zi nii nei a
1Samuel1:3 Kum simin Elkanah sia Topa Vaanglianbelpa bia tu le sangaw biakpiakna vawt tu in Ramah pan Shiloh ah pai hi
1Samuel1:4 Elkanah in sangaw biakpiakna a vawt simin
1Samuel1:5 Tuaciang ama in Hannah it mama hi napi tel khat bek pia thei hi
1Samuel1:6 A kidem pui Peninnah in ama sia nunau zazaan in
1Samuel1:7 Kum khat zawk kum khat hi bangin papai a; Topa ii inn ah a pai uh simin Peninnah in Hannah a thin lalsak mama ahikom Hannah sia kap a
1Samuel1:8 A pasal Elkanah in
1Samuel1:9 Ni khat
1Samuel1:10 
1Samuel1:11 Hannah in a ciliap huai kamciam khat pia hi: Vaanglianbelpa “ Topa awng
1Samuel1:12 Hannah in Topa tungah hun saupi sung thungen top a
1Samuel1:13 Ama sia a thimthamin thungen hi; a muk phun ahihang a aw suaksak ngawl hi. Tua ahikom Eli in ama sapittui kham hi tu in um hi
1Samuel1:14 tuaciang ama munah
1Samuel1:15 Ama in
1Samuel1:16 Nupi mannung ngawl hong sa heak in. Lungmang mama ka hikom hi bangin thu ngengen khi hi
1Samuel1:17 “Thinnuam in va pai ta'n
1Samuel1:18 “A tawntungin cikna thiamna taw kei hong phawk ta'n

1Samuel1:20 Tuabangin ama naungil om a
1Samuel1:21 Elkanah le a innkuanpuite Shiloh ah pai in Topa tungah kum sim sangaw biakpiakna le a kamciam tuam sangaw biakpiakna a piak tu hun hong cing kik hi.

1Samuel1:27 Hi patang sia ama munah ka ngen a

1Samuel2:1 Hannah in hi bangin thungen hi: “ Topa in ka lungtang sia lungdamna taw hong dimh hi; Ama ii sepna sate hu in bangza in ka lungdam ziam! Ka ngalte ka nuisan hi; Pathian in hong hu ahikom bangza in ka thinnuam ziam!
1Samuel2:2 “ Topa bangin a thiangtho kuama om ngawl hi; Ama taw a kibang kuama om ngawl hi
1Samuel2:3 Na kisuantaak vazakna uh teng kheal vun; Na kiphatsak kampaute thimsak vun. Banghang ziam cile Topa sia a he a tel Pathian hi a
1Samuel2:4 Ngalkap thahat te ii thalte taltan a
1Samuel2:5 Khatvei lai in pha takin a kivaakte
1Samuel2:6 Topa in thatlum a
1Samuel2:7 Ama in mihing pawlkhat zawngkhalsak a
1Samuel2:8 Ama in mizawngte leivui panin laamto a
1Samuel2:9 “Ama in a thumaan a mite ii nuntakna dal hi
1Samuel2:10 Topa ii ngalte sia kisusia cip tu hi; Topa in amate vantung panin vanto bangin langpan tu hi. Topa in leitung buppi thu hong khen tu hi; ama in a kumpipa tungah vaangletna pia tu hi
1Samuel2:11 Tua zawkciang Elkanah sia Ramah ah cia kik hi
1Samuel2:12 Eli ii tapate sia mihing phelphol vive hi. Amate in Topa a awlmaw bua uh hi
1Samuel2:13 tua bek dom ngawlin thiampite ii mipite tung pan a nget thei tu te a nadon bua uh hi. Tua taangin mihing khat ii sangaw biakpiakna a om ciangin thiampi pa ii naseampa in kaa thum nei thiktung zum khat taw hong pai uh hi. A sa a kihuan saan laitakin
1Samuel2:14 ama in beal sungah a thiktung kaa taw sun a

1Samuel2:16 Tua pa in
1Samuel2:17 Hi bangin Eli ii tapate mawna sia Topa muna ah nasia leih hi
1Samuel2:18 Tua hun sungin patang Samuel sia puanneal kawngsawm thiangtho khat taw Topa na seam hi.
1Samuel2:19 A nu in a pasal ii kum sim sangaw biakpiakna a vawt simin a pai khop uh ciangin
1Samuel2:20 Tua hun ciang Eli in Elkanah le a zi thupha pia a
1Samuel2:21 Topa in Hannah sia thupha pia takpi a
1Samuel2:22 Tu in Eli sia huai mama zo hi. Ama in a tate ii Israel mite tungah a ngamtatna theampo zaza a

1Samuel5:1 Philistine te in Thuciamna Thingkuang a matsak zawkciang
1Samuel5:2 amate ii Dagon pathian biakinn sungah tumpui in
1Samuel5:3 A zing ciang zingtuungin Ashdod mite ii milim sia Thuciamna Thingkuang mai lei ah lutu in a puk mu uh hi. Tua ahikom amate in phongto in a omna ngei ah koi kik uh hi.
1Samuel5:4 A zing kik ciang zingtuungin amate in a milim sia Topa Thuciamna Thingkuang mai ah a pukin mu kik uh hi. Tusia ciang a lu le a khutte nii taltan in kongbiang ah liik a; a pumpi bekma kinusia hi.
1Samuel5:5 (Tua hu in tuni dong ma Dagon thiampite le Ashdod a biakpiakna a vawt mite theampo in tua mun sia a pai ngei bangin pai ngawlin kan valian uh hi.)

1Samuel20:14 A nungta in ka om le

1Samuel20:16 ei ii khat le khat tungah ih kamciam sia peal ngawlin kho lai tahen. Tuasia na ciampeal le Pathian in nang daan hong pia tu hi

1Samuel20:18 Tuaciang Jonathan in
1Samuel20:19 Thai ciangin na om ngawl hunlam kitel seseam tu hi; tua ahikom va pai in tu nung a na bukna suang kholna lia ah na buu in.
1Samuel20:20 Tua suangkhol sia phutuun bangin thaltang tang thum taw kong kap tu hi.
1Samuel20:21 Tuaciang ka naseampa munah tua thaltangte zongin ka sawl tu hi. Tuaciang ama munah

1Samuel22:1 David sia Gath khuapi panin tai in Adullam khua nai suanghawng khat zuan hi. A suapuipate le a innkuanpui dangte in tua thu a zaak ciang ama pawm uh hi.
1Samuel22:2 Mihing a kinengniamte

1Samuel24:1 Philistine te a simna pan Saul hong cia kik ciang

1Samuel25:26 Phulam in na ngalte na thalup ngawl natu pan hong keamcing sia Topa hi. Tuaciang tu in a nungta Topa taw ka kiciamna pan
1Samuel25:27 Nong hesuakna in topa awng

1Samuel30:11 David taw a kithua mite in Egypt te patangno khat ngam sungah mu in
1Samuel30:12 theinga ngawm tawm le sapit ko ngawm bom nii pia uh hi. An a neak zawkciang a tha hong hat kik hi; ama in an ahizong tui ahizong a neak ngawl zawk ni thum hi zo hi.
1Samuel30:13 David in

1Samuel30:15 David in

1Samuel30:17 A khuavak ni zing tuungin David in sim a
1Samuel30:18 David in Amalek te ii laak sa na theampo le a mat teng ama zite nii dongin suatak a;
1Samuel30:19 bangma a sumsi om ngawl hi. David in a mite ii tapate
1Samuel30:20 Ama in tuu hon le khui hon te zongh nga kik a; a mite in amate mai ah nganno theampo hawl a
1Samuel30:21 Tua zawkciang David in Besor Lui ah tha zawm leih in nungsang ah a taam 200 te kungah pai kik hi. Amate sia David le a mite muak tu in hong pai a
1Samuel30:22 Ahihang mihing mannung ngawl thusel pawlkhat in
1Samuel30:23 Ahihang David in

1Samuel30:25 David in hi thuthun vawt a

1Samuel30:28 Aroer

1Samuel30:30 tuaciang Hormah
1Samuel30:31 le Hebron khua mite teng tungah puak hi. Ama in ama le a mite vaa kotna mun theampo ah tua letsong puak siat hi.
1Samuel31:1 Gilboa Mual ngal kidona ah Philistine te in Israel te do uh hi. Israel te tam mama tua munah thi in
1Samuel31:2 Ahihang Philistine te in amate pha in Saul ii tapate thum
1Samuel31:3 Saul ii kiim ah nasia tak ngal kidona om a

1Samuel31:5 Tangvalpa in Saul thi zo ci in a mu ciang

1Samuel31:7 Jezreel Kuam ii langkhat Jordan ngun nisuana sang a om Israel te in

2Samuel12:3 a zawng pa ahile a leisa tuuno khat bek nei hi. Ama in tuasia pha takin khoai a
2Samuel12:4 Ni khat ni in leangna khat a hau pa inn ah zin hong tung hi. Tua pa neak tu in mihaupa in a nganno khat zongh ngaw nuam ngawl hi; ama in mizawngpa ii tuuno laaksak in a zinpa neak tu in huan hi
2Samuel12:5 David sia tua mihau pa tungah thin uuk mama a
2Samuel12:6 Hi bangin a tatsiat hu in a laak za tungah a zaa li in a lo kik kul tu hi
2Samuel12:7 “Nangma tuasia pa ni hi
2Samuel12:8 Ama ii kumpi ngam le a zite nang kong pia hi; Israel le Judah kumpipa kong suaksak hi. Hi sia kicing ngawl lai ahile a zaa nii in a tamzaw hong pia zo tu khi hi.
2Samuel12:9 Tua ahile banghangin kong thupiakte ni ngawl ni ziam? Banghangin hi tatsiatna ngamtat in nei ni ziam? Nang in Uriah sia ngal sungah na thisak hi: Ammon te in na thatlumsak hi
2Samuel12:10 Tu in na khang simin na suan na paalte pawlkhat sia thisia thi ngamh in thi tu hi
2Samuel12:11 Nangma innkuan sung pan ma in khat ma in nangma ngim hong piak natu in ka kiciam hi. Na zite nangma kung pan la in midang khat ka piak ciangin hi thu na mu tu hi; ama in suntangin amate luppui tu hi.
2Samuel12:12 A thimtham in mawna vawt ku ni hi
2Samuel12:13 David in
2Samuel12:14 Ahihang hi bangin na ngamtatna panin Topa simmawkna lak zo na hikom na ta sia thi tu hi
2Samuel12:15 Tua zawkciang Nathan inn ah cia hi. Uriah zi taw a hin David ii ta sia Topa in a ciinasak mama hi.
2Samuel12:16 David in a ta dam natu Pathian tungah thu ngen hi. Ama in bangma ne nuam ngawl a
2Samuel12:17 A kumpi inn uliante in thosak nuamin hanciam hikale tho nuam ngawl a
2Samuel12:18 Nipi khat zawkciang a ta hong thi a
2Samuel12:19 David in amate kihuau a mu ciang a tano thi zo hi
2Samuel12:20 Suat tung pan David thoto a
2Samuel12:21 Ama uliante in ama munah
2Samuel12:22 “Hi hi
2Samuel12:23 Ahihang tu in thi zo ahiciang banghangin an tatang lai tu khi ziam? Tano nungtasak kik thei tu khi ziam? Ni khat ni ciang ama omna ah kei pai tu khi hi
2Samuel12:24 Tua zawkciang David in a zi Bathsheba heeneam hi. Ama in luppui in
2Samuel12:25 tuaciang Topa in kamsaangpa Nathan thupia a
2Samuel12:26 Tua lanin Joab in Ammon te khuapi Rabbah a simna zom suak a
2Samuel12:27 Ama in kamtaite paisak a
2Samuel12:28 Tu in na ngalkap om lai teng hong khawmtua ta'n a
2Samuel12:29 Tua ahikom David in a ngalkapte khawmtua a
2Samuel12:30 Ammon te ii biak milim pathian Molech ii lu tung pan David in kilogramme 35 bang a ngit suangmanpha khat a kisuan khamh kumpilukhu sia la hi. David in tua suangmanpha la in ama lukhu tungah suang hi. Ama ii khuapi sung pan a laaksak vanh zongh tam mama a
2Samuel12:31 a khua mite sia thing at naam

2Samuel20:2 Tua ahikom Israel te in David nusia in Sheba zui ahihang Judah mite sia thumaan top in
2Samuel20:3 Jerusalem khua a kumpi inn ah David a thet ciangin kumpi inn cing tu in ama nusiat zino sawm teng la in
2Samuel20:4 Kumpipa in Amasa munah
2Samuel20:5 Amasa in amate khawmtua tu in pai hi
2Samuel20:6 Tua ahikom kumpipa in Abishai munah
2Samuel20:7 Tua ahikom Joab ii mite
2Samuel20:8 Amate suangpi khat sia omna Gibeon a thet uh ciang Amasa taw kisi uh hi. Joab sia ngalsim natu puansilh in
2Samuel20:9 Joab in Amasa munah
2Samuel20:10 Amasa sia Joab ii a khut langkhat ah a toai namsau sia pan kidal ngawl ahikom Joab in a ngil panin sun a
2Samuel20:11 Joab ii mi khat Amasa ii luang hui ah ding a
2Samuel20:12 Chi taw a kidim Amasa ii luang sia lampi laizang ah liik hi. Joab ii mihing pa in
2Samuel20:13 A luang lampi pan a khiin zawkciang a kuama po in Joab zui in Sheba del uh hi.
2Samuel20:14 Sheba in Israel nam theampo ii ngam kaantan in
2Samuel20:15 Joab ii mite in Sheba sia tua munah a om hunlam za uh ahikom amate pai in khuapi uumci uh hi. Luphung puanung pangh panin lei vum tosak a
2Samuel20:16 Tua khuapi sungah nupi ciim khat om a
2Samuel20:17 Joab pai a
2Samuel20:18 Tua nu in
2Samuel20:19 Ko khuapi sia lian a
2Samuel20:20 Joab in
2Samuel20:21 Tuabang sia ko ngealna hi ngawl hi. Ephraim mualtung ngam pan Bikri ii tapa Sheba a ci sia in Kumpipa David langpanin leedo hi. Hi sia pa hong aap lete
2Samuel20:22 Tua zawkciang ama tua khua mite kungah ama ii ngealna taw pai hi
2Samuel20:23 Joab sia Israel ngalkaphonpi ukpa hi; Jehoiada ii tapa Benaiah sia David a cingte a ukpa hi;
2Samuel20:24 Adoniram in zawthawk thu taw kisawlin na a sepsakna teng uk a; Ahilud ii tapa Jehoshaphat in tepteena lai teng sai hi;
2Samuel20:25 Sheva sia kumpi zum thuzeakpa ahi hi; Zadok le Abiathar te sia thiampi te ahi uh hi
2Samuel20:26 Tuaciang Jair khua pan Ira zongh David ii thiampi khat ahi hi.

2Samuel21:4 Amate in

2Samuel21:6 Tua ahikom Saul ii suan le paal pasal sali hong aap tavun
2Samuel21:7 Ahihang Jonathan taw a thiangtho kamciamna a piak hu in
2Samuel21:8 Ahihang ama in Aiah ii tanu Rizpah ii Saul taw a hin tapate nii
2Samuel21:9 David in amate teng Gibeon mite tungah aap a
2Samuel21:10 Tuaciangin Saul ii zino
2Samuel21:11 David in Rizpah ii ngamtatna a zaak ciangin
2Samuel21:12 ama pai a
2Samuel21:13 David in Saul le Jonathan ii ngute le a ki awklumsak pasal sali teng ii ngute zongh khawmtua hi.

2Samuel21:15 Philistine te le Israel te ngal kisimna khat om kik a

2Samuel21:17 Ahihang Zeruiah ii tapa Abishai in David hu a

2Samuel22:1 Topa in David sia Saul le a ngal dangte kung panin a hutkhiat ciangin David in Topa tungah hi la a sak hi.
2Samuel22:2 Topa in kei hong dal pa hi; ama sia ka kulh kho ahi hi.
2Samuel22:3 Ka Pathian sia ka kidalna hi a
2Samuel22:4 Topa ka biakpui a
2Samuel22:5 Thina tuihualte ka kiim theampo ah om a; lalna tuihualte kei tungah hong kihual hi.
2Samuel22:6 Thina ii lau huaina ka kiim ah hong om a
2Samuel22:7 Ngim ka nga ciangin Topa ka biakpui a; ka Pathian munah hu ka ngen hi. A biakinn sung pan ka aw hong za a; hu ngen in ka auna aw ama in hong ngai hi.
2Samuel22:8 Tua zawkciang leitung sia liingin ngawk a; van ii a bul a zungte kivei in liing hi
2Samuel22:9 A naak hawng panin meikhu hong pusuak a
2Samuel22:10 Ama in vantung balkeakin hong pai suk a
2Samuel22:11 Ama in cherub tha tungah to in manlang takin leang a; vui ii thakhui te tungah khualhaw hi.
2Samuel22:12 Ama le ama khuazing taw kituam a; tui taw kidim meeikaai saate in ama kiim uum hi;
2Samuel22:13 khualeng in meikamte ama mai ah kuangsak hi.
2Samuel22:14 Tuaciang Topa in van pan vanto nging bang hisak a
2Samuel22:15 Ama in a thaltangte kap a
2Samuel22:16 Topa in a ngalte a teih ciang le a thin uukin a hawksan ciangin
2Samuel22:17 Topa in tungsang panin hong baan suk a
2Samuel22:18 A thahat ka ngalte kung pan ahizong kei hong ensan theampo te kung pan ahizong hong suatak hi — kei atu in amate hat leih uh hi.
2Samuel22:19 Ngim ka nga ciang
2Samuel22:20 Ama in launa pan hong hu a; kei tungah hong lungkim hu in kei hong hun hi.
2Samuel22:21 A maan bang ngamta ka hikom Topa in kei
2Samuel22:22 Topa thukham ka ni a; ka Pathian kung pan ka puapial bua hi.
2Samuel22:23 Ama ii thukham theampo ka tang a; a thupiakte ni ngawlin ka om bua hi.
2Samuel22:24 Ama in ka maw ngawl hunlam hong he a
2Samuel22:25 A maan bang ngamta ka hikom ama in tel hong pia hi
2Samuel22:26 Topa awng
2Samuel22:27 Nangma in a thiangtho te ii tungah na thiangtho a
2Samuel22:28 A kiniamkhiakte na ngum a
2Samuel22:29 Nangma
2Samuel22:30 Ka ngalte ka sim natu in thahatna nong pia a
2Samuel22:31 Hi Pathian — bangza in ama nasepnate cialcing a
2Samuel22:32 Topa bekma Pathian hi a; Pathian bekma ih kihuukna ahi hi.
2Samuel22:33 Hi Pathian in a kip a kho ka bukna hi; Ama in ka lampi ngammuangsak hi.
2Samuel22:34 Ama in ka peangte sangai bangin kho takin hong khuasuansak a; mualte tungah kei hong keamcing hi.
2Samuel22:35 Ama in ngal kisim hong sinsak a
2Samuel22:36 Oh
2Samuel22:37 Hong kimat natu panin nong keam a
2Samuel22:38 Ka ngalte ka del a ka zo hi; amate ka mot mateng ka tawp bua hi.
2Samuel22:39 Amate ka vaat vawk a
2Samuel22:40 Ngal do natu in thahatna nong pia a; ka ngalte nong zosak hi.
2Samuel22:41 Ka ngalte ka kung panin na taisak a; kei hong ensan te ka mon hi.
2Samuel22:42 Amate in huna zong ka le kuama in hun ngawl hi; amate in Topa biakpui hikale ama in zo ngawl hi.
2Samuel22:43 Amate ka sucip a
2Samuel22:44 Hong leedo ka mite kung pan nong hun a minamte ka ukna nong kipsak hi; tu in ka heak ngeingawl mihingte ka khutnuai mi suak uh hi.
2Samuel22:45 Ngamdangmite ka mai ah hong kun a; amate in ka kammal a zaak ciang hong ni hi.
2Samuel22:46 Amate a thin letna uh bosua in
2Samuel22:47 Topa nungta hi! Kei hong hunpa pok vun! Kei hong hun a thahat Pathian ii letna thangsak vun.
2Samuel22:48 Ama in ka ngalte hong zosak hi! minamte ka khutnuai ah ama in huthe ngam ngawlin koi a;
2Samuel22:49 ka ngalte kung pan kei hong hun hi. Oh Topa
2Samuel22:50 Tua ahiciang minamte sungah nang kong pok a; na tungah pokna late kong sak hi.
2Samuel22:51 Pathian in a kumpipa tungah zawna liante pia hi; ama in a tealsa khat ii tungah itna kip lak a
2Samuel23:1 Jesse ii tapa
2Samuel23:2 Topa ii thaa in kei tungtawnin pau hi; ama ii thu puak sia ka muk tungah om hi.
2Samuel23:3 Israel ii Pathian pau zo hi; Israel a dal pa in kei tungah hong ci hi: “Thutang khenna taw a uk kumpipa
2Samuel23:4 meeikaai om ngawl zing khuavak tuung nitaang taw kibang hi
2Samuel23:5 Pathian ii ka suan ka paalte thupha a piak tu zia sia tuabang ahi hi
2Samuel23:6 Ahihang Pathian a selte sia
2Samuel23:7 Thik vanhzak ahibuale tei khat na zak kul tu a; amate kaanghtum tu hi.
2Samuel23:8 David ii a minthang ngalkapte sia hite ahi hi: a masa phitbel sia Tachemon pan Josheb Basshebeth hi a
2Samuel23:9 A minthang thum sung pan a niina sia Ahoh phung sung pan Dodo ii tapa Eleazar hi. Ni khat ni in ama le David in ngaldo tu a kikhawmtua Philistine te thato uh hi. Israel te nungkin a
2Samuel23:10 ahihang ama ding topin do in
2Samuel23:11 A minthang thum sungah a thumna sia Harar pan Agee ii tapa Shammah hi. Philistine te sia be ciinna lo khat omna Lehi ah kikhawmtua uh hi. Israel te Philistine te mai panin tai keak uh a
2Samuel23:12 ahizong Shammah ahile lo sungah a dinmun nusia ngawlin ngalnang a
2Samuel23:13 Anlaak hun kipat nai ciang
2Samuel23:14 Tua hun laitakin David sia ngalnanna tu in a ki uum mualtung khat ah om a
2Samuel23:15 David in inn sang ngai mama in
2Samuel23:16 Ngalkap minthang thumte in a pai natu Philistine te phual nawkkeak in
2Samuel23:17 tuaciang
2Samuel23:18 Joab ii suapuipa Abishai (a nu sia Zeruiah hi) sia “A minthang Sawmthumte” ii lampui ahi hi. Ama in tei taw a ngalte zathum do a
2Samuel23:19 Ama sia “Sawmthumte” sungah a minthangbel hi a
2Samuel23:20 Kabzeel pan Jehoiada ii tapa Benaiah sia ngalkap minthang dang khat hi; ama in ngalhang nasep lian tam mama a seamsa hi a
2Samuel23:21 Ama in a thatang lian mama Egypt te tei toai khat that hi. Benaiah in a molpum taw Egypt pa sim a
2Samuel23:22 “Sawmthumte” sungah khat ahi Benaiah ii ngalhan nasepnate tuabang ahi hi.
2Samuel23:23 Ama sia “Sawmthumte” sung panin kician a

1Kings3:3 Solomon in Topa it a
1Kings3:4 Khatvei

1Kings3:6 Solomon in
1Kings3:7 Oh Topa Pathian
1Kings3:8 Hi sungah nangma atu na tealsa mite tam leihin a kisim zo ngawlte sungah om khi hi.
1Kings3:9 Tua ahikom na mite thutang khenna taw ka uk thei natu le a pha le a sia ka khentel thei natu in ciimna hong pia ta'n. Tua ahibuale bangbangin hi na mihonpite uk thei tu khi ziam?” ci hi
1Kings3:10 Solomon ii hisia a nget sia Topa lungkim hi
1Kings3:11 tua ahikom ama munah
1Kings3:12 nong nget bangin kong pia tu hi. Ciimna le tel theina sia tu masia le maisang zong kuama peuma ii a tamzaw in a nei ngeingawl tu za kong pia tu hi.
1Kings3:13 Nong nget ngawlte zongh hong pia si tu khi hi: na khan tawntung hauna le minphatna zongh kumpipa dang khat pawpo sangin tamzaw nga tu ni hi.
1Kings3:14 Tuaciang na pa David bangin kei thu nong ni a ka thukhamte le ka thupiakte na keamcing le khansauna hong pia tu khi hi

1Kings3:16 Ni khat ni in pumpi kizuak numei nii hong pai a
1Kings3:17 Khat sia in

1Kings4:1 Solomon sia Israel ngam bup ii kumpipa hi a
1Kings4:2 tuaciang hite sia a uliante ahi uh hi: Thiampi: Zadok ii tapa Azariah
1Kings4:3 Zum thuzeakpite: Shisha tapate Elihoreph le Ahijah Thu ciamtee pipa: Ahilud tapa Jehoshaphat
1Kings4:4 Ngalkaphonpi ukpa: Jehoiada tapa Benaiah Thiampite: Zadok le Abiathar
1Kings4:5 Ngamkhen uk mangte a ukpipa: Nathan tapa Azariah Kumpi thudokpa: Nathan tapa thiampi Zabud
1Kings4:6 Kumpi inn sung naseamte a ukpa: Ahishar Zawthawk thu taw na a kiseam sakte a ukpa: Abda ii tapa Adoniram ahi hi.
1Kings4:7 Solomon in Israel ngam sungah ngamkhen uk mangte sawm le nii koi hi. Kumpipa le a bangkua ii kum khat bup a neak tu sia tua mangte khat simin a uk sung ngamkhen tek panin tha sim a banin piasak hi.
1Kings4:8 Tua ulian sawm le niite le amate ii ukna ngamkhente sia hi bang ahi hi: Benhur: Ephraim mualtung ngam teng
1Kings4:9 Bendeker: Makaz
1Kings4:10 Benhesed: Arubboth le Socoh khuapite le Hepher ngam theampo
1Kings4:11 Solomon tanu Taphath ii pasal Benabinadab: Dor ngamkhen buppi
1Kings4:12 Ahilud tapa Baana: Taanach le Megiddo khuapite le Jezreel khua thangsang
1Kings4:13 Bengeber: Gilead ngam Ramoth khuapi
1Kings4:14 Iddo tapa Ahinadab: Mahanaim ngamkhen
1Kings4:15 Solomon ii tanu dang khat Basemath ii pasal Ahimaaz: Naphtali ngam
1Kings4:16 Hushai tapa Baana: Asher ngamkhen le Bealoth khua
1Kings4:17 Paruah tapa Jehoshaphat: Issachar ngam
1Kings4:18 Ela tapa Shimei: Benjamin ngam
1Kings4:19 Uri tapa Geber: Amor kumpipa Sihon le Bashan kumpipa Og ii a ukna sa Gilead ngamkhen Hi ngam uk sawm le niite ii tungsia ah ngam bup a uk mang khat om hi.
1Kings4:20 Judah le Israel mite sia tuipivaal a senmal za in tam hi; amate in ne in
1Kings4:21 Solomon ii kumpi ngam sia Euphrates ngun pan Philistia le Egypt te ngamngi dong ngam theampo kihel hi. Amate in shia pia in
1Kings4:22 Solomon ii ni sim a tulmawk ante sia
1Kings4:23 sangai

1Kings4:27 Ngamuk mang sawm le niite in Solomon le a kumpi inn sungah an ne theampo atu an sia tha simin a piak tu za tek pia uh hi; amate in a kisamh theampo a tawntungin pia uh hi.

1Kings6:1 Israel mite ii Egypt a nusiat zawk kum zali le kum sawmliat zawk
1Kings6:2 A sungsang a sauna metre 27 pha a

1Kings6:4 Biakinnpi ii pangte ah a om a hawngvang te sia a sungsang sangin a puasang ciakzaw hi.

1Kings7:9 Hi innte theampo le a suum lianpi sia a tawdap pan kipan bitha dong suangphate taw kivawt hi. A suangte sia a suangkhuk ah a pha tu cia kivawt khol a
1Kings7:10 A tawdap tu sia suangtum liante taw suangkhuk ah kivawt a

1Kings7:14 A thi zo a pa sia Tyre pan hi a
1Kings7:15 Huram in taau khuampi nii vawt hi
1Kings7:16 Ama in tua khuampite ii tungkhu tu in taau metre 2.2 veve a sau zongh vawt si hi.
1Kings7:17 Khuampite ii a dawn veve sia thikkhau kipheakte ii lim la in
1Kings7:18 taau taw a kivawt talee nga lim ngual nii veve taw zongh zeam hi.
1Kings7:19 A tung khu sia unok paak bangin kivawt in
1Kings7:20 tuate sia a kawnin a kivawt a tungkhu thikkhau pheak bang ahi sia ii tungah kikoi hi. A tungkhu khat sim ii kiim ah talee nga ngual nii in a kingual pum 200 om hi.
1Kings7:21 Huram in hi taau khuampite nii sia Biakinnpi tumna mai ah koi hi: a thangsang a sia Jachin ci a
1Kings7:22 Unok paak taw kibang taau tungkhute sia tua khuampite dawn ah kinga hi. Tuabangin khuampite taw kisai nasepna kiman hi.
1Kings7:23 Huram in tuikuang khat sia a beamin vawt hi
1Kings7:24 Tuikuang ii a ngong puasang kiil kiim theampo taau uum nga lim ngual nii om a tuikuang taw sakhat suak in taau kisung hi.
1Kings7:25 Tuikuang sia a puasang a ngaa
1Kings7:26 Tuikuang ii pangh sia millimetre 75 saa hi. A ngong sia hai ngong taw kibang a
1Kings7:27 Huram in taau taw leang sawm vawt si hi; khat simin metre 1.8 sau a
1Kings7:28 Tuate sia a paona nei kiing li kikim taau a pheakte taw kivawt a
1Kings7:29 tawpi lim
1Kings7:30 Leang khat simin taau mui li veu
1Kings7:31 Tua tungah kuangpui ngak natu valh kawn khat om hi. Tuasia in leang tungah centimetre 45 dok to a
1Kings7:32 Leangmuite sia centimetre 66 saang hi; Tuate sia taaupheakte nuai ah om a
1Kings7:33 Leangmuite sia siphu ngalleangmuite taw kibang hi; leangzawlte
1Kings7:34 Leang khat ii a king sim ah a nuai pan a nannate zongh leang taw sa khat ma ahi hi.
1Kings7:35 Centimetre 22 a beak taau kual khat veu leang khat sim tungah om hi; tua ii nannate le taaupheakte sia leang taw sa khat ahi hi.
1Kings7:36 A nannate le taaupheakte sia cherubim
1Kings7:37 Tua hi a

2Kings3:21 Tua kumpi thum teng amate sim tu in hong pai hunlam Moab te in a zaak uh ciang pa a minpiang ngalhiam toai thei theampo a moibel pan a haambel dong kiko in

2Kings11:1 Kumpipa Ahaziah ii nu Athaliah in a tapa ii kisuamlupna a zaak po ciang kumpipa innkuan pui theampo thalup natu thupia hi.
2Kings11:2 Ahaziah ii tapa Joash bekma suakta hi. Ama sia a dangte taw kithatlum dektak a
2Kings11:3 Kum luk sung Jehosheba in patangno sia biakinn sungah Athaliah ii Kumpinu a sep sung theampo phual hi.
2Kings11:4 Ahihang a kum sali na ciangin thiampi Jehoiada in kumpipa a cingte le kumpi inn a cingte a uk uliante Biakinn ah samin
2Kings11:5 tuaciang hi thupiakna teng pia hi: “Sabbath ni in vaipuak la tu in nong pai uh ciang
2Kings11:6 a dang see thum sua see khat sia Sur Kongpi cingin om tu nu hi
2Kings11:7 Sabbath ni a vaipuak nei ngawl a om pawl nii te sia kumpipa hung tu in Biakinnpi ah a cingin om tu nu hi.
2Kings11:8 Kumpipa Joash sia noma in namsau daw sa in cing tu a
2Kings11:9 Uliante in Jehoiada ii hil bangin ni a
2Kings11:10 Ama in uliante sia David ii neisa
2Kings11:11 tuaciang ama in kumpipa cing tu in ngalkapte sia a namsau daw sa in Biakinn mai kiimkot ah koi hi.
2Kings11:12 Tua zawkciang Jehoiada in Joash pusua pui in
2Kings11:13 Kumpinu Athaliah in a cing ngalkapte le mipite ii awsa za ahikom
2Kings11:14 Ngeina om bangin kumpipa thak sia Biakinnpi tumna khuampi kungah dingin a om sia kumpinu in mu hi. Ama sia uliante le lemle tumte in kiim uum uh a
2Kings11:15 Jehoiada in Athaliah sia biakinnpi huang sungah a kithalup tu oai ngawl ahikom ama in ngalkap uliante munah: “A ngual a ngualin a cingte kilaklaw panin ama la in paipui vun
2Kings11:16 Amate in Athaliah manin
2Kings11:17 Thiampi Jehoiada in Kumpipa Joash le mipite
2Kings11:18 Tua zawkciang mipite in Baal ii biakinn ah pai uh a
2Kings11:19 tua zawkciang ama sia ngalkap uliante
2Kings11:20 Mipi theampo sia lungdam uh a
2Kings11:21 Joash sia kum sali a phak laitakin Judah te kumpipa suak hi.
2Kings12:1 Israel ah Jehu Kumpipa a maan zawk a kum salina ciang Joash sia Judah te ii kumpipa suakin
2Kings12:2 A khan tawntung ama in Topa ii diksak tu bebekin ngamta hi
2Kings12:3 Ahitazong doai biakna munte kisusia ngawl a
2Kings12:4 Joash in thiampite sam a

2Kings12:12 uksuang ciangte
2Kings12:13 Ahizong a sumte sung panin ngunn haite
2Kings12:14 Tua sumte sia naseamte thaman le biakinn puuana sung a kizangh vanhte leina bekin kizangh hi.
2Kings12:15 Tua nasep taw kisai in a ukte sia thumaan takpi ahikom tua sumte tungtaang ah sazian koi kul ngawl hi.
2Kings12:16 Khialphel biakpiakna le mawphel biakpiakna atu a kipia sumte sia thingkuang sungah kikoi ngawl hi; tuate sia thiampite neisa ahi hi.

2Kings17:34 Amate in a ngeina luite tu ni dongin zom suak lai uh hi. Amate in Topa bia ngawl a

2Kings19:24 Ngamdang ah tuikhuk to in tui ka dawn hi na ci a

2Kings19:26 Tua munah a teang mihingte sia thahatna nei ngawl hi; amate lau in khing liang uh hi. Amate sia lo sungah lopate ahibuale nisuana pan vuisa ii seam keak innkhum tungah a po lopate taw kibang hi.

2Kings19:31 Jerusalem ah mite om tu a
2Kings19:32 “Assyria kumpilianpa huvau Topa ii ci sia hisia hi: ‘Ama in hi khuapi sungah tum ngawl tu a
2Kings19:33 Ama hi khuapi sungah tum ngawlin hong paina lampi ma tawnin heak kik tu hi
2Kings19:34 Keima vaang atu le ka naseampa David tungah ka kamciamna hangin hi khuapi sia dal in hung tu khi hi’ ” ci hi.
2Kings19:35 Tua zanin Topa vantunglalang khat Assyria te ngiaphual ah pai in ngalkap 185

2Kings19:37 Ni khat ni in ama in a pathian Nisroch ii biakinn sungah ama bia in a om laitak a tapate nii

2Kings21:1 Manasseh sia Judah kumpipa a sua hunin ama kum sawm le kum nii pha hi
2Kings21:2 Topa ii mite mai sang hong nawk ciang a kinotkeak minamte ii a thasiathuai ngamtatna te zui in Manasseh in Topa tungah maw hi.
2Kings21:3 A pa Hezekiah ii a suksiatcip sa doai biate ii biakpiakna munte ama in sa kik hi; Israel kumpipa Ahab ii vawt bang keak ma in ama in Baal biak natu biaknataute sa in
2Kings21:4 Ama in Topa ii ama a kibiak natu mun hi a ci Biakinnpi sungah doai sepna taute sa hi.
2Kings21:5 Biakinnpi ii leitualte nii sungah aksite a biak natu biaknatau te vawt hi.
2Kings21:6 A tapa sia meihal biakpiakna in pia hi. Ama in aisaan le mitbumna zangh in
2Kings21:7 Ama in numeipathian Asherah ii lim sia Biakinnpi sungah koi hi
2Kings21:8 Tuaciang Israel mite theampo in ka thupiakna te theampo ni in
2Kings21:9 Ahihang Judah mite in Topa thu ni ngawl a
2Kings21:10 A naseam kamsaangte tungtawnin Topa in
2Kings21:11 “Kumpipa Manasseh in hi a thasiathuai mama nate Canaan mite vawt bang sangin a nasia zaw lai in vawt hi; tuaciang ama ii milimte taw Judah mite mawna sungah lampui hi.
2Kings21:12 Tua ahikom kei
2Kings21:13 Samaria daan ka piak bang le Israel kumpipa Ahab le a suan a paalte ka vawt bangin Jerusalem daan ka pia tu hi. Jerusalem sia a mite bo dongin ka nawt siat tu a
2Kings21:14 A nungta lai teng ka nusia tu a
2Kings21:15 Hi bangin ka vawt tu sia banghang ziam cile ka mite in kei tungah hong maw a
2Kings21:16 Manasseh in mawna nei ngawl mihing tam mama thatlum a
2Kings21:17 Manasseh ii sep le vawt a dangte theampo mawna a vawtte theampo kihel in
2Kings21:18 Manasseh thi a
2Kings21:19 Amon sia Judah te kumpipa a sua hunin kum 22 pha a
2Kings21:20 A pa Manasseh bangma in ama in Topa tungah maw hi;
2Kings21:21 ama in a pa ii ngamtatna teng zui in a pa ii biak milimte bia hi.
2Kings21:22 Ama in a taanghpupite ii Pathian
2Kings21:23 Amon ii uliante in ama thasawm in
2Kings21:24 Judah mite in Amon a that teng thatlumin
2Kings21:25 Amon ii a sep a vawt dangte theampo Judah Kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi.
2Kings21:26 Amon sia Uzza huan sung thaan ah kiphum a
2Kings22:1 Josiah sia Judah kumpipa a sua hunin kum liat pha hi
2Kings22:2 Josiah in Topa ii diksak te vawt hi; ama in a taanghpupi David ii lamlak bangin ngamta a
2Kings22:3 Kumpipa Josiah in a maan zawk kum sawm le kum liat laitakin
2Kings22:4 “Thiampi Lianbelpa Hilkiah kungah pai in a
2Kings22:5 A sum sia Biakinnpi puate a ukte tungah a piak tu in son in. Amate in
2Kings22:6 lettamate
2Kings22:7 Nasepnate a ukte sia thumaan mama ahikom a sum zakna uh sazian vawtsak kul ngawl hi
2Kings22:8 Shaphan in kumpipa thupiakna teng Hilkiah tungah son a
2Kings22:9 Tua zawkciang ama kumpipa kungah pai kik a: “Na naseamte in Biakinnpi sung a om sum teng la in
2Kings22:10 Tua zawkciang ama in
2Kings22:11 Kumpipa in laibu a kisim sia thu a zaak ciang
2Kings22:12 tuaciang Hilkiah thiampipa
2Kings22:13 “Pai tavun a
2Kings22:14 Jerusalem khua ii a khenthak sungah a teang Huldah a kici numei kamsaang khat munah thu dongh tu in
2Kings22:15 tuaciang ama in amate sia kumpipa kungah cia kikin sawl a
2Kings22:16 Topa ii thupiak hi teng kumpipa puakin sawl hi: “Keima in Jerusalem le a mite theampo kumpipa ii sim laibu sia sungah a ki at bangin daan ka pia tu hi.
2Kings22:17 Amate in kei hong nial a
2Kings22:18 Kumpipa ama a tu in hi bangin kei

2Kings23:1 Kumpipa Josiah in Judah ngam le Jerusalem khua ii lampuite theampo khawmtua hi
2Kings23:2 tuaciang amate sia Biakinnpi ah thiampite le kamsaangte
2Kings23:3 Ama in kumpi khuam sia kungah dingin ama ii thu a ni tu
2Kings23:4 Tua zawkciang Josiah in Thiampi Lianbel Hilkiah
2Kings23:5 Ama in Judah khuapite le Jerusalem nai ah a om sangaw biakpiakna le doai sepna taute tungah a seam Judah kumpi masa te ii kipsak thiampite — Baal tung a sangaw biakpiakna a pia
2Kings23:6 Ama in Biakinnpi sung pan Asherah numeipathian ii lim sia la keakin khuapi pua sang Kidron kuam ah a haltum zawkciang a vaamte a zaancip dong sucip in nautaangte kiphumna munah poai hi.
2Kings23:7 Ama in pumpi zuakte teenna Biakinnpi sung inndoite baltham hi. (Numeite in tua munah Asherah biak natu a kizangh puantualte tak uh hi.)
2Kings23:8 Ama in Judah khuapite a om thiampite Jerusalem ah paipui hi
2Kings23:9 Tua thiampite sia Biakinnpi sungah a sep tu ki oai ngawl hi
2Kings23:10 Kuama in a tapa ahibuale a tanu
2Kings23:11 Ama in Judah kumpite ii ni biakna in a zak siphute heam a
2Kings23:12 Kumpipa Josiah in Ahaz kumpipa teenna inndoite ii tung kumpi innkhum tungah Judah kumpipate ii saksa biaknataute le Manasseh kumpipa ii Biakinnpi leitualte nii sungah a koi biaknataute vaattham hi; ama in biaknataute saatneen in a bek a bek in Kidron kuam ah vawk hi.
2Kings23:13 Josiah in Kumpipa Solomon ii saksa Jerusalem nisuana sang Olive Mual thang sangah a om a thasiathuai milim biaknataute — Sidon numeipathian Astarte
2Kings23:14 Kumpipa Josiah in suangkhuamte vaattan in
2Kings23:15 Josiah in Israel te mawna sungah a lampui Nebat ii tapa Kumpipa Jeroboam ii saksa Bethel a om biakpiakna mun sia zongh baltham hi. Josiah in biaknatau kaivawk a
2Kings23:16 Tua zawkciang Josiah in a kiimkot a et le mual tungah thaankuul pawlkhat mu hi; ama in mithi ngute la in biaknatau tungah halsak hi. Kumpipa Jeroboam sia poaikhaam sungin biaknatau hui ah a din laitak kamsaang khat ii nidang pek lai in a sonkhol sa bangin ama in vawt a
2Kings23:17 Ama in “Zia sia akua thaan ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Bethel mite in
2Kings23:18 Josiah in
2Kings23:19 Kumpipa Josiah in Israel khuapi theampo ah Topa thin uukna piangsak Israel kumpite ii vawt doai biakna munte susia siat hi. Tua biaknataute Bethel a te a vawt bangin vawt hi.
2Kings23:20 Ama in doai bia thiampi theampo sia amate ii doai sepna biaknatau tungah thatlum a
2Kings23:21 Kumpipa Josiah in mipite munah thuciam laibu sungah a ki at bangin Topa amate ii Pathian zatakna Paisan Poai vawtin sawl hi.
2Kings23:22 Hi bang Paisan Poai khat Israel kumpipate ahibuale Judah kumpipate peuma in Thukhenmangte ii ngam a uk zawk nungsang in vawt ngeingawl hi.
2Kings23:23 Tu in a khakbel ciang Josiah ii kumpi maan zawk a kum sawm le liat na hun ciang Jerusalem khua sungah Paisan Poai kivawt hi.
2Kings23:24 Thiampi Lianbel Hilkiah ii Biakinnpi sung pan a mu Thukham laibu sungah a ki at te bang ngamtatsak natu in Kumpipa Josiah in Jerusalem pan le Judah ngam lei dang panin
2Kings23:25 Ama ii Topa atu a thin theampo
2Kings23:26 Ahihang Topa ii a nasia mama a thin uukna sia Kumpipa Manasseh ii ngamtatna hangin Judah te tungah hong tung a
2Kings23:27 Topa in
2Kings23:28 Kumpipa Josiah ii a sep a vawt dangte theampo sia Judah Kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kikhum hi.
2Kings23:29 Josiah sia kumpi ahi laitakin
2Kings23:30 Ama ii uliante in a luang sia siphu leang tungah suan a Jerusalem ah ciapui in
2Kings23:31 Joahaz sia Judah kumpi a sua hunin kum 23 pha hi
2Kings23:32 A taanghpupite ii ngamtat zui in ama in Topa tungah maw hi.
2Kings23:33 Ama ii kumpi maan hun sia Egypt kumpipa Neco in Hamath ngam Riblah ah thong a taaksak ciang bo a
2Kings23:34 Kumpipa Neco in Josiah ii tapa Eliakim sia Josiah laih tu Judah kumpipa in koi a
2Kings23:35 Kumpipa Jehoiakim in a mipite tung pan amate hauna taw kizui in shia sia
2Kings23:36 Jehoiakim sia Judah kumpipa a sua hunin ama kum 25 pha hi
2Kings23:37 A taanghpupite ii ngamtat zui in ama in Topa tungah maw hi.

2Chronicles2:3 Solomon in Tyre kumpipa Hiram tungah a vaithakna panin: “A kumpi inn sak natu in ka pa David kumpipa tungah cedar thingluangte na zuak bangma in kei taw zong na hong seam ta'n.
2Chronicles2:4 Topa ka Pathian ka patoai natu in biakinn khat ka sak laitak hi. Tua mun sia mun thiangtho hi tu a
2Chronicles2:5 Ih Pathian in pathian dang khat pawpo sangin lianzaw ahikom biakinn lian khat sak tu ka sawm hi.
2Chronicles2:6 Ahizong vantung zaina theampo ngawngawn in ama tasak zo ngawl tu ahikom kuama in Pathian atu biakinn sa thei tatak ngawl tu hi. Tuasia ci leang Pathian tungah ngimnamtui hal natu mun ci tung kaan keima in bangbang biakinn khat sa thei tu khi ziam?
2Chronicles2:7 Tu in khetlet lim ngelh thiamna nei a
2Chronicles2:8 Nangma ii thingvawt nasep thiamzia ka heak ahikom Lebanon panin cedar thing
2Chronicles2:9 banghang ziam cile sak tu a ka tup biakinn sia lian tu a
2Chronicles2:10 Na thing atte neak tu in zungtaang tann tulnii
2Chronicles2:11 Hiram kumpipa in Solomon tungah lai thuk kik hi. A lai sungah
2Chronicles2:12 Leitung le vantung a bitphua pa Israel te Topa Pathian pok vun! Tu in Topa atu biakinn khat le ama a tu kumpi inn khat sak a sawm
2Chronicles2:13 Huram kici a ciim le khutthiam mama khat kong puak hi.
2Chronicles2:14 A nu sia Dan nam pan hi a
2Chronicles2:15 Tua hi a

2Chronicles12:3 siphu ngalleang 1

2Chronicles16:1 Judah kumpipa Asa ii kumpi maanna kum 36 kumin Israel kumpipa Baasha in Judah ngam sim a
2Chronicles16:2 Tua ahiciang Asa in Biakinnpi sumkholnate le kumpi inn pan khamh le ngunn la in Damascus ah Syria kumpipa Benhadad tungah thaak a
2Chronicles16:3 “Ih pate a kipawl bangma in ei zongh kipawl tawng. Hi khamh le ngunnte sia letsong in kong puak hi. Tu in Israel kumpipa Baasha taw na kipawlna sia tatsak vun
2Chronicles16:4 Asa ii kam vaithak sia Benhadad lungkimin
2Chronicles16:5 Baasha kumpipa in tua thu a zaak ciang Ramah khua a kulh vawt tawlnga in a nasep nusia hi.
2Chronicles16:6 Tuasia ciang Asa kumpipa in Judah ngamsung theampo pan mihing khawmtua in Baasha ii Ramah ah a zak suang le thingte puasakin Geba le Mizpah khuapi kulhte vawtna in zangh hi.
2Chronicles16:7 Tua hunin kamsaang Hanani sia Kumpipa Asa kungah pai a
2Chronicles16:8 Ethiopia le Libyan te in siphu ngalleang tam mama le siphu ngalkap tam mama taw ngalkaphonpite nei hi ngawl ka na ziam? Ahihang Topa muangin suang na hikom ama in amate hong zosak hi.
2Chronicles16:9 Topa in ama tungah thumaanna a neite tungah thahatna pia nuam in leitung buppi encik nginge hi. Na mawmawt ngamtatna hu in tu pan kipan ngal do tawntung tu ni hi
2Chronicles16:10 Hi thu in kamsaangpa tungah Asa thin uuksak mama ahikom ama in kamsaangpa thikkol bulsak hi. Hi hunsung teng mama in Asa in a mite pawlkhat a vawtsiat kipan hi.
2Chronicles16:11 Asa ii kumpi maan sungin a piang thute theampo a kipat pan a tawpna dong Judah le Israel Kumpite Taanghthu sungah kiciamtee hi.
2Chronicles16:12 Asa ii kumpi a sep a kum 39 kumin a peang ah meima ngilo khatvei in a peang bai hi; ahihang tuasia hun ngawngawn in ama in Topa tungah hu ngen ngawlin syavuante in bawlsak zaw hi.
2Chronicles16:13 Tua zawk a kum nii ciang ama thi a
2Chronicles16:14 David Khuapi sungah ama mama ii khuaksa suangkuul sungah kiphum hi. Amate in a luang phum natu a puuana in a tungah hel namtuite le paaknamtui thau te zut in ama ii thi a khuangaina in a lian mama meimang khat sep uh hi.

2Chronicles20:37 Ahihang Mareshah khua mi
2Chronicles21:1 Jehoshaphat thi a
2Chronicles21:2 Judah kumpipa Jehoshaphat ii tapa Jehoram in suapui pasal luk nei a: Azariah
2Chronicles21:3 A pa in amate khamh
2Chronicles21:4 Jehoram in a kumpi ngamukna a kip ciang
2Chronicles21:5 Jehoram sia kum 32 a phak kumin kumpi suak a
2Chronicles21:6 Ahab ii tanute khat a teenpui hu in ama in Ahab kumpipa le Israel kumpi dangte ii seksol ngamtatna zui hi. Ama in Topa tungah mawna khialna vawt hi
2Chronicles21:7 ahihang Topa in David taw thuciamna khat vawt zo a
2Chronicles21:8 Jehoram ii kumpi maan sungin Edom ngam in Judah ngam leedo in
2Chronicles21:9 Tuabangin Jehoram le a ngalkap bute in siphu ngalleang taw kuanin Edom ngamsung tumin sim uh hi. Tua munah Edom te ngalkaphonpi in amate kiim uum a
2Chronicles21:10 Tua hun pan kipan Edom sia Judah khut sung pan suatakna nga hi. Jehoram in a taanghpupite ii Pathian
2Chronicles21:11 Ama in Judah ngam mualsaangte tungah doai sepna munte ngawngawn vawtin
2Chronicles21:12 Kamsaangpa Elijah in Jehoram laithak a
2Chronicles21:13 Israel kumpite lamlakna zuizaw in Ahab le ama za a laih te ii Israel te sia thumaanna panin a pialpui bangma Judah le Jerusalem mite Pathian tungah thumaan ngawl tu in lam na pui hi. Nangma sangin mi phazaw na suapuite ngawngawn na suamlum hi.
2Chronicles21:14 Tua ahikom Topa in na mite
2Chronicles21:15 Nangma mama in ngilzang natna khat na nga tu a
2Chronicles21:16 Philistine te le Arab te pawlkhat sia Ethiopia te pawlkhat teenna tuipi dung teng ah teang uh hi. Tua mite sia Jehoram a sim tu in Topa in thawn hi.
2Chronicles21:17 Amate in Judah ngam simin kumpipa inn phuul a
2Chronicles21:18 Hiteng theampo a pian zawkciang Topa in kumpipa sia a bot mama ngilsung natna khat veisak hi.
2Chronicles21:19 A natna nasia vaial in kum nii dektak zawkciang thuak zo ngawlin thi hi. A khutnuai ngammite ii a taanghpupite atu a vawtsak ngei bangin thina huvau khuangaina lakna in meimang sep ngawl uh hi.
2Chronicles21:20 Jehoram kum 32 a phak ciang kumpi suak a
2Chronicles22:1 Arab te pawlkhat in Jerusalem simin Jehoram kumpipa ii tapa teng a nobel Ahaziah simngawl thatlum siat hi. Tua ahikom tu in Jerusalem khua mite in Ahaziah sia a pa ii kumpiza laihsak hi.
2Chronicles22:2 Ahaziah kum 22 a phakin kumpi suak a
2Chronicles22:3 
2Chronicles22:4 A pa thi zawkciang Ahab kumpipa innkuanpui dang teng sia ama ngaisutna a piate suak ahi hu in Topa tungah maw in tuate in ama puksak hi.
2Chronicles22:5 Amate ii ngaisutna piak bangin ama in zui a Syria kumpipa Hazael taw ngal kidona ah Israel kumpipa Joram pawlpui hi. Gilead ngam Ramoth ah ngalkaphonpite kisim a
2Chronicles22:6 A liamna kibawl tu in Joram sia Jezreel khuapi ah heak kik a
2Chronicles22:7 Hi bangin Joram a ve in a pai sia Pathian in Ahaziah ii puk natu in a zak ahi hi. Tua mun ah Ahaziah a taam sungin Ahab kumpi khang ngui siasak tu in Topa ii tealsa Nimshi ii tapa Jehu in ama le Joram thato hi.
2Chronicles22:8 Pathian ii tua khangngui tungah a thukhen bang Jehu in a taksuasak laitakin Ahaziah khualhawna ah a zui Ahaziah ii tute le Judah lampuite pawlkhat taw kisii uh hi. Jehu in amate that siat hi.
2Chronicles22:9 Ahaziah a kizon ciang a bukna Samaria khua sungah mu hi. Amate in ama sia Jehu kungah paipui in thatsak hi. Ahihang amate in Topa atu a sep thei za a seam a pu Jehoshaphat kumpipa a zatakna uh taw Ahaziah ii luang sia phum hi. Ahaziah innkuan sungah kumpi ngam uk thei tu khat zongh taang ngawl hi.
2Chronicles22:10 Ahaziah kumpipa ii nu Athaliah in a tapa a kithalupsak sia a heak po ciang Judah kumpi innkuanpui theampo a kithalup natu in thupia hi.
2Chronicles22:11 Ahaziah in thiampi Jehoiada taw a kiteang Jehosheba a kici suapui sealh numei khat nei hi. Tua nu in Ahaziah ii tapate khat a hi Joash a kici pa suatak ku in
2Chronicles22:12 Athaliah ii kumpinu a sep kum luk sung theampo tua munah ama buu top hi.

2Chronicles23:4 Ih vawt tu sia hisia hi. Thiampite le Levi te
2Chronicles23:5 a dang khen thum sua khen khat in kumpi inn cing tu hi

2Chronicles23:7 Levi te in namsau doksa in kumpipa cingin

2Chronicles29:31 Hezekiah in mipite tungah

2Chronicles29:34 Nganno hiza a ngo tu in thiampite kicing zo ngawl ahikom Levi te in nasep a man dong hu uh hi. Tuasia hunin thiampite a tamzaw a zeksa om bangin kithiangsak zo hi. (A zeksa kithiansakna thu ah thiampite sangin Levi te thumaan zaw uh hi.)
2Chronicles29:35 Pum bup hal sangaw biakpiakna ah a piak banah mipite neak tu in sangaw biakpiakna pan ngan ii thaute a hal tu le meihal biakpiakna taw a kipia sapittui a sung tu sia thiampite ii nasep ahi hi. Tuabangin Biakinnpi ah biakna vawt kipan kik hi.
2Chronicles29:36 Pathian huna taw hi nasep theampo manlang takin zo ahikom Hezekiah kumpipa le mipite lungdam hi.
