2Chronicles30:4 Kumpipa le mite in amate ngealna uh diksa hi
2Chronicles30:5 tua ahi bangma
2Chronicles30:6 Kumpipa le a uliante ii thu piakna om bangin Judah ngam le Israel ngamsung theampo ah kamtaite paisak kawkoai in hi bangin samsak hi: “Israel mite awng
2Chronicles30:7 Amate ii Pathian
2Chronicles30:8 Amate bangin thinpui ngawlin Topa thu ni vun. Topa note Pathian in no tungah a thin uuk nawn ngawl natu in a tawntungin a thianthosak sa Jerusalem Biakinnpi ah hong pai in ama bia vun.
2Chronicles30:9 Topa na zuan kik uh le na mealheakte
2Chronicles30:10 Kamtaite sia Ephraim le Manasseh namte ii ngamsung khuapi theampo ah pai a
2Chronicles30:11 Tua kawm pan Asher
2Chronicles30:12 Judah mite sung zongh ah Pathian in naseam a
2Chronicles30:13 A tha nii tha in Tol Kisaw Ngawl Anluum Poai vawt tu in mi honpui khat Jerusalem ah kikhawmtua uh hi.
2Chronicles30:14 Amate in Jerusalem khua sungah sangaw biakpiakna le ngimnamtui halna in a kizangh biaknataute theampo la in Kidron kuam ah vawk uh hi.
2Chronicles30:15 Tuaciang tua tha a ni sawm le ni li ni in amate in Paisan Poai sangaw biakpiakna atu tuute ngo uh hi. A zeksa om bangin a thiang ngawl lai thiampite le Levi te sia a maizum mama in Topa mai ah amate le amate ki aaptuam hi; tuasia ciang tu in amate in Biakinnpi sungah meihal biakpiakna pia thei hi.
2Chronicles30:16 Pathian mi Moses ii Thukham sungah a thupiak bangin amate in Biakinnpi sungah omna mun la tek hi. Levi te in sangaw biakpiaknate ii a chite thiampite pia a
2Chronicles30:17 Mipite tam mama sia a zeksa om bangin thiang ngawl ahi hu in Paisan Poai tuute ngo thei ngawl ahikom amate taangin Levi te in ngoin Topa tungah tuuno te aap uh hi.
2Chronicles30:18 Tuaban ah
2Chronicles30:19 “Ka taanghpupite ii Pathian
2Chronicles30:20 Topa in Hezekiah thungetna saang a; tua mite mawna maisak in
2Chronicles30:21 Jerusalem khua ah a kikhawmtua mite theampo in Tol Kisaw Ngawl Anluum Poai sia lungdamna lianpi taw ni sali sung vawt hi; ni khat zawkciang ni khat thiampite le Levi te in a tha neiza taw Topa pok uh hi.
2Chronicles30:22 Hezekiah in Topa biakna vawt a thiam Levi te pok hi. A taanghpupite ii Pathian
2Chronicles30:23 amate teng in a dang ni sali sung ma poai vawt natu in khensat hi. Tuabangin amate lungdam takin poai vawt uh hi.
2Chronicles30:24 Hezekiah kumpipa in tua poai ah mipite neak tu in khuital 1
2Chronicles30:25 Tua ahikom mite theampo — Judah mi
2Chronicles30:26 Jerusalem khuapi sia lungdamna taw kidim hi
2Chronicles30:27 Thiampite le Levi te in mipite atu in Topa tungah thupha ngetsak hi. Vantung a inn pan Pathian in amate thungetna za in saang hi.
2Chronicles31:1 Tua poai a man zawkciang Israel mite theampo Judah khuapi teng ah pai a
2Chronicles31:2 Hezekiah kumpipa in thiampite le Levi te ii nasep kipawlna puuapha kik a
2Chronicles31:3 Zing le nitak veu in a kiseam meihal biakpiaknate le Sabbath ni le Tha Thak Poai atu ahizong
2Chronicles31:4 Tua banah Topa Pathian Thukham om bangin thiampite le Levi te in a hun nei zaza a piak thei natu in amate nga tu a hi piakkhiatnate a piak tek natu in kumpipa in Jerusalem khua mite thupia hi.
2Chronicles31:5 Tuabangin thu a piak zawk po ciang Israel mite in a antang
2Chronicles31:6 Judah khuapite ah a teang mite theampo in a khui le a tuute sawm a khat puakin
2Chronicles31:7 A tha thumna tha sungin letsongte hong puak a
2Chronicles31:8 Hezekiah kumpipa le a uliante in tuabangza a tam letsong a kipiak a mu uh ciang
2Chronicles31:9 Hi letsongte thu kumpipa in thiampite le Levi te tungah a son ciang
2Chronicles31:10 Zadok ii suan Thiampi Lianbel Azariah in Ama tungah
2Chronicles31:11 Kumpipa thupiak bangin amate in Biakinnpi suum sungah vanh kholna inndoite vawt a
2Chronicles31:12 tua inndoite sungah letsongte le sawm a khat te theampo kikeamcing hi. Amate in tua sia Levi te Conaniah in uksak a
2Chronicles31:13 Amate khutnuai ah na seam tu in Levi te sawm kisee a: Jehiel
2Chronicles31:14 Biakinnpi Nisuana sang Kongpi a cingpipa Levi mi Imnah ii tapa Kore sia Topa tungah a kipia letsongte a sang tu le tuate a hawmna ah a ukpa ahi hi.
2Chronicles31:15 Thiampite teenna khuapi dangte ah hi Levi dangte in thumaan takin ama nasep a hu te sia: Eden
2Chronicles31:16 bee le phung zui in hawm ngawl hi. Amate Biakinnpi ah ni sim vaipuak nei pasal kum 30 ahibuale a tungsia theampo a nasep na mun zui in hawmsak uh hi.
2Chronicles31:17 Thiampite sia bee le phung zui in nasep kiseesak a
2Chronicles31:18 Amate ii a thiangtho nasep thupite bang hun pawpo in sep na tu kingin kul ahikom amate
2Chronicles31:19 Thiampi bangkua sungah a om pa a minpiang le Levi bee le phung min tepteena sungah min om theampote
2Chronicles31:20 Judah ngamsung theampo ah Hezekiah kumpipa in a maan sia le Topa a Pathian ii diksak teng seam hi.
2Chronicles31:21 Ama ii Biakinnpi a tu a sep theampo ahibuale Thukham zuina thu ah thutakin a thin takpi taw a Pathian a biak hu in a maa tun hi.
2Chronicles32:1 Hezekiah kumpipa in thumaan takin Topa na seam a
2Chronicles32:2 Sennacherib in Jerusalem khuapi zongh sim a sawm hunlam Hezekiah in a phaw ciang
2Chronicles32:3 Assyria te Jerusalem khua hong nai ciang tui a nga ngawl natu in ama le a uliante in khuapi pua sang pan tuinaakte khakcip tu in khensat uh hi. Uliante lampui in khua mite tam mama kuan tek a
2Chronicles32:4 
2Chronicles32:5 Kumpipa in khuapi uumna luphungte puuapha in
2Chronicles32:6 Ama in khuapi sung pasal om theampo ngalkap bute khutnuai ah koi in khuapi kongpi leitual ah a kikhoptua natu thupia hi. Ama in amate tungah
2Chronicles32:7 “Citakin kimuang vun
2Chronicles32:8 Ama in mihing thahatna nei ahihang eite in hong hu tu le ih ngalte hong simsak tu in Topa ih Pathian kinei hi
2Chronicles32:9 Tawmvei zawkciang Sennacherib le a ngalkaphonpite Lachish ah a om hun laitakin
2Chronicles32:10 “Keima Assyria kumpilianpa Sennacherib in kong dok nopna pan
2Chronicles32:11 Ko khut sung panin Topa na Pathian in no hong hun tu hi ci in Hezekiah in hong son hi
2Chronicles32:12 Topa biakna munte le biaknataute a sutham sia ama hi a
2Chronicles32:13 Ngamdangmite tungah ka taanghpupite le keima ngamtatna he ngawl nu ziam? Ngamdang khat pawpo ii pathiante in a mite Assyria kumpilianpa khut sung panin a hun ngei ziam?
2Chronicles32:14 Bang hunin tua ngam teng ii pathiante khat pawpo in a ngam sia ko khut sung pan hun ngei na ziam? Tua ahile na pathian in nang hong hun thei hi ci sia
2Chronicles32:15 Tu in Hezekiah in tuabangin theamsak heak vun a
2Chronicles32:16 Assyria uliante in Topa Pathian le Topa naseampa Hezekiah te siat son zaw lai uh hi.
2Chronicles32:17 Kumpilianpa in Israel te ii Pathian Topa a dona lai thaak a tuasung ah
2Chronicles32:18 Tua uliante in tua khuapi a ol zaw in a laak thei natu in luphung tungah a om Jerusalem mite a lau natu le a thinkiam natu in Hebrew kam taw
2Chronicles32:19 Amate in mihing khut taw a kivawt tawm milimte
2Chronicles32:20 Tuasia ciang Hezekiah kumpipa le Amoz ii tapa
2Chronicles32:21 Topa in vantunglalang khat paisakin Assyria ngalkap te le a ngalkapbute thatsak hi. Tua ahikom a kumpilianpa sia maimawlin Assyria ngam ah heak kik hi. Ni khat ni in ama sia a pathian biakinn sungah a om laitakin a tapate pawlkhat in a namsau uh taw ama thatlum hi.
2Chronicles32:22 Tuabangin Topa in Hezekiah kumpipa le Jerusalem mi teng Assyria kumpilianpa Sennacherib le a ngal dangte khut sung pan zongh suatak hi. Ama in a mite sia a kiim le a paam ngam theampo taw kilemin teangsak hi.
2Chronicles32:23 Mihing tam mama in Topa tungah a piak tu biakpiakna te le Hezekiah tungah a piak tu letsongte kengin Jerusalem ah hong pai uh hi
2Chronicles32:24 Tua hun khawngin Kumpipa Hezekiah a ciina in thi dek tak hi. Ama in thungen a
2Chronicles32:25 Ahihang Hezekiah kiphasak leih in Topa ii ama atu a vawtsak nate hangin lungdamko ngawl hi
2Chronicles32:26 Ahizong a khakbel ciang Hezekiah le Jerusalem mite kiniamkhiak kik ahikom Topa in Hezekiah ii thi dong tua mite daan pia ngawl hi.
2Chronicles32:27 Hezekiah kumpipa hau mama a
2Chronicles32:28 Tuaban ah ante
2Chronicles32:29 Tuaban ah Pathian in tuu le khui te pia in a dang nei le lamh tam mama pia ahikom ama in khuapi tam ma saat hi.
2Chronicles32:30 Gihon Ciktui ii pusuana vang khaktan in Jerusalem luphung sungsang mun khat dongin leinuai ah tui kheetna luam a vawt sia Hezekiah kumpipa ahi hi. A sep a vawt theampo Hezekiah in taangtun a
2Chronicles32:31 a ngam sungah a lamdang a piang thu kan tu in Babylon tongciinte a pai laitak ngawngawnin a ngamtatna a heak ku nopna in Pathian in Hezekiah sia ama uuk thu in ngamtasak hi.
2Chronicles32:32 Hezekiah kumpipa ii a nasep dang teng le Topa tungah a kipiaknate theampo sia Amoz Tapa Kamsaang Isaiah ii Mukholna sung le Judah le Israel Kumpipate ii Taanghthu sungah kiciamtee hi.
2Chronicles32:33 Hezekiah thi a
2Chronicles33:1 Manasseh sia kum sawm le kum nii a phak ciangin Judah kumpi suak a
2Chronicles33:2 Israel mite maisang a manaw lai in tua ngamsung pan Topa ii a nawkeak minamte ii a kiihuai ngamtatna te zui in Manasseh sia Topa tungah maw hi.
2Chronicles33:3 Ama in a pa Hezekiah ii suksiat sa doai biakna munte sa kik hi. Ama in Baal biakna tu in biaknataute sa a
2Chronicles33:4 Topa ii ama a tawntungin a kibiak natu mun a cina Biakinnpi sungah ama in doai biaknataute vawt hi.
2Chronicles33:5 Ama in Biakinnpi leitual nii te ah aksite biakna tu in biaknataute vawt hi.
2Chronicles33:6 Ama in a tapate Hinnom Kuam ah meihal biakpiakna in nei hi. Ama in mitbum le aisaanna zangh a
2Chronicles33:7 Ama in Topa Biakinnpi sungah milim khat koi a
2Chronicles33:8 Israel mite in ka thukham theampo zui in ka naseampa Moses ii amate a piak Thukham buppi a zui uh le a taanghpupite tungah ka piak ngam panin a kinawkeak tu ka oai buatu hi
2Chronicles33:9 Topa mihing Israel mite maisang a manaw lai in
2Chronicles33:10 Topa in Manasseh le a mite a kidop natu in son hi napi amate in nangai ngawl uh hi.
2Chronicles33:11 Tua ahikom Topa in Assyria ngalkapmangte in Judah ngam simsak hi. Amate in Manasseh manin thikkawn le kol bulin Babylon ah paipui uh hi.
2Chronicles33:12 Hi bangin a thuakna hu in ama kiniamkhiak in Topa a Pathian zuanin huna ngen hi.
2Chronicles33:13 Manasseh ii thungetna sia Pathian in saang a
2Chronicles33:14 Tuasia zawkciang Manasseh in David Khuapi nisuana sangah a om luphung puanung sia Gihon Cik hui Kuam sung panin saksang ah Ngasa Kongpi le Ophel kici khuapi huam ciang dong saangsak vaial hi. Judah ngam sungah kulh taw a ki uum khuapi sim ah ngalkap honkhat le a uk ngalkapbu khat veu koi hi.
2Chronicles33:15 Ama in Biakinnpi sung panin ngamdang pathiante le tua munah ama koi milim sia ahizong
2Chronicles33:16 Ama in Topa a kibiakna biaknatau zongh puua kikin tua tungah kipawlkhop biakpiaknate le lungdamko biakpiaknate pia hi. Ama in Israel te ii Pathian
2Chronicles33:17 Mite in biakna mun dangte ah sangaw biakpiaknate pia suak ahitazong amate in Topa tung bekma ah pia uh hi.
2Chronicles33:18 Manasseh ii a nasep dangte theampo a Pathian tungah a thungetna le Topa Israel ii Pathian min taw kamsaangte ii ama tungah a thupuakte theampo Israel Kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kiciamtee hi.
2Chronicles33:19 Kumpipa ii thungetna le Pathian zo kikna
2Chronicles33:20 Manasseh thi a
2Chronicles33:21 Amon in Judah kumpi a sua lai in kum 22 pha a
2Chronicles33:22 A pa Manasseh bangma in ama in Topa tungah maw in a pa ii biak milimte bia hi.
2Chronicles33:23 Ahihang ama ahile a pa bang hi ngawl a
2Chronicles33:24 Amon sia a uliante ma in thasawm a
2Chronicles33:25 Amon a suamte sia Judah mite in thatin
2Chronicles34:1 Josiah in kum liat a phak ciang Judah kumpi suak a
2Chronicles34:2 Ama in Topa diksak nate vawt a; a taanghpupi David ngamtatna zui in Pathian ii thukham theampo pha takin zui hi.
2Chronicles34:3 Josiah a kumpi sua zawk kum liat a phak kumin khangmoi mama lai ahihang ama in a taanghpupi David kumpipa ii Pathian a biak kipan hi. Kum li zawkciang ama in doai sepna munte
2Chronicles34:4 Ama ii thupiak bangin a mite in Baal biakna biaknataute sutham in a kungah ngimnamtui halna biaknataute pheltham hi. Amate in Asherah milimte le a dang milimte theampo suuvui in
2Chronicles34:5 Ama in doai seam thiampite ii ngu teng amate ii biaknataute tungah hal hi. Hi bang teng taw Josiah in Judah le Jerusalem sia a zeksa ngeina om bangin thiansua kik hi.
2Chronicles34:6 Ama in khuapite sung le Manasseh ngam
2Chronicles34:7 Saksang kumpi ngam theampo ah ama in biaknataute le Asherah limte sutham in milimte suuvui a
2Chronicles34:8 Josiah kumpipa in a kumpi maan zawk kum sawm le kum liat kumin
2Chronicles34:9 Levi biakinn cingte ii Biakinnpi sung pan a khon sum teng Thiampi Lianbel Hilkiah tungah ki aap hi. (Tua sumte sia Ephraim mi
2Chronicles34:10 Tua sum teng biakinn puua kikna a ukte thum tungah ki aap a
2Chronicles34:11 Judah kumpite ii a muatsak innte puua natu a kizangh suang le thing lei natu in lettamate le inn sate a piak tu ahi hi.
2Chronicles34:12 Tua na a seamte thumaan tatak hi. Amate sia Levi mite li ahi Merari bee le phung pan Jahath le Obadiah
2Chronicles34:13 A dang Levi te in vanh nawn na le nasep dang tuatuam a seamte uk in
2Chronicles34:14 Vanh kholna inndoi sung pan sum a laak laitakin Hilkiah in Moses tungah Pathian piak Thukham
2Chronicles34:15 Ama in Shaphan munah
2Chronicles34:16 Shaphan in kumpipa kungah paipui hi. Ama in
2Chronicles34:17 Biakinnpi sungah a kep sum teng ka la zo uh hi
2Chronicles34:18 Tuaciang ama in
2Chronicles34:19 Kumpipa in laibu a kisim na bang a zaak ciang
2Chronicles34:20 tuaciang Hilkiah
2Chronicles34:21 “Pai tavun a
2Chronicles34:22 Kumpipa thupiak bangin Jerusalem ii a khen khuathak mun khat sungah a teang Huldah a kici numei kamsaang khat munah thu dongh tu in
2Chronicles34:23 tuaciang ama in kumpipa kungah amate pai kikin sawl a
2Chronicles34:24 A nuai a Topa thupiak teng puak hi: “Keima in Jerusalem le a mite theampo kumpipa tungah a kisim laibu sia sungah a ki at haamsiatna te taw daan ka pia tu hi.
2Chronicles34:25 Amate in kei hong nial a
2Chronicles34:26 Kumpipa mama atu in hi bangin kei
2Chronicles34:27 tuaciang Jerusalem le a mite daan piak tu ka tawnna na zaak ciang kiniamkhiakna le kisii kikna taw ka mai ah na puansilh eaukeak in kap ni hi. Na thungetna hong za zo khi hi.
2Chronicles34:28 Tuaciang Jerusalem ka piak tu daan sia na thi zawk ciang mateng in tungsak ngawl tu khi hi. Thinnuam in kong thisak tu hi
2Chronicles34:29 Kumpipa Josiah in Judah le Jerusalem lampui teng sam a
2Chronicles34:30 tuaciang amate a pai uh ciangin
2Chronicles34:31 Ama in kumpi khuam sia kungah dingin Topa thu a ni tu
2Chronicles34:32 Ama in tua thuciamna a zui kik natu in Benjamin mite le Jerusalem ah a om dang teng theampo kiciamsak hi. Tuabangin Jerusalem mite in a taanghpupite ii Pathian taw a vawt sa thuciamna ii dei nate zui tek hi.
2Chronicles34:33 Josiah kumpipa in Israel te neisa a ngam sungah a om a kiihuai milim theampo susia hi
2Chronicles35:1 Josiah kumpipa in Topa patoaina in Jerusalem khua ah Paisan Poai vawt hi; a tha masabel
2Chronicles35:2 Ama in thiampite ii Biakinnpi sungah a nasep tu seesakin amate nasep tek a phatak a sep natu in hanthawn hi.
2Chronicles35:3 Ama in Topa tungah a ki aap Israel syate ahi Levi te tungah hi thute hil hi: “David tapa Solomon kumpipa ii a sak Biakinnpi sungah tua Thuciamna Thingkuang thiangtho koi vun. Tua sia mun khat pan mun khat ah khiin kawkoai nawn heak vun
2Chronicles35:4 David kumpipa le a tapa Solomon ii nasep hong seesak bangin Biakinnpi sungah bee le phung zui in panmun la tek vun a
2Chronicles35:5 Noma pawlkhat in Israel mi sungah bangkua khat sim hu a kul ciang
2Chronicles35:6 Noma in Paisan Poai atu in tuunote le kealte ngo tu nu hi. Tu in Topa ii Moses tungah a piak thuhilnate Israel na mipuite ii a zui thei natu in noma le noma a zeksa om bangin kithiangsak vun a
2Chronicles35:7 Josiah kumpipa in Paisan Poai hun sung mipite zak tu in ama ii khoai nganhonte sung pan tuute
2Chronicles35:8 A uliante zongh in mipite
2Chronicles35:9 Levi lampuite — Conaniah
2Chronicles35:10 Paisan Poai atu in na theampo a vaihawm siat zawkciang kumpipa ii thupiak bangin thiampite le Levi te in amate nasepna mun tek ah om uh hi.
2Chronicles35:11 Tuu le keal a kingaw zawkciang Levi te in a vun hoai in thiampite in biaknatau tungah a chi the uh hi.
2Chronicles35:12 Tua zawkciang Moses Thukham sungah hilna om bangin a piak thei tu in meihal biakpiaknate a tu ngannote sia amate in a innkuan pawl tuatuamte zui in mipite hawmsak hi.
2Chronicles35:13 Levi te in ngeina om bangin Paisan Poai sangawte sia mei tungah em in a thiangtho biakpiakna sate sia bealte
2Chronicles35:14 Hiteng a vawt zawkciang Levi te in amate atu le Aaron suan thiampite atu in sa hawm uh hi
2Chronicles35:15 Asaph bee le phung pan a nuai a Levi music thiamte sia David kumpipa thupiakna bangin nasep kiseena munte ah om tek hi: Asaph
2Chronicles35:16 Tua ahikom Josiah kumpipa thupiak bangin Topa biakna Paisan Poai vawtna a tu le biaknatau tungah meihal biakpiaknate a tu teng tua ni in a vekpi kivawt siat hi.
2Chronicles35:17 Tua munah a om Israel mite a vekpi in Paisan Poai le Tol Kisaw ngawl Anluum Poai ni sali sung vawt uh hi.
2Chronicles35:18 Kamsaangpa Samuel hun lai pan kipan Paisan Poai hi bangin kivawt ngeingawl hi. Paisan Poai sia Josiah kumpipa
2Chronicles35:19 Josiah kumpi maan zawk kum sawm le kum liat kum in
2Chronicles35:20 Josiah kumpipa in Biakinnpi atu in hite theampo a vawt zawkciang Egypt kumpipa Neco in Euphrates ngun tungah a om Carchemish ah ngalsim tu in a ngalkaphonpi paipui hi. Josiah in ama tawlngaksak tu in hanciam hi
2Chronicles35:21 ahizong Neco in Josiah tungah hi bangin thupuak hi: “Judah kumpipa awng
2Chronicles35:22 Ahihang Josiah in sim sawm veve hi. Ama in Pathian ii Neco kumpipa tungtawnin a thusonte na ngai ngawlin kimealseal in Megiddo zaangtam ah ngalsim hi.
2Chronicles35:23 Ngal kisim sungin Egypt te ii thaltangte in Josiah kumpipa kha hi. Ama in a naseamte tungah
2Chronicles35:24 Amate in a siphu ngalleang tung panin toai in tua munah a om ama siphu ngalleang niina sia tungah suanh in Jerusalem ah paipui uh hi. Tua munah ama thi in kumpite thaan ah kiphum hi. Judah le Jerusalem mite theampo ama thi hu in khuangai tek uh hi.
2Chronicles35:25 Kamsaangpa Jeremiah in Josiah kumpipa atu in khuangai la khat phuak hi. Ama atu khuangai in a kaa uh ciang la sate in nupite ahizong pasalte ahizong hi khuangai la a zak uh sia Israel te ngeina suak hi. Tua late sia khuangai late khoptuana sungah kimu hi.
2Chronicles35:26 Josiah ii a sep theampo — Topa tungah a kipiakna
2Chronicles35:27 le ama taanghthu a kipatna pan a tawpna dong — Israel le Judah Kumpipate Taanghthu sungah kiciamtee siat hi.
2Chronicles36:1 Judah mite in Josiah ii tapa Joahaz teal a Jerusalem khua ah ama sathau noai in kumpi suaksak hi.
2Chronicles36:2 Judah kumpi a sua lai in Joahaz kum 23 pha a
2Chronicles36:3 Egypt kumpipa Neco in ama thongtaaksak a
2Chronicles36:4 Neco in Joahaz ii suapuipa Eliakim Judah kumpi suaksak a
2Chronicles36:5 Jehoiakim sia Judah kumpi a sua lai in kum 25 pha a
2Chronicles36:6 Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar in Judah ngam sim in
2Chronicles36:7 Nebuchadnezzar in Biakinnpi vanh manpha pawlkhat pua in Babylon a kumpi inn ah koi hi.
2Chronicles36:8 Jehoiakim ii a sep a vawt theampo
2Chronicles36:9 Jehoiachin sia Judah kumpi a sua lai in kum sawm le kum liat pha a
2Chronicles36:10 Khuakhaal kipat ciang Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa in Jehoiachin sia thongtaak tu in Babylon ah paipui hi. Biakinnpi sum le vanh manphate zongh pua hi. Tua zawkciang Nebuchadnezzar in Jehoiachin ii pano Zedekiah sia Judah le Jerusalem kumpi suaksak hi.
2Chronicles36:11 Zedekiah sia Judah kumpi a sua lai in kum 21 pha a
2Chronicles36:12 Ama in Topa tungah maw in Topa kammal a son kamsaangpa Jeremiah ii thusonte kiniamkhiakna taw ngai ngawl hi.
2Chronicles36:13 Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa ii ama tungah a thumaan tu in Pathian min taw hamtangpi in a kiciamsak Zedekiah in ama leedo hi. Zedekiah thinpui in kisiik kik nuam ngawlin Israel te ii Pathian
2Chronicles36:14 Tua banah Judah lampuite
2Chronicles36:15 A taanghpupite ii Pathian
2Chronicles36:16 Ahizong amate in Pathian ii kamtaite nunau in
2Chronicles36:17 Tua ahiciang Topa in amate sim tu in Babylon kumpipa paisak hi. Kumpipa in Judah tangvalte Biakinnpi sung ngawngawn ah thatlum hi. Kumpipa in a moi a haam
2Chronicles36:18 Babylon kumpipa in Biakinnpi sung
2Chronicles36:19 Ama in Biakinnpi le khuapi sia a kumpi innte le a nei a lam theampo taw haltum in khuapi uumna luphungte sutham hi.
2Chronicles36:20 Ama in a nungta lai theampo Babylon ah ciapui a
2Chronicles36:21 Tuabangin kamsaang Jeremiah tungtawn a
2Chronicles36:22 Persia mi Cyrus
2Chronicles36:23 “Hisia in Persia kumpilianpa Cyrus ii thupiakna ahi hi. Vantung Pathian
Ezra1:1 Persia mi Cyrus in kumpilianpa a sep
Ezra1:2 “Hisia in Persia kumpilianpa Cyrus ii thupiakna ahi hi. Vantung Pathian
Ezra1:3 Ama mi ahi note theampo taw Pathian hong omkhawm tahen. Note Jerusalem ah pai tavun a
Ezra1:4 Saltaang a mite a cia kik natu in hu tu a kul le
Ezra1:5 Tuaciang Judah le Benjamin namte sung pan bee le phung lutangte
Ezra1:6 A innpaamte theampo in na tam mama pia in amate hu uh hi: ngunn taw kivawt vanhzakte
Ezra1:7 Cyrus kumpilianpa in Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa ii Jerusalem Biakinnpi sung pan a laaksak
Ezra1:8 Ama in tua teng Judah ngamukmangpa Sheshbazzar a piak tu in tepteena lai a vawt kumpi sumkeampi pa Mithredath tungah aap hi
Ezra1:9 a piak vanhte a nuai a bang ahi hi: biakpiakna khamh khawbeamte 30 biakpiakna ngunn khawbeamte 1000 khawbeam dangte 29 khamh khawbeam note 30 ngunn khawbeam note 410 vanhzak dangte 1000

Ezra2:1 Saltaang tam mama te in Babylon nusia in Jerusalem le Judah ngam a khuapi tek ah ciakik uh hi. Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa in tualai ah thongtaak tu in a mat pan kipan amate a innkuan a innkuanin Babylon ngam ah saltaangin teang uh hi.
Ezra2:2 A lampuite sia Zerubbabel
Ezra3:1 A tha sali tha in Israel mite a khua tek ah teang siat hi. Tua zawkciang amate a vekpi in Jerusalem ah kikhawm uh a
Ezra3:2 Jehozadak ii tapa Joshua
Ezra3:3 Saltanna pan a cia kikte in tua ngam ah a teang mite kiita ahitazong
Ezra3:4 Amate in zui tu ngeina om bangin Buk Poai khaam a; ni khat sim atu a kisamh babang tua ni in biakpiakna pia uh hi;
Ezra3:5 tuaban ah amate in a piak tawntung pum bup meihal sangaw biakpiakna
Ezra3:6 Mipite in Biakinnpi sakkik tu kipan ngawl lai hikale
Ezra3:7 Mipite in suangciangte le lettamate a piak tu sum khia in
Ezra3:8 Tuabangin Jerusalem Biakinnpi sak natu munah amate a ciakik kum
Ezra3:9 Levi mi Jeshua le a tapate le a mealheakte
Ezra3:10 Inn sate ii Biakinn tawdap a vawt kipat ciang puantual silh Thiampite in a khut ah lemle toai in dinmun la uh a

Ezra3:12 Khanghaam thiampite
Ezra3:13 Amate aw sa taw ngamlum mama in a khuala na pan kiza thei ahiciang kuama in kaa na aw maw lungdamna aw maw khen thei ngawl uh hi.
Ezra4:1 Judah le Benjamin mite ii ngalte in saltaang a cia kikte ii Israel te ii Pathian
Ezra4:2 Tua ahiciang amate pai a Zerubbabel le a bee a phung lutangte taw a kimu uh ciang
Ezra4:3 Zerubbabel
Ezra4:4 Tuaciang tua ngam sungah a teang mite in a sak ngawl natu in Jew te thinkiam sakin lauthawn tu hanciam uh hi.
Ezra4:5 Amate a langpan natu in Persia kumpi uliante zongh sumnguk pia uh hi. Amate in Cyrus kumpi maan hun sung theampo le Darius kumpi maan hun dongin tubangin langpan tan uh hi.
Ezra4:6 Xerxes kumpilianpa maan hun a kipat ciang Judah le Jerusalem ah a teangte ii ngalte in amate a langpanna lai pia uh hi.
Ezra4:7 Persia kumpilianpa Artaxerxes maan hun ciangin Bishlam
Ezra4:8 Ngamukmangpa Rehum le ngamsung thuzeakpi Shimshai te zongh in Jerusalem khua thu taw kisai kumpilianpa Artaxerxes tungah a nuai a bangin laithak at uh hi:
Ezra4:9 “Ngamukmangpa Rehum le ngamsung thuzeakpi Shimshai
Ezra4:10 tuaciang a lian le a thahat Ashurbanipal ii amate inn pan a khiin Samaria khuapi sung le Euphrates nitumna ngamsung mundang ah a teensak midangte theampo tung panin kong thaak khop uh lai ahi hi.”
Ezra4:11 A laithak sia a nuai a bang hi: “Euphrates nitumna sangah a teang na naseamte in kumpilianpa Artaxerxes tungah lai kong thaak uh hi.
Ezra4:12 “Nangma vaanglian kumpipa in
Ezra4:13 Vaanglian kumpipa awng
Ezra4:14 Tu in kote sia nangma a vaanglian kumpipa khutnuai ah a seamte ka hi uh ciang
Ezra4:15 na taanghpupite nusiat thu tepteena laibu sungah na kat kik tu in ngaisutna kong pia uh hi. Tuabangin kan kik le te hi khuapi sia kumpi leedo tawntung khuapi a hina le taanghlai hun a kipan kumpite le ngam ukte a buaisakna thu na mu tu hi. A mite sia uk hak tawntung hi. Tua hangin a khua kilalsak hi.
Ezra4:16 Hi khua kisaat kikin a luphungte kizo thiang thong le vaanglian kumpipa nangma in Euphrates nitumna ngam teng uk zo nawn ngawl tu ci thu telthiang khu hi.”
Ezra4:17 Kumpilianpa in hi bangin lai thuk hi: “Ngam uk mangpa Rehum
Ezra4:18 “Nong laithak kipheen kik in keima hong kisim hi.
Ezra4:19 A thu kan tu in ka sawl a
Ezra4:20 A thahat kumpite maang in Euphrates nitumna sang theampo uk in shia le phiangshia khon uh hi.
Ezra4:21 Tua ahikom thu kong piak kik mateng tua mite in khuapi a sakkik nawn ngawl natu in thupia tu nu hi.
Ezra4:22 Ka ngam phattuam nate a kilalsak ngawl natu in thakhat thu in tuasia seam paih vun
Ezra4:23 Hi Artaxerxes ii laithak sia Rehum
Ezra4:24 Biakinnpi sakkik sia kitawlngasak a

Ezra6:1 Tuaciang Darius kumpilianpa in Babylon khua ah a kikeam kumpite thu tepteena laibu sungah tua thute kan tu in thupia hi.
Ezra6:2 Ahizong Media ngamsung Ecbatana khua sungah a nuai a bang thu tepteena a om laizial khat kimu hi:
Ezra6:3 “Ama ii kumpi maan zawk a kum khat kum in Cyrus kumpilianpa in sangaw biakpiakna le meihal biakpiakna mun tu in Jerusalem Biakinnpi a kisak kik natu thupia hi. Biakinnpi sia metre 27 saangin metre 27 zai tu hi.
Ezra6:4 A pangte suangtum dawl thum a cian simin thing dawl khat taw kisa tu hi. A sum bo theampo kumpi sum sung pan kipia tu hi.
Ezra6:5 Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa ii Jerusalem Biakinnpi pan Babylon ah a paipui khamh le ngunn
Ezra6:6 Tuasia ciang Darius in a nuai a bangin zasak kik hi: “Euphrates nitumna ngamuk mangpa Tattenai
Ezra6:7 Biakinn sakna nawngkaisak heak vun. Judah ngamukmangpa le Jew lampuite in Pathian Biakinnpi sia a om na ngei ma ah sa kiksak vun.
Ezra6:8 Amate ii a sak kikna na hu natu uh in hi lai sungah thu kong pia hi. Hi nasep a kisuangsamh ngawl natu in Euphrates nitumna sang pan phiangshia a kinga kumpi sum sung pan a bona teng theampo manlang takin kipiaksak tu hi.
Ezra6:9 Jerusalem ah a om thiampite ii ni simin kisamh hi hong ci pawpo peal ngawlin pia tu nu hi: vantung Pathian tungah meihal biakpiak natu in khuitalnote
Ezra6:10 Vantung Pathian ii a saan thei tu in sangaw biakpiakna a piak thei natu le keima le ka tapate atu in thupha nong nget thei natu in hisia sep tu ahi hi.
Ezra6:11 Tua banah hi thupiakna a zui ngawl a om le a inn zawlliang khat kidawkeaksak tu a
Ezra6:12 Ama a kibiak natu mun Jerusalem khuapi a teal Pathian in hi thupiakna nial a
Ezra6:13 Tuasia ciang ngamukmang Tattenai
Ezra6:14 Jew lampuite in kamsaang Haggai le Zechariah te ii hanthotna taw a Biakinnpi sak ngai tawto uh hi. Amate in Biakinnpi sia Israel te ii Pathian le Persia kumpiliante ahi Cyrus
Ezra6:15 Amate in Darius ii kumpilian a sep zawk a kum luk kum Adar tha
Ezra6:16 Tua zawkciang Israel mite — thiampite
Ezra6:17 Biakinnpi aapna in amate in khuital 100
Ezra6:18 Amate in Moses laibu sungah kihilna om bangin Jerusalem biakinn naseam tu in thiampite le Levi te zongh kaikhawm uh hi.
Ezra6:19 Saltanna pan hong cia kik mite in a kum kik
Ezra6:20 Thiampite le Levi te theampo in amate le amate kithiansua in a zeksa om bangin thiangtho uh hi. Levi te in hong cia kik mite theampo atu le thiampite le amate mama atu in Paisan Poai sangaw biakpiakna in ngannote ngo uh hi.
Ezra6:21 Tua biakpiakna sate saltanna pan hong cia kik Israel te theampo le tua ngam ah a teang doai biate ii biakna nusia a Israel ii Topa Pathian bia tu in hong paite in ne uh hi.
Ezra6:22 Ni sali sung lungdam takin Tol saw ngawl Anluum Poai khaam uh hi. Israel te ii Pathian ii Biakinnpi a sakkikna ah a hu natu Topa in Assyria kumpilianpa sia Jew te ngup nopna thin neisak ahikom amate lungdamna taw kidim hi.

Ezra7:17 “Hi dangka teng khuital

Ezra8:5 Casiphia khua taangpi lutang ahi Iddo kungah amate ka paisak a

Ezra8:8 Tua banah Levi te a hu tu in David kumpipa le a uliante ii a taanghpupite pan nasep a piaksa biakinn naseam 220 om hi. Amate min teng zongh kikhum siat hi.
Ezra8:9 A kitotawm Ahava Tuiluam hui ah ka vekpi uh in antang in kote ii Pathian mai ah kiniamkhiak a

Ezra9:1 Hi teng a kisep zawkciang Israel mite lampui pawlkhat hong pai in
Ezra9:2 Jew pate in ngamdang numeite teenpui ahikom Pathian ii mi thiangthote mi thiangtho ngawl suaksak uh hi. A khial belte sia lampuite le uliante veu ahi hi.
Ezra9:3 Hi thu ka zaak ciang thinkiam in ka puan ka eaukeak a
Ezra9:4 Khuangai in tualai ah nitak sangaw biakpiak hun dong ka to a
Ezra9:5 Nitak sangaw biakpiak hun hong thet ciang khuangai in ka omna mun pan thoto in ka puan ek sil lai teng ma taw khupdin in ka khutte laamin Topa ka Pathian tungah thu ka ngen hi.
Ezra9:6 Keima in
Ezra9:7 Ka taanghpupite hun pan tu hun dongin koma
Ezra9:8 Tu in hun tomno sung teng kote Pathian
Ezra9:9 Kote sila ka hi uh hang saltaangin nong nusia bua hi. Persia kumpiliante in nong ngumsak a
Ezra9:10 “Ahizong tu in Pathian awng
Ezra9:11 Kamsaang na naseamte tungtawn a nong thupiakte ka zui bua leleau uh hi. Amate in ka laak tu uh ngam sia thiangtho ngawl hi
Ezra9:12 Amate hong cina pan
Ezra9:13 Ka mawnate le ka khialnate hangin hiza daan ka thuak zawk uh ciang zong in nangma
Ezra9:14 Tua ahiciang nong thupiakte thu sim ngawl kikin hi mihing seksolte taw kiteang kik thei tu khu ziam? Tuabang ka ngamta uh le na thin uuk mama in khat zongh hong hing khoai ngawlin nong mon siat tu hi.
Ezra9:15 Israel ii Topa Pathian awng
Ezra10:1 Biakinnpi mai ah Ezra kapin hi mawna khialnate pualaakin kunin a thunget laitak a kiim ah Israel te — pasalte
Ezra10:2 Tuaciang Elam bee le phung sung pan Jehiel ii tapa Shecaniah in Ezra tungah
Ezra10:3 Tu in hi numeite le a tate puak kik natu in ih Pathian tungah a ciliap huai kamciamna khat vawt hamtang tu khu hi. Kote in nangma le Pathian thupiak a zakta dangte ii vawt tu hong ci bangin ka vawt tu uh hi. Pathian Thukham ii ci bangin ka vawt tu uh hi.
Ezra10:4 Tuasia in sep tu na vaipuak ahi hi. Kote na nungah om khu hi
Ezra10:5 Tua ahiciang Ezra in Shecaniah ii a ci bangin thiampi lampuite
Ezra10:6 Tua zawkciang ama sia Biakinnpi mai pan pai in Eliashib ii tapa Jehohanan inn sungah tumin zan taam hi
Ezra10:7 Saltanna pan a cia kik theampo Jerusalem khua ah a kikhop natu thu Jerusalem le Judah ngam mun theampo ah

Ezra10:15 Hi ngealna sia Asahel ii tapa Jonathan le Tikvah ii tapa Jahzeiah te sim ngawlin nial ngawl a
Ezra10:16 Saltanna pan a cia kikte in tua ngealna sia thukim ahikom thiampi Ezra in bee le phung lutang teng tung pan pasal upate panmun pia in
Ezra10:17 tua zawk tha thum sungin amate in ngamdang zi neite taw kisai thu theampo kan siat uh hi.
Ezra10:18 Hi sia in ngamdang zinei pasalte tepteena hi: Joshua le a suapuite ii bee le phung pan Jehozadak ii tapate: Maaseiah

Nehemiah1:1 Hi sia in Hacaliah ii tapa Nehemiah ii a zawsa nasep teng tepteena ahi hi. Artaxerxes ii Persia kumpilian a sep a kum kul kum
Nehemiah1:2 Ka suapui khat ahi
Nehemiah1:3 Amate in
Nehemiah1:4 Hi thu teng ka zaak ciang to suk in ka kap hi. Ni tam mama khuangai in ka mau a an ka ne bua hi. Pathian tungah thu ka ngen a
Nehemiah1:5 “Vantung ah a mang Topa Pathian awng! Nang na lian a
Nehemiah1:6 Topa awng
Nehemiah1:7 Seksol ngamtatna taw nang kong langpan zo uh a
Nehemiah1:8 Nangma ii Moses tungah: ‘No Israel mite ka tungah nong thumaan bua uh le minam dangte sungah kong thethaang tu hi.
Nehemiah1:9 Ahizong ka kungah hong zuan kikin kong thupiakte na zui uh le
Nehemiah1:10 “ Topa awng
Nehemiah1:11 Tu in ka thungetna le nangma hong patoai nuam na naseam dangte theampo ii thungetnate hong ngai ta'n. Tuni in taangtutna hong pia ta'n a
Nehemiah2:1 A tha li zawk ni khat ni in Artaxerxes kumpilianpa ii an a neak laitakin sapittui ka pia hi. Ama in nidang in ka hee maipuak hong mu ngeingawl ahiciang
Nehemiah2:2 ama in
Nehemiah2:3 “Kumpipa awng
Nehemiah2:4 Kumpilianpa in
Nehemiah2:5 kumpilianpa tungah
Nehemiah2:6 Kumpilianpa in kumpiliannu taw tokhawm a
Nehemiah2:7 Tua zawkciang
Nehemiah2:8 Kumpi thingtaamte a keam pa Asaph tungah Biakinnpi cinna kulh kongpite
Nehemiah2:9 Kumpilianpa in keima taw ngalkapbu pawlkhat le siphu ngalkap pawlkhat hong paisak a
Nehemiah2:10 Ahizong Beth Horon khua pan Sanballat le Ammon ngamkhen pan ulian Tobiah in Israel mite ii phattuam natu in na a seam tu mihing khat hong pai ci thu a zaak uh ciang thin uuk mama uh hi.
Nehemiah2:11 Jerusalem ah ka paisuak a
Nehemiah2:12 Jerusalem atu in ka nasep tu Pathian ii hong heaksak thute kuama tungah ka son bua hi. Tuaciang zankim laitakin tho in ka pusuak a
Nehemiah2:13 Zan lai ma in khuapi nusia in nitumna sang Kuam Kongpi tawnin thangsang Ngulpui Tuinaak kaantan in Ninthuk Kongpi ah ka pai hi. Ka pai kawmin khuapi luphung cimhthamte le mei ii kak kongpite ka en kawkoai hi.
Nehemiah2:14 Tuaciang khuapi nisuana sang pan saksang Tuinaak Kongpi le Kumpipa Tuili ah ka pai hi. Ka tona laa sia in suangkawm ah lampi mu zo ngawl ahikom

Nehemiah13:3 Israel mite in hi thukham a kisim a zaak ciang amate mi sungah ngamdangmi theampo kihelsak ngawl uh hi.
Nehemiah13:4 Biakinn vanh kholna inndoite a uk thiampi Eliashib sia Tobiah taw khuangei hialma a thu kisi in om uh hi.

Nehemiah13:6 Hi bang teng ahi hunlai in Jerusalem ah ka om bua hi

Nehemiah13:8 Ka thinso a
Nehemiah13:9 Tua inndoite a zeksa om bangin a kithianthosak natu le biakinn vanhte
Nehemiah13:10 Mipite in a khamkhop tu an pia zo ngawl ahikom biakinn music thiamte le a dang Levi te in Jerusalem nusia in a lo tek a zot kik zongh ka za hi.
Nehemiah13:11 Biakinnpi a kingaingonsak hu in tua uliante ka teih zazaan hi. Tuaciang Levi te le music thiamte Biakinnpi ah ka kaikhawm kik a

Nehemiah13:13 Vanh kholna inndoite uk tu in
Nehemiah13:14 Ka Pathian awng

Nehemiah13:16 Tyre khuapi mite pawlkhat Jerusalem ah teang a
Nehemiah13:17 Jew lampuite ka teih a
Nehemiah13:18 Hi bang linlian in na taanghpupite ngamta ahikom Pathian in daan pia a
Nehemiah13:19 Tua ahikom Sabbath a kipat sim
Nehemiah13:20 Vanh namcin a zuakte khatvei niivei khawng khuapi luphung pua sangah nipi zawk Ni nga ni zanin ngiak uh hi.
Nehemiah13:21 Tua mite tungah

Nehemiah13:24 A tate a lang in Ashdod kam ahibuale kamdang khat pau in om a

Nehemiah13:28 Joiada sia Thiampi Lianbel Eliashib ii tapa hi a
Nehemiah13:29 Pathian awng
Nehemiah13:30 Ngamdang taw a kipee-awna theampo pan mipite ka thiansua a
Nehemiah13:31 A hun ciang biakpiaknate halna ah a kizangh thingte a kipaipui natu le mipite ii a anpalte le thingnga minciilte taw biakpiaknate a paipui natu in ka vaihawmsak hi. Pathian awng
Esther1:1 Persia ngam khuapi Susa khua kumpi tokhum tung panin Xerxes kumpipa in India pan Ethiopia dong ngamke 127 uk hi.
Esther1:2 
Esther1:3 Kumpi a sep a kum thum kumin a uliante theampo le zum ukte atu in anneakpoai khat vawt hi. Tualai ah
Esther1:4 Kumpipa in a ngam haunate le kumpi zum ii vaang neina
Esther1:5 Tua zawkciang kumpipa in Susa khuapi sungah a om pasal theampo a hau
Esther1:6 Tua mun a suumsung sia patpuankhai vancii le a kaangte taw kizeam a
Esther1:7 Sapittui te khat le khat a kibang ngawl khamh hai taw kihawm vazia a
Esther1:8 Sapittui neak tu za ciangtan om ngawl a; a kuama po in a du za a neak natu in kumpipa in kumpi inn sung naseamte thupia hi.
Esther1:9 Tua poai hun sungin Vashti kumpinu in kumpi inn sungah numeite atu in anneakpoai khat vawtsak hi.
Esther1:10 A poaikhaam ni sali ni in kumpipa sapittui ne in nuamsa ahikom ama aituam naseam
Esther1:11 Kumpipa in amate tungah Vashti kumpinu a kumpilukhu khu in ama kungah a paipui natu in thupia hi. Kumpinu sia numei mealpha khat hi a
Esther1:12 Ahizong a naseamte in kumpipa thupiakna Vashti kumpinu tungah a son uh ciang kumpinu in nialin pai nuam ngawl hi. Tua hu in kumpipa thinso hi.
Esther1:13 Tu in upadi zui natu ngeina huvau thudokna a pian ciang

Esther2:1 Tua nungciang kumpipa ii thin uukna a thai zawkciang ngawngawnin ama in Vashti ngamtatna le a tungah a thu thansakna sia ngaisun top hi.

Esther2:3 Na ukna ngamke theampo ah ngaknu mealpha teng hi lai Susa khuapi sung numeite teenna munah hong puak tu in uliante panmun pia thei ni hi. Na numeite a uk cilnge sa Hegai ii kep tu in koi in a
Esther2:4 Tuasia ciang pha na sakbel numei sia la in a

Esther2:10 Tu in Mordecai ii ngaisutna a piak bangin Esther in Jew te a hina thu iimcip hi.
Esther2:11 Ni simin Mordecai in Esther bang bang in om a

Esther2:13 Numeite teenna pan kumpi inn sungah ama a pai ciang puan a silh nop po silh thei hi.

Job4:6 Nangma in Pathian na bia a

Job4:8 Mite in tatsiatna lo bangin tho a
Job4:9 Vuipi suangval bangin Pathian thin uukna in amate susia hi.
Job4:10 Mi ngilote sia tawpite bangin hawkin ngalh hi
Job4:11 Mat tu neak tu a nei ngawl tawpite bangin
Job4:12 Khatvei thu khat
Job4:13 Zan mangsia bangin tua in ka mut hong phawng hi.
Job4:14 Liingin ka ngawk hi; ka pumpi bup lau in
Job4:15 Vuiva vahiau khat in ka maitang hong seam a
Job4:16 Tua munah a ding khat ka mu thei hi; sal kaleng zong a bang tatak ziam ka son thei bua hi. Tuasia ciang a thim dide sung pan aw khat ka za hi:
Job4:17 “Pathian ii muna ah mi khat pawpo a thutang om thei tu ziam
Job4:18 Pathian in a vantung naseamte muang ngawl hi; ama in a vantunglalangte ii khialna ngawngawn mu hi.
Job4:19 Tungman taw kivawt a nungta khat
Job4:20 Mihing khat sia zingsang in nungta tha tu a
Job4:21 Ama ii nei theampo kilaaksak a; ciimna nei ngawl lai in thi hi.”
Job5:1 Job awng
Job5:2 Thin natna teng taw na thi dong na thinngim tu sia mawmawt huai hi
Job5:3 Ngammuang a kisa
Job5:4 A tapate in ngal muanna mu zo ngeingawl a
Job5:5 A ngilkial mite in a mawmaw sia ii lo an — ling kawm ah a po lo ante ngawngawn — neaksak tu uh hi. tuaciang a dangko mite in ama ii nei le lamh te eang tu uh hi.
Job5:6 Siatna sia lei sungah po ngawl a
Job5:7 A hi ngawl tatak ma hi! Mihing in ama le ama ngim kipia a
Job5:8 Nang hi leng Pathian kung tuu in
Job5:9 Ama ii nasep lian a septe ih tel zo bua a
Job5:10 Ama in leitang tungah nguazusak a lote tui buak hi.
Job5:11 Hi hi
Job5:12 Ama in mihing kukalte ii ngealnate lumleesak a
Job5:13 
Job5:14 Amate suntang ngawngawnin khuazing a lei zawtin pai uh hi.
Job5:15 Ahihang Pathian in mizawngte thina pan hun hi; Ama in a cimawte zawthawkna pan hun hi.
Job5:16 Ama in mizawngte lametna pia a
Job5:17 Pathian ii puua kik sia mi hampha ahi hi! Pathian in hong teih le thin uuk heak in.
Job5:18 Pathian in ama liamsuate ii meimate tuamsak hi; a khut taw nang hong nasak a
Job5:19 Hun khat zawk hun khat ama in nang lal theina pan hong hun tu hi;
Job5:20 kialpi a tun ciang ama in nang hong nungtasak tu a
Job5:21 Pathian in nang sia sonsiatna pan hong suatak tu a
Job5:22 Nangma in ngoltolnate le ngilkialnate na nuisan tu a
Job5:23 Na lo thawna munah suang om ngawl tu hi; ngamsate in nang hong sim ngeingawl tu hi.
Job5:24 Tuaciang na puanbuk sungah thinnuamin na teang tu hi; na tuute na et ciang bit takin a om na mu tu hi.
Job5:25 Ngan thana munah lopa teete zaa in ta tam mama na nei tu hi.
Job5:26 Anlaak hun dong a min mangtaang huite bangin a huai a teakin na nungta tu hi.
Job5:27 Job awng
Job6:1 Ka ngimna le ka khuangainate khai kitee le
Job6:2 
Job6:3 tuipi vaal a senvuite sangin ngitzaw tu hi
Job6:4 Vaanglianbel Pathian in thaltangte taw hong kap a
Job6:5 Laa in lopa a neak ciang lungkim a
Job6:6 Ahizong akua in limna nei ngawl
Job6:7 Tuabang ante lim ka sa bua a
Job6:8 Pathian in ka nget sia banghang hong pia ngawl hi tu ziam? Banghangin ka thunget hong zo ngawl hi tu ziam?
Job6:9 Ama in kei hong that vet pole maw!
Job6:10 Tuabang hong tha nop tu sia he leng ka natna bangza in a lian tazong
Job6:11 Ka luhai lai natu in bang thahatna nei na khi ziam? Muanmawkna ka nei ngawl nungsang banghang nung tataa lai tu khi ziam?
Job6:12 Kei suang taw kivawt khi ziam? Ka pumpi sia taau ahi ziam?
Job6:13 Keima le keima ka kihut natu tha nei ngawl khi hi; hu ngen in ka tai thei tu mun om ngawl hi.
Job6:14 Pathian nusia ka hi a
Job6:15 Ahihang no ka lawmte awng
Job6:16 Luite vuuk le tuikhalte in khakcip a
Job6:17 ahizong nisa sungah tuate bo a
Job6:18 Sennealngam khualhawte tui a zonna in ngam amh a; amate sennealngam sungah vakkotin thi uh hi.
Job6:19 Sheba pan le Tema pan tua khualhawte in tui zong uh hi
Job6:20 ahihang luiko hui teng ah a lametna uh bo hi.
Job6:21 No teng sia kei atu in tua luikote taw kibang nu hi
Job6:22 Letsong khat nong piak tu ahizong
Job6:23 ngal khat po ahibuale zawthawk thu a zangh thei khat pawpo pan ahizong nong hut tu in kong ngen ziam?
Job6:24 Pha hi
Job6:25 Thumaan kammalte up taak hi
Job6:26 Ka kam pan vui bek pusuak in a pau hong sa nu hi; tua ahile thinkiam a ka paute banghang hong zo nu ziam?
Job6:27 Tanga silate na nga natu in aisaanna nuangtangte ngawngawn na lawn uh a
Job6:28 Ka maitang hong en tavun. Leilot ngawl tu khi hi.
Job6:29 A vaal kai in pau zo nu hi. Na thumaan ngawlna uh kheal vun. Hong puanil heak vun. Kei sia thumaan khi hi.
Job6:30 Ahihang leilot thuson hong sa nu hi — a maan le a maan ngawl khentel in son thei ngawl hong sa nu hi.
Job7:1 Mihing nuntakna in zawthawk thu taw ngalkap nasep bang
Job7:2 sila khat ii nilim vot a lungngul bang
Job7:3 Tha khat zawk tha khat
Job7:4 A mu tu in ka lupsuk ciang naite cing hak a; zankhuateak kilumlet in khuavak tu kaal ka ngakla hi.
Job7:5 Ka pumpi sia thanh taw kidim hi; meima khiik in tuamcip hi; Ka meima pan meima nai luang hi.
Job7:6 Ka ni ka hunte muanmawk lam et om ngawlin bawbo a
Job7:7 Pathian awng
Job7:8 Tu in hong mu ni hi
Job7:9 Meeikaai khat a bo vadi bangin
Job7:10 
Job7:11 Hi ngawl hi! Thim om thei ngawl tu khi hi! Ka thin uuk a
Job7:12 Banghangin kei hong cing nu ziam? Tuipi nganhing pui khat hong sa nu ziam?
Job7:13 Lumsuk in tawlngak tu ka hanciam hi; ka natna pan noptuamna ka zong hi.
Job7:14 Ahihang nangma mama in mangte taw nong lausak a; mukholnate le mangsiate nong puak hi
Job7:15 hi bang a ngimhuai pumpi taw ka nuntak sangin ka tawl hong kisaanlup tu uukzaw liang khi hi.
Job7:16 Ka thinkiam zo hi; nuntakna cimtak khi hi. Kei nguak hong nusia tavun. Ka nuntak man om ngawl hi.
Job7:17 Banghangin nang atu in mihingte sia thupi mama ziam? Amate ii sep sia banghang thinnopmawkpui ni ziam?
Job7:18 Zing simin ama na vil a
Job7:19 Ka ciltee valh tu hun sung beak leidang en ngawl tu ni ziam?
Job7:20 Thongcing pa awng
Job7:21 Ka mawna hong maisak thei ngeingawl tu ni ziam? Ka sep khialna hong hesuak thei ngawl tu ni ziam? Hai ngawlin ka thaankuul sungah ka om tu hi
Job8:1 Na hawpai kamtam thuson teng na man zo ziam?
Job8:2 
Job8:3 Pathian in thutang lumlet ngeingawl hi; ama in a maan ngawl vawt ngeingawl hi.
Job8:4 Pathian tungah na tate khial hi nanak tu hi
Job8:5 Ahihang tu in kiheak in a
Job8:6 na thumaan mama a
Job8:7 Nei le lamh na bosua theampo sia tua hun ciang Pathian hong piak tute taw en khawm leang son thamman ngawl tu hi.
Job8:8 Taanghlai hun a ciimna kan pak in; ih taanghpupite heak thumaan thutak te ngaisun in.
Job8:9 Ih khantom a
Job8:10 Ahihang taanghpupi miciimte in hilsak in; amate hong sonna teng ngai in:
Job8:11 “Pumpa sia tui om ngawlna ah po thei ngawl hi
Job8:12 No lei lai a
Job8:13 Pathian selte sia tua pumpate taw kibang hi; Pathian a makngil uh po ciang a lametna bo hi.
Job8:14 Amate in khau zam khat — momkhau khat muang uh hi
Job8:15 amate in pangpaan kaai khat neal le tuasia in amate do zo tu ziam? amate in khauzam khat zamh le tuasia in amate khuangkho zo tu ziam?
Job8:16 Mi ngilote sia nitaang sungah lopate po bangin
Job8:17 A zungte in suangte vial a
Job8:18 Ahihang tuate bot le uhte — tuate tua munah om ngei ahi hunlam a he khat zongh om ngawl tu hi.

Job8:21 Ama in nang hong nuisakin hong ausak kik tu a
Job8:22 ahizong ama in nang hong ensante tungah minsiatna tungsak tu hi
Job9:1 Hi hi
Job9:2 
Job9:3 Bangbangin mihing khat po in Pathian nial zo tu ziam? Ama in kuama ii zo thei ngeingawl tu thu dokna tul khat
Job9:4 Pathian sia ciim peuma a
Job9:5 Ama in kidop natu thu son khol ngawlin mualpite khiin a
Job9:6 Pathian in zinliingsak a
Job9:7 Ama in ni a sua ngawl natu in khak thei a
Job9:8 Pathian ii vantungte a phalh ciang ahizong tuipi nganhing pui sia ii thibin a totcip ciang ahizong kuama in hu ngawl hi.
Job9:9 Pathian in aksite — Solh
Job9:10 Na lianpi ama ii septe ih tel zo bua hi
Job9:11 Pathian in hong kaantan hi
Job9:12 Ama in a dei po la a
Job9:13 Pathian ii thin uukna sia thai ngeingawl hi. Ama in ama langpan tuipi nganhing pui Rahab tha a pia a ngalte ngoaicip hi.
Job9:14 Tua ahikom Pathian kam ka zo natu kammalte koi bangin mu thei tu khi ziam?
Job9:15 Mawbaang ngawl ka hihang ka vawt theibel sia Pathian ka thukhenpa munah hesuak nget tu ahi hi.
Job9:16 Tuasia ciang ngawngawn in
Job9:17 Ama in ahang thu om ngawl bulin kei hong nawk tu le hong liamsak tu vuipi suangvalte hong paisak hi.
Job9:18 Ama in ka hu zongh hong diiksak man bua hi
Job9:19 Thazaw ka suang tu ziam? Pathian tungah thazaw kisuang thei ziam? Thukhenzum ah ama then tu khi ziam? Akua in ama paisak thei tu ziam?
Job9:20 Mawbaang ngawlin thumaan ka hi hang ka kammalte sia a mawte ii awsua bang ka hi hi
Job9:21 Mawbaang ngawl khi hi
Job9:22 
Job9:23 A maw ngawl mi khat thakhat thu in a thi ciang Pathian nui hi.
Job9:24 Pathian in leitung sia mi ngilote pia hi. Ama in thukhenmangte theampo mittawsak siat hi. Tuabang sia Pathian ii vawt ahibuale akua vawt ziam?
Job9:25 Ka ni hunte pai vahan a
Job9:26 Ngunkuang manlangbel sia bangin ka nuntakna bo vazangh a
Job9:27 Zumnui maitai in ka natnate makngil sawm leng ngim ka thuakna theampo in hong lauthawn tu in hong vil kik hi. Pathian in kei sia a maw ma in hong koi hunlam ka he hi.
Job9:28 
Job9:29 Maw hong kiputsak zawk nungsang banghang awlmawk tu khi ziam?
Job9:30 Ka mawnate hong silthiang zo tu satpia om ngawl hi.
Job9:31 Pathian in a kiihuai dum sungah kei hong lawn suk a
Job9:32 Pathian sia mihing hile a kam zo thei khi hi; ka kihauna uh thukhen tu in zum ah pai thei tu khu hi.
Job9:33 Ahihang ko kilaklaw ah palai hong seam tu kuama om ngawl — Pathian le kei thu hong khen khawm tu kuama om ngawl hi.
Job9:34 Pathian awng
Job9:35 Kei lau ngawl khi hi
Job10:1 Ka nuntak cimtak khi hi
Job10:2 Hong puavawk heak in Pathian awng. Kei nong mawsakna a bang hi thong ziam? Hong son ta'n!
Job10:3 Tua zata bang na ngitlo sia maan tu ziam? Nangma vawtsate ma zawnsak vawt tu ni ziam? Tuaciang mi ngilote sawmna tungtaang ah maipha pia tu ni ziam?
Job10:4 Kote muna bangin tuate na mu ziam?
Job10:5 Ko ma bangin na khantom ziam?
Job10:6 Tua ahile banghang ka mawna theampo hong sul zui in
Job10:7 Maw ngawl ka hi hunlam le
Job10:8 Na khutte in kei hong piangsak a hong zeam hi
Job10:9 Tungman panin nong vawt sia phawk kik in a
Job10:10 Nangma in kei pian natu in ka pa thahatna na pia a; ka nu sulh sungah nong khangsak hi.
Job10:11 Ka pumpi sia ngute le sazangte taw na vawt hi
Job10:12 Nuntakna le a kikhomsuan itna nong pia zo a
Job10:13 Ahihang tua hun sung theampo ah nong natsak natu na ngeal ku sia tu in ka he hi.
Job10:14 Ka mawna nong maisak nop ngawl hu in mawna a vawt ziam ci in nong encik hi.
Job10:15 Ka maw poma ciang ngim nong thuaksak a
Job10:16 Zawna khat pawpo nei lei leng zong
Job10:17 Kei hong langpanin a ding tu tetti na nei tawntung hi; Kei tungah na thin uukna khang vaial hi; kei nong sim natu ngealna thak na nei tawntung hi.
Job10:18 Pathian awng
Job10:19 Sulh sung pan thaankhuk ah paitan paih hi leng a om ngeingawl sia bang hi tu kana ve.
Job10:20 Ka khan bo dektak zo hi ngawl ziam? Kei nguak hong omsak kapo in! Ka hun nei lai sun teng a nuamin hong zanghsak ta'n.
Job10:21 Hai ngawlin ka pai tu a
Job10:22 khuazinna
Job11:1 Hi nawnsan thute theampo kuama in zo kik ngawl tu ziam? Kam tam pauna in mihing khat a maan suaksak ziam?
Job11:2 
Job11:3 Job awng
Job11:4 Na pau teng thumaan hi ci ni hi; Pathian muna ah ka thiang ci ni hi.
Job11:5 Pathian in na kam hong zo le uuk na peu ing!
Job11:6 Ama in ciimna nam tam a om sia nang hong son tu hi; mihingte heak zawk ngawl thuthukte a om sia nang hong son tu hi. Pathian in na kilawmna za sangin a tawm zaw daan hong pia hi.
Job11:7 Pathian ii letna le a vaang ii a phakcia le a mongte na mu thei ziam?
Job11:8 Van sia Pathian atu mong nei ngawl ahihang
Job11:9 Pathian letna sia simlei sangin zaizaw a
Job11:10 Pathian in nangma hong manin
Job11:11 Pathian in akua teng mannung ngawl ci sia he hi; ama in amate tatsiatna theampo mu hi.
Job11:12 Ngam laate a zual sa in a pian ciang mi ngoaite a ciim hong kipan tu hi.
Job11:13 Job awng
Job11:14 Na bangkua sung pan siatna le tatkhialna teng heam in.
Job11:15 Tuasia zawkciang dinmun kho le hangsanna taw leitung vaite maingat kik in.
Job11:16 Tuasia ciang
Job11:17 Na nuntakna sia sunkim laitak nitaang sangin taang zaw tu a
Job11:18 Ngal muanna le lametna taw kidim in na nungta tu hi; Pathian in nang hong dal tu a
Job11:19 Na ngalte na kiita buatu hi; mihing tam mama in huna hong ngen tu hi.
Job11:20 Ahihang mihing ngilote thinkiam in

Job12:2 
Job12:3 Ahihang
Job12:4 Tu in ka ngualtamhte ngawngawn in kei hong nuisan hi; kei thutang in sit baang ngawl hi napi hong kinuisan hi; ahihang Pathian in ka thungetna hong zo kik hun om ngei hi.
Job12:5 Note ngim nga ngawl nu hi
Job12:6 Ahihang ngutate le Pathian a selte sia amate ii tha le ngal bekma a pathian hi napi thinnuamin nungta uh hi.
Job12:7 Vacimte le nganhingte ngawngawn in no hong hil thei natu thu tam ma nei hi
Job12:8 leitung le tuipi nganhingte ii ciimna ngen in.
Job12:9 Amate theampo in Topa khut ii a vawt hunlam he uh hi.
Job12:10 A piansaksa te ii nuntakna lam a lak sia Pathian hi; mihing theampo nuntakna sia ama ii khut sungah om hi.
Job12:11 Ahihang na leei in an tep a
Job12:12 Pasal haamte in ciimna nei hi

Job12:18 Ama in kumpite za taaksak a
Job12:19 Ama in thiampite le vaang nei mite kiniamkhiaksak hi.

Job12:21 Ama in vaangletna a neite min siasak a
Job12:22 Ama in thina bang ahi khuazingna munte ah khuavak puak hi.
Job12:23 Ama in ngamte thahatsakin liansak hi
Job12:24 Ama in a lampuite mawmawsak a
Job12:25 amate khuazing sungah zawtin vak uh a
Job13:1 Na son theampo ka zaak ngeisa vive hi. Tuate ka tel siat a; na heak za uh ma ka he hi. Kei
Job13:2 
Job13:3 Ahizong ka thu kinialpui sia Pathian hi a
Job13:4 Na heak ngawl uh teng leilot thu taw seal nu hi; no sia kuama a damsak zo ngawl syavuante taw kibang nu hi.
Job13:5 Bangma son ngawlin om vun
Job13:6 Ka thu kong pualaak ciang ngai vun.
Job13:7 Banghangin leilot nu ziam? Na leilotnate in Pathian phatuamsak tu in ngaisun nu ziam?
Job13:8 Ama sungsia tu hanciam nu ziam? Ama ii thu sia zum ah kinial nuam nu ziam?
Job13:9 Pathian in no hong en cian le a pha khat pawpo a mu tu ziam? Ngual na theam uh bangin Pathian theam thei tu in ki um nu ziam?
Job13:10 Doidan nopna na seal uh hang ama in no hong teih tu a
Job13:11 tuaciang ama thahatna in no hong lausak tu hi.
Job13:12 Na paunakte vut taw kibangin kimanna om ngawl hi; na ngatang seenate tungman bangin topcip hi.
Job13:13 Thim khipkhep vun a
Job13:14 Keima in ka nuntakna pia tu in ka kinging hi.
Job13:15 Ka lametna theampo bosua zo ci leang Pathian in hong that hial zong bang phamaw ziam? Ama tungah ka thu sung tu khi hi.
Job13:16 Ka hangsanna zongh in hong hun thei lai hi
Job13:17 Tu in ka son telna kammalte ngai vun.
Job13:18 Ka thu sung tu in kinging zo khi hi
Job13:19 Pathian awng
Job13:20 Thu nam nii hong ngensak ta'n; tuate thukim lete nang kung pan buk tu hanciam ngawl tu khi hi;
Job13:21 Kei daan nong piak tawp in a
Job13:22 Pathian awng
Job13:23 Ka mawnate bang teng ziam? Khialna ka vawt bang om ziam? Bang khialna liante taw kei hong kimawsak ziam?
Job13:24 Banghangin kei hong pial ni ziam? Banghangin hong ngal vawt ni ziam?
Job13:25 Kei hong lauthawn nuam ni ziam? Kei sia thingtee khat hi lel khi hi; taangphaw ko sa khat a ngal vawvawt na hi hi.
Job13:26 Kei tungah nasia takin maw nong suanh hi
Job13:27 Ka peangte thikkol nong bulh hi
Job13:28 Tua hu in thing muatsa bangin ka topcip a
Job14:1 Eite theampo sia a thaneam a cimaw sa in ih piang hi. A vekpi in khantom nuntak haksatna le ngimnate a kibang in kidim hi.
Job14:2 Ih khangto a
Job14:3 Pathian awng
Job14:4 Mihing bang a thiang ngawl na khat pawpo sung pan a thiangtho na piang thei ngeingawl hi.
Job14:5 Ama khansau za tu — a nuntak hun tha pha za tu sia a masia in kikhensat zo hi. Nangma in tuate na khensat zo a
Job14:6 Mundang en in a
Job14:7 Thingkung kiphuk sa khat atu in lametna om hi; tuasia nungta kikin meang hi.
Job14:8 A zungte haamin
Job14:9 tui a nga thingkung no bangin meang tu hi.
Job14:10 Ahihang mihingte thi a
Job14:11 Ngun a luan tawp te
Job14:12 mihingte thi in
Job14:13 Mithi khua ah kei hong seal heu lete uuk nang; na thin uuk thai dong hong seal ka ven
Job14:14 Mihingte thi le amate nungta kik thei ziam? Ahihang hi ngim ngana hunte a bo dong hun phazawte ngak tu khi hi.
Job14:15 Tuasia ciang nong sam tu a
Job14:16 Tua zawkciang ka kalsuan simin nong encik tu a
Job14:17 Nangma in tuate na maisak tu a
Job14:18 Mualte a cip tu hun le a kip suangliangte a kikhin tu hun hong theng tu hi.
Job14:19 Tui in suangpite seu tu a
Job14:20 Mihing khat na zothaw a ama a tawntung na hawlkhia hi. A thi ciang a meal mang hi.
Job14:21 A tapate in minphatna nga kale ama in heaksak ngeingawl hi
Job14:22 Ama in ama ii a pumpi natna le a thin heena teng bek phawk hi.
Job15:1 Job awng! na kammalte a hawmpi hi
Job15:2 
Job15:3 Miciim kuama in nang pau bangin pau ngawl hi
Job15:4 Nangma ci bang suak thei thong le kuama in Pathian kiita ngawl tu a; ama tungah kuama in thungen ngawl tu hi.
Job15:5 Na seksolna sia na pauna panin kilangh hi; na pilna kammalte taw kiseal sawm ni hi.
Job15:6 Kei in nang kong puanil tu kul tuan bo; na pau kammal theampo taw nangma kipuanil ni hi.
Job15:7 Nang sia mihing a piang phitbelpa kisa ni ziam? Pathian in mualte a vawt lai in om ni ziam?
Job15:8 Pathian vaihawmnate za ku ni ziam? Mihing ciimna sia nang bek in nei kisa ni ziam?
Job15:9 Ko ii heak ngawl thu khat pawpo na heak om tuan ngawl hi.
Job15:10 Ka ciimna uh sia na pa ii pian ma in a piangte — puakkaang sa mite tung pan ka heak uh hi.
Job15:11 Pathian in nang heenepna hong pia hi; banghangin nolh lalai ni ziam? Ama taangin kam-uai in kamthiam taw pau khu hi.
Job15:12 Ahihang nang na hile
Job15:13 Pathian tungah na thin uuk a
Job15:14 Mihing khat pawpo sia thiangtho takpi thei tu ziam? Mihing khat pawpo sia Pathian muna ah maan thei tu ziam?
Job15:15 Ahang sia Pathian in a vantunglalangte ngawngawn muang ngawl hi; amate zongh ama muna ah thiangtho ngawl hi.
Job15:16 Tuaciang
Job15:17 Job awng
Job15:18 Miciimte in a taanghpupite tung pan a heak uh thumaan thutak te kei hong hil zo hi
Job15:19 A ngam sungah ngamdangmi om ngawl hi; Pathian taw amate a kikhualasak tu kuama om ngawl hi.
Job15:20 Ngualdang a zothaw mihing seksol khat sia
Job15:21 A lauhuai awte a nakheng sungah ciik au tu hi
Job15:22 Amate in khuazing sung pan a suatak tu lametna nei ngawl hi
Job15:23 tuaciang amate ii luang ne tu in vaciikte in ngak hi. Amate in a mailam khuazing ahi sia he a;
Job15:24 a thahat kumpipa khat bangin tuasiatna in amate sim tu in ngak nginge hi.
Job15:25 Tuasia in Pathian khuttum a ngat
Job15:26 Amate kiphasak a leedo kin uh hi; amate in thinpui takin a lum laamto a
Job15:27 
Job15:28 Amate sia khuapite a la le a neite ii taisat sa innte a suan te hi a
Job15:29 Amate khuangei hau ngawl tu hi; a neisa bangma kikhomsuan ngawl tu hi. A limh uhte ngawngawn bo tu a
Job15:30 tuaciang amate khuazing sung pan suakta ngawl tu hi. Amate sia a baakte mei ii a kak
Job15:31 Amate in siatna a suang tu in a mawmaw lawlawm uh le siatna sia amate ii tel hi tu hi.
Job15:32 A hun a cin ma in amate vulcip tu uh hi
Job15:33 Amate a nga ung lai teng a pul sapitkung bang hi tu hi; amate sia a paak pul sa olive kung bang hi tu hi.
Job15:34 Pathian a sel mite atu in suan le paal om ngawl tu a
Job15:35 Hi mite sia ngual ngim piak sawm in
Job16:1 Kammal tuabangte tu masia in ka za ngei zo hi; heenepna nong piak uh sia ngim kipiakna hi bek hi.
Job16:2 
Job16:3 Pau tan viuveu tu nu ziam? kam a pau khak tu sia na uukna in kam tungnut kitu nu ziam?
Job16:4 Kei dinmun ah no om le uhte a
Job16:5 Ngaisut piakna taw no kong thahatsak thei tu a
Job16:6 Ahihang ka thusonte in bangma hong hu ngawl a
Job16:7 Pathian awng
Job16:8 Nangma in nong pummat zo a; ka ngal na hi hi. Ka vun le ka ngu nguak bekin ka om a
Job16:9 Pathian in thin uukna taw ka ngu ka taang khat zawkciang khat thiaktan a; etsatna taw kei hong ngau hi.
Job16:10 Mite in kei hong nunau a; amate in hong kiim uum in ka maitang hong beang hi.
Job16:11 Pathian in kei sia mi ngilote khut sungah hong aap zo hi.
Job16:12 Thinnuam in ka om a
Job16:13 tuaciang ka kiimkot pan thaltangte taw hong kap a — tuate in hong sun in hong liamsua hi
Job16:14 Ama in kei hong liamsua kikik hi; Ngual a huatsa leilam ngalkap khat bangin ama in kei hong sim hi.
Job16:15 Khuangai in khau-ip puan ka silh a
Job16:16 Ka mai a san dongin ka kap a
Job16:17 ahihang ngongtat mawna khat zongh ka vawt bua hi
Job16:18 Simlei awng
Job16:19 Kei atu hong ding tu le kei hong panpui tu vantung ah khat om hi.
Job16:20 Ka lawmte in kei hong lang a; ka mit pan ka thituite Pathian mai ah taak hi.
Job16:21 Mihing khat in a lawmpa atu a maangkaasak bangin kei atu in Pathian tungah hong thuumsak tu khat ka kisamh hi.
Job16:22 Tu in ka kumte bawbo a
Job17:1 Ka nuntak hun a bo tu nai zo a
Job17:2 Ngual theampo ii hong nunau zazaan nate ka en bek hi.
Job17:3 Pathian awng
Job17:4 Amate khua ngaisut thiamna teng na khak hi
Job17:5 Paunak lui sungah mihing khat in sum huvau in a lawmte leeheak a
Job17:6 Tu in mite in hi paunak sia kei tungah hong zangh hi; Amate hong pai in ka maitang cil hong phii hi.
Job17:7 Ka heena in ka mit hong tawsak phial hi; ka khut le ka peang te sia limhte bangin zeen kiangkuang hi.
Job17:8 Thumaan khu hi a kicite in ciza in ingh a
Job17:9 Zatakhuai khu hi a kicite in amate ngaisutna maan kisa vaial uh hi.
Job17:10 Ahihang amate a vekpi hong pai in ka mai ah hong ding tek le
Job17:11 Ka ni hunte bawbo a; ka tupnate taangtung ngawl hi; ka lametna bo hi.
Job17:12 Ahihang ka lawmte in zan sia sun hi ci a; khuavak nai hi ci hi
Job17:13 Ka lametna in mithi khua bek hi a
Job17:14 Thaankuul sia ka pa ka ci tu a
Job17:15 Kei atu lametna khat pawpo koi sungah om ziam? akua in tua lametna mu tu ziam?
Job17:16 Mithi khua ka zotsuk ciang kei taw lametna tonkhawm ngawl tu hi.
Job18:1 Job awng
Job18:2 
Job18:3 Ko sia khui khawng bangin mawmaw ci in akua in nang hong ngaisunsak ziam?
Job18:4 Na thin uukna taw nangma le nangma a kinatsua hi bek ni hi. Na thin uuk hang po in leitung kinusia tu ziam? Pathian in na lungkim natu in mualte a khiin tu ziam?
Job18:5 Mi ngilote ii khuavak taang kimitsak lai tu hi; a meikuang kuang kik ngei nawn ngawl tu hi.
Job18:6 A tuipuan bukte sungah a meiinn sia kimit tu hi.
Job18:7 A kalsuannate kho hi
Job18:8 Ngen khat sungah amate vak a
Job18:9 thaangsia na khat sungah a khuatulte awk a
Job18:10 Lei ah thaangkhau khat kiseal a
Job18:11 A kiimkot panin launa in ngak hi; tua in a kalsuan simin amate zuizen hi.
Job18:12 Amate hau ngei hi
Job18:13 A kiitakhuai natna khat amate ii pumpi tungah kizel a
Job18:14 Amate ngammuang takin a teenna tuipuan bukte panin kinuaicip a
Job18:15 Tu ahile natna a nga thei ngawl natu in kaan a kithe zawkciang
Job18:16 Tuate ii a baakte le a zungte sia vulin ko hi.
Job18:17 Amate ii minthanna sia tualsung le ngamdang ah bo vangeu a; kuama in amate phawk nawn ngawl hi.
Job18:18 Amate a nungtate ngam pan kinotkeak tu a
Job18:19 Amate in suan le paal nei ngawl a
Job18:20 Nisuana pan nitumna dong amate ii thuakna a za theampo lau in liinglawng hi.
Job18:21 Tuasia in mi seksolte ii thuak tu hi a
Job19:1 Banghangin kammalte taw kei hong vawtsia tawntung nu ziam?
Job19:2 
Job19:3 Hun khat zawk hun khat kei nong selno tawntung uh a
Job19:4 Sep khial keak ka nei zong
Job19:5 No hile kei sangin phazaw kisa nu hi
Job19:6 Hi sia a seam sia Pathian a hi sia mu thei ngawl nu ziam? Ama in kei hong mat natu in thaang hong sia hi.
Job19:7 Ama ii ngongtatna lungkim ngawlin
Job19:8 Pathian in lampi khak zo a
Job19:9 Ama in ka nei ka lamh theampo la siat zo a
Job19:10 Ama in ka ci tung mun theampo hong vel zazaan hi
Job19:11 Pathian thin uukin kei tungah a thin hong so hi; ama ii ngal ciphabel bangin kei hong vawt hi.
Job19:12 Kei hong sim tu in a ngalkaphonpite hong paisak hi; amate in kulhte to in ka tuipuan buk uumci uh hi.
Job19:13 Ka suapuipate ii hong taisat sia Pathian ii vawt hi; Kei hong hete atu in kei sia khualmi ka suak hi.
Job19:14 Ka beete le ka ngualtamhte bo siat zo hi.
Job19:15 Ka inn ah zin hong tung ngeite in kei hong mangil zo hi; ka naseam numeite in khualmi khat le ngamdangmi khat bangin kei hong vawt hi.
Job19:16 Naseam khat ka biapui ciang
Job19:17 Ka zi in ka husan ngim namh zo ngawl a
Job19:18 Patangte in hong mu ciang hong zawngsak in hong nuisan uh hi.
Job19:19 Ka ngualtamh pha belte in hong et ciang hong lipkhap uh hi; ka it belte ka lang ah pang uh hi.
Job19:20 Ka ngute tungah ka vuntunte kaai vadul hi; a nungta valiai bekma in ka suakta hi.
Job19:21 Note ka ngualtamhte nu hi! Hesuak mulkimna hong nei tavun! Pathian khut in kei hong vaatvawk zo hi.
Job19:22 Pathian ii kei hong vawt siat bangin
Job19:23 Mihing khat in ka kammalte phawk in
Job19:24 Tua ahibuale sikkhu khat taw suang tungah ka kammalte a tawntung a kip tu in khen le oai napeu ing.
Job19:25 Ahizong vantung ah a om khat om a
Job19:26 Natna in ka vunte a neaktum zawk ngawngawn in hi ka pumpi sia taw ma Pathian ka mu tu hi.
Job19:27 Ama ka mittang mama taw ka mu tu hi
Job19:28 noma in
Job19:29 Ahihang tu in tua namsau — mawna tungah Pathian thin uukna a thengsak namsau sia kiita vun
Job20:1 Job awng
Job20:2 
Job20:3 Na paunate zawnsakna kammal vive hi
Job20:4 Taanglai pek pan leitung ah mihing a kikoi ciil lai in
Job20:5 mi ngilote khuangei a lungdam ngawl hunlam he nanak tu ni hi.
Job20:6 Amate van nawl in khangto a
Job20:7 ama sia leivui bangin kiseamkeak tu hi. Amate a he ngeite in amate ii thetna hawna he ngawlin a lung uh mang tu hi.
Job20:8 Amate sia mang khat bang
Job20:9 A teen ngeina mun pan amate bo tu hi;
Job20:10 tuaciang mizawngte ii na a nguksak sia a tapate in piakik tu hi.
Job20:11 A pumpi moi in hat mama ngei hikale hai ngawlin leivui suak tu hi.
Job20:12 Ama in siatna sia limsa mama a
Job20:13 
Job20:14 Ahihang a an neakte a ngil sungah a sia a khaa suak a
Job20:15 Mi seksol pa in a nguktak haunate lua kik siat hi; Pathian in a ngilsung pan ngawngawn in tuate la kik hi.
Job20:16 Mi ngilo pa ii a valh sia nguu taw kibang hi; tua in ngulnguu hangte tuk bangin ama thatlum hi.
Job20:17 Ama sia olive thau a luang ngunte ahibuale noai le khuaitui a luang luite mu tu in nungta ngawl tu hi.
Job20:18 Ama in a sepna sa theampo nusia tu a; a haunate nopsakna in nei man ngawl tu hi
Job20:19 banghang ziam cile ama in mizawngte nengcip in awlmaw ngawl a
Job20:20 A duhopna huvau in lungkim ci om ngeingawl hi.
Job20:21 Amate an a neak uh ciang a khamvaal om ngei ngawl hi
Job20:22 A daupai bel laitakin thinngimna takngimna theampo in sukhuanin zawmcip tu hi.
Job20:23 A du a dei theampo ne tahen! Pathian a thinso
Job20:24 Thik namsau pan suatak tu a hanciam ciang taau thal in ama kap vawk tu hi.
Job20:25 Thaltang khat in a pum sung pailet in tangciak a
Job20:26 A kholsa na theampo kilalthamsak a
Job20:27 Vantung in hisia pa ii mawna pualaak a
Job20:28 Ama ii nei le lamh theampo Pathian thin uukna tuipawm sungah kisiasak tu hi.
Job20:29 Hisia mi ngilote thuak tu tangsa hi a
Job21:1 Kong son tu teng hong ngai tavun; Heenep natu kong nget sia
Job21:2 
Job21:3 Pau tu hun hong pia tavun a
Job21:4 A thithei mihingte taw a kihau hi ngawl khi hi; ka thin vei laakna sia ahang thupi khat om hi.
Job21:5 Kei hong en tavun. Ingh in
Job21:6 Kei tungah hong piangsate ka ngaisut ciang lung amh in liingin ka ci ngawk hi.
Job21:7 Banghangin Pathian in misia te a huai dong a nuamsa in nungtasak ziam?
Job21:8 Amate in tate le tute nei a
Job21:9 Pathian in a bangkua uh ah tuasiatna tungsak ngawl hi
Job21:10 Hi hi
Job21:11 A note sia tuunote bangin tai in kimai uh a
Job21:12 tengtongh le tamngaite aw taw laam uh hi.
Job21:13 Amate thinnuam in nungta a
Job21:14 Mi ngilote in Pathian tungah koma nguak hong nusia ta'n ci uh hi; amate in a nuntakna sungah Pathian ii deina he nuam ngawl uh hi.
Job21:15 Amate in Pathian atu sep kul sa ngawl hi
Job21:16 Amate in a nei tha le ngal taw zawna ka nga uh ci hi
Job21:17 Mi ngilopa ii meivak sia kimitsak ngei ziam? Amate khat in tuasiatna thuak ngei ziam? Pathian thin uukin a ngilote daan pia ngei ziam?
Job21:18 tuaciang vui ii taangphaw a seam bangin ahibuale vuipi suangval ii leivui a let bangin amate seamkeak ngei ziam?
Job21:19 A pa ii mawnate hu in a tate khat ii tungah Pathian in daan pia hi ci nu hi. Hi ngawl hi! Mawneite amate mama Pathian in daan pia hen; Amate mawna hu in ama ii tuabang a vawtna thu ama in lak hen.
Job21:20 Mi mawte in amate aituamin daan thuak tahen; Amate in Vaanglianbel pa Pathian thin uukna thuak tahen.
Job21:21 Eite ih khan man zawkciang ih tate ii a lungdam le a lungdam ngawl ih awlmawk takpi ziam?
Job21:22 A saangna munah a omte ngawngawn thu a khen Pathian tungah mihing khat pawpo in hilcian thei ziam?
Job21:23 Mihing pawlkhat sia a thi ni dong ciidam in nungta a; a pumpi uh zongh pha takin kivaak a
Job21:24 
Job21:25 A dangte in lungdamna nei vet ngawl hi; amate thinsia in nungta a
Job21:26 Ahihang a vekpi
Job21:27 Elna thin kukal na nei uh hong he khi hi.
Job21:28 “Tu in siatna a vawt mi liante ii innte koisung om ka na ziam?” ci in na dongh uh hi.
Job21:29 Khualhaw mite taw thu kumkhawm ngawl nu ziam? Amate ii hong ko kik thute he ngawl nu ziam?
Job21:30 Pathian thin uuk a daan a piak ni in mi ngilote sia kikhoaikhe tawntung hi.
Job21:31 Mi ngilote a mawsiat tu kuama om ngawl hi
Job21:32 Pha takin a kicing a thaankuul omna thaanmual ah amate a kipuak ciang
Job21:33 mihing a tul simin thaan kuanpui a
Job21:34 Tuaciang no na hi uh le! Thu nawnsan teng po taw kei heenep nong sawm uh hi! Nong zo kikna peuma leilot thu vive hi!

Job22:2

Job22:4 Nangma in Pathian na zatak hu in ama in nang hong hil a
Job22:5 Hi ngawl hi

Job22:7 A toite tui na pia nuam bua a
Job22:8 Leitang theampo na sungsuam natu in na vaang neina le na za neina na zangh hi.
Job22:9 Meingongte na hu nop ngawl bek dom ngawlin tangate zongh na suttol a
Job22:10 Tua ahikom tu in na kiim theampo ah na taak natu vuumte om a
Job22:11 Khua hong zing mama ahikom khua na mu thei bua a
Job22:12 Pathian sia a saangbel vantungte ah teangin
Job22:13 Ahitazong nangma in
Job22:14 Van khuvum tungah ama a pai ciang meeikaai saate in khua a mu ngawl tu in ama seal hi ci in
Job22:15 Mi ngilote tot tawntung na lampi ma tawn tu in na khensat ziam?
Job22:16 A hun uh a tun ma ngawngawnin namthuam in amate taaikeak hi.
Job22:17 Hi mite sia Pathian a nialte le Pathian in amate bangma law zo ngawl tu in a um mite ahi hi.
Job22:18 Ahihang amate nuamsa in a khangtosak sia Pathian hi a — mi ngilote thinsung ka tel thei bua hi.
Job22:19 Mi ngilote daan a kipiak a mu uh ciang miphate lungdamin maw baanna nei ngawl mite nui uh hi.
Job22:20 Mi ngilote neisa theampo kisusia siat a

Job23:1 Lungkim ngawlna pualaakin Pathian langpan lai khi hi; tau ngawlin ka om thei bua hi.
Job23:2 
Job23:3 Koisungah ama mu thei tu khi ziam
Job23:4 A mai ah ka thu teng ka son tu a keima sang pan ka nial nopna teng ka sung tu hi.
Job23:5 Ama ii a son tu sia le bangbangin kei hong zo kik tu ci ka he nuam hi.
Job23:6 Pathian in a thahatna theampo kei tungah hong zangh tu ziam? hong zangh ngawl tu hi
Job23:7 Keima in thutak son khi hi; Pathian taw kam kikum thei tu khi hi; ama in kei
Job23:8 Ni suana sangah ka zong zo a
Job23:9 Pathian sia saksang le thang sangah na seam hi
Job23:10 Tua hi napi Pathian in ka kalsuanna theampo he hi; Ama in kei hong sit le a thiangin hong mu tu hi.
Job23:11 Ama ii a teal lampi sia thumaan takin ka zui a
Job23:12 Pathian ii thupiakte ka seam tawntung hi; ama ii deina ka zui a
Job23:13 Ama kikheal ngeingawl hi. Kuama in ama nalh zo ngawl hi
Job23:14 Kei atu a ngealsa sia ama in taangtungsak tu hi; tuasia ama ngealna tam mama sung pan khat bek hi.
Job23:15 Ama mai ah lau in ka liing vadil hi.
Job23:16 Vaanglianbelpa Pathian in ka thin hanna bosak hi. Khuazing in ka mit hong tawsak ahitazong hong patausak sia khuazing hi ngawl a Pathian ahi hi.
Job23:17 
Job24:1 Banghangin Pathian in thukhen natu hun khat
Job24:2 Mite in leitang tamzaw a nga natu in
Job24:3 Amate in tangate neisa laanote la in
Job24:4 Amate in mizawngte ii a nga thei tute khaktan in; tuaciang a zawngkhalte zawthawkna taw taisakin buusak uh hi.
Job24:5 Tua ahikom mizawngte sia
Job24:6 Amate in amate ii neisa ahi ngawl lo ante a laak kul hi
Job24:7 Zanin amate bangma silh ngawlin lum a
Job24:8 Mualtung ah ngua a zute in amate tuamcipsak a
Job24:9 Misiate in pasel patang note sal suaksak a
Job24:10 Mizawngte ahile a kiseal natu puan nei ngawlin a vak kul a
Job24:11 Amate in olive ngate sathau in ngoai a
Job24:12 Khuapite sungah a liamte le a thi dekte in au in a ko uh hang Pathian in amate thungetnate awlmawk ngawl hi.
Job24:13 Khuavak a nial mite om hi; Amate in tuasia tel ngawl hi
Job24:14 Khuavak ciang mi thatpa tho in mizawngte thatlum tu in kuan hi
Job24:15 Palngul mawna a vawt sia in khuangial tu ngak hi; Ama in kuama ii mu thei ngawl tu in a maitang seal hi.
Job24:16 Zanin ngutate in innte phuul a
Job24:17 Amate in sun khuavak kiita a
Job24:18 Mi ngilopa sia khuanawl tuipawm in taaikeak a
Job24:19 Nisa khua kona sungah vuuk a tuithap vadi bangin mimaw khat sia a nungtate ii ngam panin bo vangeu hi.
Job24:20 Tu in a nu ngawngawn in ama phawk nawn ngawl hi; ama thanh in ne a
Job24:21 Tuabangin a pian sia meingongte a vawtsiat hang le tasel nupite tungah cikna thiamna a lak ngawl hang hi.
Job24:22 Pathian in ama ii thahatna taw a thahatbelpa susia a; Pathian hong dian tak ciang mi ngilo pa thi hi.
Job24:23 Pathian in ama ngal muangin nungtasak thei hikale ama encik tan viuveu hi.
Job24:24 Tawmvei sung teng mi ngilo pa nuamsa hi
Job24:25 Tu a ka ci bang hi bo ci in khat po in a nial thei tu ziam? Ka kammalte maan ngawl hi ci in

Job25:2 
Job25:3 Ama ii na a seam vantunglalangte akua in a phakza sim zo tu ziam? Pathian ii khuavak a taan ngawlna mun om ziam?
Job25:4 Pathian muna ah a thutang ahibuale a thiang
Job25:5 Ama mit sungah tha ngawngawn taang sitset ngawl a
Job25:6 Tua ahile tangteal
Job26:1 A zawngkhal a thazawm mi kei — atu in nong huna bangza in pha ziam!
Job26:2

Job26:4 Na kammal theampo akua in za tu in um ni ziam? Hi bang pau tu in akua in nang hong thaw ziam?
Job26:5 A thisate ii thaate sia leinuai ah a om tui sungah liinglawng hi.
Job26:6 Mithi khua kihongin Pathian mai ah kilangh hi. Ama ii a mu thei ngawl natu in a khak a dal bangma om ngawl hi.
Job26:7 Pathian in van saksang teng phalh a
Job26:8 Meeite tui taw a kidimsak sia Pathian hi

Job26:10 Ama in khuazing pan khuavak sia tuipi maitang tungah a kisuai a beampui khat sia taw khen hi.
Job26:11 Ama in van a len khuamte a teih ciang tuate lau a kilok in liing uh hi.

Job26:13 Ama ii husan sia in van thiangsak a
Job26:14 Ahihang hite ama thahatna ii a hiauhiau hi bek a
Job27:1 Thukhaikim thu hong pia nuam ngawl
Job27:2 
Job27:3 Pathian in husanna hong piak laiteng in
Job27:4 ka kam ka muk in a sia peuma pau ngeingawl tu a
Job27:5 No pasalte maan nu hi ci ngeingawl tu khi hi; ka mawban ngawlna sia ka thi dongin ka thasua buatu hi.
Job27:6 Maan khi hi ka ci sia bangma hunin thasua ngawl tu khi hi; hi thu ah kithasunna om ngawlin ka thin thiang hi.
Job27:7 Kei hong langpanin kei hong ngal vawtte a vekpi in mi seksolte le thutang ngawlte bangin daan kipia tahen.
Job27:8 Pathian selte nuntakna sia Pathian ii a tangkal hun ciang bang lametna om na ziam?
Job27:9 Ngimna hong tun ciang Pathian in amate auna za tu ziam?
Job27:10 Amate in Pathian piak lungdamna sia a dei tu uh hi a
Job27:11 Pathian ii vaangletna bangza in lian ziam
Job27:12 Ahihang
Job27:13 Hisia in vaanglianbelpa Pathian ii a ngilo
Job27:14 Amate in tapa tam mama nei thei tha tu hi
