Jeremiah4:4 No
Jeremiah4:5 Ngamsung theampo ah lemle tum vun! A nging le a kitelthiangin au vun! Judah mite le Jerusalem khua mite tungah a muanhuai khuapite ah a tai natu son vun.
Jeremiah4:6 Zion paina lampi hil vun! Na suatak natu in tai vun! Haisaang heak vun! Topa in saksang panin tuasiatna le suksiatna lian hong puak hi.

Jeremiah4:8 Tua ahiciang khau-ip puan silh in
Jeremiah4:9 Topa in
Jeremiah4:10 Tuasia ciang keima in
Jeremiah4:11 Vui a sa mama khat sennealngam panin Jerusalem mite sangah hong va tu hi cina thu sia Jerusalem mite tungah a kison tu hun hong theng zo hi. Tua vui sia anvaaite a mut keak vui bang bek hi ngawl tu a —
Jeremiah4:12 Topa ii sawlna taw a va vui sia tuasia sangin thahat zaw tu hi! A mite tungah thukhenna a pia sia Topa ama mama ahi hi.
Jeremiah4:13 En vun

Jeremiah4:17 mihingte lo hung bangin Jerusalem kiim uum tu uh hi

Jeremiah4:19 Na hi! A na ka thuak zo bua hi! Ka lungtang! Ka lungtuk ngam vasat hi! Thim khipkhep in ka ommuang thei bua hi; lemle aw le ngal simna aw ka za hi.
Jeremiah4:20 Tuasiatna khat zawkciang khat hong theng a; ngamsung buppi kisia siat hi. Thakhat thu in ih bukte kilalsak hi; a puankhaite ki eaukeak hi.
Jeremiah4:21 Bang tanvei ngal kisim lialua ka mu lai tu ziam
Jeremiah4:22 Topa in

Jeremiah4:24 Mualliante ka en a — tuate liing hi
Jeremiah4:25 Khua ka et le mihing kuama om ngawl a; vacimte ngawngawn leang siat zo uh hi.
Jeremiah4:26 Lo ngam leiphana teng sennealngam suak zo a; Topa ii thin uuk mama na hu in a khuapite kisia cip hi.

Jeremiah13:4 “Euphrates ngun ah pai in

Jeremiah13:6 Khuangei dingdeng zawkciangin Topa in Euphrates ngun ah pai kik ta'n a
Jeremiah13:7 Hong sawl bangin ka pai kik a
Jeremiah13:8 Tuaciang Topa in kei hong paupui leleau hi. Ama in
Jeremiah13:9 “Judah ii kiphatsak na le Jerusalem ii kiphatsakna lian mama sia hi bangin ka siasak tu hi.
Jeremiah13:10 Hi mi ngilote in ka thu hong ni nuam bua uh hi. Amate sia a ngei bangma in a thin uh pui in seksol uh a
Jeremiah13:11 Ngoaipuan tomte in kawng ah a belh cinten bangma in Israel le Judah mite theampo in keima hong bel cinten tu ka dei hi. Hi bang a ka vawtna in amate sia ka mi a sua thei natu
Jeremiah13:12 Topa Pathian in keima tungah
Jeremiah13:13 Tuaciang keima Topa in hi ngam sungah a om mihingte theampo: David ii suan le paal kumpite
Jeremiah13:14 Tuaciang a huai a khang a kibangin thambealte khat le khat kitaih in a kisukthap bangin amate ka susia tu hi. Khuangaihuai sakna
Jeremiah13:15 Israel mite awng
Jeremiah13:16 Topa in khua a zinsak ma mualte tungah na lutu uh ma in; na lam et uh khuavak sia khuazing bikbek a suasak ma in
Jeremiah13:17 Ka thu nong ngai bua uh le na kiphatsak na uh hangin ka kap ku tu a; thitui luangin nasia takin ka kap tu hi
Jeremiah13:18 Topa in kei tungah
Jeremiah13:19 Judah ngam thangsang khuapite sia ngalte in uumci zo a; a sungah kuama tum thei ngawl hi. Judah mite theampo a saltanna munah kipaipui siat zo hi
Jeremiah13:20 Jerusalem awng
Jeremiah13:21 Na lawm na ngual a na ngaisut mihingte kekeak in nangma hong zo in hong uk ciang bang na ci tu ziam? Nausuak tu numei khat taw kibangin nasa in na om tu hi.
Jeremiah13:22 Banghangin
Jeremiah13:23 Mihing civom pa khat in a civom sia theak thei tu ziam
Jeremiah13:24 Sennealngam pan a hong va vui in taangphaw a muutkeak bangin Topa in note hong thethaang tu hi.
Jeremiah13:25 Tusia note ii thuak tu ma ahi hi
Jeremiah13:26 Topa ama mama in noma puante hong hawkeaksak tu a
Jeremiah13:27 Ama ii huasaak nate na vawt uh sia ama in mu zo hi. Pa khat in a innpaampa ii zi a khialpui nop bang

Jeremiah14:4 Nguazu ngawl ahikom leiko ngawp a

Jeremiah14:7 Ka mite in kei hong oksan in

Jeremiah17:22 ahibuale Sabbath ni in a inn uh pan bangma pusua pui heak hen. Sabbath ni in amate naseam ngawl het tu hi; a taanghpupite thu ka piak bangin ni thiangtho khat in tang nanak tahen.
Jeremiah17:23 A taanghpupite in ka thu hong ngai ngawl

Jeremiah17:27 Ahihang amate in ka thu hong nit kul tu a Sabbath sia ni thiangtho khat in a tan uh kul tu hi. Tua ni in amate Jerusalem kongpite kaantan in vanh bangma pua ngawl het tu uh hi. A pua uh ahile Jerusalem kongpite mei taw ka hal tu hi. Mei in Jerusalem khua kumpi innte kaanghtum tu a

Jeremiah23:10 Tua ngam sia Topa tungah a thumaan ngawl mihingte taw kidim hi; amate sia a seksol nuntakna taw nungta in a vaang neina uh zangh khial uh hi. Topa ii haamsiatna hangin hi ngam sia khuangai in om a

Jeremiah23:14 Ahihang Jerusalem khua a kamsaangte in a sia zaw lai a vawt ka mu hi: amate in nupa kipalngul in leilot thu son uh hi; mihingte ii ngitlo ngamtatna pan a kheal ngawl natu in mihingte khial natu panpui uh hi. keima muna ah amate sia Sodom le Gomorrah mite bangma in sia siat uh hi.

Jeremiah23:20 ama ii tupna teng a vekpi a vawt siat mateng in a thin uukna thai ngawl tu hi. Mailam sangah a mite in hi thu telthiang tu uh hi
Jeremiah23:21 Topa in

Jeremiah23:23 “Keima in mun khat bek ah a om hi ngawlin mun theampo ah a om Pathian ka hi hi.
Jeremiah23:24 Ka mu thei ngawl tu in a buu thei tu kuama om ngawl hi. Vantung leitung mun theampo ah ka om hunlam he ngawl nu ziam?
Jeremiah23:25 Amate mang sungah ka thupuakte hong pia zo hi ci a keima min suangin leilot thu a son kamsaangte ii thusonte ka he hi.

Jeremiah24:2 Bawm a masa sia sungah a om theingate sia a min pal theinga phate hi a; a dang bawm sia ii sungah a om theingate sia neak tu zong a pha ngawlte ahi hi.

Amate tungah tuasiatna ka thengsak tu hi a ci sia Topa in a thin kheal kik hi. Tu in eima in a lauhuai tuasiatna khat eima tung ma ah ih thengsak dektak hi!” ci uh hi.

Jeremiah32:30 Amate taanghthu a kipatciil pan a sep a vawtna uh taw Israel mite le Judah mite in ka thin hong nuamsak ngawl a

Jeremiah32:32 banghang ziam cile Judah mite le Jerusalem khua mite in a kumpite le a lampuite
Jeremiah32:33 Amate in kei hong nungngat uh a

Jeremiah32:35 Amate in a tapate le a tanute taw Molech pathian a biakpiak thei natu in Hinnom Kuam sungah Baal a tu biaknataute vawt uh hi. Hi bang a vawt tu sia amate tungah thu ka pia bua hi. Tuabang khat a vawt tu le tuaciang Judah mite mawna vawt a suasak tu sia ka ngaisun tha ngei bua hi
Jeremiah32:36 Topa Israel ii Pathian in kei tungah
Jeremiah32:37 Ka thin uuk
Jeremiah32:38 Tua zawkciang amate sia ka mite hi tu a
Jeremiah32:39 A nuntakna uh ah tupna khat bek ka pia tu hi: tua tupna sia amate ii phat natu le a suan le a paalte ii phat natu in

Jeremiah51:45 Israel mite awng
Jeremiah51:46 Kamleang na zakte hu in na thin uh kiamsak heak vun a
Jeremiah51:47 Tua ahikom Babylon ii milimte daan ka piak tu hun hong theng hi. A ngam buppi kimaizumsak tu a
Jeremiah51:48 Saksang pan a susia tu in hong pai mite khut sungah Babylon a taak ciang lei le van ah a omte theampo lungdam in au tu uh hi.
Jeremiah51:49 Babylon in leitung theampo a mihingte thisak hi
Jeremiah51:50 Topa in Babylon a om a mite tungah: “Thina panin suakta zo nu hi! Tu in pai vun! Ngak heak vun! Inn taw kikhuala na hi uh hangin Keima na Topa hong ngaisun tavun a Jerusalem phawk vun.
Jeremiah51:51 Note in
Jeremiah51:52 Tua ahikom Babylon khua a milimte tungah daan ka piak tu hun le ngamsung theampo ah a liamte a tau tu hun hong theng tu hi ka ci hi.
Jeremiah51:53 Babylon sia van ah kaato thei in
Jeremiah51:54 Topa in
Jeremiah51:55 Babylon ka susia tu a
Jeremiah51:56 Amate Babylon susia tu in hong pai zo hi; a ngalkapte kiman a
Jeremiah51:57 A ngamukte — mipilte
Jeremiah51:58 A thahat Babylon luphungte lei ah kilawnsuk tu a
Jeremiah51:59 Zedekiah kumpipa a hu pa sia
Jeremiah51:60 Babylon tungah a theng tu suksiatna thu theampo le Babylon taw kisai hi thudangte theampo laibu khat sungah ka ciamtee hi.
Jeremiah51:61 Keima in Seraiah tungah
Jeremiah51:62 Tua zawkciang
Jeremiah51:63 Seraiah awng
Jeremiah51:64 tuaciang
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekiah sia Judah kumpi a sua lai in kum kul le kum khat pha a
Jeremiah52:2 Jehoiakim kumpipa ii mawna khialna a vawt bangma in Zedekiah kumpipa in Topa tungah maw hi.
Jeremiah52:3 Topa sia Jerusalem le Judah mite tungah thin uuk mama ahikom a mit muna pan hawlkhia hi. Zedekiah in Babylon kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar leedo hi
Jeremiah52:4 tua ahiciang Zedekiah ii kumpi a sua zawk kum kua kum
Jeremiah52:5 tuaciang Zedekiah kumpipa maan zawk kum sawm le kum khat a phak dong tua khuapi uumci uh hi.
Jeremiah52:6 Tua kum a tha lina ni kua ni in kialpi nasia mama a
Jeremiah52:7 khuapi uumna luphungte kisulet hi. Babylon te in khuapi uumci hi napi
Jeremiah52:8 Ahihang Babylon ngalkaphonpi in Zedekiah kumpipa delkot in Jericho khua nai zaangtam ah man uh hi
Jeremiah52:9 Zedekiah sia Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa kungah kipaipui hi
Jeremiah52:10 Riblah ah Nebuchadnezzar in Zedekiah ii tapate sia a pa ii mu tang ma in that hi
Jeremiah52:11 Tua zawkciang
Jeremiah52:12 Nebuchadnezzar ii Babylon kumpi a sep zawk kum sawm le kum kua kum a tha ngana
Jeremiah52:13 Ama in Biakinnpi
Jeremiah52:14 tuaciang a ngalkapte in khuapi luphungte sutham uh hi.
Jeremiah52:15 Tuaciang Nebuzaradan in khua sungah a taanglai mite
Jeremiah52:16 Ahihang ama in nei le lamh a nei ngawl
Jeremiah52:17 Babylon te in Biakinnpi sungah a om taau khuamte le khuileangte le taau tuikuang lian sia sutham hi
Jeremiah52:18 Amate in kawkeaute
Jeremiah52:19 Amate in khamh ahibuale ngunn taw a kivawt nate theampo la uh hi: tuate sia kuangnote
Jeremiah52:20 Solomon kumpipa ii Biakinnpi a tu a vawt taau vanhte — khuam niite
Jeremiah52:21 A khuam niite sia kibang linlian hi: khat sia metre 8 saang a
Jeremiah52:22 
Jeremiah52:23 Khuam khat sim ii tungkhuna theampo tungah talee nga zakhat veu om a
Jeremiah52:24 Tua bek dom ngawlin ngalkaphonpi ukpa
Jeremiah52:25 Khuapi sung panin ngalkapte a uk ngalkap mangpa
Jeremiah52:26 Nebuzaradan in amate sia Riblah khuapi ah a om
Jeremiah52:27 tua khuapi sia Hamath ngam sungah om hi. Tua munah kumpipa in amate saatsak in thatlum hi. Tua ahikom Judah mite sia a ngam panin saltaang tu in kipaipui hi.
Jeremiah52:28 Hisia in Nebuchadnezzar ii thongtaak a
Jeremiah52:29 a kum sawm le kum liat kum in
Jeremiah52:30 tuaciang a kum kul le kum thum kumin
Jeremiah52:31 Evilmerodach sia Babylon kumpi a sua kumin
Jeremiah52:32 Evilmerodach in Jehoiachin phat vawt a
Jeremiah52:33 Tua ahikom Jehoiachin sia a thong puante kilaihsakin a nuntak lai teng kumpipa ii sabuai ah an kinesak hi.
Jeremiah52:34 A nuntak sung ni sim a kisap na ah a zak tu in ama sia dangka kipia tawntung hi.
Lamentations1:1 Khatvei lai in mihing taw a kidim Jerusalem khuapi bangza in ngamkhing ziam! Leitung ii khatvei a zatak ngei sia tu in meingongnu khat taw kibang hi; khuapi teng po pan a tuanngenbel sia sila dinmun ah taak zo hi.
Lamentations1:2 Zankhuateakin ama kap a; a biangkho ah thitui luang suk vahii hi. A lawm a ngual masa te khat zongh ama heeneam tu taang ngawl hi
Lamentations1:3 Judah ii mite sia inn pan zawthawk thu taw a kihawlkeak a cimaw silate ahi uh hi. Ngamdang ah amate sila in om a
Lamentations1:4 Ni thiangtho nite ah biakna vawt tu in
Lamentations1:5 A ngalte in ama zo a; amate khutnuai ah koi hi. A khialna tam mamate hangin Topa in ngim thuaksak hi; A tate kipummat in kipaipui hi.
Lamentations1:6 Jerusalem phatna sia bo zo hi. A lampuite sia sangai ngilkial a thazawm
Lamentations1:7 Tu in a ngamkhing
Lamentations1:8 A minphatna teng bo a; a pumnguak in om a ngual zawnsak thuak hi. Ama tau a maizum in a mai seal hi. Jerusalem in lipkhaphuai mawna taw ama le ama kininsak hi.
Lamentations1:9 A thiantho ngawlna ol tak kimu a
Lamentations1:10 A ngalte in ama ii a nei a lamh theampo suttol hi. Topa ii Gentile te pai tu a khaamna mun Biakinnpi sung mama ah a ngalte a tum sia ama in mu hi.
Lamentations1:11 A mite in bang khat po neak tu a zon uh ciang mau vangui uh hi; Amate in a nuntak thei natu in a nei a lamhte an taw theak uh hi. “Kei hong en ka ven
Lamentations1:12 “Kei hong en ka ven!” ci in ama kaantan in a pai theampo tungah ko hi. “Kei nat bangin kuama in a na thuak ngeingawl hi. Topa in a thin uuk laitak hong thuaksak natna a hi hi.
Lamentations1:13 “Ama in tungsang pan mei hong khiaksuk a
Lamentations1:14 “Ama in ka mawna theampo ciamtee a
Lamentations1:15 “Topa in ka ngalkap thahatbelte theampo nuisan lel a; Ama in ka tangvalte a lalsak tu in ngalkaphonpi khat puak hi. Sapit ngoaina sungah sapitngate kingoai thap bangin ka mite ama in sucip hi.
Lamentations1:16 “Tua hu in ka mittangte thitui taw kidim leet hi. Kuama in hong heeneam thei ngawl a; kuama in hong hanthawn thei ngawl hi. Ngalte in hong zothal a; ka mite in bangma nei nawn ngawl uh hi.
Lamentations1:17 “Ka khutte zan kaleng kuama in hong hu ngawl hi. Mun theampo pan kei hong langpan tu ngalte Topa in sam zo hi. Amate in a kiihuai nate bangin kei hong vawt hi.
Lamentations1:18 “Ahihang Topa sia a maan hi a
Lamentations1:19 “Ka pawlpuite ka sam a
Lamentations1:20 “ Topa awng
Lamentations1:21 “Ka tau nate hong ngai ta'n; hong heeneam tu kuama om ngawl hi. Tuasiatna nong thuaksak manin ka ngalte lungdam uh hi. Nong kamciam ni hong thengsak ta'n a; keima thuak bangin ka ngalte thuaksak in.
Lamentations1:22 “Amate seksolnate theampo hu in amate ningkhiin in; Ka mawnate hu in daan nong piak bangma in amate daan pia in. Thasiatna taw ka tau a
Lamentations2:1 Topa a thin uuk in Zion sia khuazing taw tuam zo hi. A vantung hoina te ama in sia sak zo hi. A thin uuk ni in a Biakinnpi ngawngawn nusia hi.
Lamentations2:2 Topa in Judah ngam khuano theampo hesuak ngawlin lalthamsak a
Lamentations2:3 Ama in a thinso in Israel te thahatna saattham hi. Ngalte hong kuan ciang ama in hong hu nuam ngawl hi. Kaanghmei bangin ama in ei hong zaap keak a
Lamentations2:4 Eite sia ngal bang phetin a thaltangte taw hong tuung hi; Ih lungdamna le ih diksak theampo ama in thatlum hi. Hi lai Jerusalem ah ama ii thin uukna meikuang eite in ih thuak hi.
Lamentations2:5 Topa in ngal khat bangin Israel susia zo hi. Ama in a kulhte le kumpi innte a zaancip sa in nusia hi. Ama in Judah mite tungah a bo thei ngawl heena tungsak hi.
Lamentations2:6 Ama ih biakna mun Biakinnpi sia ama in a bebekin sutham hi. Ama in ni thiangthote le Sabbath te bosak zo hi. Kumpipa le thiampipa in ama thin uukna a kibangin thuak khawm uh hi.
Lamentations2:7 Topa in a biaknatau nial a
Lamentations2:8 Zion khuapi luphungte a cipthap tu sia Topa in ciangtan zo hi. A vekpi a sia tu in ama in see zo hi. Tu in tausaangte le luphungte lal khawm hi.
Lamentations2:9 Kongpite sia leivum suangvum sungah kivuknelh a
Lamentations2:10 Jerusalem ii pasal huaite sia huthe ngawlin lei ah to khipkhep uh hi. A lu tungah leivui kithe in khau-ip puan silh uh hi. Ngaknu note lei ah a lu kun uh hi.
Lamentations2:11 Ka ka kaana in ka mitte paat zo a
Lamentations2:12 Amate ngilkial dangtaak in a nute kaa uh hi. Amate sia a liamte bang phetin lampi ah puk uh a
Lamentations2:13 Jerusalem awng
Lamentations2:14 Na kamsaangte in leilot thu ngawl po nang tungah son tu nei ngawl hi. Na mawna a pholaak ngeingawl amate thuhilna taw nang hong theam ahi hi. Amate in na kisii kik tu a kul ngawl tu dongin hong ngaisunsak hi.
Lamentations2:15 Khuapi kaantan in a pai mihingte in nangma hong ngaimawk et uh hi. Amate in Jerusalem ii zaanthapna sia a lu pei in nuisan uh hi: “Hisia
Lamentations2:16 Na ngalte theampo in hong selno in etsatna taw nang hong salh uh hi. Amate mukmen in “Khuapi lalthamsak zo hing! hisia ih ngalaakbel ni hi!” ci in selno uh hi.
Lamentations2:17 Topa in hong tawnna teng a khak belin tungsak hi. Ama in hun saupi lai a eite kidop natu hong hil sa bangin hesuakna om ngawlin hong lalsak hi. Ama in ih ngalte ngalzosak a
Lamentations2:18 Jerusalem awng
Lamentations2:19 Zankhuateak Topa tungah ko tu in tho kikik in! Na thin na lung takpi taw na patangte — lampi king sim ah neak tu nei ngawl pukhong in a thi tu na patangte atu in ama tungah hesuak ngen in.
Lamentations2:20 En in
Lamentations2:21 A moi a haam a kibangin lampi ah thi uh hi. Ngalte in ngaknu le tangval teng namsau taw thatlum uh hi. Na thin uuk ni in hesuak ngawlin amate na thatlum hi.
Lamentations2:22 Nangma in keima ii kiim ah hong lausak poai vawt tu in ka ngalte na sam a
Lamentations3:1 Pathian ii daan piakna bangbang tatak hi tu ziam ci in a he sia keima ka hi hi.
Lamentations3:2 Ama in khuazing sungah a thuk vaial
Lamentations3:3 Tuaciang ama in hong hesuak ngawlin kei hong vevel hi.
Lamentations3:4 Ama in ka samal sia a at babangin nusia a
Lamentations3:5 Ama in thasiatna le mauna thong sungah hong khum hi.
Lamentations3:6 Ama in a uih thina khuazing sungah kei hong teangsak hamtang hi.
Lamentations3:7 Ama in thikkhau taw hong heen a; suatak tu muanmawk om ngawl thongtaak a
Lamentations3:8 Hu ngenin nging takin ka kap a
Lamentations3:9 Lam ka pai ciang ka hoi vadai a; ka heakna mun theampo ah suangpangte in ka mai hong khak hi.
Lamentations3:10 Vompui khat bangin ama in kei hong pang nginge a; tawpi khat bangin ama in hong baw hi.
Lamentations3:11 Ama in lam puasia ah kei hong del a
Lamentations3:12 Ama in a thal keak a
Lamentations3:13 Ama in a thaltangte taw ka pumpi thuk bunin hong kap hi.
Lamentations3:14 Mihingte in sunkhuateak in kei hong nuisan a; amate theampo atu in kei sia ciammuina ka suak hi.
Lamentations3:15 An le tui hong piak taangin ama in nasia takin hong thuaksak hi.
Lamentations3:16 Ama in ka maitang lei ah hong tat a
Lamentations3:17 Cidamna
Lamentations3:18 Khuangei nungta nawn ngawl tu khi hi; Topa sungah ka lametna bo zo hi;
Lamentations3:19 Natna ka thuakna
Lamentations3:20 A tawntungin tuate ka ngaisun a

Lamentations3:22 A kiam ngeingawl Topa ii hong itna le hong hesuakna kizom suak lai a;
Lamentations3:23 zing khuavak bangin thak suak tawntung a
Lamentations3:24 Topa bekma ka nei hi a
Lamentations3:25 Ama a muangte theampo tungah Topa pha hi.
Lamentations3:26 Tua ahikom eite atu in
Lamentations3:27 Ih khan moi lai in hi thinsauna sin tu phabel hi.
Lamentations3:28 Ngimna ih thuak ciang thinsauna taw thimdide in eima nguak ih to tu ahi hi;
Lamentations3:29 Kipum aapin ih kun tu ahi hi
Lamentations3:30 Hong kivua in hong kizawngsak kale tuate theampo ih saang thiam tu hi.
Lamentations3:31 Topa sia hesuakna taw kidim a
Lamentations3:32 Ama in eite heena hong thuaksak thei tu hi
Lamentations3:33 Ama in eite hong khuangaisak
Lamentations3:34 Topa in thong sungah thinngimna ih thuak ciang hong heaksak a;
Lamentations3:35 Ama ii eite hong piak hamphatna te ih taan ciang hong heaksak hi;
Lamentations3:36 thukhenzum ah thutang khenna a om ngawl ciang
Lamentations3:37 Topa deina sia bekma kiseam suak tawntung hi.
Lamentations3:38 Ama thu piakna zui in a pha le a sia a kibangin piang hi.
Lamentations3:39 Ih mawna hangin daan hong kipiak ciang banghang phuphun tu hi ziam?
Lamentations3:40 Ih kalsuan nate en pha kikin Topa kungah heak kik tawng.
Lamentations3:41 Vantung a om ih Pathian tungah ih thinsung kongkha hongin thungen tawng

Lamentations3:44 na thinsona meeikaai sia saa leih ahikom kote thungetnate nang kungah hong theng zo ngawl hi.
Lamentations3:45 Nangma in kote simlei ninthuk nong sua hi.

Lamentations3:47 Kote in tuasiatna le siatna ka thuak zo uh a
Lamentations3:48 Ka mite siatna hu in ka thituite ngun bangin luang hi.
Lamentations3:49 “Ka thituite sia
Lamentations3:50 Topa in vantung pan hong ensuk a
Lamentations3:51 Khuapi sungah numeite bang tawk ziam ci sia ka mu ciang ka khuangai mama hi.
Lamentations3:52 “Kei hong ngaimawk natu thu a nei ngawl ngalte in

Lamentations3:54 Tui in hong khuum tu in kithoai a

Lamentations3:57 Nong zo a
Lamentations3:58 “ Topa awng

Lamentations3:60 Ka ngalte ii hong etsatzia le hong thasawm zia na he hi.

Lamentations4:1 Ih khamh tee vakilte mualmang zo hi; Biakinnpi sakna suangte lampi ah kithethaang in om hi.
Lamentations4:2 Zion ii tangvalnote sia khamh bangin ei atu in manpha hi
Lamentations4:3 Ngiapui khat ngawngawn zongh in a note ou tu hi
Lamentations4:4 Amate in a nausente ngilkial dangtaak in thisak hi; tanote in an ngen a
Lamentations4:5 An phabel a ne ngei mihingte sia lampi ah anngawlin pukthi uh hi; a nuamsa in a khangte in an zongin ninbung tok uh hi.
Lamentations4:6 Ka mite sia thakhat thu in Pathian khut sa a thuak Sodom a teang mihingte sangin nasia zaw in daan kipia hi.
Lamentations4:7 Ih kumpi tapate sia kiihuai ngawl hi
Lamentations4:8 Tu in amate sia kuama heak ngawlin lampi ah kisial uh a; thi in a mai mual uh hi; a vun uh tun a
Lamentations4:9 Ngal sungah a thite sia nuntak zawk natu an om ngawl a
Lamentations4:10 Ka mite tungah a tung tuasiatna sia cizat huai mama hi
Lamentations4:11 Topa in a thinsona teng nasia takin hong buak hi. ama in mei taw Zion halin kaanghtumsak hi.
Lamentations4:12 A kuama peuma
Lamentations4:13 Ahihang hisia thu piang hi
Lamentations4:14 Mittawte bangin a lampuite lampite ah vakvai uh a
Lamentations4:15 Mihingte in amate oksan a
Lamentations4:16 Topa in amate awlmaw nawn ngawl a; amate thethaang hi. Ama in ih thiampite le ih lampuite bangma in hong hensak ngawl hi.
Lamentations4:17 Eite in hong pai ngeingawl tu bul huna lamen in khuadak zawk nawn ngawl tu dong khua ih dadak hi. Eite in piak tu a nei ngawl ngam khat tung pan huna ih ngangak hi.
Lamentations4:18 Ngalte in eite hong encik a; lampite ah vak zongh ih vak thei bua hi. Ih nite bo zo a; a tawpna hong theng zo hi.
Lamentations4:19 Muvanlaite van pan suktun a hong len sang a manlang zaw in amate in ei hong zuizen suk hi. Amate in mual tungah ei hong sul zui a; sennealngam ah muanmawk ngawlin ei hong phaa hi.
Lamentations4:20 Amate in ngalte khut sung pan hong dal zo tu in ih muan
Lamentations4:21 Edom le Uz mite awng
Lamentations4:22 Zion in a mawna thaman pia zo a; Topa in eite saltaang in hong koi nawn ngawl tu hi. Ahihang Edom awng
Lamentations5:1 Topa awng
Lamentations5:2 Kote neisa sia khualmite khut sungah om a; ngamdangmite sia koma inn sungah teang uh hi.
Lamentations5:3 Koma pate sia ngalte in thatlum zo a
Lamentations5:4 Kote dawn tu tuite man piak kul a
Lamentations5:5 Kalaohte le laate bangin hong kihawl ngawp a
Lamentations5:6 Nuntak khom natu an ka nga natu uh in Egypt le Assyria ah an ngenin ka pai uh hi.
Lamentations5:7 Koma taanghpupite mawna hi a; ahihang tu in amate om nawn ngawl hi
Lamentations5:8 Silate sangin a phazaw tuan ngawl mihingte in ko hong uk a
Lamentations5:9 Ngam sungah mithatte vak kawkoai a
Lamentations5:10 Ngilkialna in ka ci uh hong suuksak a
Lamentations5:11 Zion Mualtung mama ah koma ii zite hong buansak uh a; Judah ngam khuano theampo ah koma ii tanute zothaw in khialpui uh hi.
Lamentations5:12 Koma ii lampuite hong matsakin ngui awksak a; koma ii pasal huaite hong zataksak bua uh hi.
Lamentations5:13 Koma ii tangvalte sia silate bangin zawthawk thu taw an ngoaisak uh a; patangnote sia a thing puak uh khopin hoi vatut uh hi.
Lamentations5:14 Khanghaamte khuapi kongpi ah to nawn ngawl a
Lamentations5:15 Kote nuntakna sungah lungdamna bo zo a; kote ngualnop lapna teng sia khuangaina taw kilaih zo hi.
Lamentations5:16 Ko kiphatsakpui nate khat zongh taang nawn ngawl hi. Kote ka maw uh a
Lamentations5:17 Kote ii ka thin ka lung mama uh na a
Lamentations5:18 Zion Mual sia ngamkhing ngamdai in kinusia ahikom tua a kisia sa munte ah ngam uite vak hi.
Lamentations5:19 Ahihang Topa awng
Lamentations5:20 Banghangin tu tanvei kote hong nusia ni ziam? Kote nong phawk kik ngei tu ziam?
Lamentations5:21 Na kungah ko hong ciapui kik ta'n
Lamentations5:22 Tua ahibuale kote a tawntungin hong nial tu ni ziam? Na thin uukna in ciangtan nei ngawl ahi ziam?
Ezekiel1:1 Kum sawmthum kum a tha li na a ni nga ni in Babylon ngam Chebar ngunhui ah keima Buzi ii tapa thiampi Ezekiel in Judah mi saltaangte taw ka teang khawm hi. Van kihong a
Ezekiel1:2 Tua hun sia Jehoiachin kumpipa sal in a kipaipui zawk a kum nga kum ahi hi.)
Ezekiel1:3 Chebar ngunhui tua Babylon ngamah
Ezekiel1:4 Khua ka dakto le saksang pan vuipi suangval hong pai ka mu hi. Meeikaai lian pui khat sung pan khualeng vazak a
Ezekiel1:5 Vuipi suangval laizang ah mihing pianlim bang ahi cherubim li ka mu hi
Ezekiel1:6 ahihang tuate khat simin maitang li le tha li tek nei uh hi.
Ezekiel1:7 A peangte maam a
Ezekiel1:8 Maitang li le tha li te bek hi ngawlin
Ezekiel1:9 Cherub te khat simin
Ezekiel1:10 Cherub khat simin a kibang ngawl maitang nam li nei uh hi: tuate sia a maisang ah mihing maitang
Ezekiel1:11 Nganhing khat sim a thate nii tek kilaamto a
Ezekiel1:12 Nganhing khat simin a mun li teng nga ahiciang lu heak kul ngawlin a uuk na po ah a hon in pai thei uh hi.
Ezekiel1:13 Cherub te sungah meisip kuang bang khat om a
Ezekiel1:14 Tua cherub te sia khualeng manlangza in nung le mai ah a manlangin tai uh hi.
Ezekiel1:15 Nganhing lite ka et ciangin khat ii pangh ah khat a om lei taw kipha a mui li teng ka mu hi.
Ezekiel1:16 Tua a mui li teng kibang siat hi; tuate khat simin suangmanpha bangin taang hi. Tuaciang a muite khat simin
Ezekiel1:17 tuabangin a muite sia mun li ah a ukna sang pawpo pai thei uh hi.
Ezekiel1:18 Tua a muite ii kiil teng sia mittangte taw kidim uh hi.
Ezekiel1:19 Cherub te a kikhiin simin leangte taw kikhiin khawm a
Ezekiel1:20 Cherub te sia amate ukna po ah pai uh a
Ezekiel1:21 Tua ahikom cherub te a kikhiin sim a tawlngak sim ahibuale vui sungah a kikhaangto simin a muite zongh in tuabang tatak ma in zui uh hi.
Ezekiel1:22 Tua cherub te lu ii tung san ah a tee vazal limlangh taw a kivawt kikhupsiin in a kikoi taw a kibang khat om hi.
Ezekiel1:23 Tua a kikhup siin sia ii nuai ah cherub te dingin
Ezekiel1:24 A len uh ciang a thaphil nging ka za hi; tua awnging sia tuipi hawk bang hi a
Ezekiel1:25 Ahihang amate lu tungah a om a kikhup siin sia ii tung panin aw nging khat om lai hi.
Ezekiel1:26 Tua a kikhup siin sia ii tungah Sapphire suangmanpha taw a kivawt kumpi tokhum taw a kibang khat om a
Ezekiel1:27 Tua lim sia meikhuk laizang ah a om taau bangin taang hi. Tua in a kiim a paam theampo nasia takin khuavak taangsak hi.
Ezekiel1:28 Tua ii sungah sangun ii meal namcin om hi. Tuasia in Topa ii ompuina a kilanghsak khuavak taang velvol sia ahi hi. Hisia ka mu ciangin ka maisang ah ka puksuk hi.

Ezekiel7:1 Topa in kei hong paupui hi.
Ezekiel7:2 Ama in “A thithei mihing awng
Ezekiel7:3 “Israel awng
Ezekiel7:4 Nang hong khoaikhe ngawl tu khi hi
Ezekiel7:5 Hisia in Vaanglianpipa Topa ii ci ahi hi: “Na tungah tuasiatna khat zawkciang khat hong tung tu hi.
Ezekiel7:6 A vekpi kiman zo hi. Hisia in bona ahi hi. Nang sia a mansa na hi hi.
Ezekiel7:7 Ngam sungah a teang no mihingte atu in bona hong thetheng hi. Mual tung biakpiakna munte ah poai kikhaam nawn ngawlin buaina bek a om tu hun hong nai hi.
Ezekiel7:8 “Hai ngawlin ka thin uukna ii thahatna na phawk tu hi. Na sepna sate tungah thu kong khen tu a
Ezekiel7:9 Nang kong khoaikhe buatu a
Ezekiel7:10 Israel atu in tuasiatna ni hong theng tu hi. Ngoltol ngamtatna pung vaial hi. Kiphatsakna sia a saangbel mun theng hi.
Ezekiel7:11 Ngoltol ngamtatna in khansiat seksolna tam piangsak vaial hi. Amate ii neisa a hauna a phatna
Ezekiel7:12 A hun hong theng hi. Vanh lei vanh zuak sia khiakna a nei nawn ngawl tu ni hong nai hi
Ezekiel7:13 Sumvawt a kuama po in
Ezekiel7:14 Lemle kitum a mihing theampo kithoai khol hi; ahihang kuama ngalsim tu in kuan ngawl hi
Ezekiel7:15 Lampite ah ngal kisimna om a
Ezekiel7:16 Pawlkhatte sia leikuamte pan a lau vakhute bangin mual tungah suakta to tu hi. A mawna uh hu in amate theampo mau tu uh hi.
Ezekiel7:17 A kuama po ii khutte sia thazawm tu a
Ezekiel7:18 Amate in khau-ip puan silhin liing ngawp tu uh hi. A lute uh kimeet tol tu a
Ezekiel7:19 Amate in a khamh le a ngunnte lampi ah ninteak bangin vawk tu uh hi
Ezekiel7:20 Khatvei lai in amate ii a et hoi suang manphate kiphatsakpui hikale tu in amate in tuate sia a kiihuai milimte vawtna in zangh uh hi. Tua hu in Topa in amate haunate huatsasak hi.

Ezekiel10:1 Cherub te ii lu tung san ah a kikhup siin sia ka en a
Ezekiel10:2 Pathian in puanneal a silh pa tungah “Cherub te ii nuai
Ezekiel10:3 Cherub te sia ama ii tum laitakin Biakinnpi thang sangah ding uh hi
Ezekiel10:4 Topa ii omna po ah khuavak taang velvol sia cherub te kung pan kikhaangto a Biakinn tumna ah kikhiin hi. Tua zawkciang meeikaai in Biakinnpi tuam a
Ezekiel10:5 Cherub te thaphil nging sia a suumsung puanung ngawngawn dongin kiza hi. Tua awnging sia Vaanglianpipa Pathian ii aw bang ahi hi.
Ezekiel10:6 Topa in puanneal a silh pa tungah cherub te ii nuai a muite kawm pan meikuang la tu in sawl hi. Tua pa pai in tua a mui khat ii hui ah ding hi.
Ezekiel10:7 Cherub te sung pan khat in
Ezekiel10:8 Cherub khat simin a thakhui nuai tek ah mihing khut bang veu a nei ka mu hi.
Ezekiel10:9 A kibang linlian mui li zongh ka mu hi
Ezekiel10:10 
Ezekiel10:11 Cherub te a kikhiin uh ciang
Ezekiel10:12 Amate ii pumte
Ezekiel10:13 Hi a muite sia ka mangmu maksak sungah ka mute taw ma kibang hi.
Ezekiel10:14 Cherub sim in maitang li veu nei uh hi. A masa phitbel sia khuital maitang
Ezekiel10:15 (Tuate sia Chebar Ngunhui ah ka mu cherub te ma ahi uh hi). Cherub te vui sungah kikhaangto in
Ezekiel10:16 a kikhiin uh ciangin a muite in zui uh hi. Amate in leang tu in a thate a phil uh simin a muite in a zui lai uh hi.
Ezekiel10:17 Cherub te a tawlngak uh ciang a muite zongh tawlnga uh hi; tuaciang cherub te a len uh ciang a muite in zui uh hi; banghang ziam cile cherub te in a muite a uk uh hi.
Ezekiel10:18 Tuasia zawkciang Topa ii ompuina po ah khuavak taang velvol sia in Biakinnpi tumna mun nusia in cherub te ii tungsia mun khat ah kikhiin hi.
Ezekiel10:19 Amate in a thate phalhin
Ezekiel10:20 Chebar Ngunhui Israel ii Pathian nuai ah ka mu sa cherub te ma hi ci sia ka tel hi.
Ezekiel10:21 Amate sim in maitang li tek
Ezekiel10:22 A maitangte sia Chedar Ngunhui ah ka mu maitang te taw kibang linlian hi. Cherub sim in a maisang tek ah tang takin kikhiin uh hi.

Ezekiel13:4 Israel mite awng
Ezekiel13:5 Amate in luphung cimhna munte cing ngawl a
Ezekiel13:6 Amate mukholna sia maan ngawl a
Ezekiel13:7 Amate munah ka ci hi: Tua na mukhol uhte maan ngawl a
Ezekiel13:8 Tua ahikom Vaanglianpipa Topa in amate tungah “Noma kammalte sia maan ngawl a
Ezekiel13:9 A maan ngawl mukholna te le lamkhialsak tu sonkholnate a nei no kamsaangte daan kong pia tu hi. Thukhen tu in ka mite a kikhop ciang
Ezekiel13:10 “Kamsaangte in ka mite sia na theampo pha hi a ci na taw lamkhialsak uh hi. Na theampo pha siat ngawl het hi! Ka mite in luphung sia suang thawthongte taw ciang a
Ezekiel13:11 A luphung cimhtham tu hi ci in kamsaangte son vun. Buak bangin ngua ka zusak tu hi. A tungah ngialtangte hong kia tu a
Ezekiel13:12 Luphung sia topcip tu hi. Mihing theampo in leikaang tui ii kimanna sia bang ziam ci in nang hong dongh tu uh hi
Ezekiel13:13 Tu in hisia Vaanglianpipa Topa ii pauna hi: “Ka thin uukna taw luphung susia tu in vuipi thahat khat
Ezekiel13:14 Amate ii leikaang taw a zut luphung sia vaat thapsak tu
Ezekiel13:15 “Luphung le tua luphung leikaang taw a zutte in ka thin uukna ii thahatna a thuak tu uh hi. Tuasia ciangin

Ezekiel16:2 Ama in
Ezekiel16:3 Vaanglianpipa Topa in Jerusalem tungah a ci teng son in: “Nang sia Canaan ngam ah piang ni hi. Na pa sia Amor mi hi a
Ezekiel16:4 Na sua lai in kuama in na lai hong tan ngawl
Ezekiel16:5 Kuama in nang atu hite hong vawtsak za tu in hesuakna hong nei ngawl hi. Na sua lai in kuama in hong it ngawl hi. Nang sia lozau sung a hong kivawk hi.
Ezekiel16:6 “Tuaciangin kei kong pai a
Ezekiel16:7 Thingno ciidam bangin kong khangsak hi. A thahatin na khang tawto a
Ezekiel16:8 “Nang kaantanin kong pai kik ciang
Ezekiel16:9 “Tua zawkciang
Ezekiel16:10 A kizeam puantual kong silhsak a
Ezekiel16:11 Suang manphate — haak le khite taw kong zeam hi.
Ezekiel16:12 Naakbaa le bilbaate
Ezekiel16:13 Khamh le ngunn taw kivawt kizepnate na nei a
Ezekiel16:14 Ngam theampo ah sitbaang ngawl mealphatna taw na minthang hi
Ezekiel16:15 “Ahihang na mealphatna le na minthanna te suangin hong pai po na luppui hi.
Ezekiel16:16 Na puansilh pawlkhatte na biakpiakna munte zepna in na nei a
Ezekiel16:17 Ngunn le khamh kizepna kong piakte la in
Ezekiel16:18 A kizeam puan kong piakte sia tua milimte na silhsak a
Ezekiel16:19 Na neak tu an — anvui phabel
Ezekiel16:20 “Tuaciangin kei taw na nei tapate tanute la in
Ezekiel16:21 ka tate milim biakna in na nei bua zong
Ezekiel16:22 Pumpi zuakin a thasiathuai na nuntak sungah na no lai hun — na chisan sungah na pumnguakin na kisasaan lai hun
Ezekiel16:23 Vaanglianpipa Topa in
Ezekiel16:24 lampi hui sim ah milim biak natu mun le pumpi zuak natu mun na vawt hi.
Ezekiel16:25 Na mealphatnate buan na noai zo hi. Hong pai pawpo kungah nangma le nangma na ki aap a
Ezekiel16:26 A lan mama na innpaam Egypt te taw na lumkhawm a
Ezekiel16:27 “Tu in nang daan kong piak natu in ka khut ka laamto zo a
Ezekiel16:28 “Banghang ziam cile midangte in hong lungkimsak ngawl a hikom Assyria te na del hi. Nang sia amate atu pumpi zuak na hi a
Ezekiel16:29 Sumvawt minam Babylon te a tu zongh pumpi zuak khat na hi hi
Ezekiel16:30 Vaanglianpipa Topa pauna hisia hi: “Nang in a maizum maw pumpi zuak khat bangin hi teng na seam hi.
Ezekiel16:31 Lampi lian theampo tungah milim biakna tu le pumpi kizuak natu omna munte na vawt hi. Ahihang pumpi kizuak pawpo bangin sum dei na hi bua hi.
Ezekiel16:32 Nang sia na pasal na it taangin khualmite taw palngul mawna a vawvawt numei sia taw na kibang hi.
Ezekiel16:33 Pumpi zuak khat sia sum taw kithamh hi
Ezekiel16:34 Nang sia a tumpian pumpi zuak nam na hi hi. Kuama in tuabang khat na sua natu in zawthawk thu taw hong vawt om ngawl hi. Nang hong kithamh ngawl a; nangma in amate na pia hi! Hi hi
Ezekiel16:35 Tua ahiciang tu in
Ezekiel16:36 Hi sia Vaanglianpipa Topa ii ci hi: “Pumpi zuak numei khat bangin
Ezekiel16:37 Hi sia hu in na lawmluite theampo — na etsat
Ezekiel16:38 Palngul mawna le mihing thana taw kong ningkhiin tu a
Ezekiel16:39 Amate ii thahatna nuai ah nang kong koi tu a
Ezekiel16:40 Amate in nangma suang taw hong deang tu in mihonte thawn tu uh a
Ezekiel16:41 Amate in na innte hong haltumsak tu a
Ezekiel16:42 Tua zawkciangin ka thin uukna hong veng tu a
Ezekiel16:43 Na khanmoi lai in bangbangin hong phatvawt khi ziam ci sia na mangil zo hi
Ezekiel16:44 Topa in
Ezekiel16:45 Nang sia na Nu ii tanu hi takpi ni hi. Ama in a pasal le a tate huatsa hi. Na suapuinumeite taw kibang ni hi
Ezekiel16:46 “Na u nu sia saksang ah a om
Ezekiel16:47 Amate paina a khuani te zui in a thasiathuai ngamtat bang na zui ciangin na lungkim ziam? Lungkim vet ngawl ni hi. Na ngamtatna theampo sia tawmvei zawkciang amate siatna sangin lawmawk zaw ni hi.
Ezekiel16:48 Vaanglianpipa Topa in
Ezekiel16:49 Ama le a tanute sia kiphasak hi
Ezekiel16:50 Amate kiphasak in
Ezekiel16:51 “Samaria in nangma ii vawt
Ezekiel16:52 Tu in min siatna na thuak kul tu hi. Nangma ii mawnate sia na suapuinumeite ii mawna taw tee ngat ciang
Ezekiel16:53 Topa in Jerusalem tungah
Ezekiel16:54 Nangma le nangma na maizum tu a
Ezekiel16:55 Amate nuamsa kik tu a
Ezekiel16:56 Na kiphatsak thei hun lai le
Ezekiel16:57 a sia na vawtte hong kipholaak ma in
Ezekiel16:58 A thasiathuai zummawk thute nasep hu in na thuak kul hi.” Topa in son zo hi.
Ezekiel16:59 Vaanglianpipa Topa in
Ezekiel16:60 Ahihang na khanmoi lai in kong thuciamna ka kholet a
Ezekiel16:61 Na unu le na naunu na nga kik ciangin
Ezekiel16:62 Nang taw ka kamciamte ka thaksua tu a
Ezekiel16:63 Na khialnate theampo kong maisak tu a

Ezekiel17:7 “A lian mama
Ezekiel17:8 Ahihang sapitkung sia leiphana
Ezekiel17:9 “Tua ahikom
Ezekiel17:10 Hi hi
Ezekiel17:11 Topa in kei tungah
Ezekiel17:12 “Hi a langpante munah thu sonteena ii a khiakna a he uh ziam
Ezekiel17:13 Ama in kumpipa innkuanpuite khat la in
Ezekiel17:14 amate in a kithukimna sia a kepcing natu le ngal thawkikna ngam ahi ngawl natu in
Ezekiel17:15 Ahihang Judah kumpipa in leedo veve a

Ezekiel17:17 Babylon te in mihing tam mama a thalup natu in

Ezekiel18:1 Topa in kei hong paupui a

Ezekiel18:3 Vaanglianpipa Topa in
Ezekiel18:4 Mihing theampo ii nuntakna sia keima neisa hi a
Ezekiel18:5 “Mihing a pha takpi khat om ci in ngaisun tawng.
Ezekiel18:6 Ama in Israel te ii milimte bia ngawl hi
Ezekiel18:7 Ama in kuama theam ngawl
Ezekiel18:8 Ama in a meet deina in sum pukthaak ngawl hi. A sia vawt tu nial a
Ezekiel18:9 Tuabang mihing khat in ka thupiakte zui a
Ezekiel18:10 “Tua zawkciang
Ezekiel18:11 a pa ii vawt ngeingawl hi bang phat ngawlnate vawt hi ci in ngaisun tawng. Ama in a kikhaam biakna munte ah
Ezekiel18:12 Ama in a zawngte theam a
Ezekiel18:13 tuaciang

Ezekiel18:16 ahibuale kuama nengcip ngawl
Ezekiel18:17 Siatna vawt tu nial a
Ezekiel18:18 A pa ahile ngualtheam in

Ezekiel18:21 “Mihing ngilo khat in mawna vawt nawn ngawlin
Ezekiel18:22 A mawna theampo kimaisak tu a

Ezekiel19:1 Israel te kumpi tapate nii atu in hi khuangai lasa tu in Topa in kei hong sawl hi:
Ezekiel19:2 Na nu uh sia tawpipui bangza ma a hi bua ziam! Ama in a note sia a kiitakhuai tawpi talte kawm ah khangsak hi.
Ezekiel19:3 A no khat khangsakin savaizia hil hi; mihingte ii sa a ne thei khat suak hi.
Ezekiel19:4 Minamte in a thu za in
Ezekiel19:5 Tua nu in a lametna a bo dong ngak hi. Tua zawkciang a no dangkhat khangsak leleau a
Ezekiel19:6 Hong khanthin tak ciang
Ezekiel19:7 Ama in kulhte susia in khua te lalcipsak hi. Ama a hawk simin ngamsung mite lau mama uh hi.
Ezekiel19:8 Minamte in ama do tu in mun tuatuam pan pai in kikhawm uh hi; mun theampo pan mite hong pai uh hi. Amate in a sa siana ngeen hong phalh a
Ezekiel19:9 Bawm khat sungah khumin Babylon kumpipa kungah paipui uh hi. Amate in a hawk a kizaak kik ngei nawn ngawl natu in Israel mualte tungah cing uh hi.
Ezekiel19:10 Na nu sia luihui ah a kisuan sapitkung khat taw kibang hi. Tui tam ahikom
Ezekiel19:11 A baakte sia takin kho a
Ezekiel19:12 Ahihang a thin uuk khutte in a zung pan longhto in lei ah vawk uh hi. Nisuana vui in a ngate kosak hi. A baakte kithiaktan a; ko in kihaltum hi.
Ezekiel19:13 Tu in tua sia sennealngamsung tui om ngawlna lei kona ah kisuan hi.
Ezekiel19:14 A kung zikpi sia mei in kaangh a; a baakte le a ngate kaanghtum hi. A baakte bangma hunin takin kho kik ngeingawl tu a
Ezekiel20:1 Saltaang in ka om zawk uh a kum sali
Ezekiel20:2 Tua zawkciang Topa in hong paupui hi.
Ezekiel20:3 “A thithei mihing awng
Ezekiel20:4 “A thithei mihing awng
Ezekiel20:5 Ka ci teng son in. Israel ka teal lai in kamciam khat ka pia hi. Egypt ngam amate kungah ka kilangh a
Ezekiel20:6 Tuasia lai in amate Egypt ngam pan pusuapui in leitang teng po pan a phabel
Ezekiel20:7 A kiihuai milim a it te vawkin
Ezekiel20:8 Ahihang amate in kei hong nalh a
Ezekiel20:9 Ahihang tua bangin ka ngamta bua hi
Ezekiel20:10 “Tua ahikom Egypt ngam pan sennealngam ah ka paipui hi.
Ezekiel20:11 Ama te tungah a zui pawpo nuntakna a pia thupiak te ka nei a
Ezekiel20:12 Koma kilaklaw thukimna limlakna in Sabbath tanna ka vawt a
Ezekiel20:13 Ahihang sennealngamsung ngawngawn ah kei hong nalh uh hi. Ama te in a zui pawpo nuntakna a pia ka thukham te paltan a
Ezekiel20:14 Ahihang Egypt ngam pan Israel mite ka pusuapui hong mu minamte sungah ka mindai tu ahikom tuabangin ka ngamta bua hi.
Ezekiel20:15 Tua ahikom sennealngam ah kamciam khat ka pia a
Ezekiel20:16 Kiciamna ka vawt sia banghang ziam cile amate in ka thupiakte nial in
Ezekiel20:17 “Ahihang amate hesuak huai ka sa hi. Tua mun sennealngam ah thalup ngawl tu in ka khensat hi.
Ezekiel20:18 Tua taangin
Ezekiel20:19 Keima in Topa na Pathian ka hi hi. Ka thukhamte le ka thupiakte zui vun.
Ezekiel20:20 Sabbath sia ni thiangtho khat hisak vun a
Ezekiel20:21 “Ahihang tua khang kikte zongh in kei hong nalh uh hi. Amate in ka thukhamte paltan a
Ezekiel20:22 Ahihang Egypt ngam pan Israel mite ka pusuapui hong mu minamte mai ah ka mindai tu ahikom tuabangin ka ngamta bua hi.
Ezekiel20:23 Tua ahikom sennealngam ah kamciam dang khat ka pia hi. Amate leitung theampo ah thethaang tu in ka kiciam hi.
Ezekiel20:24 Hi bang a ka hi sia banghang ziam cile amate in ka thupiakte nial a
Ezekiel20:25 “Tuasia ciang thukham pha ngawlte le nuntakna a piangsak ngawl thupiak te ka pia hi.
Ezekiel20:26 A biakpiakna te taw amate ka ninsak a
Ezekiel20:27 “Tua ahiciang tu in a thithei mihing awng
Ezekiel20:28 Ka piak tu a kamciam ka piaksa ngam ah ka paipui hi. Mualsaangte le thingkung hing te a mu uh ciang amate in tuate theampo tungah sangaw biakpiakna pia uh hi. A sangaw meihal biakpiakna le sapittui biakpiakna te in kei hong thin uuksak hi.
Ezekiel20:29 Keima in na zot uh munsaangte bang hi kabel ziam ci in amate ka dongh hi. Tua ahikom tua hun pan kipan ‘Mun Saangte’ kici suak hi.
Ezekiel20:30 Tu in Israel mite munah Vaanglianpipa Topa keima ci teng son in: banghangin na taanghpupite mawna vawt teng ma vawt hamtang in a milimte ma dedel tu nu ziam?
Ezekiel20:31 Tuni dong ngawngawn in na piak ngei tengma pia in
Ezekiel20:32 Mi nam dang te le ngamdang a teang mite taw kibangin thing le suang a bia te bang suak nuam in na thin uh khensat zo nu hi. Ahihang tuabang suak ngeingawl tu hi.
Ezekiel20:33 “Kei
Ezekiel20:34 Na kithethaang na ngam theampo pan kong khoptua kik tak ciang ka thin uukna le ka thahatna kong lak tu hi.
Ezekiel20:35 ‘Minamte ii Sennealngam’ a kici na ah kong paipui tu a
Ezekiel20:36 Sinai Sennealngam ah na taanghpupite ka puavawk bangin tu in kong puavawk tu hi
Ezekiel20:37 “Ngat takin no kong uk tu a
Ezekiel20:38 No sung pan hong langpan theite le mi mawte ka lakeak tu hi. Tu a
Ezekiel20:39 Vaanglianpipa Topa in
Ezekiel20:40 Tua ngamsung ka mual thiangtho Israel mual saang tungah no Israel mite theampo in kei nong bia tu uh hi. No tungah ka lungkim tu a
Ezekiel20:41 Na kithethaang na ngamte panin kong kaikhop zawkciang
Ezekiel20:42 Na taanghpupite tungah piak tu in ka ciamsa ngam
Ezekiel20:43 Tuasia ciang a thasiathuai na vawt theampo taw noma le noma bangza in kininsak nu ziam ci sia na phawk kik tu uh hi. Siatna na vawtte theampo hu in noma le noma na kithasiat sua tu uh hi.
Ezekiel20:44 A zatak huai ka vaang ka huuk ciangin no Israel te in Kei
Ezekiel20:45 Topa in kei hong paupui hi.
Ezekiel20:46 Ama in

Ezekiel20:49 Ahihang keima in ka nial a

Ezekiel22:12 Na mite pawlkhat in sum ne in ngual that uh hi. Pawlkhatte sia

Ezekiel23:1 Topa in kei hong paupui hi.
Ezekiel23:2 Ama in
Ezekiel23:3 A khanmoi lai in Egypt ngam ah ngaknu thiangtho a hina bosua a
Ezekiel23:4 A u zaw ii min sia Oholah (ama sia Samaria taang) hi
Ezekiel23:5 Oholah sia keima aa hi napi a pumpi zuak ma seam suakin Assyria pan a lawmpate taw omkhop tu lungngul mama hi
Ezekiel23:6 Amate sia puan sandup a kibang a silh ngalkapte
Ezekiel23:7 Ama sia Assyria uliante theampo ii zak pumpi zuak nu hi a
Ezekiel23:8 Egypt ngam ah ngaknu thiangtho a hina bosua a
Ezekiel23:9 Tua ahikom a dei mama Assyria a lawmpate tungah ama ka aap hi.
Ezekiel23:10 Amate in a puan suutsakin a pumnguak a koi zawkciang
Ezekiel23:11 “A suapuinu Oholibah in mu ahihang ama sia Oholah sangin zongh khai zaw a
Ezekiel23:12 Tuanu zongh Assyria nampite
Ezekiel23:13 Ama sia paktat cip a
Ezekiel23:14 “Ama sia paktatna sungah a thuksuk vaial in kidia hi. Ama sia Babylon uliante ii limte pang tungah kingelh a
Ezekiel23:15 
Ezekiel23:16 Ama in tua limte a mu po ciang uukna taw kidim a
Ezekiel23:17 Babylon te sia ama taw omkhawm tu in hong pai uh hi. Amate in ama nasia zak mama in
Ezekiel23:18 Ama le ama sia mipi mai ah kipholaak in pumpi zuak nu a hina a kuama theampo in hesak hi. A suapuinu kiihuai ka sak za ma in ama zongh kiihuai ka sa hi.
Ezekiel23:19 Ama sia a khai zaw seseam pumpi zuak khat hong suak a
Ezekiel23:20 Ama in siphu ahibuale laa tal te lanna taw a kidim pasalte taw omkhop tu lungngul hi.”
Ezekiel23:21 (Oholibah awng
Ezekiel23:22 “Tu ahile Oholibah awng
Ezekiel23:23 Babylon te le Chaldean te theampo
Ezekiel23:24 Amate in siphu ngalleang le vanh puakna leangte kengin ngalkaphonpi khat taw saksang pan hong sim tu uh hi. Lum le thik lukhu taw kidalin nang hong kiim uum tu hi. Nang sia amate tungah kong aap tu a
Ezekiel23:25 Nang tungah thin uuk ka hikom amate zongh a thin uukna taw diangsak tu khi hi. Na naak le na bilte hong at tansak tu a
Ezekiel23:26 Na puansilh lai hong laaikeaksak tu a
Ezekiel23:27 Egypt ngam ah na om lai pan kipan na sikvil na loklenna te le a maizumhuai na ngamtatnate kong khealsak tu hi. Milimte na en nawn buatu a
Ezekiel23:28 Hisia Vaanglianpipa Topa ii ci ahi hi: “Na ngaimawk le kiihuai na sak mite khut sungah nang kong aap tu hi.
Ezekiel23:29 Tuaciang amate in nang hong ensan ahikom
Ezekiel23:30 hi teng na tungah hong tungsak hi. Nang sia ngam tuatuam te a tu pumpi zuak na hi a
Ezekiel23:31 Na suapuinu ii khuani teng ma zui na hikom
Ezekiel23:32 Vaanglianpipa Topa in
Ezekiel23:33 Nang hong lungmangsak tu a
Ezekiel23:34 Na dawn tu a na dawnkang tu hi
Ezekiel23:35 Tu in hisia Vaanglianpipa Topa ii ci ahi hi: “Kei hong mangil in hong nungngat na hi ciang na sikvilna le na pumpi zuakna hu in ngim na thuak tu hi.”
Ezekiel23:36 Topa in kei tungah
Ezekiel23:37 Amate in palngul mawna le mihing thana vawt zo hi — palngul mawna sia milimte taw vawt a
Ezekiel23:38 Tua teng bek vawt ngawl hi. Ka Biakinnpi ninsakin
Ezekiel23:39 Ka tate milim biakpiakna in a thalup ni mama in ka Biakinnpi ah hong pai in ninsak uh hi!
Ezekiel23:40 “Amate in ngam khualana ah a om pasalte tungah kamtaite pehialin paisak kikikin samsak uh a
Ezekiel23:41 Amate tokhum hoi khat tungah to in
Ezekiel23:42 Sennealngam panin hong kipaipui pasal honkhat ahi bangma thinngimna a nei ngawl mihon khat ii aw kiza thei hi. Amate in numeite ii baan ah haak bulsakin a lu tungah a hoi kumpi lukhute a khusak uh hi.
Ezekiel23:43 Keima le keima ka kici na ah
Ezekiel23:44 Amate in hi pumpi zuakte kungah pai kikik uh hi. Amate in tua a paktat Oholah le Oholibah te kung zuan kikik uh hi.
Ezekiel23:45 Mihing thutang te in amate sia palngul mawna le mihing thana vawt nu hi ci in a ningkhiin tu uh hi
Ezekiel23:46 Hisia in Vaanglianpipa Topa ii ci ahi hi: “A lausak tu le a suttol tu in a ngilo nuam honkhat hong paipui tavun.
Ezekiel23:47 Tua mi ngilote in suang taw deang tahen a
Ezekiel23:48 Amate paktat ngamtat bang palngul mawna vawt ngawlin numei a minpiang ii a kidop thei natu in ngamsung teng ah paktat nate ka khealsak tu hi.
Ezekiel23:49 Tuaciang no unau numei niite — noma paktatna le milim biakna mawnate hu in daan kong pia tu hi. Tuasia ciang Keima sia Vaanglianpipa Topa ka hi hunlam nong he tu uh hi.”
Ezekiel24:1 Sal ka tan zawk a kum kua kum
Ezekiel24:2 Ama in
Ezekiel24:3 Hong langpan ka mite munah Keima
Ezekiel24:4 Sabak a phabel teng thasuk vun — saliangte le sapheite — a ngu limci belte zongh beal dim thasuk vun.
Ezekiel24:5 A phabel tuute ii sa zangh vun; beal nuai ah thing thut vun. Tui sosak vun; a ngu le a sate sosak vun.”
Ezekiel24:6 Hisia Vaanglianpipa Topa ii ci nop teng hi: “Mihing thatte ii khuapi sia a lal ahi hi! Ama sia a kinawt ngeingawl beal kaangh kheangh taw kibang hi. Sate bak khat zawkciang bak khat kithuuk a
Ezekiel24:7 Khuapi sungah mihing kithat hi
Ezekiel24:8 Tuabang a kiseal thei ngawlna munah chisan ka nusia zo a
Ezekiel24:9 Hisia Vaanglianpipa Topa ii ci ahi hi: “Mihing thatte ii khuapi sia a lal ahi hi! Keima mama in thingkangte ka sia to tu hi.
Ezekiel24:10 Thingkang a tamzaw lai hong paipui tavun! Mei zaap vun! A sa huan vun! Satui so kangsak vun! A ngute kaanghthamsak vun!
Ezekiel24:11 Tu in taau bealhawm sia a san dongin meikam tungah suang vun. Tua hile a kheangh teng kaanghin
Ezekiel24:12 ahizong tua kheangh theampo meikuang sungah bo tuan ngawl tu hi.
Ezekiel24:13 Jerusalem awng paktat ngamtatnate in nang hong niinsak zo hi. Thiansua tu in kong hanciam hangin na nin veve lai hi. Ka thin uukna a cingin na thuak mateng na thiangtho kik buatu hi.

Ezekiel24:22 Tuasia ciang keima ngamtat sa bangma in na ngamta tu uh hi. Na maitang uh seal ngawlin
Ezekiel24:23 Lukhu khu ngawl ahibuale peangnguakin vak heak vun a

Ezekiel26:2 Ama in
Ezekiel26:3 “Tua ahile tu in hisia Keima
Ezekiel26:4 Amate in na khuapi kulh luphungte siasak tu uh a
Ezekiel26:5 Tuipi sungah a dok tua suangpi sia tungah ngasa paaite in a ngeen uh a pho tu uh hi. Keima
Ezekiel26:6 tuaciang a namsau uh taw a ngam sungah a om khuate sungah a teang mite thatlum tu uh hi. Tuasia ciang Tyre in Topa ka hi sia hong he tu hi
Ezekiel26:7 Vaanglianpipa Topa in
Ezekiel26:8 Ngam sungah a om khuate sungah a teangte ngal kidona sungah kithatlum tu uh hi. Ngalte in kanhte to in
Ezekiel26:9 Amate in na kidalna kulhte sia sukthapna moltumte taw suu in na ngal vilna tausaangte thikpumte taw vaattan tu uh hi.

Ezekiel26:11 A siphu ngalkapte in na lampite zui in hong nawk a
Ezekiel26:12 Na ngalte in noma hauna uh le na sumbuk vanh zuakte tang tu uh hi. Noma luphungte cimhthamsak in
Ezekiel26:13 Na lasak uhte ka tawlngasak tu a
Ezekiel26:14 Ngasa paaite ii ngeen a pho thei natu in suangpi khat bek kong nusiat tu hi. Khuapi sia kisa kik ngeingawl tu hi. Keima
Ezekiel26:15 Vaanglianpipa Topa in Tyre tungah
Ezekiel26:16 Tuipi tungah a vak a cia minamte ii kumpi theampo in kumpi tokhum panin tuak tu uh hi. Amate in a puantual te le a kizepna puansilhte suutin
Ezekiel26:17 Amate in hi mithi vui la sia nang hong sak tu uh hi: Khuapi minthang sia kilalcipsak zo hi! A teambawte tuipi panin bocip zo hi. Hi khuapi ah a teang mite in tuipite uk hi

Ezekiel27:7 Na teambaw puankhak uh sia puanneal taw kivawt hi

Ezekiel42:19 
Ezekiel42:20 tuabangin a pang ii lang le lang ah a pangh li teng a kikim
Ezekiel43:1 Tua pa in nisuana sang a nga kongpi ah kei hong paipui a
Ezekiel43:2 tualai ah Israel te ii Pathian ii ompuina ahi khuavak taang velvol khat nisuana sang pan hong pai ka mu hi. Tui kihual nging bangin
Ezekiel43:3 Hi mukholna in Pathian ii Jerusalem khua siasak tu hong pai lai in ka mu sia le Chebar ngunhui ah ka mu mukholna khat taw kibang hi. Tuaciang
Ezekiel43:4 Khuavak taang velvol sia in nisuana kongpi kaantan a
Ezekiel43:5 Topa ii thaa in kei hong laamto in
Ezekiel43:6 Tua munah tua pa sia ka kungah hong ding a
Ezekiel43:7 “A thithei mihing awng
Ezekiel43:8 Kumpite in a kumpi inn kongkha khuamte le a saamkiilte sia ka Biakinnpi kongkha le kongkha saamkiilte nealin vawt a
Ezekiel43:9 Tu in amate sia pathian dangte bia nawn ngawl tu a
Ezekiel43:10 Topa in a pau zom a
Ezekiel43:11 A vawt sate hu in a mai uh a zum le
Ezekiel43:12 Hi thu sia Biakinnpi thukham ahi hi: Biakinnpi omna mualdawn le a kiimkot mun theampo sia ciliaphuai in thiangtho hi
Ezekiel43:13 Hite sia biaknatau teenate ahi hi. Biakinnpi teena ah a kizangh piciang pikhaute ma kizangh hi. Biakinnpi ii a bul kiimkot ah centimetre 50 a thuk
Ezekiel43:14 Biaknatau nuainungbel khen sia a dawn pan a bul metre 1 saang hi. A khen kik sia a kiil pan a nungah centimetre 50 zai in a kiimkot ah kivawt a
Ezekiel43:15 A tungbel dawl biakpiaknate halna sia zongh metre 2 saang hi. A king li tungah a dokte sia a dawn dangte saangin saangzaw hi.
Ezekiel43:16 Biaknatau dawn sia a kikim pangh li nei hi a
Ezekiel43:17 A laizang khen zongh a dung a vai kikim a
Ezekiel43:18 Vaanglianpipa Topa in
Ezekiel43:19 Zadok suan le paal ahi Levi minam thiampite bek in keima ompuina ah hong pai in ka na seam tu uh hi. Keima
Ezekiel43:20 Nang in a chi pawlkhat na la tu a
Ezekiel43:21 Mawphel biakpiakna in a kipia khuital sia nang in na la tu a
Ezekiel43:22 A zing ciangin a mealhem ngawl kealtal khat kengin mawphel biakpiakna in pia tu ni hi. Biaknatau sia khuital chi taw na thiansua bangma in
Ezekiel43:23 Tua teng na man zawkciang
Ezekiel43:24 keima kungah hong paipui ta'n. Thiampite in tua cherub te tungah ci al the tu a
Ezekiel43:25 Ni sali sung ni simin mawphel biakpiakna in keal khat
Ezekiel43:26 Ni sali sung thiampite in biaknatau aap tu a
Ezekiel43:27 Tua nipi kaal a bo zawkciang thiampite in meihal biakpiakna le mite kipawlkhop biakpiaknate biaknatau tungah a piak kipan tu uh hi. Tua hun ciang note theampo tungah ka lungdam tu hi. Keima
Ezekiel44:1 Tua pa in biakinn mun nisuana sangah a om a puasang kongpi ah hong paipui hi. Kongpi kikhak a
Ezekiel44:2 Topa in kei tungah
Ezekiel44:3 Ngamukpa ahile keima omna ah a thiangtho an ne tu in pai thei tu hi. Ama in kongpi vang pan sungtanna inndoi lian sia tawn a
Ezekiel44:4 Tuaciang tua pa in saksang kongpi tawnin Biakinnpi mai ah kei hong paipui hi. Ka et ciang Topa Biakinnpi sia ama ompuina khuavak taang velvol sia taw kidim ka mu hi. Keima le keima lei ah ka boksuk hi
Ezekiel44:5 tuaciang Topa in kei tungah
Ezekiel44:6 “Israel mi kei hong langpante tungah
Ezekiel44:7 Keima sangaw biakpiakna ii a thau le a chi hong kipiak ciangin amate in ka thu a ni ngawl
Ezekiel44:8 Ka Biakinnpi sungah a zeksa a thiangtho biakpiaknate ah amate in uk ngawlin ngamdangmite in uksak zaw uh hi.
Ezekiel44:9 “Keima
Ezekiel44:10 Topa in kei tungah
Ezekiel44:11 Amate in ka Biakinnpi sungah kongpite cingin Biakinnpi nasepte seamin keima na a seam thei tu uh hi. Amate in mihingte ii meihal le sangaw biakpiakna ah a piak nganhing te ngo thei tu a
Ezekiel44:12 Ahihang amate in Israel mite atu in milim biakna vawtsak a
Ezekiel44:13 Amate in thiampite bangin keima ii na seam ngawl tu hi
Ezekiel44:14 Biakinnpi sungah nasep nawno teng sia amate sep tu in ka see tu hi
Ezekiel44:15 Vaanglianpipa Topa in
Ezekiel44:16 Amate bekma ka Biakinnpi sung tum in biaknatau ah seam tu a
Ezekiel44:17 Amate Biakinnpi suum sungnung paina kongpi vang a tum ciangin puanneal silh tu uh hi. Biakinnpi suum sungnung
Ezekiel44:18 A khua ul ngawl natu in amate in puanneal dial khim tu a
Ezekiel44:19 Mihonpite omna suum puanung ah a pai ma in
Ezekiel44:20 “Thiampite in a sam meettol ngawl tu a
Ezekiel44:21 Thiampite in suum sungnung ah a pai ma in
Ezekiel44:22 Thiampi khat in a kikhul sa numei khat teenpui ngawl tu hi; Israel numei thiangtho khat ahibuale thiampi dang khat ii zi
Ezekiel44:23 “Thiampite in ka mite tungah biakna taw kisai a thiangtho le a thiangtho ngawlte kilamdanna le a zeksa ngeina thiangtho le a thiangtho ngawlte hil tu hi.
Ezekiel44:24 Thukhen tu thu khat a pian ciang
Ezekiel44:25 “Thiampi khat sia mithi luang a thamna taw in zeksa ngeina taw in nin tu hi
Ezekiel44:26 Ama a thiantho kik zawkciang
Ezekiel44:27 tuaciang Biakinnpi suum sungnung ah pai in
Ezekiel44:28 “Israel tungah ka piaksa khang khat pan khang dangkhat ah a ki aap susuk tu thiampiza sia thiampite ii a saan tel ahi hi. Israel ngam ah thiampite in nei le lamh nei ngawl tu a; amate kisap theampo sia keima ka hi hi.
Ezekiel44:29 Antang taw biakpiakna
Ezekiel44:30 Thiampite in anpal teng sung pan a limci belte le kei tungah a dang hong kipia theampo tang tu uh hi. Mihingte in anluum a em simin
Ezekiel44:31 Ama thu in a thi thawthong vacim le nganhing ii sa ahibuale nganhing dang khat ii thalup sia ii sa thiampite in ne ngawl tu uh hi
Ezekiel45:1 Minam sim tungah piak tu leitang khenin a kihawm ciang
Ezekiel45:2 Hi munah Biakinnpi atu a pangh a kikim king li nei khen khat om tu a
Ezekiel45:3 Hi mun ii lang
Ezekiel45:4 Tuasia ngam ii a thiangthona mun khat hi tu a
Ezekiel45:5 A dang a mun lang teng sia Biakinnpi ah a seam Levi te neisa in kikoituam tu hi. Tua munah amate teenna tu khuate om tu hi.
Ezekiel45:6 A thiangtho mun ii zom ah kilometre 12.5 a sau
Ezekiel45:7 Kumpipa atu leitang zongh kikoituam tu hi. Mun thiangtho ii nitumna ngamngi pan nitumna sang Mediterranean tuipi dong; nisuana ngamngi pan nisuana sang ngam mong dong hi tu a
Ezekiel45:8 Hi mun sia kumpipa ii nga tu Israel ngam leitang hi tu hi
Ezekiel45:9 Vaanglianpipa Topa in
Ezekiel45:10 “Mihing sim in a ngit teena maan le teena maante a zak kul tu hi.
Ezekiel45:11 “A ko teena ephahs sia a tui teena bath taw kibang tu hi. Homer sia zak maanbel teena ahi hi. Teenate a nuai a bang ahi hi: 1 homer = 10 ephahs = 10 baths
Ezekiel45:12 “A ngit teenate a nuai a bang hi tu hi: 20 gerahs = 1 shekel 60 shekels = 1 mina
Ezekiel45:13 “Hite doppha in na biakpiaknate na pia tu uh hi: Zungtaang: a piang theampo sung pan 1/60 Mangtaang: a piang theampo sung pan 1/60 Olive thau: a kungte pan a piang theampo sung pan 1/100 (Bath taw teena: 10 baths = 1 homer = 1 kor) Tuu: Israel lo hingna te pan a piangte 200 sung pan 1 “Antang taw biakpiakna
Ezekiel45:14 
Ezekiel45:15 
Ezekiel45:16 “Ngamsung mite theampo in hi biakpiaknate Israel ngamukpa kungah paipui nanak tu hi.
Ezekiel45:17 Ama in Israel minam bup ii Thadet Poaite
Ezekiel45:18 Vaanglianpipa Topa in
Ezekiel45:19 Thiampipa in mawphel biakpiakna pan a chi pawlkhat la tu a
Ezekiel45:20 Tha sim ni sali ni in
Ezekiel45:21 “Tha masabel ni sawm le ni li ni in noma in Paisan poai vawt tu in na kipan tu uh hi. mi simin ni sali sung teng tol saw ngawl anluum ne tu hi.
Ezekiel45:22 Poai ii ni masabel ni in ngamukpa in khuital khat sia ama mawna khialnate le a mite theampo ii mawna khialnate atu in mawphel biakpiakna in pia tu hi.
Ezekiel45:23 Ama in ni sali sung ni simin a mealhem ngawl khuital sali le tuutal salite Topa tungah a pum bupin meihal biakpiakna in pia tu hi. Ama in ni simin kealtal khat taw zong mawphel biakpiakna nei tu hi.
Ezekiel45:24 Khuital khat le tuutal khat sangaw biakpiakna in a kingaw simin antang taw biakpiak natu in antang litre sawm le sali le a lang le olive thau litre thum pia tu hi.
Ezekiel45:25 “Tha sali tha ni sawm le ni nga ni a kipan Buk Poai atu sia a kibang ma in mawphel biakpiakna
Ezekiel46:1 Vaanglianpipa Topa in
Ezekiel46:2 Kumpipa sia suum puanung pan kongpi vang tawnin sungtanna inndoi sungah pai tu a
Ezekiel46:3 Sabbath sim le Thadet Poai simin
Ezekiel46:4 Sabbath ni in kumpipa in Topa tungah a mealhem ngawl tuuno luk le tuutal khat
Ezekiel46:5 Ama in tuutal khat simin antang litre sawm le sali le a lang biakpiakna in paipui tu a
Ezekiel46:6 Thadet Poai sungah a mealhem ngawl khuital moi khat
Ezekiel46:7 Khuital khat le tuutal khat a piak simin
Ezekiel46:8 Kumpipa in kongpi vang ii sungtanna inndoi sia a nusiat ciang a tumna lampi sia ma zui in a pusua kul tu hi.
Ezekiel46:9 “Poai khat pawpo ah mihingte in Topa bia tu hong pai ciang
Ezekiel46:10 Kumpipa sia mihingte pai ciang tum tu a
Ezekiel46:11 Poai vawt nite le Poaite ah khuital
Ezekiel46:12 “Kumpipa in Topa tungah a thinzaw za biakpiakna sia pum bup meihal biakpiakna taw ahizong
Ezekiel46:13 Topa in
Ezekiel46:14 Zing sim biakpiakna ah zungtaang vui kilogramme 2 le tua taw hel tu in olive thau litre khat taw zong pia khawm tu hi. Topa tungah hi biakpiakna ngeinate sia a tawntungin zui tu ahi hi.
Ezekiel46:15 Tuuno
Ezekiel46:16 Vaanglianpipa Topa in thupia hi: “Kumpipa in a neisa leitang mun khat pawpo a tapate khat tungah letsongin a pia le tua tapa in tang tu a
Ezekiel46:17 Ahihang kumpipa in a neisa leitang khat pawpo sia a naseam khat po tungah a pia le Puakik Kum a thet ciang
Ezekiel46:18 Kumpipa in a mite ii neisa te peuma laaksak ngawl tu hi. Ama in a tapate tungah a piak leitang khat pawpo sia ama atu a kikoisia sung pan bek hi tu a
Ezekiel46:19 Tua zawkciang
Ezekiel46:20 tuaciang “Hi mun sia thiampite ii mawphel sangaw biakpiakna sate huan natu mun
Ezekiel46:21 Tua zawkciang ama in a suum puanung ah kei hong paipui a
Ezekiel46:22 
Ezekiel46:23 Tuate khat sim sia suang pang taw ki um a
Ezekiel46:24 Tua pa in kei tungah
Ezekiel47:1 Tua pa in Biakinnpi sung tumna ah hong heakpui kik hi. Tua tumna nuai pan tui hong phul a
Ezekiel47:2 Tuaciang tua pa in saksang kongpi lam tawnin biakinn mun pua sangah kei hong paipui a
Ezekiel47:3 Tua pa in a piciang taw nisuana sang luidung zuisuk in metre 590 tee a
Ezekiel47:4 Tua zawkciang ama in a dang metre 500 tee a
Ezekiel47:5 Ama in metre 500 tee thua a
Ezekiel47:6 Ama in kei tungah
Ezekiel47:7 tua mun ka thet ciang
Ezekiel47:8 Ama in kei tungah
Ezekiel47:9 Luitui luanna mun theampo ah nganhing namcin le ngasa namcinte om tu hi. Hi luitui in Tuipi Thi sungah tuite thiangsak tu a
Ezekiel47:10 Engedi Cik tuite panin Eneglaim Ciktuite dong tuipi vaalbo tungah ngasa mante om tu a
Ezekiel47:11 Ahihang vaalbo dungah a om buannawngte le tuicing note sungah tuite kithiangsak ngawl tu hi. Tua tuite ci al pian natu in tua munah om tawntung tu hi.
Ezekiel47:12 Lui lang le lang vaalbo tungah an tu in thingkung namcinte po tu hi. A teete vul ngeingawl tu a
Ezekiel47:13 Vaanglianpipa Topa in
Ezekiel47:14 Keima in na taanghpupite tungah hi ngam piak tu in a ciliaphuai takin ka kamciamsa hi; tu in noma sungah a kikim in hawm diimdiam vun.
Ezekiel47:15 Saksang ngamngi sia Mediterranean Tuipi pan nisuana sangah pai a
Ezekiel47:16 Berothah le Sibraim khuapite (Tua khuapite sia Damascus kumpi ngam le Hamath kumpi ngam kilaklaw ah om hi)
Ezekiel47:17 Tua ahikom saksang ngamngi sia Mediterranean pan nisuana sang Enon khuapi
Ezekiel47:18 “Nisuana sang ngamngi sia Damascus le Hauran ngam kilaklaw mun khat pan thang sangah paisuk a
Ezekiel47:19 “Thangsang ngamngi sia Tamar pan nitumna thangsang ah pai in Kadesh Meribah ciktui ah
Ezekiel47:20 “Nitumna ngamngi sia Mediterranean hi a
Ezekiel47:21 “Hi leitang sia na minamte sungah hawm vun;
Ezekiel47:22 tua sia a tawntungin noma neisa hi tu hi. Ngamdangmi noma taw a teang khawm te le hi lai munah a suak a tate zongh in leitang na hawm uh ciang a nga tu bang hawmtel saang tu uh hi. Amate sia Israel ngammi tatakte bangma in kivawt tu a
Ezekiel47:23 Ngamdangmi hong teang khat simin a teen khoppui Israel minamte taw a kibangin ama ii tel nga tu hi. Keima
Ezekiel48:1 Saksang ngamngi sia Mediterranean tuipi pan nisuana sang ah pai a

Ezekiel48:4

Ezekiel48:7 
Ezekiel48:8 Tua zom leitang khen sia a zak tuam tu in kituam koi tu hi. Hi sia saksang pan thangsang dong kilometre 12.5 zai a
Ezekiel48:9 Hi leikhen ii laisaan ah kilometre 12.5 a sau
Ezekiel48:10 Hi a thiangtho mun ii leikhawk khat sia thiampite ii neisa hi tu hi. Amate ii leikhawk sia nisuana pan nitumna ah kilometre 12:5
Ezekiel48:11 Hi mun thiangtho sia Zadok suan le paal thiampite atu ahi hi. Amate in ka na thumaan takin hong sepsak a
Ezekiel48:12 Tua ahikom amate in Levi te leitang neina mun taw kizomin muntuam khat nei tu a
Ezekiel48:13 Levi te zongh in muntuam khat nei tu a
Ezekiel48:14 Topa tungah a ki aapna mun sia leitang a phabelna mun hi a
Ezekiel48:15 A taanglai a tuam vilvel mun sia kilometre 12.5 sau in kilometre 2.5 zai a
Ezekiel48:16 tua pangh li teng kikim in
Ezekiel48:17 Khuapi kiimkot sia a pangh simin metre 125 a zai mun awng khat veu om tu hi.
Ezekiel48:18 Khuapi a kisaat zawkciang mun awng lai leitang
Ezekiel48:19 Khuapi sungah a teang pawpo akua minam ahizong tua munah lotho thei tu hi.
Ezekiel48:20 Tua ahiciang a khen laizang ah a kikoituam mun buppi sia pangh li nei tu a
Ezekiel48:21 Biakinnpi omna mun ii nisuana sang le nitumna sang ah thiampite leitang

Ezekiel48:35 Khuapi ii pangh li teng a kiim uum pang sia ii sauna kingawm sia metre 9
Daniel1:1 Jehoiakim ii Judah kumpi a sua zawk a kum thum kumin
Daniel1:2 Topa in
Daniel1:3 Kumpipa in Israel saltaangte sung pan kumpi nam le nampite tangvalno pawlkhat teal tu in a khutnuai ulianbel Ashpenaz thupia hi.
Daniel1:4 Tua a teal mihingte sia kumpi inn sungah naseam thiamte a sua thei natu in a mealhoi
Daniel1:5 Kumpi inn sungah a om mihingte bangma in amate sia ni simin an le sapittui a piak natu kumpipa in thupia si hi. Hi bangin kum thum a sin zawkciang kumpipa mai ah kilak tu uh hi.
Daniel1:6 Tuabang a kitealte sung panin Daniel
Daniel1:7 A ulianbel pa in amate sia min thak phua in: Belteshazzar
Daniel1:8 Daniel in kumpi inn sung pan a kipia an le sapittui neakna taw in ama le ama biakna sangah a kininsak ngawl natu in a thin khensat ahikom ama in Ashpenaz tungah huna ngen hi
Daniel1:9 tuaciang Pathian in Ashpenaz sia Daniel tungah hesuakna thin neisak hi.
Daniel1:10 Ahizong Ashpenaz in kumpipa kiita ahikom ama in Daniel tungah
Daniel1:11 Tuasia ciang Daniel sia ama le a lawm thum teng a uk in Ashpenaz ii a koi a cingpa kungah pai hi.
Daniel1:12 Ama in
Daniel1:13 Tua zawkciang kumpi an a ne tangvalno dangte taw hong ettee khawm ta'n a
Daniel1:14 Ashpenaz in ni sawm sung kisinsak tu in thukim hi.
Daniel1:15 A hun a cin ciang amate sia kumpi an a nete theampo sangin a ciidam tuak zaw
Daniel1:16 Tua ahikom tua ni pan kipan amate a cing pa in kumpipa ii piak an luangin anteete ne suaksak hi.
Daniel1:17 Pathian in tua tangvalno lite sia heak theina
Daniel1:18 Kumpipa ii ciangtan kum thum a cin ciang
Daniel1:19 Kumpipa in amate paupui siat a
Daniel1:20 Kumpipa in a dok pawpo ahibuale bangbang thu haksa nawno dongh kale hi mihing lite in a kumpi ngam bup a om aisaan theite le mitbum thiamte khat pawpo sangin a sawmvei in he zaw uh hi.
Daniel1:21 Daniel sia kumpi inn ah Persia kumpilianpa Cyrus ii Babylon zo in a uk dong om suak hi.
Daniel2:1 Nebuchadnezzar in kumpi a sua zawk a kum nii kumin mang khat man hi. Tua mang in ama thinngimsak mama a
Daniel2:2 tua ahikom ama tungah a mang khiakna son tu in a aisaan theite
Daniel2:3 amate tungah
Daniel2:4 Amate in Aramaic kam taw kumpipa tungah
Daniel2:5 Kumpipa in amate tungah
Daniel2:6 Ahizong ka mang le a khiakna nong son thei uh le letsong le min phatna lian kong pia tu hi. Tua ahiciang tu in
Daniel2:7 Amate in kumpipa tungah
Daniel2:8 Tuaciang
Daniel2:9 na vekpi a kibangin daan pia tu ci a ka khensat sia na heak uh hang ahi hi. Kei tungah leilot thu nong sawson uh sia na lungkim tek uh ma ahi hi
Daniel2:10 Kumpipa ii thudokte in
Daniel2:11 Kumpipa ii nong thu dokna sia haksa mama ahikom pathiante simngawl hong son thei tu kuama om ngawl hi
Daniel2:12 Tuasia ciang
Daniel2:13 Tua ahikom amate theampo thalup siat tu in thu kipia a
Daniel2:14 Tuaciang Daniel sia mihing that tu a kisawl
Daniel2:15 ama in banghangin kumpipa in tuabang thupiak nasia mama khat suaksak ziam ci in
Daniel2:16 Thakhat thu in Daniel pai a
Daniel2:17 Tua zawkciang Daniel sia inn ah cia a
Daniel2:18 Vantung Pathian in amate hesuak a
Daniel2:19 Tuasia ciang tua zanin tua thu tumdang sia Daniel mukholna sungah kipualaak hi
Daniel2:20 “Pathian sia ciim in vaanglian hi! Ama a tawntung a tawntungin pok vun.
Daniel2:21 Ama in hunte le khua hunte uk hi; ama in kumpite panmun pia a
Daniel2:22 Ama in thuthukte le thukute pualaak hi; ama in khuazing sungah a kiphualte he a
Daniel2:23 Ka taanghpupite ii Pathian awng
Daniel2:24 Tua ahiciang Daniel sia kumpipa ii thudokte that tu in a sawl pa Arioch kungah pai hi. Daniel in Arioch tungah “Kumpipa ii thudokte that heak in. Kumpipa kungah hong paipui ta'n
Daniel2:25 Thakhatin Arioch in Daniel sia Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa omna ah paipui in kumpipa tungah
Daniel2:26 Kumpipa in (Belteshazzar zongh a kici) Daniel tungah
Daniel2:27 Daniel in
Daniel2:28 Ahihang thutumdangte a pualaak vantung ah Pathian khat om hi. Ama in maisang thupiang tute
Daniel2:29 “Kumpipa awng
Daniel2:30 Tu in midangte saangin ka pil zawk man hi ngawl hi
Daniel2:31 “Kumpipa awng
Daniel2:32 Tua milim lutang sia khamh ciitak taw kivawt a; a awm le a baante sia ngunn taw kivawt in; a kawng le a khealte sia taau taw kivawt hi.
Daniel2:33 A peangte thik taw kivawt a
Daniel2:34 Tua milim na et laitak
Daniel2:35 Thakhatin thik
Daniel2:36 “Na mangmat sia tu a bang teng hi. Tu in Nangma Kumpipa tungah a khiakna kong son tu hi.
Daniel2:37 Kumpipa awng
Daniel2:38 Ama in nang sia mihing teenna leitung theampo
Daniel2:39 Nang zawkciang nangma ngam za in a lian ngawl kumpi ngamlian khat hong piang tu a
Daniel2:40 Tua zawkciang na theampo sutham in a zaansak
Daniel2:41 A peangpak le a peangmete khen khat sia thik hi a
Daniel2:42 Peangmete — khen khat thik
Daniel2:43 Thik le tungman a kihel khawm zongh na mu hi. Tua kumpi ngamlian ukte in a innkuanpuite kiteensakna taw in ngawmtua tu hanciam tu a
Daniel2:44 Tua ngamukte hun sungin
Daniel2:45 Kuama ii thuthaak ngawl bulin liang tung pan hong liik suangtum khat in thik
Daniel2:46 Tuaciang Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa lei ah kunsuk in
Daniel2:47 Kumpipa in
Daniel2:48 Tua zawkciang kumpipa in Daniel sia letsong pha tam ma pia in a za khangsak a
Daniel2:49 Daniel ii ngetna bangma in kumpipa in Shadrach
Daniel3:1 Kumpipa Nebuchadnezzar in metre 27 a saang le metre 3 dektak a lian khamh milim khat vawt a
Daniel3:2 Tua zawkciang kumpipa in a ulian theampo — kumpinote
Daniel3:3 Hi uliante theampo milim aapna vawt tu in kikhawmtua a
Daniel3:4 thu puak khat in aw nging takin au a
Daniel3:5 Lemle aw na za tu uh a
Daniel3:6 Kun in a bia ngawl peuma sia thakhat thu in a lingh meiphual sung denna kinei tu hi
Daniel3:7 Tuabangin
Daniel3:8 Tuasia ciang Babylon mite pawlkhat in Jew mite a siat son natu hunpha khat nga uh hi.
Daniel3:9 Amate in Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa tungah
Daniel3:10 Tum theite hong kitum pawpo ciang
Daniel3:11 tua milim mai ah a kun ngawl
Daniel3:12 Babylon ngam khen uk tu a na koi Nangma Kumpipa ii thu a ni ngawl — Shadrach
Daniel3:13 Tuasia po ciang kumpipa a thin uuk ngawp a
Daniel3:14 Kumpipa in amate tungah
Daniel3:15 Tua ahiciang tu in lemlete
Daniel3:16 Shadrach

Daniel4:1 Nebuchadnezzar kumpipa in leitung ah a om ngam theampo
Daniel4:2 Lianbel Pathian ii ka tungah hong lak a lamdangte le nalamdang laknate ngai vun.
Daniel4:3 “Pathian ii eite hong lak nalamdangte lian lawlawm hi! A vawt nalamdang laknate vaang nei lawlawm hi! Pathian sia a tawntungin kumpi hi a; ama in a tawntungin uk tu hi.

Daniel4:11 Tua thingkung sia van a phak dongin lian vaial in khangto a
Daniel4:12 A teete et hoi a
Daniel4:13 “Ka mukholna thu ka ngaisut laitakin khua a phawk vilvel
Daniel4:14 Ama in nging takin

Daniel4:16 Ama in kum sali sung mihing ngaisutna nei ngawl tu a
Daniel4:17 Hi thu sia a pilvang le a phawk vilvel vantunglalangte ii thukhenna ahi hi. Tua ahiciang mun theampo ah om mihing theampo in
Daniel4:18 “Ka mangmat sia hi bang hi

Daniel5:1 Zan khat Belshazzar kumpipa in a uliante tulkhat samin anneak poaipi khat vawt a

Daniel5:5 Thakhat thu in mihing khut khat kilangh a
Daniel5:6 Kumpipa lau mama in
Daniel5:7 Ama in mitbum thiamte
Daniel5:8 Tua kumpi thudokte mai ah hong pai uh a
Daniel5:9 Belshazzar kumpipa sia a thinngimna taw in a mai daang vaial a
Daniel5:10 Kumpipa ii nu in kumpipa le a uliante ngamlum lialuana aw za a an neakna inndoi sungah tum hi. Ama in
Daniel5:11 Na ngam sungah a thiangtho pathiante ii thaa a nei mihing khat om hi. Na pa kumpi ahi lai in
Daniel5:12 Ama sia a tumdang hi theina nei a
Daniel5:13 Daniel sia thakhatin kumpipa omna ah kipaipui a
Daniel5:14 A thiangtho pathiante ii thaa sia na sungah om a thiamna
Daniel5:15 Hi a ki at lai a sim tu le a khiakna hong son tu in thudokte le mitbum thiamte hong kipaipui napi amate in a khiakna he zo ngawl hi.
Daniel5:16 Nangma in a khiakna kiphualsealte le thutumdangte sonthiang thei hi

Daniel5:21 Ama sia mihing huamsung pan kihawlkeak a

Daniel5:23 Vantung Topa na langpan a

Daniel5:27 Khaitee ii a khiakna in nang sia toaitee na tungah hong kitee zo a
Daniel5:28 Kikhen ii a khiakna in na ngam kikhentham a Mede mite le Persia mite tungah kipia hi
Daniel5:29 Thakhat ma in Belshazzar in Daniel sia kumpi puantual sandup silhsak tu le minphatna khamh khi a ngawng ah awsak tu in a naseamte thupia hi. Tuaciang ama in Daniel sia a ngam sungah zalian a thumna in koi hi.

Daniel6:10 Kumpipa thukham sia kumpipa in a minthu zo hi

Daniel6:17 Kuama in Daniel a suataksak thei ngawl natu in suangtum khat taw tawpi dum vang khakin

Daniel6:19 Zingsang khuavak tuungin kumpipa tho in
Daniel6:20 Tua mun a thet ciang
Daniel6:21 Daniel in

Daniel6:27 Ama in ngum in suatak a; vantung le leitung ah a lamdangte le nalamdang laknate vawt hi. Ama in Daniel sia tawpite thalup natu pan suatak hi.”

Daniel7:1 Belshazzar ii Babylon kumpi a sep kipat kumin keima in mang khat ka man a
Daniel7:2 hi bang ahi hi: Mun theampo pan vui hong va a
Daniel7:3 Tuipi sung pan nganhing lian li pusuak a
Daniel7:4 A masabel sia tawpi taw kibang a
Daniel7:5 A niina nganhing sia a nung peangte taw a ding vompui khat taw kibang hi. Tuasia in a hate taw telngu thum pu a
Daniel7:6 Ka et laitakin nganhing khat kilangh hi. Tuasia pawlbeam taw kibang a
Daniel7:7 Ka et lalai le
Daniel7:8 Tua kiite ka salh laitak a dang kiite sungah kiino khat hong poto ka mu hi. Tua kiino in tua munah a omsa kii thumte phulkeak hi. Hi kii in mihing mittangte le kiphatsak kam a pau kam khat nei hi.
Daniel7:9 Ka et laitakin kumpi tokhumte a om natu san tek ah hong kikoi hi. A nungta tawntung mihing khat sia tua kumpi tokhumte khat tungah to hi. A puante vuuk bangin paak a
Daniel7:10 tua mun panin meikuang a kipee in hong pusuak hi. Ama ii naseam tu in mihing tul tam mama tua munah om a
Daniel7:11 Ka et laitakin tua kiino ii kiphatsakna kam a papau ka za thei lai hi. Ka et lalai ciang nganhing a lina sia kithatlum a
Daniel7:12 Nganhing dangte ahile a vaang kilaaksak a
Daniel7:13 Hi mukholna ka mu ni zanin mihing taw a kibang khat ka mu hi. Ama sia meeikaai in kiim uum in ka kung hong neak a
Daniel7:14 Ngam theampo
Daniel7:15 Ka mukholnate in hong patausak a
Daniel7:16 Tua munah a ding mihingte khat kungah ka paito a
Daniel7:17 Ama in
Daniel7:18 Tuaciang Lianbel Pathian ii mihingte in kumpi vaangletna nga tu a

Daniel7:20 A lu tung a om kii sawmte ii thu le a zawkciang hong poto a
Daniel7:21 Ka et laitakin
Daniel7:22 Tuaciang a nungta tawntung mihingpa hong pai a
Daniel7:23 Hi sia keima tungah hong kison a khiakna ahi hi: “Nganhing lina sia leitung ah a om tu kumpi ngamlian lina hi a
Daniel7:24 Kii sawmte sia tua kumpi ngamlian uk tu kumpi sawmte ahi hi. Tua zawkciang kumpi dang khat hong piang tu hi; ama sia a om masate taw kilamdang mama tu a
Daniel7:25 Ama in Lianbel Pathian sia sonsia tu a Pathian ii mihingte nengcip tu hi. Ama in amate ii biakna taw kipawl thukhamte le poai vawtnate khealsak tu in hanciam tu hi

Daniel7:28 Hi sia thu tepteena ii tawpna ahi hi. Ka lau mama hu in ka mai daang a

Daniel10:1 (Cyrus ii Persia kumpilian a sua zawk a kum thum kumin Belteshazzar a kici Daniel tungah thu khat kipualaak hi. Tua thu in thumaan ahihang telhak mama hi. Tua thu sia ama tungah mukholna taw in kisonthiang hi.

Daniel11:1 Ama in kei hong hu tu le hong dal tu in vaipuak nei hi.
Daniel11:2 Tua hi a
Daniel11:3 “Tua zawkciang ngalhang kumpi khat piang tu hi. Ama in kumpi ngamlianpi khat uk tu a
Daniel11:4 Ahizong a tha a hatbel laitakin a kumpi ngamlian kitamhtham tu a
Daniel11:5 “Egypt kumpipa thahat tu hi. Ahizong a ngalkap mang lianbelte khat sia thahat zaw lai tu a
Daniel11:6 Kum tam mama zawkciang Egypt kumpipa in Syria kumpipa taw kipawl khopna vawt tu a
Daniel11:7 Tua zawk hai ngawlin Egypt kumpipa tanu ii mealheak khat kumpi suak tu hi. Tua kumpipa in Syria kumpipa ii ngalkaphonpi sim tu a
Daniel11:8 Ama in amate ii pathian milimte le tua pathiante biak piakna in a ki aap khamh le ngunn taw kivawt nate sia Egypt ngam ah pua kik tu hi. Kum tam ma kilemin a om zawkciang
Daniel11:9 Syria kumpipa in Egypt ngam sim tu a
Daniel11:10 “Syria kumpipa ii tapate ngalsim tu in kinging tu a
Daniel11:11 Egypt kumpipa in a thin uukna taw
Daniel11:12 Ama a ngalzawna le ngalkap tam mama a thalup hu in kiphasak tu a
Daniel11:13 “Syria kumpipa cia kikin a masa a nei ngalkap phaza sang a tamzaw ngalkap khawm tu hi. A hun cing a sak ciang ama in ngalhiam vanhte taw a kinging phitphet ngalkap tam mama taw kuan kik tu hi.
Daniel11:14 Tuaciang mihing tam mama in Egypt kumpipa leedo tu uh hi. Tuaciang a mu sa mukholna khat hu in
Daniel11:15 Tua ahikom Syria kumpipa in kulh taw a ki uum khuapi khat uumci in la tu hi. Egypt ngalkapte in ngal do suak ngawl tu hi; amate sung pan a hatbel te ngawngawn zongh in thahatna a kicing nei ngawl tu hi.
Daniel11:16 A nalh tu om nawn ngawlin Syria ngalkap pa in a uuk bang pawpo in amate vawt tu hi. Ama in Kamciamsa Ngam sungah ding tu a
Daniel11:17 “Syria kumpipa in a ngalkap buppi zanghin ngalsimin kuan tu ngeal hi. Tuasia zawkciang a ngal pa ii kumpi ngam a suksiat natu in ama in a ngalpa taw kipawlna khat vawtin a tanu taw kiteangsak tu hi; ahihang ama ngealna taangtung ngawl tu hi.
Daniel11:18 Tua zawkciang ama in tuipi hui ah ngamte sim tu a
Daniel11:19 Kumpipa in ama ngam kulhte zuan kik tu hi
Daniel11:20 “Kumpi dang khat in ama nungzui tu a
Daniel11:21 Vantunglalang in sonthiang tawto hi: “Syria kumpipa a suak kik tu sia kumpi tu in a kilawm ngawl mi ngilo khat hi tu hi
Daniel11:22 Ama a nalh pawpo
Daniel11:23 Kilemna vawtna taw
Daniel11:24 Ama in hesak khol ngawlin ngamkhen hau khat sim tu a
Daniel11:25 “Ama in Egypt kumpipa sim tu in hang takin ngalkap tam mama khawm tu hi
Daniel11:26 Ama ii a nai puibel a thudokte in ama siasak tu uh hi. A ngalkapte tam mama kithatlum tu a
Daniel11:27 Tua zawkciang tua kumpite ngeal sabuai khat ah an nekhawm tu uh hi
Daniel11:28 Syria kumpipa sia Pathian mite ii biakna suksiat tu khensatna nei in ngal sungah a vanh laakte theampo taw a ngam zuan kik tu hi. Ama a uuk bang po in ngamta tu a
Daniel11:29 “Tua zawkciang ama in Egypt ngam sim leleau tu a
Daniel11:30 Rome mite ama nalh tu in
Daniel11:31 A ngalkap pawlkhatte in Biakinnpi melsia tu uh hi. Amate in ni sim biakpiaknate tawpsak tu uh a
Daniel11:32 Theamna taw kumpipa in a biakna uh a nusia sa mihingte ii panpuina nga tu hi
Daniel11:33 Mihingte ii lampui ciimte in amate ii a ciimna midang tam mama hawm tu uh hi. Ahihang hun tawmvei sungah amate pawlkhat ngal sungah kithatlum tu a
Daniel11:34 Tuabangin thalupna a thuak laitakin
Daniel11:35 Tua mihing ciim lampuite pawlkhat kithatlum tu a
Daniel11:36 “Syria kumpipa in ama uuk babangin ngamta tu hi. Ama in pathian khat pawpo sangin ka lian zaw a
Daniel11:37 Kumpipa in a taanghpupite ii a biak pathian le numeite ii a it pathian zongh melsia tu hi. A tatakin ama in pathian theampo melsia tu hi
Daniel11:38 Tuate luangin ama in kulhte a cing pathian sia upat zaw tu hi. Ama in a taanghpupite ii a biak ngeingawl pathian khat tungah khamh
Daniel11:39 Ama ii kulhte cing tu in
Daniel11:40 “Syria kumpipa ii hun a bo kuan ciang
Daniel11:41 Ama in Kamciamsa Ngam ngawngawn simin
Daniel11:42 Ama in tua ngamte theampo a sim ciang
Daniel11:43 Ama in Egypt ii a phual khamh le ngunn le a dang a neisa manpha teng laaksak tu hi. Ama in Libya le Ethiopia ngam zo tu hi.
Daniel11:44 Tuasia ciang
Daniel11:45 Ama in a kumpi puanbuk liante ngawngawn sia Biakinnpi dinna mual le tuipi kilaklaw ah sa tu hi. Ahihang tua mun ah ama a hu tu om ngawlin thi tu hi
Daniel12:1 Puanneal a silh vantunglalang in
Daniel12:2 A thisate tam mama nungta kik tu uh hi: pawlkhatte sia tawntung nuntakna nga tu uh a
Daniel12:3 Lampui ciimte sia van ii taanna theampo taw taang tu uh hi. A maan seam tu in mihing tam thu a hilte sia aksi bangin taang tawntung tu uh hi
Daniel12:4 Ama in kei tungah
Daniel12:5 Tuaciang keima in ngunvaalbo lang le lang ah a ding mihing nii ka mu hi.
Daniel12:6 Amate khat in tuilu sang a khuala zawhiatna ah a ding vantunglalang tungah
Daniel12:7 Vantunglalang in a khutte nii van sangah laamto a
Daniel12:8 Ama thu son ka za hi
Daniel12:9 Ama in
Daniel12:10 Mihing tam mama kithiansua tu hi. Mi seksolte in tel ngawl tu uh a seksol tan tu uh hi; miciimte bekin tel tu uh hi.
Daniel12:11 “Ni sim biakpiakna te a kitawpsak hun pan
Daniel12:12 Ni 1
Daniel12:13 “Tua ahiciang
Hosea1:1 Hisia in Kumpi Uzziah
Hosea1:2 Topa in Hosea tungtawn a
Hosea1:3 Tuabangin Hosea in Diblaim tanu Gomer kici numei khat teenpui hi. A ta phit tapa sia a sua zawkciang
Hosea1:4 Topa in Hosea tungah
Hosea1:5 Tua hun ciang Jezreel Kuam ah Israel ngalkap thahatna ka susia tu hi
Hosea1:6 Gomer in a ta niina — numei khat nei hi. Topa in Hosea munah
Hosea1:7 Ahihang Judah mite tungah ka itna ka lak tu hi
Hosea1:8 Gomer in a tanuno noai a tensak zawkciang ama nau paai kik a
