Hosea1:11 Judah mite le Israel mite kingawm kik tu hi. Amate mama in amate atu lampui khat teal tu a
Hosea2:1 Tua ahikom na Israel mipuite sia
Hosea2:2 Ka tate awng
Hosea2:3 A kheal buale a suani in a pumnguak a om bangin a nik a puan ka sutkeaksak tu hi. Leiko le lei kolhna mun taw kibangin ama ka vawt tu a
Hosea2:4 A tate tungah hesuakna ka nei buatu hi; amate a maizum maw pumpi kizuak nu ii tate ahi hi. Ama mama in
Hosea2:5 
Hosea2:6 Tua ahikom ama sia lingdai taw ka uum tu a
Hosea2:7 Ama in a lawmpate del tu hi
Hosea2:8 Ama ii Baal biakna ah a zak ngunn le khamh theampo le olive thau
Hosea2:9 Tua ahikom anlaak hun ciang ka piakthongsa antang le sapittui te tuaciang a silh tu ka piak samul le patpuan te ka la kik tu hi.
Hosea2:10 A lawmpate mai ah a nguaktangin om tu in a puan a nikte ka suukeaksak tu a
Hosea2:11 Ama ii poai khaamnate theampo — kum sim le tha sim a poaite le Sabbath poaite — a biakna taw kisai kikhopna theampo ka bosak tu hi.
Hosea2:12 A pumpi a kipiak ciang
Hosea2:13 Baal tungah ngimnamtui khat a hal ciang le a suangmanpha kizepnate taw kizeamin a lawmpate a del hun lai a kei hong makngil hu in ama daan ka pia tu hi. Topa in son zo hi.
Hosea2:14 Tua ahikom sennealngam sungah ama ka paipui kik tu a; tua munah ki itna kam taw ama ka zol kik tu hi.
Hosea2:15 A sapithuante ama tungah ka piakik tu a
Hosea2:16 Tuasia ciang kei sia khatvei ka pasal hong ci kik tu a — ama ii Baal hong ci nawn ngawl tu hi.
Hosea2:17 Baal min ka losak kik ngei nawn buatu hi.
Hosea2:18 Tua hun ciang ka mite a liamsua ngawl natu in ngamsate le vacimte taw thuciamna ka vawt tu hi. Ngalhiam theampo ahi
Hosea2:19 Israel awng
Hosea2:20 Ka kamciamte ka len tu a. keima aa kong hisak tu hi. tuaciang keima Topa in nong saang tu hi.
Hosea2:21 Tua hun ciang Israel ka mite ii thungetnate ka zo tu hi. Lei tungah ngua ka zusak tu a
Hosea2:22 
Hosea2:23 Ka mite tua ngam ah ka khosak tu a
Hosea3:1 Topa in kei tungah
Hosea3:2 Tua ahikom tua nu ka lei natu in ngunn dangka sawm le nga le mangtaang kilogramme 150 ka pia hi.

Hosea3:4 Hi bang lian ma in

Hosea4:4 Topa in
Hosea4:5 Sun taw zan taw note khial tan nu hi

Hosea4:7 “No thiampite na tam vaial uh ciang
Hosea4:8 Ka mite mawna khialna te tung pan hau law na hi uh kom amate khial vaial le na oai uh hi.
Hosea4:9 Tua mite daan thuak bangma in na thuak tu uh hi! Siatna na vawt hu in kong liausak tu a
Hosea4:10 Note in sangaw biakpiakna pan
Hosea4:11 Topa in
Hosea4:12 Amate in thingbek khat tung pan thupualaakna dongh hi! Ciangkang khat in amate heak nopte son hi! Amate in kei hong nusia zo uh hi. Pumpi zuak a suak numei khat bangin amate le amate ii pathian dangte tungah ki aap zo hi.
Hosea4:13 Amate in mualpi dawn mun thiangthote ah sangaw biakpiaknate pia in
Hosea4:14 Ahitazong
Hosea4:15 “No Israel mite in kei tungah hong thumaan ngawl na hi uh hang Judah te in tuabang in mawna nei heak tahen. Gilgal ah ahibuale Bethaven ah biakpiakna vawt heak vun
Hosea4:16 Israel mite sia laate bangin thinpui hi. Bangbangin amate lopa hingna sungah tuuno bangin taasak thei tu khi ziam?
Hosea4:17 Israel mite sia milimte ii ngau tawk hi. Amate lampi tek tawn lel tahen.
Hosea4:18 Sapittui tam mama a neak zawkciang amate pumpi zuakna taw nuamsa in
Hosea4:19 Amate vuipi seam bangin kiseamkeak tu a
Hosea5:1 “No thiampite awng
Hosea5:2 Acacia Khuapi ah dum thuk khat na suak uh a
Hosea5:3 Israel bangbang hi ziam
Hosea5:4 Mite ngamtat siatna in amate ii Pathian kung a heakkik tu khak hi. Milim biakna in amate nasia takin len ahiciang
Hosea5:5 Israel mite kiphatsak na in amate langpanin ausan hi. A mawnate in amate lutusak a
Hosea5:6 Amate in a tuute le a khuite Topa tungah sangaw biakpiakna tu in pia ahihang amate atu phattuamna om ngawl hi. Amate in Topa mu thei ngawl uh hi
Hosea5:7 Amate Topa tungah thumaan ngawl a; a tate Topa neisa hi ngawl hi. Tua hi a
Hosea5:8 Gibeah ah ngal dona lemle tum vun! Ramah ah patau daak saat vun! Bethaven ah minsial vun. Benjamin mite awng ngal simin kuan vun.
Hosea5:9 Daan thuak tu ni hong theng tu a
Hosea5:10 Topa in
Hosea5:11 Israel in nenniam thuak a; a neisa tatak ahi leitang taan hi
Hosea5:12 Israel tungah siatna le Judah mite tungah lalna ka tungsak tu hi.
Hosea5:13 “Israel in a ciinatna bangza ziam ci sia a kimu ciang le Judah in ama ii liammate a kimu ciang
Hosea5:14 Keima in tawpi khat bangin Israel le Judah mite ka sim tu hi. Keima mama in amate ka balneen tu a ka nusia tu hi. Amate ka kaikeak ciang kuama in hun zo ngawl tu hi.
Hosea5:15 “Keima in a mawna a khialna hu in a thuak tu za in a thuak dong le kei hong zon kik mateng ka mite ka nusia tu hi. Ngimna a thuak ciang amate in kei hong zon tu hanciam tha tu uh hi

Hosea7:8 Topa in

Hosea7:11 Inn vakhu mawmaw khat bangin Israel te leang kawkoai hi; amate in Egypt te tungah huna ngen masa uh hi

Hosea12:4 ama in vantunglalang khat buanin zo hi. Ama kapin thupha ngen hi. Tuaciang Bethel ah ih taanghpupi Jacob kungah Pathian pai in paupui hi.

Joel1:1 Hi sia in Pethuel tapa Joel tungah Topa ii thupuak ahi hi.
Joel1:2 Khanghaamzawte awng
Joel1:3 Na tate tungah tua thu son vun; amate in a tate tungah sonsawn tu hi
Joel1:4 Khaumaw honkhat zawkciang honkhat in lo ante topha hi; Hon khat ii nusiat sate hon dang khat in khawng tum hi.
Joel1:5 No zu khamte awng
Joel1:6 Khaumaw ngalkaphonpi khat in ih ngam hong sim hi; tuate thahatin tam leih a
Joel1:7 Amate in ih sapitkungte susia zo a
Joel1:8 No mite awng
Joel1:9 Biakinnpi sungah piak tu antang ahibuale sapittui om ngawl hi; Topa biakpiak natu bangma nei ngawl ahikom thiampite khuangai hi.
Joel1:10 Lote kolh hi; leitangte khuangai hi banghang ziam cile ankungte kisusia in sapitngate kikosak a
Joel1:11 No
Joel1:12 Sapitkungte le theikungte kongaw zo hi; thingnga kungte theampo vulin thi zo hi. Mite ii lungdamna bo hi.
Joel1:13 No
Joel1:14 Antan natu thupia vun; kikhoppi khat sam vun! Lampuite le Judah mi theampo Topa na Pathian Biakinnpi sungah khawmtua in
Joel1:15 Topa ni nai hi; Vaanglianbelpa ii siatna hong tunsak tu ni ahi hi. Tua ni in bangza launa piang tu ziam!
Joel1:16 Ih ante a suksiat ciang cimaw in ih en lel hi. Ih Pathian Biakinnpi sungah lungdamna om ngawl hi.
Joel1:17 Anciite leiko sungah thi hi. Khol tu antang om ngawl hi; tua ahikom ansaal hawmte lalcip hi.
Joel1:18 Khuite ngilkialin haam uh hi
Joel1:19 Topa awng
Joel1:20 Luituite kang ahikom ngamsate ngawngawn in nang hong ko uh hi.
Joel2:1 Lemle tum vun; Pathian mual thiangtho Zion tungah patau daak tum vun
Joel2:2 Tua ni sia khuatuapin
Joel2:3 Meikuang bangin tuate in ankungte netum hi. A mai sangah ngam pha in Eden Huan bang hi a
Joel2:4 Tuate siphute taw kibang a; ngal siphute bangin tai uh hi.
Joel2:5 Mualdawnte ah a lento uh ciang siphu ngalleangte bangin nging vatel a; lopa kote mei taw hal bangin puak vatam hi. Tuate sia ngalsim tu in a kithoai ngalkap honpui khat bangin kingual uh hi.
Joel2:6 Tuate a nai ciang kuama theampo lau a; a maitang theampo daang siat uh hi.
Joel2:7 Ngalhangte bangin tuate in sim a; luphungte tungah ngalkapte bangin kaato uh hi. A vekpi ma in mai sangah tang tak nawk in
Joel2:8 ahibuale khat le khat a mai kikhak ngawl uh hi. Ngal nannate kaantan vanuau in kuama in khak zo ngawl hi.
Joel2:9 Tuate in khuapi bulu a; a luphungte kaantan uh hi; tuate inn tungah kaato in ngutate bangin khelkite pan tum uh hi.
Joel2:10 Mai ah a manaw uh ciang lei liing a; van kilok hi. Ni le tha mial a
Joel2:11 Topa in a ngalkaphonpi tungah vanto aw taw thupia hi. A thuni ngalkap honte tam a
Joel2:12 Topa in “Ahihang tu mama zongh in
Joel2:13 Na thin tapthapna taw in na heena lak vun; na puansilh balthapna bek sia kicing ngawl hi
Joel2:14 Topa na Pathian in a thin kheal tha tu a
Joel2:15 Zion Mual ah lemle tum vun; antan natu thupia vun a
Joel2:16 Mite khawmtua vun; a thiangtho kikhop natu in kithoaisak vun; khanghaamte hong paipui tavun; patangte le nausente zongh khawmtua vun. A kiteang tuung nupate zongh a inn nusia in hong pai uh kul tu hi.
Joel2:17 Biaknatau le Biakinnpi tumna kilaklaw a
Joel2:18 Tua zawkciang Topa in ama leitang atu thinbot a; ama in a mite hesuak hi.
Joel2:19 Ama in amate tungah hi bang in zo hi: “Tu in an
Joel2:20 Saksang pan hong pai khaumaw honpite ka heam tu a
Joel2:21 “Lote awng
Joel2:22 Nganhingte awng lau heak vun
Joel2:23 “Zion mite awng
Joel2:24 Taang cilna munte sia antang taw kidim tu a; thingngatui sukna hui ah leidumte sia sapittui le olive thau taw dimleet tu hi.
Joel2:25 Khaumaw honte ii na lo an hong neaktumsak kumte sungah na sup uhte kong pia kik tu hi. Hi khaumaw honpi hong puak sia keima khi hi.
Joel2:26 Tu in neak tu tam mama nei in
Joel2:27 Tuasia ciang Israel awng
Joel2:28 “Tuasia zawkciang a kuama po tungah ka Thaa ka buak tu a: na tapate le tanute in ka thu thangsak tu uh hi; na khanghaamte in mang man tu uh a
Joel2:29 Tua hun in naseam nupite le pasalte tung ngawngawn ah ka Thaa ka buak tu hi.
Joel2:30 “Tua ni hun atu kidop thei natu in van le lei ah limte ka pia tu a; chisan luanna
Joel2:31 A lian le a lauhuai Topa ii ni hong pai ma in
Joel2:32 Ahihang Topa tungah huna a ngen theampo kingum tu hi. Topa ci sa bangin ‘Jerusalem a om pawlkhatte suakta tu a; ka teal mite suakta tu uh hi.’

Joel3:2 Minam theampo ka khawmtua tu a
Joel3:3 Amate in a ngalmatte akua teng in nga tu ziam ci in
Joel3:4 “Tyre
Joel3:5 Note in ka ngunn ka khamh te la in
Joel3:6 Judah le Jerusalem mite sia amate ngam pan a khuala mamana ah paipui in Greek te tungah na zuak uh hi.
Joel3:7 Tu in amate na zuakna munte pan ka pui kik tu hi. Amate tung na vawt uh bangin note tungah kong vawt tu hi.
Joel3:8 Na tapate le na tanute Judah mite tungah ka zuaksak tu a; amate in a khualana Sabean te tungah zuaksawn tu hi. Keima Topa in ka ci zo hi.
Joel3:9 “Minamte sungah hi thu thangsak vun: ‘Ngalsim tu in kithoai vun; na ngalhangte sam vun; na ngalkapte khawm vun a
Joel3:10 Na lo thawna thikzumte seak vun a
Joel3:11 Manlang in hong pai tavun
Joel3:12 “Minamte kithoai in
Joel3:13 Amate seksol mama hi; anlaak hun lai ankungte saattan bangin amate saattan vun; sapitngate a tuisuukna sung dimin a tui let dong a kingoaitham bangin amate sucip vun
Joel3:14 A tul a tulin Thukhenna Kuam sungah om uh hi. Tua munah Topa ii ni hong theng pal tu hi.
Joel3:15 Ni le tha zing a
Joel3:16 Zion mual pan Topa hawk hi; Jerusalem pan a aw vanto bangin nging a; van le lei liing hi. Ahihang ama in a mite sungsia tu hi.
Joel3:17 “Tuasia ciang Israel awng
Joel3:18 Tua hun ciang mualpite sia sapithuan taw kidim tu a
Joel3:19 “Egypt ngam sia sennealngam khat suak tu a
Joel3:20 A kithatte ii phu ka lam tu hi; a mawte ka thasua buatu hi. Ahihang Judah le Jerusalem te ah a tawntungin mihing teang tu hi

Amos3:1 Egypt ngam pan minam bup in ama ii hong pusuasak Israel mite awng
Amos3:2 “Leitung minam theampo sung pan kong heak le kong thin nop mawk sia noma bek na hi uh hi. Hi thu in noma mawna khialna nasiasak seseam a
Amos3:3 Kisiktua natu in vaihawmna omkhol ngawlin mihing nii khualhaw khawm thei tu ziam?
Amos3:4 Tawpi in sa mat tu khat mu ngawl bulin duisung ah hawk thawthong na ziam? Tawpi moi khat in mat khat nei buale a kua sungah thuum vangam na ziam?
Amos3:5 Thaang a kisia ciang aitaana khat om buale vacim awk ngei na ziam? Thaang keaksa sia a pealsak khat a om buale peal na ziam?
Amos3:6 Khuapi sungah khua mite a lausak ngawl tu ngal patau lemle a kitum om na ziam? Topa in a puak buale khuapi khat ah tuasiatna theng tu ziam?
Amos3:7 Vaanglianpipa Topa in a naseam kamsaangte tungah a tupna kilanghsak phot ngawlin bangma seam ngeingawl hi.
Amos3:8 Tawpi a hawk ciang akua lau ngawlin om thei tu ziam? Vaanglianpipa Topa a pau ciang a thu thangsak ngawlin akua om thei tu ziam?

Amos3:11 Tua ahikom ngal in a ngam kiim uum in

Amos3:13 Tu in ngai vun
Amos3:14 Israel te a mawnate hu in daan ka piak ni ciang
Amos3:15 Phalbi innte le khuakhaal innte ka susia tu hi. Saiha taw a kizeam innte siacip in

Amos4:5 Paisuak vun a

Amos4:7 Na lo ante ii kisapbel hun laitakin nguatui ka hangsak hi. Khuapi khat sungah ngua ka zusak a
Amos4:8 Dangkona taw tha zawmin

Amos4:11 “No pawlkhat sia Sodom le Gomorrah ka suksiat bangin kong susia hi. No a thi mong teng sia meikhuk khat pan a kiteen thingkhua kaanghmong bang na hi uh hi. Tua hi napi
Amos4:12 “Tuabang ahikom
Amos4:13 Pathian in mualte a vawt pa le vuite a bitphuapa ahi hi. Ama in a ngaisutnate mihing in hesak hi; ama in sun sia zan suaksak hi. Ama in leitung saangnate tungah vak hi. Hisia ama min hi: Vaanglianbelpa Topa Pathian ahi hi!

Amos5:2 Numei thiangtho Israel puk zo hi! Tho kik ngei nawn ngawl tu hi! Ama lei ah kinusia in lum hi

Amos5:4 Topa in Israel mite tungah
Amos5:5 Biakkikhopna vawt tu in Beersheba ah pai heak vun. Bethel ah kei hong zong heak vun — Bethel sia a luithawthong suak tu hi. Gilgal ah pai heak vun — a mite saltaang in lal tu uh hi” ci hi.
Amos5:6 Topa kungah pai vun
Amos5:7 Thukhaikimte siatsua a
Amos5:8 Topa in siluk le zawlzawng aksite vawt hi. Ama in khuazing sia khuavak suaksak a
Amos5:9 Ama in a thahatte le a kulh muanhuaite suksiatsak hi.
Amos5:10 Note in thukhenzum ah thutang khen ngawlna a nalhte le thumaan thutak vive a sonte na ensan uh hi.
Amos5:11 A zawngte na nengniam uh a
Amos5:12 Na mawna uh bangza in kiitakhuai a
Amos5:13 Tua ahiciang hi bang hunsia laitakin thim khipkhep a om na in a pilvang ngamtatna ahi hi!
Amos5:14 Na nuntak thei natu in siatna vawt ngawlin a maan vawt sawm vun. Tua hile kote kungah Vaanglianbel Topa Pathian om hi na ci uh bangin note taw om takpi tu hi.
Amos5:15 Thusia ngaimaw in thu man dei vun a
Amos5:16 Tua ahikom Vaanglianpipa Topa Vaanglianbelpa in
Amos5:17 Sapit huan theampo sungah kaana om tu hi. Hite theampo hong theng tu hi
Amos5:18 Topa ni ngaingam in a ngakla note atu in bangza in lauhuai tu ziam! Tua ni in note bang phattuamna hong pia tu ziam? Note atu in tua sia khuavak ni hi ngawlin khuazin ni hi tu hi.
Amos5:19 Tua sia tawpi kung pan tai a
Amos5:20 Topa ni in khuazing hong paipui tu a khuavak hong paipui ngawl tu hi; tua ni sia maitaina om ngawlin lungzin ni khat hi tu hi.
Amos5:21 Topa in

Amos5:23 A nangonhuai na lasak uhte tawp vun; na tengtongh awte ngai nuam ngawl khi hi.

Obadiah1:1 Hi sia in Obadiah ii kamsaanna — Edom ngam taw kisai Vaanglianpipa
Obadiah1:2 Topa in Edom tungah
Obadiah1:3 Na kiphatsakna in nang hong theam zo hi. Na khuapi sia suang taw kivawt kulhpi hi a; na inn sia mualtung a saangna ah om hi
Obadiah1:4 Na inn sia aksi kawmah a om bang na hisak natu in muvanlai bu saanna za in a saangna ah na vawt hial zongin
Obadiah1:5 “Zan in ngutate hong pai ciang
Obadiah1:6 Esau suan le paalte awng
Obadiah1:7 Na kipawlpuite in hong theam zo a; amate in na ngam pan hong notkeak zo hi. Na kilempui minamte in tu in hong zothal zo hi; Na an neak khoppui na lawmte in nang thaang hong sia zo hi; amate in
Obadiah1:8 “Edom daan ka piak ni in
Obadiah1:9 Teman ii a ngalkapte kilausak vadil tu a
Obadiah1:10 “Jacob ii suan le paal na suapui pate ii neisa suttol in that na hi ciang nang hong kisusia tu a a tawntungin na min hong kidaisak tu hi.
Obadiah1:11 Ngalte ii a kongpite a sukthap ni in na tungh nuam bua hi. Jerusalem ii nei le lamh te laaksak a
Obadiah1:12 Judah ah a om na suapuite kaamsiat a thuak lai in diksa ku buale teh pha hi. Amate ii kisiat ni in na lungdam tu hi ngawl hi. Amate ii ngim nga ciang na nuisan buatu hi.
Obadiah1:13 Amate ii tuasiat ni in ka mite ii khuapi sungah diksa ku in na tum buatu a
Obadiah1:14 Suatak tu a hanciamte a man tu in lamkaa ah na ding buatu hi. Amate ii ngim nga ni in ngalte khut sungah na aap buatu hi.
Obadiah1:15 “Keima
Obadiah1:16 Ka mual thiang tungah ka mite in daan khakna hai khaa sia dawn zo hi. Ahizong a kiimkot ah minam theampo in a khaa zawlai daan khakna hai dawn lai tu uh a; a dawn khawng zawkciang mangthang tu uh hi.
Obadiah1:17 “Ahizong Zion Mual tungah pawlkhatte suakta tu uh a
Obadiah1:18 Jacob le Joseph mite meikuang bang hi tu uh hi; amate in Esau mite sia ninteakte mei ii kak bangin susia tu uh hi. Esau suan le paalte khat zongh suakta ngawl tu hi
Obadiah1:19 “Judah thangsang mite in Edom la tu a; nitumna sang mualpeang ah a teang mihingte in Philistia la tu hi; Israel mite in Ephraim le Samaria ngam tang tu a; Benjamin mite in Gilead la tu hi.
Obadiah1:20 Israel saksang pan saltaang ngalkaphonpi hong heak kik in
Obadiah1:21 Jerusalem ngalzote in Edom ngam simin

Jonah1:12 Jonah in

Jonah2:1 Ngasa ngilsung tawngh pan Jonah in Topa a Pathian tungah thungen a:
Jonah2:2 “Ka ngim nga laitakin Topa awng

Jonah2:5 Tui in hong khum a

Nahum1:1 Hi thu in Nineveh taw kisai thu hi a

Nahum1:3 Topa thin uuk papaih ngawl a
Nahum1:4 Ama in tuipi thupia a
Nahum1:5 Topa mai ah mualpite liingin kektham a; ama mai ah mualnote tuitham hi. Topa a kilangh ciang leitung kilok a; leitung le a mite theampo liing hi.
Nahum1:6 Ama a thin uuk ciang akua nungta zo lai tu ziam? A lauhuai mama a thinsona ah akua nungta zo nawn tu ziam? A thin uukna meikuang tha suk a; suangte tamhthamin ama ii mai ah leivui suak hi.
Nahum1:7 Topa pha hi; ngimna hun sungah a mite sungsia hi; Ama kung a zuante ama in keamthiam hi.
Nahum1:8 Tuipawm lian khat bangin a ngalte sucip a; ama a nalhte thina thuaksak hi.
Nahum1:9 Topa langpan in bang vawt sawm nu ziam? Ama in no hong susia tu hi. Kuama in khatvei kaan ama nalh ngawl hi.
Nahum1:10 Lingngui kivialte le taangphaw ko bangin no zukhamte hong kihaltum tu hi!
Nahum1:11 Nineveh awng

Habakkuk1:12 Topa awng

Habakkuk2:1 Ka ngalvilna tausaang tungah ka kaa tu a

Habakkuk2:3 Lai taw at in
Habakkuk2:4 Hi sia in a thupuak ahi hi: ‘A tatsia mite nungta ngawl tu a
Habakkuk2:5 Hauna in hong theam thei hi. A duhop a huaiham mihingte kiphasakin thim om thei ngawl hi — thina mama taw kibangin amate lungkim hun nei ngawl hi. Tua hu in amate in ngam khat zawkciang ngam khat amate atu in suanthal hi.
Habakkuk2:6 Ngallelte in ngalzote thato tu a
Habakkuk2:7 Ahizong tuasia na heak ma in
Habakkuk2:8 Ngam tam mama ah mihingte na suttol uh hi
Habakkuk2:9 Na lal zo hi! Ngongtatna taw na laak te taw na innkuan na hausak a
Habakkuk2:10 Ahihang na tup na sawmnate in na bangkua maizumsak hi; minam tam ma na suksiatna taw nangma tungah lalna bek na piangsak hi.
Habakkuk2:11 Luphung suangte ngawngawn in hong langpanin au a
Habakkuk2:12 Na lal zo hi! Khuapi khat sia kithalupna le khialna lian doppha in na saat hi.
Habakkuk2:13 Na zawthal minamte in a tha a ngal uh a thawthong in bosak a
Habakkuk2:14 Ahihang tuipi sia tui taw a kidim bangin leitung in Topa vaangletna heakna taw kidim tu hi.
Habakkuk2:15 Na lal zo hi! Na thinso hu in na innpaamte zawngsak in maizum pia ni hi; zukham bang keakin amate na hoisak hi.
Habakkuk2:16 Nangma zongh min phatna sangin maizumna taw na kituam zaw tu hi. Nangma zongh zu ne in na hoi vatut tu hi. Topa in daan piakna hai hong dawnsak tu a
Habakkuk2:17 Lebanon taamthing na phuktham zo a; tu in nang hong kiphuk vawk tu hi. A ngamsate na that a
Habakkuk2:18 Milim ii kimanna bang ziam? Mihing ii vawt sa na khat hi bek a
Habakkuk2:19 Nang a lal na hi zo hi! Thingbek khat tungah “Khanglo in!” tua ahibuale suangtum khat tungah “Tho in!” ci ni hi. Milim in na khat pawpo hong lak thei ziam? Khamh le ngunn taw kituam tha tu hi
Habakkuk2:20 Topa in a Biakinnpi thiangtho sungah om hi; ama mai ah leitung mihing theampo in thim dide in om tahen.

Zechariah14:10 Saksang Geba panin thangsang Rimmon dong ngamkuam buppi leitam kisua tu hi. Jerusalem sia kiim le paamte sangin saangzaw tu hi; khuapi in Benjamin kongpi pan nidang kongpi omna ngei Kiing Kongpi dong
Zechariah14:11 Mihingte tua munah ngam muangin teang tu a
Zechariah14:12 Topa in Jerusalem a sim minamte theampo tungah a kiitak huai mama natna tungsak tu hi. Amate nungta nginge lai in a sa uh muat tu hi; a mitte le a leeite muatcip tu hi.
Zechariah14:13 Tua hun ciang Topa in amate lungmangsak biaibuai in lausak tu a
Zechariah14:14 Judah mite in Jerusalem a huu tu in ngaldo tu uh hi. Amate in minam theampo ii nei le lamh — khamh
Zechariah14:15 A kiitak huai mama natna khat sia ngalte ngiaphual a om nganhingte theampo — siphute
Zechariah14:16 Tua zawkciang Jerusalem khua a sim minamte sung pan a nungta laite theampo sia Vaanglianbelpa Topa bia tu le Buk Poai khaam tu in kum simin Jerusalem ah pai tu uh hi.
Zechariah14:17 Minam khat pawpo in Vaanglianbelpa Topa sia kumpi bangin biak tu a nial le amate ngam ah nguazu ngawl tu hi.
Zechariah14:18 Egypt te in tua Buk Poai khaam tu a nial le
Zechariah14:19 Tua Buk Poai a khaam nuam ngawl Egypt te le minam dangte tungah hi natna daan tung tu hi.
Zechariah14:20 Tua hun ciangin siphu ngawlokte tung ngawngawn ah “ Topa atu Kitavaw” ci kammalte ki at lai tu hi. Biakinn sung a an huanna bealte zongh biaknatau mai a kuangte bangma in thiangtho tu hi.
Zechariah14:21 Jerusalem le Judah ngam bup sung a an huanna beal theampo sia Vaanglianbelpa Topa biakna a zak tu in kituam koi tu hi. Sangaw biakpiakna a pia mite in tua bealte biakpiakna sate huanna in zangh tu hi. Tua hun hong thet ciang Vaanglianbelpa Topa Biakinnpi sungah sumvawtte khat zong om nawn ngawl tu hi.
Malachi1:1 Hisia in Malachi ii Israel mite tungah a son tu Topa ii a piak thupuak ahi hi.
Malachi1:2 Topa in a mite tungah
Malachi1:3 tuaciang Esau le a suan a paalte ka ngaimaw hi. Esau ii mualtung ngam ka susia a
Malachi1:4 Esau suan le paal Edom te in
Malachi1:5 Israel mite in hite a mittang uh taw mu tu a
Malachi1:6 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in thiampite tungah

Malachi1:9 Tu in no thiampite awng
Malachi1:10 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in

Malachi1:12 Ahizong note in keima biaknatau sia bangma man nei ngawlin na son uh ciang le tua biaknatau tungah na nialnamh ante na piak uh ciangin
Malachi1:13 Noma in
Malachi1:14 A nganhon sung pan keima piak tu in hong kamciam a limci khat nei napi
Malachi2:1 Vaanglianbelpa Topa in thiampite tungah
Malachi2:2 Na sep
Malachi2:3 Na tate daan ka pia tu a
Malachi2:4 Tua zawkciang Levi suan le paal thiampite taw ka thuciamna a peal ngawl natu in hi thupiakna kong piak hunlam na he tu uh hi.
Malachi2:5 “Amate ii hong thasia thei natu in ka thuciamna sungah ka kamciamsa nuntakna le nopsakna ka pia hi. Tua hunlai in amate in kei hong zakta a hong kiita uh hi.
Malachi2:6 Amate in a maante hil a
Malachi2:7 Pathian a maan bang a heak takpi natu in hilna sia thiampite vaipuak ahi hi. Mite in amate kungah pai in ka deina a sin kul hi
Malachi2:8 “Ahihang tu in no thiampite in lampi maan panin na pial zo uh hi. Na hilna in mihing tam mama khialsak hi. No taw ka vawt thuciam sia paltan zo nu hi.
Malachi2:9 Note in ka deina nong ni bua uh a
Malachi2:10 Eite theampo in a kibang pa nei kana ngawl hi ziam? A kibang Pathian in eite theampo hong bitphua kana ngawl ziam? Tua ahile eite khat le khat
Malachi2:11 Judah mite in Pathian tungah a kamciamte paltan a Jerusalem le ngamsung bup ah a thasiathuai mama khat vawt uh hi. Amate in Pathian ii a it Biakinnpi sia ninsak uh hi. Pate in ngamdang pathiante a bia numeite teenpui zo hi.
Malachi2:12 A kuama po hi bangin a ngamtate sia Topa in Israel taangpite sung pan heam tahen a
Malachi2:13 Na ngamtatna dang khat sia hi bang hi. Ama tungah na biakpiaknate hong saang nawn ngawl ahikom kap a tau in
Malachi2:14 Banghangin hong kisaang nawn ngawl ziam ci in na dongh uh hi. Tua thu in na khanmoi lai a na teenpui na zi tungah na kamciamna paltan zo na hi sia a heak hu ahi hi. Na zi sia na koppui hi a
Malachi2:15 Pathian in ama le nang pumkhat thinkhat tu in hong vawt hi kana ngawl ziam? Hi thu ah ama ii tupna bang ziam? Pathian mite tatak ahi tu in tate na nei natu ahi hi. Tua ahikom note kuama in a zi tungah a piak kamciam paltan peuma heak hen.

Matthew1:1 Abraham ii suan
Matthew1:2 Abraham ta Isaac
Matthew1:3 Judah in a zi Tamar taw Perez le Zerah hing a
Matthew1:4 Ram ta Amminadab
Matthew1:5 Salmon ta Boaz hi. Boaz ii nu sia Rahab ahi hi. Boaz in a zi Ruth taw Obed hing a Obed ta Jesse hi.
Matthew1:6 Jesse ta sia David Kumpipa ahi hi. David pan Babylon khua ah Israel mite salin a kimat hun dong
Matthew1:7 Solomon ta Rehoboam
Matthew1:8 Asa ta Jehoshaphat

Matthew1:13 Zerubbabel ta Abiud
Matthew1:14 Azor ta Zadok
Matthew1:15 Eliud ta Eleazar
Matthew1:16 Jacob ta Joseph hi a

Matthew1:25 Ahihang taciil nau a sua dong a zi ompui ngawl hi. Tuaciang Joseph in nau min Jesus ci in phuak hi.

Matthew5:1 Jesus in mihonpite a mu ciangin mual tungah kaato hi. A nungzuite a kiim ah kikhawm a

Matthew5:3 “Thaa thu ah a zawngkhal hunlam a kihete in
Matthew5:4 “A thuum a taute in mihing lungdamte ahi uh hi! Pathian in amate heeneam tu hi.
Matthew5:5 “A kiniamkhiakte in mihing lungdamte ahi uh hi; amate in Pathian kamciamte a saang tu uh hi!
Matthew5:6 “Pathian ii tangkalte sep tu a lungngulbel te in mihing lungdamte ahi uh hi; Pathian in a kicing lungkimna pia tu hi!
Matthew5:7 “Ngual hesuak theite in mihing lungdamte ahi uh hi; Pathian in amate hesuak tu hi!
Matthew5:8 “Thinsung thiangthote in mihing lungdamte ahi uh hi; amate in Pathian mu tu uh hi!
Matthew5:9 “Kilemna a vawtte in mihing lungdamte ahi uh hi; Pathian in ka tate ci tu hi!

Matthew5:12 Na thinnuamsak vun

Matthew5:40 Tuaciang khat po in na laktong khat dei in zum ah thu hong vawt le na laktong puasilh zongh na pia thua lai vun.
Matthew5:41 Tua mun a ngak ngalkapte in
Matthew5:42 Khat po in na khat hong ngen le pia vun; khat po in na khat hong zawng nuam le zawn vun.

Matthew10:19 Amate in note thu kisit tu in hong aap ciangin

Matthew10:28 Pumpi that thei a

Matthew10:30 Note na hi uh le na lu tungah na samzamte dongin hong kisimsak siat sa ahi hi.
Matthew10:31 Tua ahikom lau heak vun; note sia tonbawm tam mamate sangin manpha zaw nu hi.

Matthew10:38 a kuama po
Matthew10:39 A nuntakna a nga natu a hanciam khat pawpo sia a nuntakna taan tu hi; ahihang a kuama po kei hangin a nuntakna a taan le
Matthew10:40 “A kuama po no hong saangte sia

Matthew13:2 A kiim ah hong kikhawm mihonpite tam mama ahikom

Matthew13:5 Thaicii pawlkhat suang tam

Matthew13:7 Thaicii pawlkhat lingphung sungah taak a

Matthew13:17 A tatak ka ci ciang
Matthew13:18 “Tua ahile ngai vun

Matthew13:20 Suang tungah a taak thaiciite sia a thu a zaak uh po ciang
Matthew13:21 Ahihang a thu in amate sungah a thuk in tum ngawl a
Matthew13:22 Lingphung sung a thaicii taakte sia a thu a zate ma hi a
Matthew13:23 Tuaciangin lei phana ah a taak thaiciite ahile a thu za in a telte ahi uh hi: amate in a zaa zakhat
Matthew13:24 Jesus in thusonteena dang khat son a: “Vantung ngam thu sia hi bang ahi hi. Pasal khat in a lo sungah thaicii pha poai hi.
Matthew13:25 Zan khat ciang
Matthew13:26 A kungte po in a huite lua tu in a kipat ciangin
Matthew13:27 Lo neipa ii naseamte hong pai a
Matthew13:28 Ama in
Matthew13:29 ‘Oai ngawl khi hi; mimphei na baw uh ciangin taang zongh na botkeak tha tu uh hi.
Matthew13:30 Anlaak hun dongin mimphei le taangte na po khawmsak lel vun. Tuasia ciangin anlate munah
Matthew13:31 Jesus in thusonteena dang khat ma son hi: “Vantung ngam thu sia hi bang hi. Pasal khat in ankamh cii la in lo sungah poai hi.
Matthew13:32 Ama sia thaicii a minpiang a nobel ahi hi
Matthew13:33 Jesus in thusonteena dang khat ma son lai hi: “Vantung ngam thu hi bang hi. Numei khat in tol tawm la in anvui khum khat dim taw hel a
Matthew13:34 Jesus in mipite tungah hi thute a son ciangin thusonteena zangh hi; thusonteena ngawl peuma taw thu khat zongh son ngawl hi.
Matthew13:35 Hi bangin ahi sia kamsaangpa pauna a taangtut natu ahi hi
Matthew13:36 Jesus in mipite nusia in innsung sangah a tum ciangin
Matthew13:37 “Thaicii pha a tuu pasalpa sia Mihing Tapa ahi hi; lo sia hi leitung ahi hi.
Matthew13:38 Thaicii pha sia Kumpingammite ahi hi; mimphei sia a ngilopa ii neisa mihingte ahi uh hi.
Matthew13:39 Tuaciangin mimphei leisung a tuu ngalpa sia Doaimangpa ahi hi. Anlaak hun sia hun bona ahi hi
Matthew13:40 Mimpheite kitawm in meikuang sungah a kihal bangma in
Matthew13:41 Mihing Tapa in
Matthew13:42 tuaciangin amate in tua mite meiphual sungah sep tu hi
Matthew13:43 Tuaciangin Pathian ii mihingte ahile Pa ii Ngam sungah ni bangin taang tu uh hi. Bil nei po in za tavun!
Matthew13:44 “Vantung ngam thu hi bang ahi hi. Pasal khat in lo khat sungah sum kiphual khat mu hi. Ama in lei huk kikin
Matthew13:45 “Vantung ngam thu in hi bang hi si hi. Pasal khat in suangmanpha zong a
Matthew13:46 a hoi tangtuam mama khat a mu ciangin
Matthew13:47 “Vantung ngam thu in hi bang hi si hi. Ngasa man pawlkhat in a ngeen uh tuili sungah paai in ngasa namcin man uh hi.
Matthew13:48 A ngeen uh a dim ciangin

Matthew23:4 Mihingte ii nungzaang ah vanhngit a puak hakte sia tua mite ma ii sot to ahi hi
Matthew23:5 Mihingte mu tu in amate in na theampo seam uh hi. Amate talki tung le a baante tungah laithiangtho kammal a ki at savun pheakte bangza in beak ziam
Matthew23:6 Poai sungah amate tona a nuambelte tungah ahizong
Matthew23:7 amate in vanhzuakna munah ngual ii paupui tu thangai a

Matthew23:10 ‘Lampuipa awng
Matthew23:11 No sungah a lianbel sia in note naseam hi tu hi.
Matthew23:12 Akua po ama le ama a kiliansak sia kiniamsak tu a

Matthew23:15 “Thukham hil syate le Pharisee te awng! No a kihitheamsakte awng! No atu in bangza in lauhuai ziam? Noma upna sungah mihing khat na nga thei natu in
Matthew23:16 “Mittaw ngual lamlakte awng! No atu in bangza in lauhuai ziam? ‘Biakinn taw a kiciamte a kamciam a peal hangin phamaw ngawl hi; ahihang Biakinn sungah khamhte taw a kiciamte sia a kamciam bangin a vawt uh kul hi
Matthew23:17 Mittaw mawmawte awng! koisia thupi zaw ziam
Matthew23:18 Na kihil thua lai na uh pan
Matthew23:19 Na mit uh bangza in taw ziam! Biakpiak natu in a kikoi nate thupi zaw ziam maw
Matthew23:20 Tua ahikom mihing khat in biaknatau taw a kiciam le
Matthew23:21 tuaciang Biakinn taw kiciam ciangin tua Biakinn le a sung a teang Pathian taw zongh kiciam hi si a
Matthew23:22 tuaciang khat po in vantung taw a kiciam le Pathian tokhum le a tungah a to pa taw kiciam ahi hi.
Matthew23:23 “Thukham hil syate le Pharisee te awng! A kihitheamsakte awng! No atu in bangza lauhuai ziam? An mee sungah hel thei lonamsia
Matthew23:24 Mittaw ngual lamlakte awng! Na dawn tu uh tui sung pan tho khat po sia nasia takin na chit uh hi; ahihang kalaoh khat na lopvalh uh hi!
Matthew23:25 “Thukham hil syate Pharisee te awng! A kihitheamsakte awng! No atu in bangza lauhuai ziam? Hai le kuang sia a puasang teng na sil uh hi
Matthew23:26 Pharisee mittawte awng! Hai sia a sungsang sil phot le uhte a puasang zongh thiang tu hi.
Matthew23:27 “Thukham hil syate le Pharisee te awng! A kihitheamsakte awng! No atu in bangza lauhuai ziam? No sia suangkaangtui taw a kizut thaankul taw kibang nu hi
Matthew23:28 Tuasia bangma in no sia a pua sang panin a kuama po ii muna ah a hoi bang na hi uh hi
Matthew23:29 “Thukham hil syate le Phariseete! A kihitheamsakte awng! No atu in bangza lauhuai ziam? Kamsaangte atu in thaankuul sia a et hoi tu in na vawt uh a
Matthew23:30 Tuaciangin ka taanghpupite khan lai in
Matthew23:31 Tua ahikom kamsaangte a thatlumte ii suante na hi uh hunlam noma pauna panin kipholaak na hi uh hi.
Matthew23:32 Tua ahiciang na taanghpupite ii patsa nate na zaw dong seam vet tavun!

Matthew23:34 Tua ahikom

Matthew24:17 Innkhum tung a om mihing khat in ama ii vanhte la tu in tuaksuk nawn heak hen.
Matthew24:18 Lo sungah a om mihing khat in a laktong puasilh la tu in
Matthew24:19 Tua hun sungah a om numei naupaaite le nau noailuaite atu in bangza he huai tu ziam?
Matthew24:20 Na tai tu uh hun sia phalbi lai le Sabbath ni ahi ngawl natu in Pathian tungah thungen vun.
Matthew24:21 Banghang ziam cile tua hun ah ngimna sia leitung a kipat pan kipan
Matthew24:22 Ahihang Pathian in a ni sia khiamsuk zo hi; tua hi buale kuama a suakta buatu hi. Ahitazong a tealtuam mihingte atu in Pathian in a ni khiam tu hi.
Matthew24:23 “Tuasia ciang khat po in
Matthew24:24 Banghang ziam cile Messiah theam le kamsaang theamte hong piang tu hi; hi thei hile Pathian tealsa mihingte ngawngawn a theam natu in
Matthew24:25 Ngai vun! a hun hong thet ma in hong sonkhol zo khi hi.
Matthew24:26 “Tua ahibuale mihingte in
Matthew24:27 Banghang ziam cile Mihing Tapa sia van buppi ah nisuana pan nitumna dong a kaantan khualeng taang bangin hong pai tu hi.
Matthew24:28 “Mithi luang omna mun po ah vaciikte kikhawmtua tu hi.
Matthew24:29 “Tua hun ngimnate zawk a hai ngawlin
Matthew24:30 Tuasia ciang Mihing Tapa ii lim sia van ah hong kilangh tu hi; Mihing Tapa sia van ah meeikaai tung pan vaangletna le minthanna lianpi taw hong pai a mu uh ciangin
Matthew24:31 Lemlepui aw hong nging tu a
Matthew24:32 “Theikung in hilsak tavun. A baakte zongh hingin hong moisua ciangin
Matthew24:33 Tuasia bangma in
Matthew24:34 Tu laitak a nungta mihingte a thi siat ma in
Matthew24:35 Vantung le simlei a bo tu hi
Matthew24:36 “Ahitazong tua a ni le a nai tu sia kuama in he ngawl hi — vantung ah vantung mite ahizong
Matthew24:37 Mihing Tapa hong pai natu sia Noah hun lai thupiang bang hi tu hi.
Matthew24:38 Tuipi liim ma in mihingte an ne tui dawnin om a
Matthew24:39 Tua hi napi tuiliim a
Matthew24:40 Tua hun laitakin pasal nii sia lo sungah naseam khawm tu hi: khat kila tu a khat kikhe tu hi.
Matthew24:41 Numei nii an ngoaina ah diang tu hi: khat kila tu a
Matthew24:42 “A kingingta sa in om vun
Matthew24:43 Inn neipa khat in ngutate ii hong pai hun tu he le
Matthew24:44 Tua ahiciang no zongh
Matthew24:45 “Thumaan a
Matthew24:46 A topa hong cia laitakin a kisawl bang a naseam hi ci in a topa ii mu naseampa sia bangza in lungdam tu ziam?
Matthew24:47 A tatakin kong ci ciang
Matthew24:48 Ahihang tua naseampa sia a ngina ngawl khat ahile
Matthew24:49 tuaciangin a nasep khoppui naseam dangte saatin
Matthew24:50 Tuaciangin tua naseampa ii topa sia a muanmawk ngawl hun le a heak ngawl ni hun khat ciang hong cia tu hi.
Matthew24:51 A topa in ama sia nasia takin ngim pia tu a

Matthew25:4 a ciimte ahile meiinn atu meitui bung dimin keng thua uh hi.

Matthew25:9 A ciimte in

Mark12:1 Tuaciang Jesus in amate tungah thusonteena taw thu son hi. “Khatvei lai in pasal khat in sapithuan vawt a
Mark12:2 Sapit nga law hun ciangin

Mark12:4 Tua zawkciang huan neipa in

Mark12:6 Tuabang a sawl thei tu a taanglai mihing sia a it a tapa bek ahi hi. A khakbel ciangin ama in a tapa lo saapte munah paisak hi
Mark12:7 Ahihang tua lo saapte in

Mark12:11 Hi thu in Topa ii zeakna ahi hi; ih et ciang lamdang hi ngawl ziam!’ ”

Luke1:35 Vantunglalang in

Luke1:50 khang khat pan khang khat

Luke1:70 Taanghlai in a kamsaang thiangthote tungah
Luke1:71 ih ngalte le hong ensante theampo ii thahatna pan hong hun tu in hong kamciam zo hi.
Luke1:72 Ama in ih taanghpupite tungah hesuakna hong lak tu in
Luke1:73 Ih taanghpupi Abraham tungah a ciliap huai kamciam taw ih ngalte khut sung panin hong hut zawk natu le ngammuangin ama ii na seam tu in hong kamciam zo hi.
Luke1:74 
Luke1:75 Tua ahikom ama mai ah ih nuntak lai theampo a thiangtho le thutang in
Luke1:76 Nang
Luke1:77 Ama mihingte tungah mawna kimaisakna taw ngupna piang tu hi
Luke1:78 Ih Pathian sia hesuak thiam a
Luke1:79 tuaciangin thina khuazing limh sung a teangte theampo tungah vantung panin hong taang tu a
Luke1:80 Nausen sia pumpi le thaa sungah hong khangto hi. Ama Israel mipite mai ah a kilak hun dong sennealngam sungah teang hi.
Luke2:1 Tua hun laitakin Augustus Kumpilianpa in Rome Kumpi ngamlian sung bup mihing kisimna omsak tu in thupia hi.
Luke2:2 Hi a masa phitbel mihing kisimna a kivawt hun laitakin Quirinius sia Syria ngam ngamuk mangpa ahi hi.
Luke2:3 Tua ahikom mihing simin amate khua tek ah min khum tu in pai uh hi.
Luke2:4 Joseph zongh Galilee ngam Nazareth khua panin Judea ngam Bethlehem khua
Luke2:5 Ama taw a kiteang tu dokzu a kipiasa ahi Mary taw min khum khawm tu in pai uh hi. Ama naungil omsa hi a
Luke2:6 Bethlehem khua ah a taam sungin
Luke2:7 A tapaciil suak a
Luke2:8 Tua ngam ah tuucing pawlkhat om a
Luke2:9 Vantunglalang khat amate kungah kilangh a
Luke2:10 Ahizong vantunglalang in
Luke2:11 Tuni mama in David khua ah note hong Hunpa — Christ Topa suak zo hi.
Luke2:12 Thumaan a hina na tel natu in
Luke2:13 Thakhat thu in
Luke2:14 “Van a saangbelna ah Pathian minthang tahen
Luke2:15 Vantunglalangte van ah a cia kik zawk uh ciangin
Luke2:16 Tuaciang amate manlangin pai uh a
Luke2:17 Tuucingte in ama a mu uh ciangin nausen huvau vantunglalang ii sonsa teng son kik uh hi.
Luke2:18 A za theampo in tuucingte son thute lamdang sa uh hi.
Luke2:19 Mary in hi thute a vekpi in ciamtee a
Luke2:20 Tuucingte zongh cia kik a
Luke2:21 Nipi khat zawkciangin
Luke2:22 Moses Thukham ii thupiak bangin Joseph le Mary te ii a kithiansua natu hun hong theng hi. Tua ahikom amate in patangno sia Topa tungah aap tu in Jerusalem ah paipui hi
Luke2:23 banghang ziam cile Topa thukham sungah: “Tapa suakciil peuma Topa atu in ki aap tu hi
Luke2:24 Topa thukham sungah a om bangma in
Luke2:25 Tua hun laitakin Jerusalem khua ah Simeon kici pasal khat om hi. Ama sia mihing pha Pathian kiita pa hi a
Luke2:26 Topa ii a ciamsa Messiah a mu mateng a thi ngawl natu in
Luke2:27 Thaa Thiangtho in lampui a
Luke2:28 Simeon in patang toai in
Luke2:29 “Tu in Topa awng
Luke2:30 Ka mittang mama taw nong tatna ka mu zo hi
Luke2:31 tua thu mihing theampo ii mu thei tu in na vawtkhol zo hi:
Luke2:32 Gentile te tungah na deina a kipualaak natu le na minam Israel mite tungah minthanna a puak khuavak khat na hi hi.” ci hi.
Luke2:33 Patang ii pa le nu in hi bangin Simeon ii a thuson a zaak uh ciangin lamdang sa uh hi.
Luke2:34 Simeon in amate thupha a piak zawkciangin

Luke2:36 Asher suan Phanuel ii tanu Anna a kici nupi meingong huai mama kamsaangnu khat om hi. Ama kum sali sung bek a pasal in nuntak pui a
Luke2:37 
Luke2:38 Tua hun laitak ma in
Luke2:39 Joseph le Mary in Topa Thukham zeksate a sep tu teng a sep zawkciang Galilee ngam Nazareth khua a inn uh zuan kik hi.
Luke2:40 Patang hong khang a hong hat hi; ama ciimna taw kidim a
Luke2:41 Jesus ii nu le pa sia Paisan Poai siim tu in
Luke2:42 Jesus kum sawm le kum nii a phak ciangin
Luke2:43 Poai man ciangin inn ah cia kik tu in amate pai uh a

Luke2:46 A ni thum ni ciangin biakinn sungah Jew syate taw tokhawm a thu ngai thu dongh in a om mu uh hi.
Luke2:47 Ama ii ciim kammal taw a zona te a za theampo in lamdang sa uh hi.
Luke2:48 A nu le a pa in ama a mu uh ciangin lamdang sa in

Luke3:1 A hun sia Kumpilianpa Tiberius ii a maan zawk kum sawm le kum nga a cin hun hi a; Pontius Pilate sia Judea ngamuk mangpa hi in
Luke3:2 tuaciang Annas le Caiaphas sia thiampi lianbelte ahi uh hi. Tua hun laitakin sennealngam sungah a om Zechariah ii tapa John tungah Pathian kammal hong theng hi.
Luke3:3 Tua ahikom John in Jordan Ngundung ngamkuam bup ah thuhil a
Luke3:4 Kamsaangpa Isaiah laibu sungah a ki at bangma in: “Sennealngam sungah mihing khat hong au a: ‘Topa atu lampi sialkhol vun; ama khualhaw natu in lamzin tang khat vawtsak vun!
Luke3:5 Ngamkuam theampo kivuk tu a
Luke3:6 Minam theampo in Pathian ii ngupna mu tu hi
Luke3:7 Mihonpite sia John ii tuiphum tu in
Luke3:8 Na mawna uh pan na kisiik kikna uh kilanghsak vun. Tuaciangin Abraham sia kote ii taanghpupi hi ci in

Luke3:10 Mipite in
Luke3:11 “Laktong silh nii a neite in

Luke3:14 Ngalkap pawlkhat in
Luke3:15 Mihingte ii lametna sia khang tu in kipan a
Luke3:16 Tua ahikom John in amate tungah
Luke3:17 Ama in ankheap natu taangkheaplaw
Luke3:18 John in Lungdamna Thupha mipite tungah a nanam in hil a
Luke3:19 Ahizong John in ngamuk mangpa Herod teih hi
Luke3:20 Tuaciang Herod in John sia thong sungah a khumna taw in ngamtatna a sia seseam khat vawt hi.
Luke3:21 Mihing a om theampo tui a kiphum zawk uh ciangin
Luke3:22 Thaa Thiangtho sia a kimu thei pumpi taw ngam vakhu bangin a tungah hong tu hi. Tuaciang aw khat van panin hong nging a

Luke8:6 Pawlkhat suang tamna munah tu a

Luke8:8 Tuaciang thaicii pawlkhat leiphana ah tu hi; a kung po a

Luke8:10 ama ii a zo kikna pan

Luke8:14 Ling kawm ah thaicii a tute sia a thu za a

Luke8:38 A sung pan doai a nawkeaksak pa in

Luke16:2 sumhaupa in sam a
Luke16:3 Naseampa in hi bangin ngaisun hi
Luke16:4 Ka nasep ka taan ciangin ka ngualtamhte in amate inn ah hong saan natu bangbang ngamta tu ci he zo ing!’ ci hi.
Luke16:5 Tua ahikom a topa tungah lei a ba theampo khawmtua hi. A masa phitbelpa munah
Luke16:6 ‘Olive thau pheal zakhat ka ba hi
Luke16:7 Tua zawkciang khat ii tungah
Luke16:8 Tua hu in
Luke16:9 Jesus in hi bang ci thua hi. “Kei kong cina pan: leitung haunate taw ngualtamh zong vun
Luke16:10 Thu note tungah a thumaante sia thuliante tung zongh ah thumaan tu hi; thunote tungah a thumaan ngawlte sia thuliante tung zongh ah a thumaan buatu hi.
Luke16:11 Tua ahile leitung haunate tungah na thumaan bua uh ahile hauna tatak ah bangbangin hong kimuang ngam tu ziam?
Luke16:12 Ngual neisa tungah na thumaan bua uh ahile
Luke16:13 “Naseam khat po in to nii ii sila sepsak thei ngawl hi; ama in khat sia ensan tu a
Luke16:14 Phariseete in hi thute a zaak uh ciangin Jesus sia ciammuina in nei uh hi
Luke16:15 Jesus in
Luke16:16 Tuiphumpa John hun ciang dongin Moses ii thukhamte le kamsaangte lai atte in thu nei hi; tuasia pan kipan Pathian ngam Lungdamna Thupha kisonin mihing sim in
Luke16:17 Ahizong tua Thukhamte sungah thu theklek no khat a bo tu sangin van le lei a bo tu ol zaw tu hi.
Luke16:18 A zi a khul pasal khat in numei dang khat taw a teang kik le nupa kipalngul mawna vawt ahi hi. Tuaciangin a kikhul numei khat a teenpui pa in nupa kipalngul mawna vawt ahi hi.
Luke16:19 “Khatvei lai in sumhau khat om a puansilh manham tatakte silh in
Luke16:20 Tua laitakin
Luke16:21 sumhaupa sabuai pan a taakte ne tu in lametna taw tuabangin om hi. Uite ngawngawn in a meimate liasak tu in pai hi.

Luke16:23 Hell sungah ngim nga mama in

Luke17:3 Tua ahiciang nasepna po ah kidawm vun! “Na suapuipa a maw le teih in
Luke17:4 Ama in ni khat sungah salivei hong khial a
Luke17:5 Sawltakte in Topa tungah
Luke17:6 Topa in zo kik a
Luke17:7 “Sonteena in no sungah khat in lotho ziam
Luke17:8 Tuabangin kici ngawl hi! Bang kici zaw ziam cile
Luke17:9 Naseampa in sawlna teng a sep hu in
Luke17:10 No zongh tuabang ma na hi natu ahi hi; hong kisawl teng na sep zawk uh ciangin
Luke17:11 Jesus in Samaria le Galilee ngamngi tawn in Jerusalem ah pai hi.
Luke17:12 Khuano khat sungah a tum laitakin a lauhuai vun natna a vei mihing sawm taw kisi hi. Amate sia ama kung panin

Luke18:5 hi meingongnu in hong nawngkaisak ahikom

John15:1 “Keima in Sapitkung tatak ka hi a
John15:2 Ama in kei tungah a nga ngawl baak theampo sattan tu hi
John15:3 Note sia hilcianna kong piakte hangin hong kithiangthosak zo hi.
John15:4 Kei sungah hong om po tavun
John15:5 Keima in sapitkung hi a
John15:6 A kuama po kei sungah hong om ngawlte thingbaak bangin kivawkin
John15:7 Kei sungah nong om uh a
John15:8 A nga tam na nga uh ciang ka Pa minthanna kilanghsak hi; tuabangin keima nungzuite na suak uh hi.
John15:9 Pa ii kei hong it bangma in note kong it hi; kong itna sungah kip vun.
John15:10 Ka Pa thupiakte ni a
John15:11 “Note sungah ka lungdamna a om natu le na lungdamna uh a kicin natu in hi thu kong son hi.

John15:14 Tuaciangin
John15:15 Naseamte awng
John15:16 Note in kei nong teal bua uh hi; keima in note a kikhomsuan a nga namte tam mama na nga natu in
John15:17 Tua hi a
John15:18 “Leitung in note hong ensan le keima hong ensan masa ahi sia phawk tavun.
John15:19 Note leitung neisa hi le uhte leitung in ama aituam bangin hong it tu hi. Ahihang hi leitung panin note kong teal zo a
John15:20 Kong sonsa thu phawk tavun: ‘Silapa in a topa sangin lianzaw ngawl hi.’ Amate in kei hong vawtsia le no zongh hong vawtsia tu hi; amate in ka hilna a mang uh le no hilna zongh zui tu hi.
John15:21 Ahihang amate in hite theampo note tungah hong vawt tu hi
John15:22 Amate kungah pai in thuson ngawl hi leng amate in mawna a nei buatu uh hi; tu in ahile amate a mawna huvau in kamzon natu a nei nawn bua uh hi.
John15:23 Kei hong ensan sia in ka Pa zongh a ensan ahi hi.

Acts8:1 Tuaciang Stephen a thalupna sia Saul in lungkimpui hi. Tua ni mama in Jerusalem a om pawlpi sia vawtsiatna nasia takin thuak tu kipan hi. Sawltakte simngawl thu um dangte theampo sia Judea le Samaria ngamkhente sungah kithethaang siat uh hi.
Acts8:2 Thu umte pawlkhat in Stephen phum uh a
Acts8:3 Ahihang Saul ahile Pawlpi sukthap natu hanciam hi; inn khat pan inn khat ah pai in

Romans1:1 Lungdamna Thupha hil tu in Pathian ii a sap
Romans1:2 Tua Lungdamna Thupha sia Lai Thiangtho sungah a ki at sa bangma taanghlai pek panin a kamsaangte tungtawnin Pathian ii kamciam a piaksa ahi hi.
Romans1:3 Tua in ih Topa Jesus Christ
Romans1:4 Pathian pianzia taw ci leang thina panin a lian vaangletna taw a kithawsak kikna in Pathian Tapa a hina kilanghsak hi.
Romans1:5 Ama tungtawnin mi namcin sung pan mihing theampo ii a up thei natu le a thu a nit thei natu in Christ hu in Pathian in kei sia sawltak khat sua theina thupha hong pia hi.
Romans1:6 Jesus Christ neisa a suak tu in Pathian hong sapsa Rome khua a om note zongh hi thu in hong huam hi.
Romans1:7 Tua ahikom Pathian in hong it a
Romans1:8 A masa phitbel in no tungtaang ah Jesus Christ tungtawnin Pathian tungah lungdam ka ko hi
Romans1:9 A Tapa ii Lungdamna Thupha ka hilsak
Romans1:10 thu ka nget simin hong he hi. Pathian ii deina ahi nale tu in no kungah kong haw tu sia hong suaksak thei takpi le ci in ka ngen hi.
Romans1:11 Note hong thakhosak tu
Romans1:12 Ka cinopna pan kei upna hu in note phat tuamna nga in
Romans1:13 Suapuite awng hi thu na teptee tu ka dei a
Romans1:14 Banghang ziam cile heakna nei te ahizong a nei ngawlte ahizong
Romans1:15 Tua ahikom Rome khua ah a teang no tung zongh ah Lungdamna Thupha hil tu ka lawp hi.
Romans1:16 Lungdamna thupha sungah a kicingin muanna ka nei hi; tua in a umte theampo kingup natu Pathian ii vaangletna hi a Jew mite atu hi photin
Romans1:17 Banghang ziam cile lungdamna thupha in Pathian le mihingte bangbangin kilemzawng thei tu ziam ci in hong pualaak hi: a patna panin a tawp dong upna tungtawnin a piang ahi hi. Laithiangtho sungah “Upna tungtawnin Pathian mai ah thutang a kisuaksak sia in nungta tu hi
Romans1:18 Thumaan thu a kiheak tu a khaktan mihingte ngitlona le mawnate hu in Pathian thin uukna sia vantung panin hong kilanghsak hi.
Romans1:19 Pathian in amate daan pia hi
Romans1:20 Pathian ii simlei a bitphua pan kipan a kimu thei ngawl Pathian phatna ahi
Romans1:21 Amate in Pathian he ahihang a upat tu bangin upat ngawl uh a
Romans1:22 Amate ciim kisa ahihang mawmaw uh hi;
Romans1:23 a nungta tawntung Pathian a biak tu luangin a thithei mihing
Romans1:24 Tua ahikom
Romans1:25 Pathian huvau thumaante sia leilot thu suaksak uh a
Romans1:26 Amate hi bangin ngamta ahikom
Romans1:27 Tuabang ma in pate zongh in numei taw omkhop tu sangin
Romans1:28 Pathian huvau heakna maante sia mihingte in khua ngaisut in nei nuam ngawl ahikom Pathian in amate ngamtat tuak ngawlte ngamtat theina ngaisutna sungah thazau hi.
Romans1:29 Amate in ngitlona
Romans1:30 khat le khat kingensia hi; amate in Pathian ensan a
Romans1:31 A pha le a sia khentel theina thinsung nei ngawl
Romans1:32 Hi bangin a nungtate sia Pathian thukham in thidaan thuak hen a ci hunlam zongh amate in he uh hi. Ahitazong
Romans2:1 Note in ngual tungah thukhen hi ngawl nu ziam? Akua po na hi uh zong na paulap tu om ngawl hi. Banghang ziam cile ngual tungah thu na khen uh ciangin noma zongh amate ngamtat bangma in na ngamta veve uh le noma le noma thu kikhen na suak uh hi.
Romans2:2 Pathian in hi bang a ngamtate tungah thu a khen ciangin thutang taw thukhen hi ci in ka he uh hi.
Romans2:3 Ahihang no
Romans2:4 Tua ahibuale ama ii cikna
Romans2:5 Ahihang note na thin uh pui in na lungtang uh sak hi
Romans2:6 Banghang ziam cile Pathian in mihing sim in a sep a vawt bangin thaman a pia tu hi.
Romans2:7 Mihing pawlkhat in nasep pha seam zomin minthanna
Romans2:8 Midangte ahile amate atu bek ngaisun in
Romans2:9 Siatna a vawt mihing theampo tungah thuakna le natna hong om tu a
Romans2:10 Ahihang Pathian in minthanna
Romans2:11 Banghang ziam cile Pathian in mihing khat sim tungah a kibang khaiteena taw thukhen hi.
Romans2:12 Gentile te in Moses Thukhamte a nei bua uh hi; amate in Thukham puasia ah om in
Romans2:13 Banghang ziam cile Pathian mai ah thutang suana in Thukham zaakna taw piang ngawl a Thukham sawlnate zuina taw piang hi.
Romans2:14 Gentile te in Thukham nei ngawl hi; ahihang Thukham sawl bangin ngamta tu in amate le amate in a thinsung uh ah a khensat uh simin Thukham nei suak uh hi. Thukham nei ngawlte hi phot ahihang a neite suak uh hi.
Romans2:15 Amate ngamtatna in Thukham sawlnate a thinsung ah ki at hi ci in lak hi. A thinsung uh ah
Romans2:16 Tua ahikom Lungdamna Thupha ka hilna bangin ci leang
Romans2:17 No
Romans2:18 Pathian in bangbangin ngamta le hong oai ziam ci in na he uh a
Romans2:19 note in mittawte lamlak tu
Romans2:20 a mawmawte atu a hilpa
Romans2:21 Ngual zongh hil thei na hi uh le noma le noma banghangin kihil ngawl nu ziam? “Nguta heak vun
Romans2:22 “Palngul mawna na vawt heak vun
Romans2:23 Pathian Thukham nei hing ci in kisuangtaak nu hi — ahihang a thukham na paltanna uh taw Pathian min na paansak uh ziam?
Romans2:24 Laithiangtho in
Romans2:25 Thukham na tang uh le na vunteap atna in man nei hi; ahihang Thukham na tang bua uh le na vunteap at bua le uhte phazaw hi.
Romans2:26 Gentile mite vunteap a at ngawlte in Thukham thupiakna a ni uh le Pathian in vunteap atte bangma in ngaisun ngawl tu ziam?
Romans2:27 Tua ahikom Thukham nei a vunteap at napi in
Romans2:28 Vunteap ki at takpi a
Romans2:29 Jew tatak a kicite sia a sungsang Jew hi a
Romans3:1 Tua ahile Jew te in Gentile te sangin hamphat zawkna khat po a nei ziam? Tua ahibuale vunteap atna ah bang phat tuamna om ziam?
Romans3:2 Phat tuamna nam tam mama om hi! a masa phitbel in Pathian in a thu a kizaaksak natu in Jew te muang phot hi.
Romans3:3 Ahihang hi thu huvau ah amate sungah thumaan ngawl pawlkhat om le
Romans3:4 Tuabang hi ngawl het hi. Mihing sim in leilot kale zong Pathian ahile a thumaan kul veve tu hi. Laithiangtho in hi bangin ci hi. “Na pau ciangin thumaan na hi hunlam kilak tu a
Romans3:5 Ahihang eite thutang ngawl ih hina in Pathian sia thutang ahi hunlam kiciansak ahile eite in bang ih son tuan nawn tu ziam? Pathian in daan hong piak ciangin ama sia thutang ngawl hi ih ci thei ziam? (Tu a teng sia mihing ngeina bangin ka pau hi.)
Romans3:6 Hi vet ngawl hi! Pathian thutang ngawl hile bangbangin ama in leitung buppi thukhen thei tu ziam?
Romans3:7 Ahihang keima ii thumaan ngawlna in Pathian thumaanna kiciansak zaw kan a
Romans3:8 Tua ahile banghangin “Thupha pianna tu in thusia vawt tawng
Romans3:9 Tua ahile ei Jew te in Gentile te sangin phazaw ih hi ziam? Hi tuan ngawl hi! Ka sonsa bangma in Jew te le Gentile te sia a kibangin mawna vaangletna nuai ah om siat hi.
Romans3:10 Laithiangtho in
Romans3:11 A ciim kuama om ngawl a
Romans3:12 Mihingte a vekpi in Pathian sang panin lampial zo a
Romans3:13 A kampau te in thi theina kitheamna thu taw kidim a; a leei uh panin leilot thu pusuak hi
Romans3:14 a kam uh sia longsia khakngal taw kidim hi.
Romans3:15 Amate in ngual liamsua tu le a thatlum tu in palvang a
Romans3:16 a paina theampo ah amate in siatna le lalna piangsak uh hi.
Romans3:17 Amate in kilemna lampi a he bua uh hi
Romans3:18 Pathian thasia natu zongh a sin ngei bua uh hi
Romans3:19 Leitung buppi Pathian thukhenna sungah a thet natu le mihingte kam zon theina theampo a bo thei natu in Thukham sungah thu omte theampo in Thukham khutnuai ah a omte atu ahi hunlam ka he uh hi.
Romans3:20 Banghang ziam cile Pathian mai ah Thukham tanna hangin kuama thutang suak zo om ngawl a; Thukham nasepna in mihing khat mawnei ahi hunlam a kiheak natu ahi hi.
Romans3:21 Ahihang tu in Pathian ii mihingte thutang a suasakzia hong kipualaak zo hi. Thukham le kamsaangte lai atte in maan hi ci in tetti pang ahitazong
Romans3:22 Pathian in mihingte sia Jesus Christ a upna uh tungtawnin thutang suaksak hi. Christ a umte theampo tungah Pathian in hi bangin vawt hi
Romans3:23 Mihing theampo maw siat zo a Pathian ii ngum tu in hong ompuina pan kikhuala siat uh hi.
Romans3:24 Ahihang amate a suaktasak Jesus Christ tungtawnin
Romans3:25 Ama ii kipumpiak biakpiak natu in hong thina taw amate upna tungtawnin
Romans3:26 
Romans3:27 Tua ahiciang eite kisuantaak natu bang om ziam? Bangma om ngawl hi! Tua hile thutang suana in koisung pan hong piang ziam? Thukham nitna sepna pan ziam? Hi ngawl hi
Romans3:28 Banghang ziam cile mihing khat sia Pathian mai ah upna tungtawn bek in thutang suak thei bek a
Romans3:29 Tua ahibuale Pathian sia Jew te ii Pathian hi bek ziam? Gentile te Pathian zongh hi ngawl ziam? Hi leilam hi.
Romans3:30 Pathian sia khat hi a
Romans3:31 Upna in Thukham phiat hi cinopna ahi ziam? Hi ngawl het hi; eite in Thukham ih kipsak zaw hi.
Romans4:1 Tua ahile ih pianna pa ahi Abraham thuakna sa tungtaang ah bang ih son tu ziam?
Romans4:2 Ama ii ngamtatna tung panin Pathian in thutang suaksak ahile a kisuantaak natu nei tu hi — ahihang Pathian mai ah ama in bangma kisuantaak natu om ngawl hi.
Romans4:3 Laithiangtho in
Romans4:4 Naseam khat in sep thaman saang hi
Romans4:5 Ahihang sepna hi ngawl a upna a nei sia in

Romans4:7 “Tatkhialnate kimaisak a
Romans4:8 Topa ii a mawnate sazian in a teptee ngawl tu sia in mihing lungdam ahi hi!”
Romans4:9 Hi lungdamna David ii son sia vunteap atte bek atu ahi ziam? Hi ngawl hi! Vunteap at ngawlte atu zongh ahi hi. Banghang ziam cile laithiangtho sungah a ki at bangin ih sonsa hi a
Romans4:10 Hi thu bang hun laitakin piang ziam? Abraham vunteap a at zawkciang ziam? A at ma ziam? A at ma hi a
Romans4:11 Ama sia a khak sang ciangin a vunteap at pheang hi. Vunteap a atna zongh
Romans4:12 Ama in vunteap atte ii pa zongh hi a
Romans4:13 Pathian in Abraham le a suan a paalte munah hi leitung sia amate atu hi ci in kamciam pia hi

Romans5:1 Tu in eite upna tungtawnin Pathian in thutang hong suaksak a
Romans5:2 Tu laitak a ih dinmun ahi Pathian ii thuthiamna sung a theng tu in upna tungtawnin ama in tua munah hong then hi. Tua ahikom eite in Pathian minthanna ih siim natu lametna ih nei hu in ih kisuangtaak hi!
Romans5:3 Ih ngimnate hu zonghin ih angtang hi
Romans5:4 thuak zawkna in Pathian thukimna piangsak in
Romans5:5 Hi lametna in hong thinkiamsak bua hi
Romans5:6 Banghang ziam cile cimaw a ih om laitakin Pathian ii a teal hun ciangin Christ sia mi ngilote atu in hong thi hi.
Romans5:7 Mihing thutang khat atu thina thuak tu sia thu haksa ahi hi. Mihing pha khat atu a thi ngam khat po zongh om tha tu hi.
Romans5:8 Ahihang eite mimaw ih hi laitak ma in eite atu Christ hong thina taw Pathian in eite bangzata in hong it ziam ci hong lak hi.
Romans5:9 Tua ahiciang
Romans5:10 Eite in Pathian ngalte ih hi laitakin
Romans5:11 Ahihang tua teng bek hi ngawl hi; Pathian lawmte hong suaksak Topa Jesus Christ tungtawn a Pathian sepna tungah ih lungdam hi.
Romans5:12 Mihing khat tungtawnin mawna leitung ah hong theng a
Romans5:13 Thukham a kipiak ma in leitung ah mawna om zo hi; ahihang thukham om ngawlna ah mawna sazian kikoi ngawl hi.
Romans5:14 Ahihang Adam hun pan kipan Moses hun dongin thina in mihingte uk a
Romans5:15 Ahihang tuate ngeal kibang ngawl hi
Romans5:16 Tuabangin Pathian piak letsong le mihing khat ii mawna kilaklaw ah kilamdanna om hi. Mawna khat hang “maw hi” ci a thukhenna piang a
Romans5:17 Mihing khat ii mawna tungtawnin thina in hong uk hi. Ahihang Jesus Christ a kici mihing khat ii sepna taw kizui in bangza in a lianzaw thu piang ziam! Pathian ii a kicing thuthiamna le man nei ngawl a hong piak thutang suana a saangte in Christ tungtawnin a ngualzo nuntakna nga tu hi.
Romans5:18 Tua ahikom mawna khat in mihing theampo hong puavawk a
Romans5:19 Mihing khat ii thunit ngawl hu in mihing theampo mawnei a kisuasak bangma in
Romans5:20 Mawna ngamtatna a khanto vaial natu in thukham kipia hi
Romans5:21 Tua ahikom mawna in thina taw hong uk bangma in
Romans6:1 Tua ahile bang ih son tu ziam? Pathian ii thuthiamna a khanto vaial natu in mawna sungah ih nungta tan lai tu ziam?
Romans6:2 Hi ngawl het hi. Eite in mawna thi san zo ih hi ciang bangbangin mawna sungah nungtata lai tu hi ziam?
Romans6:3 Banghang ziam cile hi thu na heak uh ahi hi. Eite Christ taw kikopkhawm tu in ih ki baptize ciang ama thina sung zongh ah a kikopkhawm tu in a ki baptize ih hi hi.
Romans6:4 Tua ahiciang ih ki baptize na taw eite ama taw kivuikhawm a
Romans6:5 Banghang ziam cile ama ii a thi bangma in ih thi ciangin ama taw pumkhat suak ih hile
Romans6:6 Tuaciangin hi thu ih he hi
Romans6:7 Banghang ziam cile mihing khat a thi ciangin mawna tha hatna panin a kisuaktasak ahi hi.
Romans6:8 Christ taw thi khawm zo ih hi nungsang
Romans6:9 Banghang ziam cile Christ sia thina panin kitho kiksak zo a
Romans6:10 Tua ahiciang ama thi ahi hu in
Romans6:11 Tuasia bangma in no zongh mawna taw kipee thute ah a thisa in
Romans6:12 Na cii le sa deina na zui ngawl natu in
Romans6:13 Tua bek dom ngawlin
Romans6:14 Mawna in hong uk nawn ngawl tu hi; banghang ziam cile note in thukham nuai ah nungta nawn ngawl a
Romans6:15 Tua ahile bang ci tu hi ziam? Thukham khutnuai ah om nawn ngawl a Pathian ii thuthiamna khutnuai ah om zo ih hile mawna ih vawt lai tu ziam? Hi ngawl hi!
Romans6:16 Mihing khat pawpo ii thu ni tu in noma le noma na ki aap uh ciangin a sila na suak uh sia maan takin na he uh hi — mawna sila na hi uh le thina taw kizom a
Romans6:17 Bangpo ahizong Pathian tungah lungdamko tawng! Banghang ziam cile khatvei lai in note in mawna silate na hi uh a
Romans6:18 Note mawna panin hong kisuaktasak zo a

Romans6:21 Maizum huai na saknate na vawt uh ciangin
Romans6:22 Ahihang tu in note sia mawna panin hong kisuaktasak zo a

Romans7:4 Ka suapuite awng
Romans7:5 Banghang ziam cile mihing pianzia bangin ih nuntak laitakin Thukham ii holna taw maw nopnate in ih pumpi sungah na hong seam a
Romans7:6 Bangpo ahizong
Romans7:7 Tua ahile bang ih ci tu ziam? Thukham mama pha ngawl hi ih ci tu ziam? Hi ngawl het hi! Thukham in mawna a ci sia hong hesak hi zaw hi. Thukham in
Romans7:8 Thupiakna ii sawl hu in mawna in ka sungah dungawk nopna tuatuam hong piansak natu hunpha nga hi. Thukham om ngawlna munah mawna sia a thi ahi hi.
Romans7:9 Keima ma zongh khatvei lai in thukham ngawl taw ka nungta ngei hi; ahihang thupiakna a om hunlam ka heak tak ciangin
Romans7:10 tuaciang kei ka thi hi. Tuasia ciangin nuntakna a piangsak tu thupiak sia kei atu thina ahi hi.
Romans7:11 Mawna in hunpha nga in thupiakna tungtawnin na hong seam a
Romans7:12 Tua ahikom Thukham in thiangtho a
Romans7:13 Tua ahile hi bangin a pha thu khat in
Romans7:14 Thukham sia thaa taw kisai hi ci in ih he hi; ahihang keima in a thithei mihing hi a
Romans7:15 Ka sep ka vawt sia bang ziam ci in ka tel bua hi; banghang ziam cile ka vawt nopte ka vawt bua a
Romans7:16 Ka vawt nop ngawlte ka vawt ciangin
Romans7:17 Tua ahikom hite a vawt sia in kei tatak ka hi bua hi; ka sung a teang mawna sia ahi hi.
Romans7:18 Mihing ka hina sungah — a pha bangma om ngawl hi ci in ka he hi. Banghang ziam cile a pha vawt nopna ka sungah a om bel hangin ka vawt thei bua hi.
Romans7:19 A pha ka vawt nopte ka vawt bua a
Romans7:20 Ka vawt nop ngawlte ka vawt le tuabangin a vawt sia kei ka hi bua hi. Ka sung a teang mawna in vawt ahi hi.
Romans7:21 Tua ahikom ngeina khat om hi ci in ka phawk hi. A pha khat ka vawt nop ciangin
Romans7:22 Ka sungah a nungta sia in Pathian thukham diksa hi.
Romans7:23 Ahihang ka pumpi sungah ngeina dangkhat in na hong seam hi — ka thinsung ii dik a sak ngeina sia a langpan ngeina khat sia ahi hi. Ka pumpi sung a na hong seam mawna taw kisai thukham ii thongtaakpa hong suaksak hi.
Romans7:24 Bangza in a thinngim mihing khi ziam! Thina sung hong zotpui hi pumpi panin akua in hong suatak tu ziam?
Romans7:25 Ih Topa Jesus tungtawnin hong suaktasak Pathian tungah lungdamko tawng! Tua ahikom ka dinmun sia hi bang hi: keima hantang in ci leang Pathian thukham sia ka thinsung bek in zui zo a

Romans8:4 Pathian ii hi bangin a sepna in ei
Romans8:5 Mihing pianzia bangin a nungtate thinsung sia cii le sa deina in uk hi. Thaa ii sawl bangin a nungtate thinsung sia Thaa ii deina in uk hi.
Romans8:6 Mihing pianzia in na uksak uh le thina piang a; Thaa in na uksak uh le

Romans8:8 Mihing pianzia a zuite in Pathian a lungdamsak thei bua hi.

Romans8:12 Tua ahikom ka suapuite awng

Romans8:14 Pathian Thaa ii lampuina a nga mihing peuma Pathian ii tate ahi uh hi.

Romans8:16 Pathian Thaa in eima thaa taw kikopin
Romans8:17 A tate ih hi zawk nungsang a mite atu a khealsia thuphate ih lua tu a
Romans8:18 Tu hun a ih thuakte in hong kilangh pheang tu
Romans8:19 A kibitphua sa theampo in Pathian ii tate sia akua bang teng hi tu ziam ci in hong kilaak tu kaal ngakla in om uh hi.
Romans8:20 Banghang ziam cile bitphua sate sia amate ii tupna le sawmnate a taan natu in
Romans8:21 bitphua sate in ni khat ni ciangin a muatcip theina sungah sila a tanna sung panin kisuaktasak tu a Pathian ii tate in suatak minthanna nga khawm tu uh hi.
Romans8:22 Banghang ziam cile nausuak tun a nat bangin tu hun dong ma bitphuasa theampo in na a sakna taw tau in om hi ci ih he hi.
Romans8:23 Ahihang bitphua sate bek hi ngawlin Pathian ii a leap a letsong hong piak ahi ei Thaa a neite zongh in

Romans8:25 Ahihang ih mu ngawl lai khat muangmaw ih hile

Romans8:28 Pathian ii tupna taw a sam sa ahi ama a itte atu in na theampo Pathian in a phabel in piangsak hi.

Romans11:5 Tu laitakin zongh tuabang ma ahi hi. Thuthiamna taw Pathian tealsa mihing tawm om lai hi.
Romans11:6 A tealna in ama thuthiam hu hi a
Romans11:7 Tua ahile bang ih ci tu ziam? Israel mite in a zon uh sia mu ngawl hi. Pathian tealtuam mi pawlkhat in mu bek hi. A dangte ahile Pathian samna nangonthaak hi.
Romans11:8 “Pathian in a thinsung uh le
Romans11:9 Tuaciang David in
Romans11:10 Khua a mu thei ngawl natu in a mit uh kitawcipsak tahen a
Romans11:11 Tua ahile Jew te a lutu uh ciangin a lalcip tu in a liik ziam? ci in kong dongh hi. Hi ngawl hi! Amate maw ahikom ngupna sia Gentile te tungah theng a Jew te ii een tu in kivawt ahi hi.
Romans11:12 Jew te ii mawna hu in leitung bup in thupha nasia takin saang hi. Tuaciang amate ii thaa zawngkhalna hu in Gentile te thupha nasia takin kipia hi. Tua ahile Jew te sia a pawlcing in a kihuam siat ciangin thupha saanna bangza in lianzaw seseam tu ziam!
Romans11:13 Tu in no Gentile te tungah hong son ka hi hi: Gentile te atu a sawltakpa khat ka hi laiteng in
Romans11:14 Ka minampuite in eenna thin neisakin
Romans11:15 Banghang ziam cile amate tuabangin a kinial ciangin leitung mihing dangte Pathian ngal dinmun panin
Romans11:16 Anluum a kileap masa sia Pathian atu in a kipia le a anluum buppi zongh ama aa ahi hi. Thingzungte Pathian atu in a kipia le a baakte zongh ama aa ahi hi.
Romans11:17 Inn olive baak pawlkhat kithiaktan a
Romans11:18 Tua ahikom thingbaak bangin a kithiaktante sia na zawngsak bua het tu uh hi. Banghangin note kiphasak thei tu nu ziam? Note in a baak khat na hi bek uh hi. Note in a zung na vaak na taa bua uh hi — a zung in note hong vaak hi.

Romans11:20 Hi hi

Romans11:23 Tuaciang Jew te in a up thei ngawlna uh teng nusia hile
Romans11:24 No Gentile te ahi ngam olive thingbaak sia kithiaktan a
Romans11:25 Suapuite awng
Romans11:26 Tuaciang hi thu in Israel mite theampo a kihut tu zia hi tu hi. Laithiangtho in: “Hunpa Zion panin hong pai tu a
Romans11:27 Amate ii mawna ka maisak ciangin
Romans11:28 Jew te in Lungdamna Thupha a nial uh hu in no Gentile te phattuam natu in Pathian ngalte suak uh hi. Ahihang Pathian tealna hangin a pute a pate hu in amate in
Romans11:29 Banghang ziam cile tealin thupha a piakte tungtaang ah Pathian in a thin a kheal bua hi.
Romans11:30 No Gentile te na hi uh le a bosa hun sungah Pathian thu na ni bua uh hi; ahihang tu in Jew te thu nit ngawl hu in Pathian ii hesuakna na saang uh hi.
Romans11:31 Tuasia bangma in
Romans11:32 Banghang ziam cile amate theampo tungah a hesuakna a lak natu in Pathian in mihing theampo thunit nop ngawlna ii kol a bul luangtaate suaksak siat hi.
Romans11:33 Pathian hauna bangza in lian ziam! a ciimna le a heakna bangza in thuk ziam! Ama ii thukhensat nate akua in sontel thei tu ziam? Ama zia akua in he ziam?

Romans11:35 Hong lo kik tu in akua in ama tungah bang pia ngei ziam?” ci hi.
Romans11:36 Banghang ziam cile na theampo ama bitphua sa hi a
Romans12:1 Tua ahikom suapuite awng
Romans12:2 Hi leitung pianzia zil in na om heak vun a
Romans12:3 Tuaciang Pathian ii thuthiamna letsong hong piak hu in
Romans12:4 Ih pumpi sungah na tam mama om hi
Romans12:5 Tuasia bangma in eite mihing tam ih hi hangin Christ sungah kipawlin pumkhat ih hi hi. Khat le khat pumpi sung nate bangin ih kizom hi.
Romans12:6 Tua ahikom ih saan letsong tuatuamte Pathian ii hong piak thuthiamna taw kizui in ih zangh tu hi. Ih letsong sia Pathian thupuakte son natu ahile upna ih neiza ciaciang taw ih son tu hi.
Romans12:7 Sepsak natu ahile zong ih sepsak tu hi. Hil natu ahile zong ih hil tu hi.
Romans12:8 Ngual hanthot natu ahile tuabang ma in ih seam tu hi. A neisa ngual a hawmte in ngo takin hawm tu hi. Thuneina neite in nasep hanciam tahen a
Romans12:9 Ki itna in thin tak ahi tu thupi hi. A sia theampo ensan vun a
Romans12:10 Khat le khat Tapidaw unau khat bangin ki it in
Romans12:11 Nasep hanciam vun a
Romans12:12 Na lametna in hong lungdamsak tahen a
Romans12:13 Na neisa uhte na suapui a cimaw na Tapidaw puite hawm vun a
Romans12:14 Hong vawtsiate thupha a saan natu in Pathian munah thungetsak vun — hi hi
Romans12:15 A lungdamte taw na lungdam khawm vun a
Romans12:16 A kuama theampo atu a kibangin thinbotna na nei vun. Kiphasak heak vun a
Romans12:17 A sia in hong vawt a om le a sia taw thuk heak vun. Mihing theampo ii pha hi ci in a ngaisutte sep tu hanciam vun.
Romans12:18 Mihing theampo taw kilem a na nuntak thei natu in

Romans12:21 Siatna in zosak heak vun; siatna sia phatna taw na zozaw vun.

Romans13:3 Banghang ziam cile ngamukte sia mihing phate ii kiitak tu hi ngawl a
Romans13:4 banghang ziam cile amate in Pathian naseam hi a
Romans13:5 Hi thu hu in thuneite thu na ni tavun — Pathian ii daan hong piak thei hang bek zongh hi ngawlin noma in khentel theina thin na nei uh hang zongh hi tahen.
Romans13:6 Hi thu hu in shia na pia vun
Romans13:7 Amate tungah na batte uh na lo vun

Romans14:1 Note sungah upna zawngkhalte na saang vun. Ahihang amate ii aituam ngaisutnate tungtaang ah na kinial heak vun.
Romans14:2 Mihing khat in a upna hu in
Romans14:3 Neak thei theampo a nepa in
Romans14:4 Ngualdang khat ii naseamte a sit tu in nang in bang thu nei ni ziam? Amate nasepna a zaw le a lel huvau a sit tu in a Topa om hi. Amate in zo tu hi
Romans14:5 Mihing khat in ni tuam khat sia a dang nite sangin thupi zaw in ngaisun hi
Romans14:6 Ni tuam khat a thupi tuamin a ngaisun sia in Topa upatna taw ngaisun ahi hi; bang khat po a ne khat in Topa upatna taw ne ahi hi; banghang ziam cile ama in Pathian ii a piak an atu in lungdamko hi. Bang khat po neak tu a ten sia zongh in Topa upatna taw a ten hi a
Romans14:7 Eite sungah khat zongh in ama nguak atu in a nungta ih om bua a — ama nguak atu in a thi zongh ih om bua hi.
Romans14:8 Ih nungta le Topa atu a nungta ih hi a
Romans14:9 Banghang ziam cile a thite le a nungtate ii Topa ahi natu in Christ thi a nuntakna sungah tho hi.
Romans14:10 Tua ahile note antee bek a nete in — na suapuite tungah banghangin thusit nu ziam — Banghangin no na theampo a nete in na suapuite zawngsak nu ziam? Eite theampo thusitna thuak tu in
Romans14:11 Banghang ziam cile laithiangtho in
Romans14:12 Tua ahikom eite khat simin ih hi babang Pathian tungah ih pualaak tu hi.
Romans14:13 Tua ahikom khat le khat
Romans14:14 Topa Jesus taw ka kikopna panin ka heak thu khat in bang ziam cile an khat pawpo in ama nguakin a nin om ngawl hi; ahihang mihing khat in an khat nin hi ci in a um le ama atu in tua an sia nin hi.
Romans14:15 Bang khat po na neak uh sia in na suapuipa thin nop ngawlna a piangsak le ki itna taw ngamtatna hi nawn ngawl hi. Na neakna uh taw Christ ii thina taw a tat sa mihing khat na lalsak heak vun.
Romans14:16 Pha hi ci in na ngaisutte uh na zangh khial heak vun.
Romans14:17 Banghang ziam cile Pathian Ngam in neakna le dawnna thu hi ngawl a
Romans14:18 A kua po ahizong hi bang a

Romans14:20 Anneak huvau taw Pathian nasepna lalsak heak vun. An theampo neak thei ahihang
Romans14:21 Na suapuipa a puk natu a piangsak thei sa ahizong

Romans14:23 Ahihang ama in a neak a dawnte tungah thinnop ngawlna a nei le

Romans16:1 Cenchreae pawlpi ah a seam ih suapuinu Phoebe sia note tungah ka pokna kam kong thaak hi.
Romans16:2 Pathian ii mihingte ngamtat tu bangin Topa min taw ama na saang vun a
Romans16:3 Jesus Christ sungah ka naseppui Priscilla le Aquila tungah paupuina kam ka thaak hi;
Romans16:4 Amate in kei atu in a nuntakna aitaa ngam hi; amate tungah ka lungdam hi — kei nguak bek zongh hi ngawlin
Romans16:5 Amate inn ah a kikhawm pawlpi tung zongh ah paupuina kam ka thaak hi. Asia ngamkhen pan Christ a um phitbelpa
Romans16:6 Note atu in nasia takin na a seam Mary ka paupui hi.
Romans16:7 Ka Jew mipui
Romans16:8 Topa kipawlna sungah ih seppui Ampliatus ka it ka lawm zongh ka paupui hi.
Romans16:9 Christ nasepna sungah ih seppui Urbanus le Stachys ka it ka lawmte zongh ka paupui hi.
Romans16:10 Apelles ka paupui hi
Romans16:11 Ka Jew mipui Herodion le Narcissus innkuanpuite sung Tapidaw suapuite ka paupui hi.
Romans16:12 Topa nasepna sungah a seam Tryphaena le Tryphosa luangin
Romans16:13 Topa nasepna sungah a kician tuamin a seam Rufus le a tapa bang tatak a hong vawt
Romans16:14 Ka paupuina kam Asyncritus
Romans16:15 Philologus le Julia
Romans16:16 Khat le khat unau ki itna taw kipaupui in na kinamh vun. Christ pawlpite theampo in no hong paupui hi.
Romans16:17 Suapuite awng: pawl khenna piangsak a
Romans16:18 Banghang ziam cile tuabangin a ngamtate in ih Topa Christ atu in a seamte hi ngawl a
Romans16:19 Lungdamna thu tungah na thumaan uh sia a kuama po in hong he a
Romans16:20 Tuaciang ih thinnopna ii naak ahi Pathian in Satan sia hai ngawlin na peang nuai ah siiktham tu hi. Ih Topa Jesus thuthiamna in note taw hong om tahen.
Romans16:21 Ka naseppui Timothy in hong paupui hi; tuasia bangma Lucius
Romans16:22 Hi lai a atpa keima
Romans16:23 A inn sia pawlpi kikhopna in a kizangh ka zintunna pa Gaius zongh in hong paupui hi; khuapi sumkeampa Erastus le ih suapui Quartus in hong paupui hi.
Romans16:24 Ih Topa Jesus Christ ii thuthiamna note theampo taw hong om tahen.
Romans16:25 Eite in Pathian tungah minthanna pia tawng. Jesus Christ huvau Lungdamna Thupha ka hilna bang le a bosa hun sau mama sungah a kiseal thumaan thutak hong kilak bangin Ama in na upna uh sungah kip takin na din thei natu in vawt thei hi.
Romans16:26 Tu in ahile kamsaangte lai atna sung panin tua thumaan thutak sia a kilanghtakna ah kikoi zo hi; tuaciangin a nungta tawntung Pathian sawlna taw minam theampo in um a
Romans16:27 Ciimna namcin a nei

1Corinthians4:11 Hi hun dong mama in kote ngilkial dangtaak in ka om uh hi; puansia ngapkaai ka sil uh a; kote hong kisaat hi; mun khat pan mun khat ah ka vak kawkoai uh hi;
1Corinthians4:12 nasep haksate ka sep uh manin ka zawm dikdek uh hi. Hong kitomlaw ciangin thupha ka pia uh hi; hong kivawtsiat ciangin ka thuak uh hi;
1Corinthians4:13 hong kilan ciangin kamthiam taw ka zo kik uh hi. Kote in hi leitung ninteakte bang ka hi lel uh a; tu hun dong mama in

1Corinthians6:1 Mihing khat in a Tapidawpuite khat taw thu a nei ciangin
1Corinthians6:2 Pathian ii mihingte in leitung ii thukhen tu ahi hunlam he ngawl nu ziam? Pha hi
1Corinthians6:3 Vantunglalangte tungah thukhen tu na hi uh hunlam kihe ngawl nu ziam? Tua ahile hi nuntakna sungah thute na khen thei zaw kan tu uh hi!
1Corinthians6:4 Tuabang thute hong piang le
1Corinthians6:5 Note atu in maizumhuai mama hi! Thu kinei Tapidaw puite kilaklaw ah thu a khen thei tu mihing ciim khat beak na pawl sungah om nanak tu hi.
1Corinthians6:6 Tua hi napi in Tapidaw thunei khat in a dang khat sia thukhenzum then a
1Corinthians6:7 Note sungah na thu kineina uh mama in na nginat ngawlna uh lak hi. Ngual in no tungah hong khial le no atu phazaw ngawl ziam? Ngual in hong suttol le no atu phazaw ngawl ziam?
1Corinthians6:8 Tuabang hi tu kimlai
1Corinthians6:9 Mihing ngilote in Pathian Ngam lua ngawl het tu ci in he nu hi. Noma le noma kitheam heak vun; mihing a paktatte le milim a biate
1Corinthians6:10 na ngu theite
1Corinthians6:11 Note pawlkhat in tuabang na ngamta ngei uh hi. Ahihang note sia mawna panin hong kithiansua zo hi; Pathian tungah hong ki aaptuam zo hi. Topa Jesus Christ le eite Pathian ii Thaa in Pathian mai ah note thutang hong suaksak zo hi.

1Corinthians6:13 Khat po in
1Corinthians6:14 Pathian in Topa sia thina pan tho kiksak a
1Corinthians6:15 Na pumpite uh sia Christ' pumpi ii a khen tuatuamte ahi hunlam na he uh hi. Christ ii pumpi sungah a kihel khen khat la in pumpi zuak numei ii khen khat
1Corinthians6:16 Ahibuale pumpi zuak numei taw a pumpi a ngawm sia in ama taw cii le sa in pumkhat tak khat suak ahi hunlam he ngawl na hi bua uh ziam? Laithiangtho in
1Corinthians6:17 Topa taw a kingawm khat sia ahile ama taw Thaa thu sungah pumkhat suak tu hi.

1Corinthians7:20 Pathian ii sapna a saan hun lai a

1Corinthians7:24 Ka suapuite awng
1Corinthians7:25 Tu in zi nei ngawl pasal nei ngawlte huvau nong dokna taw kisai in: Topa tung panin thupiakna nga ngawl khi hi. Ahihang Topa hesuakna taw a muan taak khat bangin keima ngaisutna kong pia hi.
1Corinthians7:26 Tu a thinngimna a om sia ngaisun leang

1Corinthians7:32 Thinngimna pan na suatak tu sia kong deisak hi. Zi nei ngawl khat in Topa nasepna thinbot hi

1Corinthians13:8 Itna in a tawntungin kip hi. Kamsaannate om ahihang tawmvei atu bek ahi hi; kam tumdangte pau theina letsongte om ahihang bo tu hi; heakna letsong om ahihang bo tu hi.

1Corinthians14:3 Ahihang Pathian thu a thangsakte in mihingte tungah pau hi a

2Corinthians1:1 Pathian ii deina taw Christ Jesus ii sawltakpa ahi Paul le ih suapuipa Timothy in — Corinth khua ah Pathian ii pawlpi le Achaia ngam bup ah Pathian ii mihingte theampo tungah lai kong thaak uh hi:
2Corinthians1:2 Ih Pa Pathian le ih Topa Jesus Christ in thuthiamna le thinnopna hong pia tahen.
2Corinthians1:3 Pathian le ih Topa Jesus Christ ii Pa
2Corinthians1:4 Pathian tung pan ih saan hunate ma zanghin ngimna namcin a thuakte ih hu thei natu in
2Corinthians1:5 Christ ii thuakna tam mama sungah ih kihel bangin Christ tungtawnin Pathian huna tam mama ih nga hi.
2Corinthians1:6 Ka thuak uh le note atu in
2Corinthians1:7 Tua ahikom note sungah ka lametna uh sia ngawk zo ngeingawl hi; ko thuaknate nong thuak pui uh bangma in
2Corinthians1:8 Suapuite awng Asia ngamkhen sungah ngim ka ngana uhte kong phawksak nuam hi. Kote tungah hong kisuanh vanhte lian mama a ngit leih ahikom
2Corinthians1:9 Kote tungah thi daan hong kipia bangza in ka ngaisun uh hi. Ahihang hi thu sia
2Corinthians1:10 Tuabang a kiitakhuai thithei natu panin
2Corinthians1:11 tua in kote nong panpui na uh taw thu nong ngetsakna uh hang ahi hi. Tua ahikom kote atu thu tam mama hong kingetsaknate hong kizo tu a
2Corinthians1:12 Hi leitung ah ka nuntakna uh le a tuanin note taw ka kizopna uh sia Pathian ii hong piaksa thinmamna le citakna ii hong ukna le Pathian' thuthiamna ii vaangletna hang hi a
2Corinthians1:13 Na sim thei tu le na tel thei tu teng bek kong at uh hi. Ahizong tu in a lalang bek hong tel tu na hi uh hang
2Corinthians1:14 
2Corinthians1:15 Hite theampo thumaan hi ci in ka telthiang hu in
2Corinthians1:16 Banghang ziam cile Judea ngam ah ka khualhaw natu taw kisai in note tung pan huna dei ka hikom Macedonia ka pai lam le ka cia lamin note kungah baang tu in ka ngeal hi.
2Corinthians1:17 Hi bang ka ngeal ciangin thukheal memeang nong sa uh ziam? Hi bangin ngealnate ka nei ciangin keima deina bek taw

2Corinthians2:1 Tua ahikom note kong heesak ngawl natu in note kungah pai kik ngawl tu in ka khensat zo hi.
2Corinthians2:2 Banghang ziam cile note hong heesak thong leng kei hong lungdamsak tu akua om nawn tu ziam? Keima ii kong heesak te ma om bek tu hi.
2Corinthians2:3 Tua hu in no tungah tua laithak kong at ahi hi — Keima hong lungdamsak tute ma in hong heesak tu ahiciang
2Corinthians2:4 Lai kong thaak lai in thinsung buaingawpna le khuangaina taw thitui taakin lai kong at hi; ka tupna sia note kong heesak nopna hi ngawl a

2Corinthians2:10 Khat po ii a ngamtatna tungtaang ah mawna na maisak uh ciang
2Corinthians2:11 Satan ngealnate he ka hikom in; ama hong nopzaw ngawl natu in ka maisak ahi hi.
2Corinthians2:12 Christ huvau Lungdamna Thupha hil tu in Troas khua ka thet ciang tua munah Topa in nasep natu lampi hon sa in a koi ka mu hi.
2Corinthians2:13 Ahihang tualai ah ih suapuipa Titus mu zo ngawl ka hikom nasia takin ka thinngim hi. Tua ahikom tua munah a om mihingte mangpha thaak in Macedonia ah ka pai suak hi.

2Corinthians3:15 Tuni ngawngawn dongin Moses Thukham a sim uh ciangin tua dial in amate thinsung siincip lai hi.

2Corinthians6:2 Pathian pauna ngai vun: “Note maipha kong piak tu hun hong thet ciang
2Corinthians6:3 Ka nasepna uh taw kisai in khat pawpo ii mawna hong zon tu sia ka dei bua uh a
2Corinthians6:4 Na ka sepna sung theampo ah Pathian naseamte ka hina uh ka lakna uh in
2Corinthians6:5 Kote sia hong kivel a
2Corinthians6:6 Pathian naseamte ka hina uh sia thiangtho nuntakna
2Corinthians6:7 a maan thuhilna le Pathian ii vaangletna teng taw ka lak uh hi. Thutang suana sia ka ngalhiam uh hi a
2Corinthians6:8 Kote sia hong kithasia a
2Corinthians6:9 ngual theampo in hong he ahihang a kihe ngeingawlte bangin hong kivawt hi; nong mu uh bangma kote nungta napi a thisate bangin hong kivawt hi. Daan hong kipia ahizong
2Corinthians6:10 hong heesak ahihang ka lung uh dam tawntung hi; a zawng bang ka hi uh hangin
2Corinthians6:11 Corinth khua a om ka it lawmte awng! No tungah ip nei ngawlin kong son zo uh hi; ka thinsung kongkha uh kong hon siat uh hi.
2Corinthians6:12 Note tungah kote in ka thinsung uh hong khakbil hi ngawlin; noma in kote sia na thinsung uh hong khabil nu hi.

Galatians2:4 ahizong mihing pawlkhat in vunteap atsak nuam hi. Christ Jesus taw ih kipumkhatna tungtawnin ih nga suatakna thu kan nuamin

Galatians2:7 Jew te tungah lungdamna thu hil tu nasep sia Peter tungah a piak bangin Pathian in kei sia Gentile te tungah lungdamna thu hil tu in nasep hong piak sia amate ii a musa ahi hi.
