Galatians3:1 Galatia mihing mawmawte awng! Akua in hong bum ziam? Jesus Christ ii thinglamtee tungah a thina thu sia na mittang uh taw
Galatians3:2 Hi thu khat sia hong son tavun: Pathian Thaa sia Thukham ii deina
Galatians3:3 Bangbangin tu zata in mawmaw thei nu ziam! Pathian Thaa taw kipan phot nu hi; tu in noma thahatna taw khup sawm nu ziam?
Galatians3:4 Na heaksa theampo no atu in bangma mama hi ngawl ahi ziam? Tawm peuma khiakna nei nanak tu hi!
Galatians3:5 Pathian in Thaa hong pia a note sungah nalamdang lakna hong vawt sia Thukham ii deina na zui uh hang ziam maw lungdamna thu za a na up uh hang ziam?
Galatians3:6 Abraham tungah thupiangte ngaisun vun; laithiangtho in
Galatians3:7 Tua ahiciang Abraham suan tatakte sia upna a nei mihingte ahi hi
Galatians3:8 Pathian in Gentile te sia upna tungtawnin thutang suaksak tu hi ci in laithiangtho in sonkhol hi. Tua ahikom laithiangtho in Lungdamna Thupha sia Abraham tungah
Galatians3:9 Abraham in um a thupha kipia hi; tua ahikom a umte theampo ama bangin thupha kipia hi.
Galatians3:10 Thukham zuina a suangte sia haamsiatna nuai ah nungta hi. Banghang ziam cile laithiangtho in
Galatians3:11 Tu in Thukham taw Pathian mai ah kuama thutang kisuaksak ngawl ci sia kitel thiang hi
Galatians3:12 Ahihang Thukham in
Galatians3:13 Ahihang Christ in ei atu a kihaamsiatna taw Thukham ii hong puak haamsiatna panin eite ama in hong tan zo hi! Banghang ziam cile laithiangtho in
Galatians3:14 Upna tungtawnin Pathian ii hong kamciamsa Thaa ih nga natu le Abraham tungah Pathian kamciamsa thuphate
Galatians3:15 Ka suapuite awng
Galatians3:16 Tu in
Galatians3:17 Ka son nop sia Pathian in Abraham taw thuciamna vawt a
Galatians3:18 Banghang ziam cile Pathian letsong sia Thukham tungah kibulphu hile
Galatians3:19 Tua ahile Thukham ii tupna in bang ziam? Tatkhialna sia bang ziam ci in a lak tu in a kibelap ahi hi
Galatians3:20 Ahihang mihing khat nguak sepna sungah palai kul ngawl hi; tuaciang Pathian sia khat ahi hi.
Galatians3:21 Tua ahile Thukham sia Pathian kamciamte taw a kileebul ziam? Kileebul ngawl het hi! Banghang ziam cile mihingte in nuntakna hong pia thei Thukham khat a saang zo le tua thukham zuina taw mihing sim in Pathian mai ah thutang kisuaksak thei tu hi.
Galatians3:22 Ahihang laithiangtho in leitung bup sia mawna vaangletna nuai ah om hi
Galatians3:23 Ahihang upna nei natu hun hong thet ma in Thukham in hi hong pai tu upna hong kipualaak mateng eite theampo thongtaak bangin hong khabil hi.
Galatians3:24 Tuaciangin Upna tungtawnin Pathian mai ah thutang ih sua thei natu in
Galatians3:25 Tu in upna nei natu hun sia hisung hong theng zo ahikom
Galatians3:26 Note theampo sia upna tungtawnin Christ Jesus taw na kipumkhatna uh hu in Pathian ii tate na suak siat uh hi.
Galatians3:27 Note Christ taw na kipumkhatna sungah na ki baptize uh a
Galatians3:28 Tua ahikom Jew te le Gentile te
Galatians3:29 Christ ii neisa na hi uh le
Galatians4:1 Ahihang tu in zomto suak leang — Pa ii ngamh a lua tu tapa in na theampo ama ii neisa ahihang
Galatians4:2 Ama a khanmoi laitakin a pa ii a hun ciam dong a vai teng a hawmsak tu le ama a en tu in pasal pawlkhat om hi.
Galatians4:3 Tuasia bangma in eite zongh thaa lamsang ah ih khanthin matengin vaannuai bup a uk thaa te ii sila in ih om hi.
Galatians4:4 Ahihang a hun hong cin pepeet ciang
Galatians4:5 Pathian ii tapate tanute ih sua natu in thukham khutnuai ah a omte a tat natu in tuabangin hong piang hi.
Galatians4:6 Note sia ama ii tapa tanute na hina uh a lak natu in
Galatians4:7 Tua ahikom nang sila hi nawn ngawlin tapa khat na hi hi. Tuaciangin ama tapa hi zo na hikom
Galatians4:8 Hun bosa sungah note in Pathian na he bua uh hi
Galatians4:9 Ahihang tu in Pathian na heak zawk uh ciang — tua ahibuale Pathian ii no hong heak zawkciang ci leang — banghangin tua a zawngkhal
Galatians4:10 Nite
Galatians4:11 No huvau in ka thinngim hi! No atu ka sep sa teng bangma a kimang thei ngawl a suak bua natu ziam?
Galatians4:12 Ka suapuite awng
Galatians4:13 Lungdamna thu note kong hil maksakna ahang sia na he lai uh hi; ka ciinat hu a hong hil ka hi hi.
Galatians4:14 Ka pumpi omzia sia note atu in thinngimpi khat ahitazong
Galatians4:15 Tualai in lungdam mama nu hi! Ahitazong bang teng piang man ziam? Na mittang uh khelkeak in kei hong pia thei le uhte hong pia nuam liangin om nu hi
Galatians4:16 Tua ahile
Galatians4:17 Tua midangte in note nasia takin hong thinnuammaw hi
Galatians4:18 Tu in tuabang a kithin nopmawkna tatakte sia tupna le sawmna pha hithong le — hisia in note taw kong omkhop ciang bek hi ngawlin
Galatians4:19 Ka it tanote awng
Galatians4:20 Tu laitakin note taw kong omkhawm thei nuam hi
Galatians4:21 Thukham khutnuai ah a om nuamte
Galatians4:22 Abraham in tapa nii nei a
Galatians4:23 Sila numei taw a hin tapa sia mihing pian ngei bang a
Galatians4:24 Hi te sia limlakna khat bangin kihe thei hi. Numei nii sia thuciamna nam nii hi. Sila in a piang tate a hing sia Hagar hi
Galatians4:25 Hagar sia Arabia ngam Sinai Mual ii lim hi a
Galatians4:26 Ahihang vantung Jerusalem sia a suakta hi a
Galatians4:27 Banghang ziam cile laithiangtho in
Galatians4:28 Isaac sia kamciamna panin piang ahi bangma tu in no
Galatians4:29 Tua hunlai in a pian ngei bangin a piang tapa in Pathian Thaa taw a piang tapa sia vawtsia hi; tu in zongh tuabang ma ahi hi.
Galatians4:30 Ahihang laithiangtho in bang na ci ziam? “Sila numei le a tapa paikhiasak vun; banghang ziam cile sila numei ii tapa in a suakta numei ii tapa taw a pa lamhsa a lua khawm buatu hi
Galatians4:31 Tua ahikom ka suapuite awng
Galatians5:1 Suatakna sia ei neisa hi — Christ in hong suaktasak zo hi! Tua ahikom a suakta mihingte bangin
Galatians5:2 Ngai vun! Keima Paul in kong ci hi
Galatians5:3 Khatvei ma kong ci kik hi
Galatians5:4 Thukham zuina taw Pathian mai ah thutang sua natu na hanciam uh le no teng in noma le noma Christ kung pan a kikhaktan na hi uh hi. Note in Pathian ii thuthiamna puasia ah na om uh hi.
Galatians5:5 Kote ka hi uh le ka lam etna uh sia Pathian in thutang hong suasak tu ci thu ahi hi; hi thusia ka upna uh tungtawnin Pathian ii Thaa vaangletna taw hong seam tu hi ci in ka ngak uh sia ahi hi.
Galatians5:6 Banghang ziam cile Christ Jesus taw pumkhatin ka om uh ciang vunteap atna ahizong
Galatians5:7 Na vawt uh sia pha mama hi! Akua in thumaan thu na nit tu sia hong khaktan ziam? Bangbangin ama in hong kaizawn ziam?
Galatians5:8 No hong sam Pathian in tuabangin hong vawt ngawl hi.
Galatians5:9 “A kithau sa anvui a khan natu in tol tawm bek kisamh hi
Galatians5:10 Ahihang note huvau in thinmuanna ka nei lai hi. Topa taw pum khatin ih nuntakna in
Galatians5:11 Ahihang kei ka hile
Galatians5:12 No hong nawngkaisak mite tai siat le ka oai hi; amate le amate cil kinget vet tahen!
Galatians5:13 Ka suapuite awng
Galatians5:14 Banghang ziam cile Thukham buppi sia thupiak khat in kingawm hi: “Nangma le nangma na ki it bangin na innpaamte na it in.”
Galatians5:15 Ahihang ngamsate bangin na ngamta uh a
Galatians5:16 Kong son thu in hi sia ahi hi: Thaa in na nuntakna uh zeaksak vun
Galatians5:17 Banghang ziam cile ih mihing pianzia ii deite sia Thaa ii deite taw kilangpan hi
Galatians5:18 Thaa in hong lampui le Thukham khutnuai ah na om nawn bua uh hi.
Galatians5:19 Mihing pianzia ii sepna sia thiang takin kimu hi. Tua sia in nu le pa paktatna
Galatians5:20 milim biakna le bum le ai toaina te hi. Mihingte khat le khat kingalin kido uh hi; amate ki eangin
Galatians5:21 kidungawkna
Galatians5:22 Ahihang Thaa in itna
Galatians5:23 kiniam khiakna le eima le eima ki uk zawknate piangsak hi. Hi te a langpan thukham bangma a om bua hi.
Galatians5:24 Tuaciang Christ Jesus ii neisa ahite in
Galatians5:25 Thaa in nuntakna ei hong pia zo hi; ama in ih nuntakna zongh hong uk nanak tu hi.
Galatians5:26 Ei sia khat le khat tungah kiphasakin
Galatians6:1 Ka suapuite awng
Galatians6:2 Khat le khat vanhngitte na kidawn tavun
Galatians6:3 Khat po in ama sia bangma hi ngawl napi
Galatians6:4 Mihing khat simin ama le ama a ngamtatna kisit hen. A pha in a ngamta khat in ngualdang khat ii ngamtatna taw kiteengat ngawlin
Galatians6:5 Banghang ziam cile mihing sim in a vanh uh tek a puak kul tu hi.
Galatians6:6 Tapidaw thu a kihil pasal khat in
Galatians6:7 Noma le noma kitheam heak vun; Pathian sia kuama ii theam zawk hi ngawl hi. Mihing khat in a poai bang lianin a at tu hi.
Galatians6:8 Ama in leitung pumpi deina lo sungah a poai le
Galatians6:9 Tua ahikom na pha sepna sungah toi kisa bua tawng; banghang ziam cile thinkiam in tawp bua po leang ih anlaak tu hun hong theng tu hi.
Galatians6:10 Tua ahikom hunpha ih nga simin mihing theampo tungah a pha ih seam tu a
Galatians6:11 Keima khut taw laithak kong at ciang
Galatians6:12 Note tungah zawthawk thu taw vunteap hong atsak nuamte sia
Galatians6:13 Vunteap at te ngawngawn zongh Thukham a zui bua uh hi; note vunteap hong atsak nopna thu in
Galatians6:14 Ahizong kei ka hile ih Topa Jesus Christ ii thinglamtee bekma ka kiphatsak pui tu hi; banghang ziam cile ama ii thinglamtee hangin leitung sia kei atu in a thisa hi a
Galatians6:15 Mihing khat vunteap a ki at le a ki at ngawl sia a phatmawkna mama om ngawl het hi; a pha maw sia in mihing thak suana ahi hi.
Galatians6:16 A nuntakna sungah hi ngeina a zuite tungah thinnopna le hesuakna om tahen a — amate le Pathian mihing theampo tung zongh ah om tahen!
Galatians6:17 Thu khupna ah: kuama in kei tungah ngimna hong pia thuasak nawn heak vun
Galatians6:18 Ka suapuite awng
Ephesians1:1 Pathian ii deina taw Christ Jesus ii sawltak khat ahi Paul in — Jesus taw kipumkhat nuntakna sungah a thumaan Ephesus khua Pathian ii mihingte tungah lai kong thaak hi;
Ephesians1:2 Ih Pa Pathian le Jesus Christ in thuthiamna le thinnopna hong pia tahen.
Ephesians1:3 Ih Topa Jesus Christ ii Pa le Pathian tungah lungdamko tawng! Banghang ziam cile Christ taw kipumkhatna sungah ama in eite sia vantung ngam taw kisai thaa thupha theampo hong pia hi.
Ephesians1:4 Christ taw kipumkhatna tungtawnin
Ephesians1:5 Pathian in Jesus Christ tungtawnin a tapa a tanute hong suasak natu in a khensat sa hi a — hi thu in ama diksak le tupna ahi hi.
Ephesians1:6 A minthang a thuthiamna hu le a it a Tapa sungah eite a thawthongin hong piak letsong hu in
Ephesians1:7 Banghang ziam cile Christ ii chisan hangin eite kisuakta a
Ephesians1:8 tua in
Ephesians1:9 Pathian in a tupna sa bangin vawt a
Ephesians1:10 A hun hong tun ciangin Pathian ii a khuangkhim tu
Ephesians1:11 Na theampo sia Pathian ii tupna le khensatna bangin kiseam a; Pathian in a kipatciil pan mama in a khensatsa thu bulphu in
Ephesians1:12 Tua ahikom Christ sungah lametna a nei phit eite in
Ephesians1:13 No ngupna hong puak thumaan thu ahi Lungdamna Thupha sia na zaak uh ciang
Ephesians1:14 Tua Thaa in Pathian ii mihingte hong kamciam sate ih nga natu kipsakna hi a
Ephesians1:15 Hi thu hu in
Ephesians1:16 note atu in Pathian tungah lungdamkona ka tawlnga ngei bua hi. Ka thungetnate sungah kong phawk a
Ephesians1:17 ih Topa Jesus Christ ii Pathian
Ephesians1:18 Bang lametna nei tu in note hong sam a
Ephesians1:19 tuaciangin ei
Ephesians1:20 Christ sia thina pan thosak a
Ephesians1:21 Christ in tua munah vantung ukpite
Ephesians1:22 Pathian in na theampo sia Christ peang nuai ah koi a
Ephesians1:23 Pawlpi in Christ ii pumpi hi a

Ephesians2:2 Tua hunlai in note in
Ephesians2:3 A tatakin eite zongh
Ephesians2:4 Ahihang Pathian ii hesuakna sia kicing lawlawm a
Ephesians2:5 Tua hi a eite ih thunit ngawlna taw thaa lamsang ah a thisa in ih om laitak Christ taw hong nungtasak kik hi. Pathian ii thuthiamna taw note hong kingum zo hi.
Ephesians2:6 Christ Jesus taw pumkhat ih hina taw vantung ngam ah ama taw a uk khawm tu in
Ephesians2:7 Hi bangin a sepna sia Christ Jesus sungah hong kilak
Ephesians2:8 Banghang ziam cile note in upna tungtawnin Pathian ii thuthiamna taw ngup sa na hi uh hi. Tua in note hanciamna hang hi ngawlin
Ephesians2:9 
Ephesians2:10 Eite in tu a ih hi babangin
Ephesians2:11 Amate le amate “Vunteap atte” (Pate ii amate pumpi tungah a vawtte cinopna) a kici Jew te in “Vunteap at ngawlte” hong ci
Ephesians2:12 Tua hunlai in note in Christ taw kikhenin a omte na hi uh hi. Note in ngamdangmite na hi uh a Pathian ii tealsa mihingte na hi bua uh hi. Pathian ii mihingte tungah a kamciamte a bulphu thuciamnate sungah na kihel bua uh a

Ephesians3:2 Note phattuam natu in
Ephesians3:3 Pathian in a tupku sia hong lak a
Ephesians3:4 Kong lai at sa sia na sim uh le
Ephesians3:5 Hun bosa sungah tua thuku sia mihingte tungah kison ngawl a
Ephesians3:6 A thuku sia bang ziam cile Gentile te le Jew te in Pathian thupha sia lungdamna thu hangin saang khawm thei hi; amate in pumpi khat ii nate hi tek a
Ephesians3:7 Ama ii vaangletna tungtawnin Pathian ii a tuam vilvelin hong piak letsong taw kei sia lungdamna thuhil naseampa ka suak hi.
Ephesians3:8 Keima in Pathian ii mihingte sung pan a nobel sia sangin a nozaw lai pa ka hi hi; tua hi napi in

Ephesians3:10

Ephesians3:13 Tua zawkciang
Ephesians3:14 Hi thu hu in ih Pa mai ah ka khupdin hi
Ephesians3:15 ama tung pan vantung le leitung ah a om innkuan sim in a min maan a nga uh hi.
Ephesians3:16 Pathian in ama ii a kicing minthanna panin a Thaa tungtawnin
Ephesians3:17 na upna hangin note thinsung ah Christ hong teangin
Ephesians3:18 tuasia ciang note le Pathian ii mihingte theampo in Christ itna ii a zaina le a sauna
Ephesians3:19 Christ hong itna a kicing takin
Ephesians3:20 Ih sungah a vaangletna taw hong sep hu in
Ephesians3:21 Pathian tungah pawlpi sung le Christ sungah minthanna sia hun theampo atu in a tawntung a tawntungin om tahen! Amen.

Philippians1:1 Christ Jesus ii naseamte ahi Paul le Timothy in — Christ Jesus taw pumkhat a om pawlpi lampuite le
Philippians1:2 Ih Pa Pathian le Topa Jesus Christ in thuthiamna le thinnopna hong pia tahen.
Philippians1:3 Noma kong ngaisut simin
Philippians1:4 tuaciangin no teng theampo atu thu ka nget simin thinnop lungdamna taw thu ka ngen hi
Philippians1:5 banghang ziam cile ka kipat phit ni pan tu dong lungdamna thu nasepna sungah nong hu zia uhte ka ngaisut hang ahi hi.
Philippians1:6 Tua ahikom no sungah hi nasep pha hong patpui Pathian in nasep a kizaw tu hun Christ Jesus Ni ciang dong na hong seam suak tu ka ci ngam hi.
Philippians1:7 Ka thinsung ah no kong phawk tawntung hi! Tuabangin kong phaw sia kei atu in a kilawm thu ahi hi. Banghang ziam cile
Philippians1:8 A thukin no kong phawna sia Christ Jesus mama ii thinsung pan hong luang tatak ahi hunlam ka tetti sia Pathian ahi hi.
Philippians1:9 Ki itna na khantosak seseam natu
Philippians1:10 tua tungtawnin
Philippians1:11 Pathian minthan natu le ama pok natu in Jesus Christ bek ii piansak thei a maan pilna thiamnate taw na nuntakna uh hong kidim tu hi.
Philippians1:12 Suapuite awng
Philippians1:13 Tua thute taw kizomin
Philippians1:14 Thong sungah ka om hu in u le nau a tamzaw in Topa tungah thinmuanna neizaw uh a
Philippians1:15 Amate sung panin pawlkhatte ahile eenna le kingal vawtna thin taw Christ thuhil a
Philippians1:16 Pathian ii kei sia lungdamna thu a maanna dinpui tu nasep hong piak hunlam amate in he ahikom hite in ki itna taw ma thu a hil uh hi.
Philippians1:17 A dangte ahile Christ thu sia thinpha taw thangsak ngawl a
Philippians1:18 Phamaw ka sa bua hi! Hisia huvau ka lungdam hi — tupna maan taw ahizong
Philippians1:19 banghang ziam cile nong thungetsakna uh le Jesus Christ ii Thaa kung pan hong pai huna taw kei hong kisuaktasak tu ci sia ka he hi.
Philippians1:20 Ka deina tatak le ka lametna sia bang ziam cile ka thi zong ka nung zong ka nuntakna buppi taw Christ vaang ka piak thei natu
Philippians1:21 Nuntakna sia bang ziam? Kei atu in
Philippians1:22 Ahizong ka nuntak ciangin a thupi nasepte seam thei zaw tu ka hile
Philippians1:23 Kei sia ka lang le ka lang panin hong kikang hi. Hi nuntakna nusia in Christ taw ka omkhawm nuam mama a
Philippians1:24 ahihang no atu in ci leang a nungta in om lai leng thupi zawlai hi.
Philippians1:25 Hi thu thiangtel ka hikomin a nungta a om tu ka hina ka he hi

Philippians3:5 Ka sua zawk nipi khat a cin ciangin ka vunteap hong ki atsak hi. Ka pianna sia Israel mi in ka piang a
Philippians3:6 a biakna sangah tha lawp leilam ka hi komin

Colossians1:1 Pathian ii deina taw Jesus Christ ii sawltak khat ahi Paul le ih suapuipa Timothy in —
Colossians1:2 Colossae khua ah a om Christ taw pumkhat ahi a thumaan suapui le Pathian mite tungah lai kong thaak uh hi. Ih Pa Pathian in thuthiamna le thinnopna hong pia tahen.
Colossians1:3 No atu thu ka nget uh ciangin
Colossians1:4 Banghang ziam cile Jesus Christ na upna uh le Pathian ii mite theampo na itna uh ka za uh hi.
Colossians1:5 Lungdamna Thupha a maan thuhilna no tungah hong theng masa a
Colossians1:6 Pathian ii thuthiamna na zaak phit ni uh pan kipan
Colossians1:7 Pathian ii thuthiamna sia kote taangin Christ ii thumaan naseampa ka nasep pui Epaphras tung panin heakna na nga uh hi.
Colossians1:8 Ama in Thaa ii hong piak itna na neina uh ko tungah hong son zo hi.
Colossians1:9 Tua thu hangin note thu ka zaak pan kipan thu kong ngetsak tawntung uh hi. Ama deina tel theina le a Thaa ii hong piak ciimna le heakna theampo taw note hong kidimsak natu in Pathian tungah ka ngen uh hi.
Colossians1:10 Tuaciang Topa deina bangin na nungta thei tu uh a
Colossians1:11 Na theampo thinsauna taw na thuak zawk natu uh in
Colossians1:12 Thinnopna taw Pa tungah lungdam na ko tavun. A ma in khuavakna ngam sungah a mite ii lua tu a khealsiate nga tu in hong kilawmsak hi.
Colossians1:13 Ama in khuazing vaangletna sung pan eite hong hun a
Colossians1:14 A chisan hangin eite ih suakta a
Colossians1:15 Christ sia mu thei ngawl Pathian ii pianzia muna ahi hi. Ama sia bitphua sa theampo sung pan Tapa upabel ahi hi.
Colossians1:16 Banghang ziam cile vantung leitung na theampo
Colossians1:17 Christ sia tuate theampo om ma in om a
Colossians1:18 Ama in a pumpi ahi pawlpi lutang hi a
Colossians1:19 Banghang ziam cile Pathian ii khensatna om bangin Tapa in Pathian ii zia theampo nei hi.
Colossians1:20 Tuaciang Tapa tungtawnin Pathian in vaannuai buppi sia ama kung a thet kik thei natu in khensat hi. Thinglamtee tungah a kibua Tapa ii chisan tungtawnin Pathian in kilemna piangsak a
Colossians1:21 Hun khat lai in note in Pathian taw na kikhuala uh a
Colossians1:22 Ahihang tu in ama omna munah a thiangtho
Colossians1:23 A kho thu doppha tungah na thumaan tawntung vun a
Colossians1:24 Tu in no atu ka thuak nate tungtaang ah ka lungdam hi
Colossians1:25 Tuaciangin kei sia Pawlpi naseam tu in Pathian in hong vawt hi a
Colossians1:26 tua thu in hun bosa sungah mihing nam theampo te sung pan a kiseal
Colossians1:27 Pathian ii ngealna sia ama ii thuku
Colossians1:28 Tua ahikom Christ sia mihing khat sim tungah ka hil uh hi. Pathian omna munah mihing khat simin Christ taw kikop in
Colossians1:29 Hi nasep a kizaw thei natu in ka sungah na hong seam Christ ii nasia tak a tha hong piakna zanghin diangin ka kisaan hi.

Colossians2:16 Tua ahikom neak le dawn huvau ahizong

Colossians4:9 Ama in Onesimus a kici khat taw hong ton hi

Colossians4:12 Epaphras zongh in hong paupui hi
Colossians4:13 No atu le Laodicea le Hierapolis ah a om mihingte atu in nasia takin na a seampa hi ci in keima tatak ma in tetti ka pang hi.
Colossians4:14 Ih it syavuan Luke le Demas in paupuina kam hong thaak hi.
Colossians4:15 Laodicea khua ah a om ih suapuite le Nympha le tua nu inn ah a kikhawm pawlpi tungah thupha ka deisaknate na sonsak vun.
Colossians4:16 Hi laithak na sim zawk uh ciangin Laodicea pawlpite zongh in na simsak hamtang vun. Laodicea khua a om ih suapuite hong puak tu lai sia zongh na sim vun.

1Thessalonians5:16 A tawntungin lungdam vun
1Thessalonians5:17 hun theampo sungah thu ngen tawntung vun
1Thessalonians5:18 na theampo sungah lungdamko vun. Christ Jesus taw pumkhat a
1Thessalonians5:19 Thaa Thiangtho na khaam heak vun;
1Thessalonians5:20 Pathian tung pan hi a kici kamsaannate sia zawngsak heak vun.
1Thessalonians5:21 Na theampo na sittel vun: a pha teng na keam tavun
1Thessalonians5:22 A sia nam theampo na pial tavun.
1Thessalonians5:23 Eite thinnopna hong pia Pathian in note a nanam in hong thiangthosak tahen
1Thessalonians5:24 Hong sampa ama in na hong seam tu hi
1Thessalonians5:25 Suapuite awng
1Thessalonians5:26 Thu um theampo suapui kinapna taw na kimuak tavun.
1Thessalonians5:27 Thu um mi theampo tungah hi laithak na sim natu in Topa thuneina suangin kong thawn hi.
1Thessalonians5:28 Ih Topa Jesus Christ ii thuthiamna no tungah hong om tahen.
2Thessalonians1:1 Paul
2Thessalonians1:2 Ih Pa Pathian le Topa Jesus Christ in note tungah thuthiamna le thinnopna hong pia tahen.
2Thessalonians1:3 Suapuite awng
2Thessalonians1:4 Pathian ii pawlpite sungah no huvau ka kisuantaakna uh sia in hi thu hang ahi hi. Vawtsiatna le ngimna teng theampo na thuak uh kawm panin
2Thessalonians1:5 Tu a na thuakna teng in Pathian thukhen na sia thumaan a hina kilanghsak hi
2Thessalonians1:6 Pathian in a maan bangin seam tu hi: note hong thuaksakte tungah thuakna tungsak tu a
2Thessalonians1:7 tuaciang no a thuakte le ko zongh nopsakna hong pia tu hi. Topa Jesus in ama ii a thahat vantunglalangte taw
2Thessalonians1:8 Pathian a nialte le Topa Jesus Lungdamna Thupha a zui nuam ngawlte daan pia tu in meikuang taw hong pai ciang ama in tuasia seam tu hi.
2Thessalonians1:9 Ama ii mihing theampo le a thu um mihingte tung pan minthanna le vaang piakna a nga tu in
2Thessalonians1:10 
2Thessalonians1:11 Note atu in a tawntungin thu kong ngetsakna in hi thu hang ahi hi. A nungta tu in ama hong sap na nuntakna sungah a kiphu a kilawm hong suasak natu in
2Thessalonians1:12 Hi bangin ih Pathian le Topa Jesus Christ ii thuthiamna taw ih Topa Jesus min in
2Thessalonians2:1 Ih Topa Jesus Christ hong pai kik natu le ama taw omkhawm tu in
2Thessalonians2:2 Topa hong pai tu Ni sia hong tung zo hi ci in a kison thu taw na khua ngaisutna uh nawngkaisak heak vun a
2Thessalonians2:3 Bangbang po ahizong kuama in na theamsak heak vun. Banghang ziam cile a khakbel Kileedona
2Thessalonians2:4 Ama in pathian a kici theampo ahibuale biak thei theampo langpan tu a
2Thessalonians2:5 Ciamtee ngawl nu ziam? Hite sia no taw ka omkhop lai in kong sonsiat sa ahi hi.
2Thessalonians2:6 Ahitazong
2Thessalonians2:7 A lamdang Seksolna in tu in na hong seam zo hi
2Thessalonians2:8 Tuasia zawkciangin A Seksolpa sia hong kilaak tu a
2Thessalonians2:9 A Seksolpa sia Satan vaangletna taw hong pai tu a
2Thessalonians2:10 tuaciangin a lal tu teng tungah a seksol theamna namcin zangh tu hi. Amate lal tu hi
2Thessalonians2:11 Tua ahikom Pathian in telkhialna vaang ama te sungah puak a
2Thessalonians2:12 Tua ahikomin
2Thessalonians2:13 Topa hong it suapuite awng
2Thessalonians2:14 Lungdamna Thupha no tungah kong hilna uh tungtawnin Pathian in hisia atu hong sam hi; Ama in ih Topa Jesus Christ minthanna tel na nga natu hong sam ahi hi.
2Thessalonians2:15 Tua ahikom suapuite awng
2Thessalonians2:16 Ih Topa Jesus Christ ama mama le eite hong it a
2Thessalonians2:17 a tawntungin a pha sep natu le pau natu hong hanthawn in hong thahat sak tahen.
2Thessalonians3:1 A khakbel in suapuite awng
2Thessalonians3:2 Mihing seksolte le misiate khut sung pan Pathian ii hong suataksak natu in thu hong ngetsak si tavun; banghang ziam cile mihing simin tua thu um ngawl hi.
2Thessalonians3:3 Ahihang Topa sia thumaan a
2Thessalonians3:4 Note kungah kong son thute na zui uh bangma in zui paisuak tatak tu ci in note muanna thin kote sungah Topa in hong pia hi.
2Thessalonians3:5 Pathian hong itna le Christ ii hong piak thuak zawkna a thukzaw in na tel thei natu Topa in lam hong pui tahen.
2Thessalonians3:6 Suapuite awng
2Thessalonians3:7 Ko ngamtat bang na ngamtat tu uh sia noma ma in na heak uh ahi hi. Note taw ka om uh lai in ko datham ngawl khu hi.
2Thessalonians3:8 Man piak ngawlin kuama tung pan huna saang ngawl khu hi. Tua taangin naseam a
2Thessalonians3:9 Hi bangin ka hi uh sia
2Thessalonians3:10 No taw ih om lai in
2Thessalonians3:11 Hi bangin kong ci theina uh sia
2Thessalonians3:12 Topa Jesus Christ min taw hi mihingte tungah ahi tu bangin nungta tahen a
2Thessalonians3:13 Ahihang suapuite awng
2Thessalonians3:14 Hi laithak sungah kong son uh thute a zui ngawl tu khat po om tha tu hi. Tuabang ahile
2Thessalonians3:15 Ahihang ama na ngal vawt heak vun; tua hi ngawl zaw in
2Thessalonians3:16 Eite thinnopna ii naak ahi Topa ama mama in
2Thessalonians3:17 Paul in kong paupui hi ci in lai kong thaak sia keima khut tatak taw ka at hi: Laithak ka at sim ka minthuna sia hisia ahi hi; lai ka atzia hi bang ahi hi.
2Thessalonians3:18 Ih Topa Jesus thuthiamna in note theampo taw hong om tahen.
1Timothy1:1 Jesus Christ sawltak khat ahi Paul in
1Timothy1:2 Upna sungah ka tapa tatak ahi Timothy tungah lai kong thaak hi: Pa Pathian le ih Topa Jesus Christ in
1Timothy1:3 Macedonia ah ka pai lai
1Timothy1:4 Kinialna bek a piangsak taanghthute le taanghpupite khang tepteena saute a vawk natu in na son in; tuate in upna taw a kihe Pathian ngealna taangtut natu in kizangh ngawl hi.
1Timothy1:5 Hi thupiakna ii tupna sia
1Timothy1:6 Mihing pawlkhat in hite panin lampial in a mawmawthuai kam kikupnate sungah ngammang uh hi.
1Timothy1:7 Amate in Pathian thukham hil syate suak nuam ahihang
1Timothy1:8 A kizak tu bangin a kizangh nale Thukham sia pha hi ci in ih he hi.
1Timothy1:9 Ih phawk tu a kul thu sia
1Timothy1:10 numei le pa huvau a paktatte
1Timothy1:11 Tuabang hilcianna sia ka thansak tu in hong ki aap lungdamna thu sungah kimu a
1Timothy1:12 Ka nasep natu in thahatna hong pia Jesus Christ ih Topa tungah lungdam ka ko hi. Ama ii na seam tu in kilawm hong sakna le nasep hong piak hu in
1Timothy1:13 ahihang hun bosa sungah ama ngensia in
1Timothy1:14 Tuaciangin ih Topa in a thuthiamna a kicing takin hong buak a
1Timothy1:15 Jesus Christ in mawneite hun tu in leitung ah hong pai hi: ci sia thumaan hi a
1Timothy1:16 ahihang nungsang ciangin ama umin tawntung nuntakna a saang tute ii a ettee tu in
1Timothy1:17 Ama bek Pathian ahi a thi thei ngawl
1Timothy1:18 Ka ta Timothy awng
1Timothy1:19 na upna kholet in
1Timothy1:20 Satan vaangletna nuai ah aapna taw daan ka piaksate sungah Hymenaeus le Alexander te kihel uh hi; Pathian min a daisak nawn ngawl natu in hi thu in amate hil tu hi.

1Timothy5:8 Ahihang khat pawpo in a mealheakte

1Timothy5:10 tuaciangin ngamtat pha nei hi ci in a kisonte: a tate pha takin a khangtosakte
1Timothy5:11 Ahihang a khangmoi zaw meingongte sia tua tepteena lai sungah hel heak vun

1Timothy6:7 Hi leitung ah bang ih keng ziam? Bangma ih keng bua hi! Leitung panin bang ih pusuapui thei tu ziam! Bangma ih pusuapui thei buatu hi!
1Timothy6:8 Tua ahiciang eite in anneak le puansilh ih nei le
1Timothy6:9 Ahihang sum a hau nuam mihingte sia ze etna thuakin

2Timothy1:1 Christ Jesus taw kikop a
2Timothy1:2 Ka it ka tapa Timothy tungah lai kong thaak hi: Ih Pa Pathian le ih Topa Christ Jesus in thuthiamna
2Timothy1:3 Ka taanghpupite ii sep bangin thinsung thiangtho taw a na ka sepsak Pathian tungah lungdam ka ko hi. Sun taw zan taw ka thungetna sungah nang kong phawk a
2Timothy1:4 Na thituite ka phawk a
2Timothy1:5 Na pi Lois le na nu Eunice te zongh ii a nei bang a na nei thintak upna sia ka phawk hi. Nang zongh tuabang ma in nei tu ni hi ci in kong muang tatak hi.
2Timothy1:6 Hi thu hu in
2Timothy1:7 Banghang ziam cile Pathian hong piak Thaa in eite hong lauthauhsak bua hi; tua hizaw ngawlin
2Timothy1:8 Tua ahikom
2Timothy1:9 Ama in ama aituam mihingte ih sua natu in eite hong hun a

2Timothy1:11 Lungdamna Thupha a thangsak tu le a hil tu in
2Timothy1:12 tuaciangin hi thu hu in hite ka thuak hi. Ahihang thinmuanna taw ka kidim nginge lai hi
2Timothy1:13 Thumaan kammal kong hilte na kholet in a
2Timothy1:14 Ih sungah hong teang Thaa Thiangtho vaangletna tungtawnin

2Timothy1:16 Topa in Onesiphorus innkuan sungah hesuakna tungsak tahen
2Timothy1:17 Rome khua a thet po ciangin hong mu dawdong hong zong hi.
2Timothy1:18 Tua Ni ciangin Topa in ama tungah hesuakna pia tahen. Ephesus khua ah zongh

2Timothy3:5 Amate in ih biakna sia a pua zuunna in nei tu a

2Timothy3:7 sin nuam he nuam tawntung leei ahihang thumaan thutak a tel zo ngawl numeite
2Timothy3:8 Jannes le Jambres in Moses a langpan uh bangma in — hi mihingte in thumaan thutak langpan uh hi. Amate sia a khua ngaisutna uh naseam ngawl a upna sangah a lel ahi uh hi.

2Timothy4:11 Luke bek kei taw om lai hi. Mark samin hi sungah hong paipui ta'n
2Timothy4:12 Ephesus ah Tychicus ka paisak hi.
2Timothy4:13 Nong pai ciang Troas khua Carpus kungah ka nusiat ka laktong puasilh hong paipui ta'n; laibute zongh hong keng ta'n
2Timothy4:14 Thik seakpa Alexander in hong nawngkaisak mama hi. Topa in ama ii sepna sa tung pan thaman pia tu hi.

2Timothy4:19 Priscilla

1Peter1:7 Tua haksatna thuaknate ii tupna in na upna uh a maanna a kilak natu ahi hi. 1Peter4:4 Tu in Pathian he ngawlte in amate sansak po maitat
1Peter4:5 Ahihang a nungtate le a thisate tungah thukhen tu in a kingingta sa Pathian mai ah amate in thusitna thuak tu uh hi.
1Peter4:6 Mihing khat sim tungah
1Peter4:7 Na theampo a bo natu hun hong nai zo hi. Thu na nget thei natu in noma le noma ki uk thiamin
1Peter4:8 Khat le khat thinsung takpi taw na ki it tu sia thupi ngaisutbel tavun
1Peter4:9 Phun ngawlin khat le khat zin kido thiam tavun.
1Peter4:10 Mihing sim in Pathian letsong tuatuamte a zeak thiampa bangin
1Peter4:11 Thuhil pawpo in Pathian ii ngupna thute hil nanak tahen a; na theampo ah Jesus Christ tungtawnin Pathian tungah pokna a kipiak thei natu in
1Peter4:12 Ka it lawmte awng
1Peter4:13 Christ ii vaangletna hong kilangh ciangin
1Peter4:14 Christ ii nungzui na hi uh hu in hong kizawngsak ahile
1Peter4:15 Note sungah khat po in ngimna a thuak le zong
1Peter4:16 Ahizong Tapidaw na hi uh hu in a thuak na hi uh le
1Peter4:17 Thukhen kipat tu hun hong tung zo a
1Peter4:18 Laithiangtho in: “Miphate a kingup tu haksa hi; tua ahile Pathian a sel mawneite bang suak tu ziam?” ci hi.
1Peter4:19 Tua ahiciang Pathian ii deina a om hu in a thuakte ahile
1Peter5:1 Pawlpi upa khat ahi keima in no pawlpi upate tungah kong thuum hi. Keima sia Christ thuakna ii tetti khat ka hi a
1Peter5:2 Uuk ngawl pipina taw hi ngawlin Pathian hong deisak bangin
1Peter5:3 Noma ii kep tu a hong ki aapte tungah zawthawkna taw uk tu hanciam ngawlin
1Peter5:4 Tuaciang Tuucing Pipa hong kilangh ciangin
1Peter5:5 Tuasia bangma in no khangmoizawte zongh
1Peter5:6 Pathian ii thahatna khutnuai ah kiniamkhiak vun
1Peter5:7 Ama in note hong thinnuam maw ahikom
1Peter5:8 Pilvang vun a
1Peter5:9 Na upna sungah kip vun a
1Peter5:10 Ahihang tawmvei na thuak zawk uh ciangin
1Peter5:11 Ama tungah vaangletna om tawntung tahen! Amen.
1Peter5:12 A thumaan Tapidaw suapui in ka ngaisut Silas ii hong huna taw
1Peter5:13 Pathian teal ahi
1Peter5:14 Tapidaw ki it kinapna taw khat le khat kimuak tavun. Christ neisa ahi note theampo tungah thinnopna hong om tahen.
2Peter1:1 Jesus Christ ii sawltakpa le silapa Simon Peter in — Ih Pathian le Hunpa Jesus Christ thumaan thutang tungtawn a
2Peter1:2 Pathian le Jesus
2Peter1:3 Pathian ii a nei vaangletna in
2Peter1:4 Hi bangin hong kamciamsa ahi a lian mama le a manpha letsongte sia
2Peter1:5 Hi thu hang mama in
2Peter1:6 na heakna tungah pumpi ki ukzawkna belap vun; pumpi ki ukzawkna tungah thuak zawkna belap vun; na thuak zawkna tungah Pathian bang hina belap vun;
2Peter1:7 Pathian bang hina tungah u le nau ki itna belap vun; tuaciang u le nau ki itna tungah ngual it theina belap vun.
2Peter1:8 Hi kicinnate sia na kitaangsap uh hi a
2Peter1:9 Ahihang hi kicinnate a nei ngawl peuma sia
2Peter1:10 Tua ahikom ka suapuite awng
2Peter1:11 Hisia tungtawnin ih Topa le Hunpa Jesus Christ ii tawntung Kumpi ngam sungah tum thei natu thu a cingin no hong kipia tu hi.
2Peter1:12 Hi thute sia na heaksa uh hi
2Peter1:13 Hi thute na tepteena kong satsuasak tu sia
2Peter1:14 Ih Topa Jesus Christ ii a thiang tak a hong sonsa bangin
2Peter1:15 Tua ahikom
2Peter1:16 Ih Topa Jesus Christ ii vaangletna taw hong pai natu thu kong heaksak ciangin
2Peter1:17 A vaanglianbel Pa in
2Peter1:18 Hi aw vantung panin hong pai lai in
2Peter1:19 Tua ahikom kamsaangte son thute tungtaang ah thinmuanna ka nei seseam uh hi. Tua thute na thupi ngaisut tu pha hi
2Peter1:20 Ahizong
2Peter1:21 Banghang ziam cile kamsaanna thute sia mihing deina pan bek hong pai ngeingawl a
2Peter2:1 A bosa hun in mihingte sungah kamsaang maan ngawlte piang hi
2Peter2:2 Tua hi napi in
2Peter2:3 Hi sya maan ngawlte sia duhop ahikom amate phuatawm taanghthute hong sonna taw no tung pan a meet hong vawt tu hi. Amate ii Thukhen pa sia a kingin zawk ngei zo a
2Peter2:4 Pathian in a maw a khial vantunglalangte khoaikhe ngawlin
2Peter2:5 Taanghlai leitung mite sia Pathian in a khoaikhe bua hi
2Peter2:6 Pathian a selte tung a piang tu sia mu thei natu in
2Peter2:7 Ngeina pha zui ngawl a maitatte ii paktat ngamtatnate hu in a khuangai
2Peter2:8 Tua mihing pha Lot sia amate sungah teang a
2Peter2:9 Tua ahikom Topa in Pathian ii dei bang a nungtate
2Peter2:10 a tuan in Pathian ii thuneina simmaw a
2Peter2:11 Hi a maan ngawl syate sangin a nasia zaw pekin a tha khozaw
2Peter2:12 Ahihang hi mihingte in
2Peter2:13 tuaciang amate in mihingte ngim thuaksak ahikom
2Peter2:14 Amate in numei paktatte simngawl a dang en nuam ngawl hi; a maw nopna bo ngeingawl hi. Amate in a tha zawm mite sia thaang sung zotpui uh hi. A thinsung uh ah duhop natu a sin ahi uh hi. Amate sia Pathian haamsiatna nuai ah om uh hi!
2Peter2:15 Amate in lampi tang nusia in
2Peter2:16 tuaciang tua pa sia a mawna hu in teih thuak hi. Ama ii laa a khoai sia mihing aw taw pau in
2Peter2:17 Hi mihingte sia a kang sa cik taw kibang a
2Peter2:18 Amate in kiphatsakna le mawmawt kamte pau a
2Peter2:19 Amate in tuabangte suatak natu kamciam pia ahihang
2Peter2:20 Mihingte in
2Peter2:21 Amate tungah a kipia a thiangtho thupiakna pan a pial uh sangin
2Peter2:22 Paunak sungah
2Peter3:1 Ka it lawmte awng
2Peter3:2 Taanghlai in a thiangtho kamsaangte sonnate le noma ii sawltakte tung pan na nga uh Topa le Hunpa thupiak sia na teptee tu ka dei hi.
2Peter3:3 A masa phitin
2Peter3:4 hi bangin
2Peter3:5 Khuangei mama lai in
2Peter3:6 tuaciangin tua leitung lui sia tui taw ma in tuipi liimna taw kilalsak hi.
2Peter3:7 Ahihang tu in a om
2Peter3:8 Ahizong ka it lawmte awng na khat na mangil heak vun! Topa muna ah ni khat le kum tulkhat sia a kilamdanna om ngawl hi; ama atu in tuate nii sia kibang hi.
2Peter3:9 Mihing pawlkhatte ngaisut bang hi ngawlin
2Peter3:10 Ahihang Topa Ni sia nguta bangin hong pai tu hi. Tua Ni ciangin vantungte a nging mama khat taw hong bocip tu a
2Peter3:11 Hite theampo tuabangin kilalcipsak tu ahile no sia bangbang mihingte na hi tu uh kisamh tu ziam? Na nuntakna uh sia thiangtho tu a
2Peter3:12 vantungte kaanghtumin bocip a
2Peter3:13 Ahihang ko ka hi uh le
2Peter3:14 Tuaciangin ka lawmte awng
2Peter3:15 Ih Topa thin sauna sia ngupna na nga natu in
2Peter3:16 A laithak theampo sungah tua thulu taw kisai in a at ciang a son thu in hi thu ahi hi. Ama laithakte sungah thu haksa pawlkhat om a
2Peter3:17 Ahihang no ka lawmte awng
2Peter3:18 Ahihang ih Topa le Hunpa Jesus Christ heakna le thuthiamna sungah na khangto suak vun. Ama tungah minthanna
1John1:1 A kipatciil pan a omsa
1John1:2 Hi nuntakna sia a kimu thei in hong kilangh ciang
1John1:3 Pa le a Tapa Jesus Christ taw ka kipawlkhopna sungah nong pop thei natu in
1John1:4 Kote lungdamna a pawlcin thei natu in tua thu kong at uh hi.
1John1:5 Tu in a Tapa tung pan ka zaak thu le kong zaaksak uh thu in hi thu ahi hi: Pathian sia khuavak hi a
1John1:6 Tua ahikom ama taw a kipawl khawm hi hing ci napi
1John1:7 Ahihang eite khuavak sungah ih nungta le — ama sia khuavak sungah om ahi bangma in — eite khat le khat a kipawl theite ih hi a
1John1:8 Mawna nei bua hing ih cile eima le eima kitheam ih hi a
1John1:9 Ahihang ih mawnate Pathian tungah ih pualaak le ama in a kamciamte keam tu a
1John1:10 Maw ngei bua hing ih cile Pathian sia a leilot pa ih suaksak a
1John2:1 Ka tate awng
1John2:2 Tuaciang Christ mama in eite ii mawna bek hi ngawlin a kuama po ii mawna zongh maisakna a pianna pa ahi hi.
1John2:3 Pathian thupiakte ih zui le tuasia ciangin ama a he ih hi hunlam ih tel hi.
1John2:4 Khat po in ama ka he hi ci napi
1John2:5 Ahihang a kuama po a kammal a zui sia in Pathian a itna kicingtaaksak takpi zo hi. Pathian taw pumkhat ih hina hi thu in hong telsak thei hi:
1John2:6 Pathian taw pumkhatin nungta ing a cite in Jesus Christ ii nuntak bangin a nuntak kul hi.
1John2:7 Ka it lawmte awng
1John2:8 Ahihang tu a kong at thupiakna sia a thak hi
1John2:9 A kuama po khuavak sungah ka om ci napi a
1John2:10 A suapuite a it te sia khuavak sungah teang ahikom ama sungah ngualdang khat khialsak thei natu bangma a om bua hi.
1John2:11 Ahihang a suapuipa a ensan khat pawpo sia khuazing sungah om ahi hi; ama khuazing sungah lampai a
1John2:12 Ka tate awng
1John2:13 Pate awng
1John2:14 Ka tate awng
1John2:15 Leitung ahizong leitung na khat pawpo ahizong na it heak vun. Leitung na it uh le Pa it ngawl na hi uh hi.
1John2:16 Leitung neisa ahi — hong mawsak thei eima atu lungngulnate
1John2:17 Leitung le a sungah a om
1John2:18 Ka tate awng
1John2:19 Hi mite in ei kipawlna sungah hong om tatak ngawl ahi hu in ei hong nusia hi; ei pawl sungah hong om hile ei taw hong omkhawm top tu hi. Ahihang eite taw hong kipawlkhawm tatak ngawl ahi hunlam a kithiangtel thei natu in amate in hong nusia hi.
1John2:20 Ahihang Christ ii no tungah Thaa Thiangtho hong buak sia na saang zo uh hi
1John2:21 Tua ahikom lai kong thaakna in thumaan thutak na tel ngawl uh hang hi ngawl hi; thumaan thutak na heak uh hang hi zaw a
1John2:22 Tua ahile a leilot pa sia akua ziam? Jesus sia Messiah hi ngawl hi a ci pawpo in leilot pa ahi hi. Tuabang mihingte sia Christ ii Ngalte ahi uh hi — amate in Pa le Tapa nial khawm hi.
1John2:23 Banghang ziam cile Tapa a nial pawpo in Pa zongh nial hi. Tapa a saang pawpo in Pa zongh nei hi.
1John2:24 Tua ahiciang a kipat pan na zaak uh ngupna thu sia noma thinsung uh ah na keamcing hamtang tavun. Tua thu na keamcing uh le Pa le Tapa taw pumkhatin na nungta tawntung tu uh hi.
1John2:25 Tuaciangin Christ ama mama ii eite hong piak tu hong kamciam sia — tawntung nuntakna ahi hi.
1John2:26 Note hong theam tu a hong kipante ii thu hong at khi hi.
1John2:27 Ahihang note na hi uh le
1John2:28 Hi hi
1John2:29 Christ sia thumaan thutang hi ci in na he uh hi; tua ahikom na heak tu uh thu sia a maanin a seam peuma Pathian ta hi ci thu ahi hi.
1John3:1 Pa in ei sia bangza in hong it ziam tel tavun! Ama hong itna lian mama ahikom ei sia Pathian ii tate hong kici hi — tuabang takpi ma ih hi hi. Leitung in Pathian he ngawl ahikom leitung mite in ei hong he ngawl hi.
1John3:2 Ka it lawmte awng
1John3:3 Christ sia thiangtho ahi bangma Christ sungah hi lametna a nei mihing peuma ama le ama a thiangtho in kikeam hi.
1John3:4 A kuama po mawna khialna a vawt peuma in Pathian thukham paltan ahi hi
1John3:5 Mawnate a la keak tu in Christ hong kilangh hi a
1John3:6 Tua ahikom Christ taw kipumkhat a
1John3:7 Ka tate awng
1John3:8 A kuama po mawna vawt a zom suakte sia Doaimangpa ii neisa ahi hi
1John3:9 Pathian ta ahi peuma sia mawna vawt a zom suak bua hi
1John3:10 Pathian ii tate le Doaimangpa tate kilaklaw ah
1John3:11 A kipat pan ma na zaak uh thu in: eite khat le khat ih ki it hamtang natu thu ahi hi.
1John3:12 Eite Cain taw ih kibang buatu hi; ama sia Ngilo Pa ii neisa hi a
1John3:13 Tua ahikom ka suapuite awng
1John3:14 Eite in ih suapuite it ih hi hu in
1John3:15 Ngualdang a ensan peuma sia mihing that hi a
1John3:16 Christ in eite atu a nuntakna hong piakna hangin eite in ki itna sia bang ziam ci in ih he hi. Tua ahiciang eite zongh
1John3:17 A hau khat in a cimaw
1John3:18 Ka tate awng
1John3:19 Tua ahikom thumaan thutak sungah ih om hunlam sia tu a bangin ih he tu hi; Pathian mai ah kimuanna ih nei natu sia hi bang teng hang ahi hi.
1John3:20 Ih thinsung ah maw ih kisa le
1John3:21 Tua ahikom ka it lawmte awng
1John3:22 Ama thupiakte zui a
1John3:23 Ama hong thupiak sia bang ziam cile a Tapa Jesus Christ ih up tu le Christ ii hong thupiak bangma khat le khat ih ki it natu ahi hi.
1John3:24 A kuama po Pathian thupiakte a zui le ama sia Pathian taw kipumkhat in a nungta hi a
1John4:1 Ka it lawmte awng
1John4:2 Pathian Thaa ahile ahi ngawl sia hi bangin na tel thei tu uh hi: Jesus sia mihing khatin hong pai hi a ci pawpo in Pathian kung pan hong pai Thaa nei hi.
1John4:3 Ahihang Jesus huvau hi thu a nial khat pawpo sia Pathian kung pan hong pai Thaa a nei bua hi. Ama nei tua thaa sia Christ ii Ngalpa kung pan hi; tuasia pa hong pai tu hi ci in na za zo uh a
1John4:4 Ahihang ka tate awng
1John4:5 Tua kamsaang maan ngawlte in leitung nate thuson in nei uh hi
1John4:6 Ahihang ei sia Pathian neisa ih hi hi. Pathian a he peuma in ei thuson hong ngai hi. Pathian neisa ahi ngawl peuma in ei thuson hong ngai bua hi. Tua ahiciang thumaan thutak ii Thaa le a maan ngawl thaa kilamdanna sia
1John4:7 Ka it lawmte awng
1John4:8 Ngual a it ngawl peuma sia Pathian a he bua hi
1John4:9 Tuaciang ama tungtawnin nuntakna ih nga thei natu in Tapa khat bek a nei sia leitung ah hong paisakna taw
1John4:10 Itna ih ci sia in hisia ahi hi: eite in Pathian a it ih hi bua a
1John4:11 Ka it lawmte awng
1John4:12 Kuama in Pathian mu ngeingawl hi
1John4:13 Eite Pathian taw pumkhat in kinungta a
1John4:14 Tuaciang Pa in a Tapa sia leitung Hunpa tu in hong paisak hi ci in ih mu a
1John4:15 Khat po in Jesus sia Pathian Tapa hi ci in a pualaak le ama in Pathian taw pumkhatin nungta a
1John4:16 Tuaciang Pathian ii ei atu a nei itna sia eima mama in ih he a
1John4:17 Thukhenna Ni in thinhanna ih nei natu in eite sungah ki itna hong cialcingsak hi; hi leitung ah ih nuntakna sia Christ ii nuntakna bangma ahikom
1John4:18 Itna sungah launa om ngawl a
1John4:19 Pathian in ei hong it masa ahikom eite in ama ih it hi.
1John4:20 Khat po in Pathian ka it hi ci napi in a suapuite a ensan le ama sia leilot thusonpa ahi hi. Banghang ziam cile a mu thei a suapuite a it buale a mu thei ngawl Pathian a it thei buatu hi.
1John4:21 Christ ii eite hong thupiakna in hi sia hi: Pathian a it peuma in a suapuite zongh a it kul tu hi.
1John5:1 Jesus sia Messiah hi ci a
1John5:2 Pathian it a
1John5:3 Banghang ziam cile Pathian ih itna ii khiakna sia ama thupiakte ih zui hi cinopna ahi hi. Tuaciang ama thupiakte sia ei atu in a haksa lei bua hi
1John5:4 banghang ziam cile Pathian ii tate khat simin leitung zothal thei hi. Tuaciang ih upna taw leitung zawna ih nga hi.
1John5:5 A kua in leitung zo zo tu ziam? Jesus sia Pathian Tapa hi ci in a um sia bek ahi hi.
1John5:6 Jesus Christ sia
1John5:7 Tua atu in tetti thum om hi:
1John5:8 Thaa
1John5:9 Mihing tetti panna ih um hi; ahihang Pathian tetti panna khozaw lai a
1John5:10 Tua ahikom a kuama po Pathian ii Tapa a umte in ama thinsung ah hi tetti nei hi; ahihang a kuama po Pathian a um ngawlte in Pathian sia leilot pa suaksak hi
1John5:11 Tua tetti in hi sia hi: Pathian in eite tawntung nuntakna hong pia zo a
1John5:12 Tapa a nei a kuama po in hi nuntakna nei hi; Pathian Tapa a nei ngawl pawpo in nuntakna a nei bua hi.
1John5:13 Pathian Tapa a um note — tawntung nuntakna na nei uh hunlam na heak natu in hi lai kong at hi.
1John5:14 Eite in Pathian mai ah thinhanna ih nei hi
1John5:15 Ih nget simin hong za hi: hi thu
1John5:16 Na suapuipa in thina dong a then thei tu ahi ngawl mawna khat a vawt le ama nuntakna a pia tu Pathian munah thu ngetsak in. Hi sia in thina hong then thei mawnate ngawl buang atu in a kizangh thei thu ahi hi. Ahihang thina dong hong then thei mawna om a
1John5:17 Ngamtat khialna theampo mawna hi a
1John5:18 Pathian ii tate kuama in mawna vawt tan viuveu ngawl hi ci in ih he hi
1John5:19 Simlei buppi sia Ngilopa ukna nuai ah om kale
1John5:20 A maan Pathian ih heak natu in Pathian Ta hong pai zo a
1John5:21 Ka tate awng
2John1:1 Pawlpi Upa pa tung pan — Ka it tatak a ithuai nupi le a tate tungah lai kong thaak hi. Tuaciang keima bek hi ngawlin thumaan thutak a he theampo in no hong it uh hi
2John1:2 banghang ziam cile thumaan thutak sia ei sungah om a
2John1:3 Pa Pathian le Pa ii Tapa Jesus Christ in thuthiamna
2John1:4 Na tate pawlkhat sia Pa ii hong thupiakna bangin thumaan thutak sungah om hi ci in ka mu ciangin ka lungdam mama hi.
2John1:5 Tua ahikom
2John1:6 Tu a ka son itna ii khiakna sia Pathian thupiakte zui in ih nuntak kul hi cinopna hi. A kipat pan na zaak siat sa uh bangma note theampo sia ki itna taw na nuntak uh kul hi
2John1:7 Leitung theampo ah ngual theam theite tam mama pai kawkoai zo a
2John1:8 Tua ahiciang ih sepna sa teng atu taan ngawlin na thaman a cingin na nga natu in kikeam tavun.
2John1:9 Christ ii hilcianna sungah om nuam ngawlin
2John1:10 Tua ahikom khatpo hong pai a
2John1:11 Banghang ziam cile ama tungah thinnopna a om tu
2John1:12 Kong son tu tam mama om ahihang laikung laite taw hong at ngawl zaw tu khi hi; ih lungdamna a kicin natu keima hong haw in maitang kisi a thuson tu ka lamen zaw hi.
2John1:13 Na it na Suapuinu ii tate in paupuina kam hong thaak hi.
3John1:1 Pawlpi Upa keima in — Ka it takpi ka lawm Gaius tungah lai kong thaak hi.
3John1:2 Ka it ka lawmpa awng
3John1:3 Thumaan thutak sungah a nungta tawntung na hi bangma — Tapidaw suapui pawlkhat hong theng a
3John1:4 Ka tate thumaan thutak sungah a nuntak ka zaak sia sangin hong lungdamsak zaw thei a dang bangma a om bua hi.
3John1:5 Ka it ka lawmpa awng
3John1:6 Amate na itna thu teng hi sung pawlpi ah hong ko uh hi. Amate khualhawna sungah Pathian lungkim zia taw a paitan thei natu in na hu in.
3John1:7 Banghang ziam cile amate sia Christ ii na seamin khual a haw uh ciang
3John1:8 Tua ahikom ei Tapidawte in hi mihingte ii thumaan thutak a tu a sepna sungah a seppui ih hi thei natu in ih hu tu hi.
3John1:9 Pawlpi tungah laithak tomno khat ka at hi; ahihang amate ih lampui a suak nuam Diotrephes in kei ii ci bang sia hong thupi sim bua hi.
3John1:10 Tua ahikom kong pai ciangin ama ngamtatna theampo: ko thu a cizathuai a hong sonte le a leilotna teng ka pholaak tu hi! Ahihang tua teng bek hi ngawl lai hi; Tapidaw suapuite hong pai ciangin saang nuam ngawlin
3John1:11 Ka it ka lawmpa awng
3John1:12 Demetrius sia ngual theampo in phat son hi; thumaan thutak mama in ama phat son hi. Tuaciang ko zongh in tetti ka pang thua uh a
3John1:13 Kong son nop tam mama om ahihang laikung laite taw kong at nuam bua hi.
3John1:14 No taw kimu pal tu in lametna ka nei a
3John1:15 Thinnopna nga tavun. Na ngualtamhte theampo in nuksetna kam hong thaak hi. Ko ii lawm teng zongh maitang kisi in na nukset sak vun.
Jude1:1 Jesus Christ ii naseam
Jude1:2 Hesuakna
Jude1:3 Ka it lawmte awng
Jude1:4 Pathian a nei ngawl mihing pawlkhatte ei sungah hong tum ku ahikom
Jude1:5 Na heaksa uh ahitazong
Jude1:6 Amate thuneina ciaciang sungah a om po ngawl
Jude1:7 Sodom
Jude1:8 Tuasia bangma in hi mihingte in amate ii pumpi mama a khialsak tu mukholnate nei a; amate in Pathian ii thuneina zawngsakin
Jude1:9 Vantunglalangte sung pan a lianbel Michael zongh in hi bangin ngamta ngawl hi. Moses luanghawm sia Doaimangpa taw a kituu laitakin
Jude1:10 Ahihang hi mite in a tel ngawl nate sia nunau in
Jude1:11 Amate atu in bangza in lauhuai ziam! Amate in Cain ii lampi tawn uh hi. Balaam khial bangma in
Jude1:12 Amate sia a maizumhuai neakna dawnna taw ngualnuamin om uh a
Jude1:13 Amate sia tuipi sung a
Jude1:14 Adam suan a khang salina
Jude1:15 mihingte theampo tungah thutanna vawt tu le
Jude1:16 Hi mihingte in a tawntungin
Jude1:17 Ahihang lawmte awng
Jude1:18 Amate in “Ni tawpkhak hun hong thet ciangin
Jude1:19 Hi mihingte in kikhenna a piangsakte hi a
Jude1:20 Ahihang no
Jude1:21 tuaciang
Jude1:22 A um tatak zo ngawlte tungah hesuakna na lak tavun;
Jude1:23 midangte sia meikuang sung pan dokin
Jude1:24 Tu in na puk ngawl natu in
Jude1:25 ama bek Pathian ahi ih Ngumpa tungah ih Topa Jesus Christ tungtawnin
Revelation1:1 Hi laibu sia Jesus Christ ii pualaak thute a kitepteena ahi hi. Hai ngawlin
Revelation1:2 tuaciang John in a mu theampo son siat hi. Hisia in Pathian ii thupuak le Jesus Christ ii a pualaak thumaante huvau thukona ahi hi.
Revelation1:3 Hi thubu sungah a ki at laite a simte le maisang thu kisonkholna kammal a zuite in mihing lungdamte ahi hi! Banghang ziam cile hi thute hong tun tu hun hong nai zo hi.
Revelation1:4 Asia ngamkhen sung a om pawlpi salite tungah
Revelation1:5 a thumaan tetti hi a
Revelation1:6 tuaciangin eite sia a Pathian le a Pa atu a seam tu in thiampi in hong vawt hi. Jesus Christ tungah minthanna le vaangletna sia a tawntung a tawntungin om tahen! Amen.
Revelation1:7 En vun

Revelation2:1 “Ephesus khua Pawlpi ii vantunglalang tungah hi bangin at in: “Hisia in a khut ziatsang ah aksi sali toai a
Revelation2:2 Na sep teng kong he hi; bangza in haksa mama in naseam a
Revelation2:3 Note na thin uh uai a
Revelation2:4 Ahihang note kong mawsakna khat sia hi thu ahi hi. A masa a nong it uh bangin
Revelation2:5 Bangza dongin kiamsuk na hi uh sia ngaisun vun! Na mawnate uh panin kisiik vun a

Revelation2:9 Na ngimna teng kong he hi; zawng hi ci in kong he hi — ahihang a tatak sia hau nu hi! Jew te khu hi a ci theamte ii no hong siatsonnate ka he hi; amate sia Satan ii neisa honkhat ahi uh hi.
Revelation2:10 Na thuak lai tute a bang po ahizong
Revelation2:11 “Bil na nei uh le pawlpite tungah Thaa thusonnate ngai vun! “Zawna a ngate niivei thina in a susia buatu hi.

Revelation2:13 Satan ii kumpi tokhum a ngakna munah na teen uh kong he hi. A thumaan ka tetti Antipas sia Satan teenna tua munah a kithalup hun dongin
Revelation2:14 Ahihang kong mawsiat nopna pawlkhat om hi: milim biakna an a neak natu le numei le pa paktat natu a kaizotna taw Israel te mawna sung a thengsak Balak tungah thu a hil Balaam thuhilna a zui pawlkhat na om uh hi.
Revelation2:15 Tuasia bangma in Nicolaitans hilna a zui zongh na om uh hi.
Revelation2:16 Tu in na mawnate uh pan kisiik kik vun! Na kisiik kik bua uh le ka kam sung pan a pusuak namsau taw tua mihingte a sim tu in
Revelation2:17 “Bil na nei uh le pawlpite tungah Thaa thusonnate ngai vun! “Zawna a nga mihingte tungah a kiseal manna an pawlkhat ka pia tu hi. Amate khat tek tungah

Revelation16:3 Tua zawkciang vantunglalang a niina sia in a khawbeam sia tuipi tungah sungsuk hi. Tui sia mithi khat ii chisan bang suak a tuipi sungah nuntakna a neite theampo thi siat hi.

Revelation20:5 (Kum tulkhat a cin mateng in

Revelation20:7 Kum tulkhat a bo zawkciang
Revelation20:8 leitung mun theampo ah a kithethaang Gog le Magog minamte theam tu in pai tu hi. Satan in tuate theampo sia ngalsim tu in hong kaikhawm tu a
Revelation20:9 Amate leitung bup ah kizelin
Revelation20:10 Tua zawkciang amate a theam Doaimangpa sia nganhing le leilot kamsaangpa kivawkna meili le kaan sungah kivawk hi; tuaciangin amate sia sun taw zan taw a tawntung a tawntung ngim kipia tu hi.
